# Script Case Studies Source Snapshot

Generated from the workspace Scripts folder. These are copied here for documentation analysis only. The live files in `Scripts` were not edited.

## AimedShot.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - Firing at innocent targets will cost the player $200.
//
//******************************************************************************************

object AimedShot : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	AimedShot()
	{
		SetIcon("shoot");
		SetCursor("shoot");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SHOOTABLE | RESTRICT_NOTINJURED);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetKeepAsCurrentCommand(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		Range = 2048.f;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid() || Caller->GetEquipment() != EQUIP_RIFLE || !Caller->IsAiming())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid() || Caller->GetEquipment() != EQUIP_RIFLE || !Caller->IsAiming())
			return false;

		if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(Target) > Range)
			return false;
		
		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_PERSON)
		{	
			// check if target is valid target to aim at
			Person t(Target);
			if (t.IsValid() && t.GetEnteredHouseID() == p.GetEnteredHouseID())
			{
				Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				return true;
			}
		}
		
		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.IsFlagSet(OF_SHOOTABLE) && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			{
				if ((v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC) && !v.IsOnGround())
					return false;
				Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				return true;
			}
		}
				
		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_OBJECT)
		{
			GameObject o(Target);
			if(o.IsValid() && o.IsFlagSet(OF_SHOOTABLE) && o.GetParentHouseID() == p.GetEnteredHouseID())
			{
				Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				return true;
			}				
		}
				
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person t(Target);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (t.GetRole() != ROLE_GANGSTER && v.GetVehicleType() != VT_GANGSTER_GETAWAY)
		{
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			int NewMoney = Money - 200;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
		}
		Caller->PushActionShoot(ACTION_INSERT, Target);
	}
};

```

## arrest.script

```cpp
//**************************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.2#										
//												
// 		Adds: - Priority added.
//			  - Radio commands added.				
//												
//**************************************************************************************************

const char SND_FOOTPURSUIT1[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/pd_footpursuit1.wav";
const char SND_FOOTPURSUIT2[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/pd_footpursuit2.wav";
const char SND_CUSTODY[]					= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/pd_custody.wav";

object Arrest : CommandScript
{
	Arrest()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_ARREST);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTINJURED | RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED | RESTRICT_NOTLINKED);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_NONIJURED_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsValid() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsPhysicsSimulationEnabled())
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		return !p.IsLinkedWithPerson();
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() ||  Caller->IsEquipped() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID() )
			return false;
	
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsValid() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		Person t(Target);
		if(!t.IsValid() || t.GetState() != PERSONSTATE_NORMAL)
			return false;

		if(t.GetRole() == ROLE_GANGSTER)
			SetPriority(800);

		if (Input::PriorityKeyPressed())
			SetPriority(2000);	
			
		return (t.GetRole() != ROLE_ANIMAL && t.GetRole() != ROLE_SQUAD);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_FOLLOW);
			Person t(Target);
			bool fight = (t.GetRole() == ROLE_GANGSTER);
			if (fight && t.IsFleeing() && t.IsMoving() && !t.IsArrested() && !t.IsInjured() && t.IsValid())
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)
					Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_FOOTPURSUIT1, Caller->GetPosition());
				else
					Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_FOOTPURSUIT2, Caller->GetPosition());				
			}
			if (t.HasName("mike") && t.GetUserData() == 0)
			{
				Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", Target, 1, false);
				fight = true;
			}
			if (t.HasName("voodoo") && t.GetUserData() == 0)
				Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", Target, 3, false);
			if (t.HasName("mikesphotos") && t.GetUserData() == 0)
				Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", Target, 4, false);
			Caller->PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, Target, fight);
			if (fight)
			{
				Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", Target, 5, false);
			}
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			Person t(Target);
			t.SetUserData(1);
			t.SetRole(ROLE_GANGSTER);
			t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_FISTFIGHT);
			VehicleList list("mikecar");
			if(list.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
			{
				Vehicle v = list.GetVehicle(0);
				if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetEnergy() >= 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy() && !v.IsSmoking() && !v.IsCarried())
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("You have found MikeyPI. A vehicle will be destroyed!");
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 3.f);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", &v, 2, false);
				} else
					Mission::PlayHint("You have found MikeyPI!");
			}
		}
		if (childID == 2)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			v.SetSmoking(true);
		}
		if (childID == 3)
		{
			Target->SetUserData(1);
			Mission::PlayHint("You have found Voodoo_Operator. Leave him alone, he's busy making the same model for the last 3 years.");
		}
		if (childID == 4)
		{
			Person t(Target);
			Target->SetUserData(1);
			Mission::PlayHint("MikesPhotos: Stop with the Misinformation now!");
			//t.PushActionRemoveEquipment(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			t.PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_NEWLIST, Caller, EQUIP_NONE);
			t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "demonstrate");
			t.PlaceObjectInRightHand("Equipment/demosign01.V3O");
		}
		if (childID == 5)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Person t(Target);
			if (p.IsValid() && p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && t.GetRole() == ROLE_GANGSTER && t.IsValid() && t.IsArrested())
			{
				t.PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_CUSTODY, p.GetPosition());
				t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_CIVILUNARMED);
			}
		}
	}	
};

```

## attachfirehose.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
	Attach fire hose script for the New York City mod by MikeyPI and Hoppah
	Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
	Quint script by itchyboy for West Falls mod - USE IN OTHER MODS IS NOT ALLOWED!
********************************************************************************************/

const char CHILD_WATER_SUPPLY[] 		= "water_supply";

object AttachFireHose : CommandScript
{
	AttachFireHose()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_FIREHOSE);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_FIREHOSE);
		//SetRestrictions2(RESTRICT2_ISHYDRANTORSELF);		
		SetPriority(220);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		return (Caller->GetFirehoseID() == 0 || Caller->GetFirehoseID() != 0);
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID()))
			return false;			
		if(Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;
		SetCursor("AttachFireHose");
		if (Caller->GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Caller->GetFirehoseID() != 0 && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			GameObject hydrant = Caller->GetHydrant();		
 			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsChildEnabled(CHILD_WATER_SUPPLY) && v.GetEnergy() > 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy())
			{
				if (hydrant.GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT && v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn"))
					return false;		//cannot install if vehicle has existing supply line from hydrant
				else if ((hydrant.GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT || hydrant.GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE) && (v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn") || v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyFromVehicle")))		//cannot install hose if vehicle already has connection from another vehicle
					return false;		//cannot install any supply line if target vehicle is receiving any water supply
				else
				{
					SetCursor("attachwatersupply");
					return true;
				}
			}
		}
		else if(Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->GetFirehoseID() == 0)
		{
 			Vehicle v(Target);
			if(v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF && v.GetEnergy() > 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy() && v.IsConnectorFree())
				return true;
			else if(v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK && v.HasCommand("DummyIsQuint") && v.GetEnergy() > 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy())	//for quints
				return true;
		}
		else if(Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT && Caller->GetFirehoseID() == 0)
		{
			GameObject obj(Target);
			if(obj.IsHydrant() && !obj.IsHydrantInUse() && !obj.HasCommand("PcmdHydrant"))
				return true;
			return false;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if (Caller->GetFirehoseID() != 0)
		{
			GameObject hydrant = Caller->GetHydrant();		
 			Vehicle v(Target);	
			if (checkTanker(Vehicle(&hydrant)) && p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
			{
				p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", false);
				p.EnableCommand("Cool", false);
				p.EnableAutoTarget(false);
			}
		}
		else if (!p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
		{
			p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", true);
			p.EnableCommand("Cool", true);
			p.EnableAutoTarget(true);
		}
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.HasCommand("DummyHasSiren") && v.HasCommand("VcmdAutoSirenOff"))
			Game::ExecuteCommand("DummyDisableSiren", &v, &v);
		if (childID == 0) //Initiate command
		{
			if (Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Caller->GetFirehoseID() != 0 && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, v.GetChildPosition(CHILD_WATER_SUPPLY));
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, v.GetChildPosition(CHILD_WATER_SUPPLY));
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "AttachFireHose", Target, 1, false);			
			}
			else if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT)
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_FREE_CONNECTOR);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdHydrant", Target, 100, false);
				p.PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, childID, 1.0f);			
			}
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF && (v.HasCommand("EmptyCar") || v.HasName("extend_wye") || v.HasName("extend_hose")))
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_FREE_CONNECTOR);
				p.PushActionCheckFreeConnector(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				p.PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, childID, 1.0f);
				if (checkTanker(&v))
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "AttachFireHose", Target, 5, false);				
			}
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK && v.HasCommand("DummyIsQuint"))
			{
				Vector TargetPos = v.GetChildPosition("pump1");
				v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyQuintPumpOn", &v, 0, false);
			}
		}
		if (childID == 1) //Install water supply line
		{
			if(v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn") || v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyFromVehicle"))
				return;
			GameObject hydrant = Caller->GetHydrant();
			if (hydrant.GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT)
			{
				v.AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn");
				Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Supply line hose attached to vehicle", 2.f);
			}
			else
			{
				v.AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyFromVehicle");
				Vehicle(&hydrant).AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");
				if (checkTanker(Vehicle(&hydrant)))
					Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Supply line hose from water tanker attached to vehicle", 2.f);
				else
					Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Supply line hose from engine attached to vehicle", 2.f);
			}
			float r[9];
			p.SetPosition(v.GetChildPosition(CHILD_WATER_SUPPLY));
			p.SetAnimation("none");
			Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/equipment/hosecoupling.wav", v.GetChildPosition(CHILD_WATER_SUPPLY));
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, 100000.0f);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_ATOM, 100000.0f);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_CHEM, 100000.0f);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_BIO, 100000.0f);
			p.SetUserData(v.GetID());
			Person n = Game::CreatePerson(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), Caller->GetName());
			p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			Vector PerPos = p.GetPosition();
			if (n.IsValid())
			{
				Game::FindFreePosition(&n, PerPos, 100.f);
				n.SetPosition(PerPos);
				n.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				n.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
				n.SetHealth(p.GetHealth());
				n.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				if(p.IsSelected())
				{
					n.Select();
					p.Deselect();
				}
				p.EnableAutoTarget(false);
				if (hydrant.GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
					p.AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");
				else
					p.AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn");
				p.SetFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
				if (p.HasCommand("VcmdRapidDeployment"))
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("VcmdRapidDeployment");
					if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF)
					{
						n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &v, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
						n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
						n.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyEquipmentCommands", &n, 3, false);
						n.PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, &v, EQUIP_FIREHOSE);
						n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &v, TARGET_FREE_CONNECTOR);
						n.PushActionCheckFreeConnector(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
						n.PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, &v, childID, 1.0f);
					}
					else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK && v.IsBasketEmpty())
						n.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "EnterBasket", &v, 0, false);
				}
			}
		}
		if (childID == 2) //Remove water supply line
		{
			float r[9];
			p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			GameObjectList list = v.GetObjectsInRange(400.0f, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				Person n = (Person*)list.GetObject(i);
				if (n.GetUserData() == v.GetID() && (n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn") || n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle")))
				{
					bool waterSupplyToVehicle = n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");
					bool waterSupply = n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn");
					if (StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), p.GetPrototypeFileName()) != 0)
					{
						n.SetEquipment(EQUIP_FIREHOSE);
						n.ChangePrototype(p.GetPrototypeFileName());
						if (waterSupply)				n.AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn");
						if (waterSupplyToVehicle)		n.AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");
					}
					n.ClearFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
					n.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, "DummyEquipmentCommands", &n, 3, false);
					n.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
					if (p.IsSelected())
						n.Select();
					n.SetUserData(0);
					if (n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn"))
					{
						n.RemoveCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn");
						if (v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn"))			v.RemoveCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn");
					}
					else
					{		if (v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyFromVehicle"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWaterSupplyFromVehicle");		}
					n.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, 0.0f);
					n.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_ATOM, 0.0f);
					n.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_CHEM, 0.0f);
					n.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_BIO, 0.0f);
					n.SetPosition(p.GetPosition());
					n.SetRotation(&p);
					if (p.HasCommand("VcmdRapidDeployment"))
					{
						if (n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle") && p.HasCommand("VcmdRapidDeployment"))
							n.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "RemoveFirehose", &v, 3, false);
						else if (p.HasCommand("VcmdRapidDeployment"))
							n.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "RemoveFirehose", &v, 1, false);
					}
					if (n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle"))
					{
						GameObject hydrant = n.GetHydrant();
						Vehicle hy(&hydrant);
						if (hy.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle"))
						{
							hy.RemoveCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");
							n.RemoveCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");
						}
					} else
						n.EnableAutoTarget(true);
					p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				}				
			}			
		}
		if (childID == 3)
		{
			p.AssignCommand("VcmdRapidDeployment");
		}
		if (childID == 4)
		{
			if (p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE)
				p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, v.GetChildPosition("water_supply"));
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "AttachFireHose", &v, 3, false);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "AttachFireHose", &v, 2, false);		
		}
		if (childID == 5)	//disable extinguish and cool commands for tanker guy
		{
			p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", false);
			p.EnableCommand("Cool", false);
			p.EnableAutoTarget(false);
			p.ClearActions();
		}
	}

	bool checkTanker(Vehicle pV)
	{
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 4.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/water_tender.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/water_tender2.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 5.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 5_1.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 USFS/usfs_cnf_wt3.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 USFS/usfs_cnf_wt31.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 6.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 7.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 8.e4p") == 0)
			return true;
		if (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 9.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		return false;
	}
};

object DummyQuintPumpOn : CommandScript
{
 	DummyQuintPumpOn()
 	{
		SetGroupID(20);
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			char pumpName[22];		snprintf(pumpName, 22, "%d_quintPump", v.GetID());
			Vehicle pump;

			v.SetChildEnabled("pump1", false);		v.SetChildEnabled("pump2", false);
			v.SetChildEnabled("pump3", false);		v.SetChildEnabled("pump4", false);
			if (!v.HasCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn"))		//create invisible pumps if none exist for the vehicle
			{
				v.AssignCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn");
				if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Truck 5.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Truck 8.e4p") == 0)
					pump = Game::CreateVehicle("mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/quint_truck5_connection.e4p", pumpName);
				else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Quint 4.e4p") == 0)
					pump = Game::CreateVehicle("mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/quint_truck4_connection.e4p", pumpName);
				else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Truck 7.e4p") == 0)
					pump = Game::CreateVehicle("mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/quint_truck7_connection.e4p", pumpName);
				if (pump.IsValid())		//important check to delay the script so that the pump is recognized
				{
					pump.SetUserData(v.GetID());
					pump.SetPosition(v.GetPosition());
						float r[9];
						v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					pump.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					pump.SetCommandable(false);
					pump.SetSelectable(false);
					pump.SetPlayerMP(v.GetPlayerMP());

					pump.AssignCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn");		//important to recognize the pumps in other scripts
					pump.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, "DummyQuintPumpOn", &v, 99, false);		//check ladder if it is valid

					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &pump, TARGET_FREE_CONNECTOR);
					p.PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, &pump, childID, 1.0f);
				}
			}
			else	//if vehicle pumps already exist for vehicle
			{
				VehicleList list(pumpName);
				if (list.GetNumVehicles() == 0)
				{
					if (v.HasCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn");
					return;
				}
				for (int i=0; i<list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
				{		pump = list.GetVehicle(i);		}

				if (pump.IsValid())
				{
					if (pump.IsConnectorFree())
					{
						v.AssignCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn");
						pump.SetUserData(v.GetID());
						pump.AssignCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn");		//important to recognize the pumps in other scripts
						pump.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, "DummyQuintPumpOn", &v, 99, false);		//check ladder if it is valid

						p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &pump, TARGET_FREE_CONNECTOR);
						p.PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, &pump, childID, 1.0f);
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if (childID == 1)		//for removeFireHose: delete invisible pumps
		{
			Vehicle pump(Target);
			if (!pump.IsInstalled())		//no more hoses connected to the invisible pump
			{
				int ID = Math::atoi(pump.GetName());
				Actor act = Game::GetActor(ID);
				if (act.IsValid() && act.GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
				{
					Vehicle v(&act);
					v.RemoveCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn");
					v.SetChildEnabled("pump1", true);		v.SetChildEnabled("pump2", true);
					v.SetChildEnabled("pump3", true);		v.SetChildEnabled("pump4", true);
				}
				pump.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.f);
				pump.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
			}
		}
		if (childID == 99)		//check ladder if it is valid, not burning and not destroyed
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			Vehicle pump(Caller);
			if (!v.IsValid() || v.GetEnergy() <= 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy() || v.IsDestroyed())
			{
				pump.SetSmoking(true);		//IMPORTANT to avoid CTD
				pump.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
				pump.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				return;
			}
		}
	}
};

```

## cool.script

```cpp
// PersonCommand_CoolFireObject.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: Cool
object Cool : CommandScript
{
	bool useDLKlogic;

	Cool()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_COOLABLE | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetKeepAsCurrentCommand(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_FIRE_EXTINGUISHER | EQUIP_FIREHOSE);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_COOLABLE_OBJECTS);
		SetNeedsConnectedHose(CFN_NEEDED);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE || Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIRE_EXTINGUISHER || (Caller->GetEquipment()== EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Caller->GetFirehoseID() != 0))
			return Game::ExistsCoolableobject();
		return false;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if(Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		GameObject o(Target);
		if (!o.IsValid() || o.GetNumActiveFireChilds() == 0)
			return false;
			
		if (o.GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if ((v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC) && !v.IsOnGround())
			   	return false;
		}
			
		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON )
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			// if (p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && o.GetParentHouseID() > -1)
				// return false;
			if (p.CanUseDLKCannon())
			{
				useDLKlogic = true;
				if (o.GetNumActiveFireChilds() == 0)
					return false;
				if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != -1 && p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != Target->GetID())
					return false;
				if (p.GetEnteredCarID() == Target->GetID())
					return false;
			
				if (!p.CheckDLKExtinguishDistance(Target))
					return false;
			
				if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != -1/* && o.IsBurningInside()*/)
					return false;
				else if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() == -1 && o.IsBurningOutside())
					return false;
			
				return true;
			}
			if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			   	return false;
		}
		
		useDLKlogic = false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE || Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIRE_EXTINGUISHER || Caller->GetEquipment()== EQUIP_FIREHOSE)
		{
			if (Caller->GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Caller->GetFirehoseID() == 0)
				return false;
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Target)
			return;

		if (useDLKlogic)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			
			if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != -1)
			{
				Caller->PushActionCannonExtinguish(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, 100.f, true);
			}
			else
			{
				Caller->PushActionTurnBase(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
				Caller->PushActionCannonExtinguish(ACTION_APPEND, Target, 100.f, true);
			}
			return;
		}

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			GameObject o(Target);
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if (v.IsCurrentAnimation("activate"))
			{
				int UnitID = v.GetID();	
				GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix("engine_water_cannon");
				for(int i = 0; i < l1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
				{
					if (l1.GetObject(i)->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
					{
						Vehicle obj(l1.GetObject(i));
						if (obj.GetUserData() == UnitID && obj.CheckExtinguishDistance(o) && obj.GetVehicleType()==VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF)
							obj.PushActionCool(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
					}
				}
				return;
			}		
			else if (!v.CheckExtinguishDistance(o))
			{
				if (v.HasCommand("VcmdRotateLightmast"))
					return;
				if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
					Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_ENGINE_EXTINGUISH);
				else
					Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_EXTINGUISH);
				Caller->PushActionCool(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
			else
			    Caller->PushActionCool(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
		}
		else if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
		{	
			if (Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_ENGINE_EXTINGUISH);
				Vector Pos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_ENGINE);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Pos);
			}
			else
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_EXTINGUISH);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
		}
		Caller->PushActionCool(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
	}
	
};
```

## deinstall.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.2#
//
// 		Changes: - De-activates warninglights.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS[]		= "DummyHasWarningLights";

object Deinstall: CommandScript
{
	Deinstall()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_INSTALL);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		return v.IsInstalled();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (!v.IsInstalled() || v.IsUplifted() || v.IsUplifting() || !v.IsBasketEmpty())
			return false;
		

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		v.PushActionDeinstall(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK)
		{
			//v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
			if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
			{
				v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
				v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS); 
			}	
		}
	}
};

```

//Vehicle names
const char NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE01[]			= "bcfd_ambulance01";
const char NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE02[]			= "bcfd_ambulance02";

const char NAME_BCFD_CHIEF[]				= "bcfd_chief";
const char NAME_BCFD_PARAMEDIC[]				= "bcfd_paramedic";
const char NAME_BCFD_SUPERVISOR[]				= "bcfd_supervisor";
const char NAME_BCFD_ENGINE01[]			= "bcfd_engine01";
const char NAME_BCFD_ENGINE02[]			= "bcfd_engine02";
const char NAME_BCFD_ENGINE03[]			= "bcfd_engine03";

const char NAME_BCFD_HRESCUE[]			= "bcfd_heavy_rescue";
const char NAME_BCFD_HAZMAT[]			= "bcfd_hazmat";
const char NAME_BCFD_TANKER01[]			= "bcfd_tanker01";
const char NAME_BCFD_TANKER02[]			= "bcfd_tanker02";
const char NAME_BCFD_MARINE[]			= "bcfd_marine";
const char NAME_BCFD_K9_VAN[]			= "bcfd_rescue_dog";
const char NAME_USFS_UTILITY[]			= "usfs_pickup";
const char NAME_USFS_ENGINE[]			= "usfs_engine";

const char VO_SQUAD01[]					= "fs_squad01";
const char VO_HOSPITAL_SQUAD01[]		= "hospital_squad01";

//Spawn VO's
const char VO_SPAWN01[] 			= "spawn01";
const char VO_SPAWN02[] 			= "spawn02";
const char VO_SPAWN03[] 			= "spawn03";
const char VO_SPAWN04[] 			= "spawn04";
const char VO_SPAWN05[] 			= "spawn05";
const char VO_SPAWN06[] 			= "spawn06";
const char VO_SPAWN07[] 			= "spawn07";
const char VO_SPAWN08[] 			= "spawn08";
const char VO_SPAWN09[] 			= "spawn09";

//Rotation VO's
const char VO_ROTATE01[] 			= "rotate01";
const char VO_ROTATE02[] 			= "rotate02";
const char VO_ROTATE03[] 			= "rotate03";
const char VO_ROTATE04[] 			= "rotate04";
const char VO_ROTATE05[] 			= "rotate05";
const char VO_ROTATE06[] 			= "rotate06";
const char VO_ROTATE07[] 			= "rotate07";
const char VO_ROTATE08[] 			= "rotate08";
const char VO_ROTATE09[] 			= "rotate09";

const char VO_SPAWN_ALL[] 			= "spawn_all";
const char VO_SPAWN_AMBU[] 			= "spawn_ambu";
const char VO_SPAWN_FD[] 			= "spawn_firedept";
const char VO_SPAWN_ALLR[] 			= "spawn_allr";
const char VO_SPAWN_AMBUR[] 			= "spawn_ambur";
const char VO_SPAWN_FDR[] 			= "spawn_firedeptr";

const char UNNAMED[] 				= "Unnamed";

int DummyGroup = 23;

Vector CommandPosEngine1; //making CommandPos1 a global variable
Vector CommandPosEngine2; //making CommandPos2 a global variable
Vector CommandPosBrush; //making CommandPos3 a global variable

object PcmdCallMPFDChief : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallMPFDChief()
	{
		SetIcon("callbcvehicle");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_CHIEF) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_BATTALION)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01)) //mpfd station
			{
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					bool HasChief = false;
					GameObjectList l1;
					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_BATTALION, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						GameObjectList pl1;
						Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01, pl1, ACTOR_PERSON);
						if(pl1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
						{
							for(int i=0; i < pl1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
							{
								GameObject *obj = pl1.GetObject(i);
								if(StrCompare(obj->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
								{
									HasChief = true;
									System::Log("MPFD battalion chief found");	
								}
							}
							if(!HasChief)
							{
								System::Log("No MPFD battalion chief found");
								Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCHIEF);
								return;
							}
						}
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 0, false);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 18.f);
				}
				/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDChief03OnMap = false;
			VehicleList c3(NAME_MPFD_CHIEF);

			if(c3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDChief03OnMap = true;
			else
				FDChief03OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy MPFD chief");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 900)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCHIEF);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 900;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;

			if(!FDChief03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_MPFD_CHIEF, NAME_MPFD_CHIEF);

			else if(FDChief03OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCHIEF);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(1);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 8.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 7.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("MPFD Chief dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBCFDChief : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBCFDChief()
	{
		SetIcon("callbcvehicle");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDChief01OnMap = false;
			VehicleList c1(NAME_BCFD_CHIEF);

			if(c1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDChief01OnMap = true;
			else
				FDChief01OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD chief");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 900)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCHIEF);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 900;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;

			if(!FDChief01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF, NAME_BCFD_CHIEF);

			else if(FDChief01OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCHIEF);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(1);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 13.0f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 11.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Chief dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBCFDEMSCaptain : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBCFDEMSCaptain()
	{
		SetIcon("callemscar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_AMBULANCE_NEF, VT_AMBULANCE_NEF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_PARAMEDIC) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_SUPERVISOR) == 0 && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDChief02OnMap = false;
			bool FDChief04OnMap = false;

			VehicleList c2(NAME_BCFD_PARAMEDIC);
			VehicleList c4(NAME_BCFD_SUPERVISOR);

			if(c2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDChief02OnMap = true;
			else
				FDChief02OnMap = false;

			if(c4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDChief04OnMap = true;
			else
				FDChief04OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
					
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD paramedic captain");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 900)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 900;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;

			if(!FDChief02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_PARAMEDIC, NAME_BCFD_PARAMEDIC);

			else if(FDChief02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_SUPERVISOR, NAME_BCFD_SUPERVISOR);

			else if(FDChief02OnMap && FDChief04OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_EMS, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(1);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.5f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 13.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Chief dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallAmbulance1 : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallAmbulance1()
	{
		SetIcon("callambulance1");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_AMBULANCE_RTW, VT_AMBULANCE_RTW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE01) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE02) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE03) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE04) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDAmbulance01OnMap = false;
			bool FDAmbulance02OnMap = false;
			bool FDAmbulance03OnMap = false;
			bool FDAmbulance04OnMap = false;

			VehicleList a1(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE01);
			VehicleList a2(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE02);
			VehicleList a3(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE03);
			VehicleList a4(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE04);

			if(a1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance01OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance01OnMap = false;

			if(a2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance02OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance02OnMap = false;

			if(a3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance03OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance03OnMap = false;	

			if(a4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance04OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance04OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE05);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN08);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE08);
				}
				break;
				
				case 2:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD ambulance");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 900)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 900;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!FDAmbulance01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE01, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE01);

			else if(!FDAmbulance02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE02, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE02);

			else if(!FDAmbulance03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE03, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE03);

			else if(!FDAmbulance04OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE04, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE04);

			else if(FDAmbulance01OnMap && FDAmbulance02OnMap && FDAmbulance03OnMap && FDAmbulance04OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_EMT, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_EMT, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			p1.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
			p2.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 10.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToHospital"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToHospital");
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdPatrolAmbulance"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdPatrolAmbulance");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Ambulance dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallAmbulance2 : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallAmbulance2()
	{
		SetIcon("callambulance2");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;
			
		if(p.HasCommand("DUMMYHasStrether") || p.HasCommand("DUMMY_HasSpineboard"))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if(p.HasCommand("DUMMYHasStrether") || p.HasCommand("DUMMY_HasSpineboard"))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALS, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALS, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_AMBULANCE_RTW, VT_AMBULANCE_RTW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE03) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CAS_AMBULANCE) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_HOSPITAL_SQUAD01)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_HOSPITAL_SQUAD01))
			{
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList gl1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_CAS_AMBULANCE, gl1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(gl1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = gl1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CAS_AMBULANCE) == 0)
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.f);
					}
				}
				/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

				float dx = 400.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);	

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);	
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				System::Log("CAS ambulance dispatched");
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_CAS_DIPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool PrivateAmbulance01OnMap = false;
			bool PrivateAmbulance02OnMap = false;
			bool PrivateAmbulance03OnMap = false;

			VehicleList a5(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01);
			VehicleList a6(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02);
			VehicleList a7(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE03);

			if(a5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				PrivateAmbulance01OnMap = true;
			else
				PrivateAmbulance01OnMap = false;

			if(a6.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				PrivateAmbulance02OnMap = true;
			else
				PrivateAmbulance02OnMap = false;

			if(a7.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				PrivateAmbulance03OnMap = true;
			else
				PrivateAmbulance03OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN07);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE07);
				}
				break;
				
				case 2:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy Private ambulance");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 1200)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 1200;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!PrivateAmbulance01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01, NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01);

			else if(!PrivateAmbulance02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02, NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02);

			else if(!PrivateAmbulance03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE03, NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE03);

			else if(PrivateAmbulance01OnMap && PrivateAmbulance02OnMap && PrivateAmbulance03OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PRIVATE_PM, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PRIVATE_PM, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			p1.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
			p2.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 10.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToHospital"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToHospital");
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdPatrolAmbulance"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdPatrolAmbulance");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("Private Ambulance dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallAmbulance : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallAmbulance()
	{
		SetIcon("callambulance1");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_AMBULANCE_RTW, VT_AMBULANCE_RTW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED) && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_HOSPITAL_SQUAD01)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_HOSPITAL_SQUAD01))
			{
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList gl1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_CAS_AMBULANCE, gl1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(gl1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = gl1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CAS_AMBULANCE) == 0)
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.f);
					}
				}
				/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

				float dx = 400.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);	

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
