				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);	
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				System::Log("CAS ambulance dispatched");
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_CAS_DIPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDAmbulance01OnMap = false;
			bool FDAmbulance02OnMap = false;
			bool FDAmbulance03OnMap = false;
			bool FDAmbulance04OnMap = false;
			bool PrivateAmbulance01OnMap = false;
			bool PrivateAmbulance02OnMap = false;
			bool PrivateAmbulance03OnMap = false;

			VehicleList a1(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE01);
			VehicleList a2(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE02);
			VehicleList a3(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE03);
			VehicleList a4(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE04);
			VehicleList a5(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01);
			VehicleList a6(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02);
			VehicleList a7(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE03);

			if(a1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance01OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance01OnMap = false;

			if(a2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance02OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance02OnMap = false;

			if(a3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance03OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance03OnMap = false;	

			if(a4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDAmbulance04OnMap = true;
			else
				FDAmbulance04OnMap = false;
				
			if(a5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				PrivateAmbulance01OnMap = true;
			else
				PrivateAmbulance01OnMap = false;

			if(a6.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				PrivateAmbulance02OnMap = true;
			else
				PrivateAmbulance02OnMap = false;

			if(a7.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				PrivateAmbulance03OnMap = true;
			else
				PrivateAmbulance03OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN07);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE07);
				}
				break;
				
				case 2:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}
			
			System::Log("Buy Assorted ambulance");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 1200)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 1200;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			VehicleList a1(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE01);
			VehicleList a2(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE02);
			VehicleList a3(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE03);
			VehicleList a4(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE04);
			VehicleList a5(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01);
			VehicleList a6(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02);
			VehicleList a7(NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE03);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!FDAmbulance01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE01, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE01);

			else if(!FDAmbulance02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE02, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE02);

			else if(!FDAmbulance03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE03, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE03);

			else if(!FDAmbulance04OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE04, NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE04);

			else if(!PrivateAmbulance01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01, NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01);

			else if(!PrivateAmbulance02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02, NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02);

			else if(!PrivateAmbulance03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01, NAME_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE03);

			else if(FDAmbulance01OnMap && FDAmbulance02OnMap && FDAmbulance03OnMap && FDAmbulance04OnMap && PrivateAmbulance01OnMap && PrivateAmbulance02OnMap && PrivateAmbulance03OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}

			if(n.HasName(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE01) || n.HasName(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE02) || n.HasName(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE03) || n.HasName(NAME_BCFD_AMBULANCE04))
			{
				p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_EMT, UNNAMED);
				p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_EMT, UNNAMED);
			}
			else
			{
				p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PRIVATE_PM, UNNAMED);
				p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PRIVATE_PM, UNNAMED);
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
			p2.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 10.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToHospital"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToHospital");
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdPatrolAmbulance"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdPatrolAmbulance");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("Assorted Ambulance dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallEngine1 : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallEngine1()
	{
		SetIcon("callengine1");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLSE, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLSE, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE01) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE02) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE03) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE04) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE05) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDEngine01OnMap = false;
			bool FDEngine02OnMap = false;
			bool FDEngine03OnMap = false;
			bool FDEngine04OnMap = false;
			bool FDEngine05OnMap = false;

			VehicleList e1(NAME_BCFD_ENGINE01);
			VehicleList e2(NAME_BCFD_ENGINE02);
			VehicleList e3(NAME_BCFD_ENGINE03);
			VehicleList e4(NAME_BCFD_ENGINE04);
			VehicleList e5(NAME_BCFD_ENGINE05);

			if(e1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDEngine01OnMap = true;
			else
				FDEngine01OnMap = false;

			if(e2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDEngine02OnMap = true;
			else
				FDEngine02OnMap = false;

			if(e3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDEngine03OnMap = true;
			else
				FDEngine03OnMap = false;

			if(e4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDEngine04OnMap = true;
			else
				FDEngine04OnMap = false;

			if(e5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDEngine05OnMap = true;
			else
				FDEngine05OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);

				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOENGINE);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD Engine");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 4000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOAMBULANCE);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;
			Person p3;
			Person p4;

			if(!FDEngine01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE01, NAME_BCFD_ENGINE01);

			else if(!FDEngine02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE02, NAME_BCFD_ENGINE02);

			else if(!FDEngine03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE03, NAME_BCFD_ENGINE03);

			else if(!FDEngine04OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE04, NAME_BCFD_ENGINE04);
				
			else if(!FDEngine05OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_ENGINE05, NAME_BCFD_ENGINE05);

			else if(FDEngine01OnMap && FDEngine02OnMap && FDEngine03OnMap && FDEngine04OnMap && FDEngine05OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOENGINE);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			p3 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			p4 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSpeed(9.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p3.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p4.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p3.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p4.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(4);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p3);
			n.AddPassenger(&p4);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%4;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 13.0f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.0f);   break;

				case 3 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 10.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Engine dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallMPFDEngine1 : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallMPFDEngine1()
	{
		SetIcon("callengine1");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		CommandPosEngine1 = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CommandPosEngine1);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALSE, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_ENGINE01) == 0 && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED) && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSESON) && aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CommandPosEngine1.x, CommandPosEngine1.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
				System::Log("Vehicle chosen as backup");
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine1);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			{
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList l1;
					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_ENGINE01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALL_VOL, Caller, 0, false);
				}
				else
				{
					if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
					else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.EnableBlueLights(true);

					GameObjectList gate01a = Game::GetGameObjects(OBJ_GATE01A);  
					for(int i=0; i < gate01a.GetNumObjects(); i++)
						GameObject *gate = gate01a.GetObject(i);
						
					float dx = 750.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
					Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
						float r[9];
						float childr[9];
					v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
					Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
					Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
					Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);	
					
					if (gate->GetUserData() == 0)
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 3, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.2f);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
							v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine1);
					}
					else
					{
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
							v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
	
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine1);
					}
					if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
					{
						v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
						v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
					}
					if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
					{
						v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
						v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
						v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
					}
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				}
				return;
			}
		}
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOENGINE);
		return;
	}
};

object PcmdCallMPFDEngine2 : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallMPFDEngine2()
	{
		SetIcon("callengine2");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		CommandPosEngine2 = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CommandPosEngine2);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALSE, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_ENGINE02) == 0 && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED) && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSESON) && aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CommandPosEngine2.x, CommandPosEngine2.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
				System::Log("Vehicle chosen as backup");
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine2);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			{
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList l1;
					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_ENGINE02, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALL_VOL, Caller, 0, false);
				}
				else
				{
					if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
					else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.EnableBlueLights(true);

					GameObjectList gate02a = Game::GetGameObjects(OBJ_GATE02A);  
					for(int i=0; i < gate02a.GetNumObjects(); i++)
						GameObject *gate = gate02a.GetObject(i);
						
					float dx = 750.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
					Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
						float r[9];
						float childr[9];
					v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
					Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
					Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
					Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);
					
					if (gate->GetUserData() == 0)
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 3, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.2f);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
							v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine2);
					}
					else
					{
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
							v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine2);
					}
					if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
					{
						v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
						v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
					}
					if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
					{
						v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
						v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
						v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
					}
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				}
				return;
			}
		}
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOENGINE);
		return;
	}
};

object PcmdCallMPFDBrush : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallMPFDBrush()
	{
		SetIcon("callusarsquad");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		CommandPosBrush = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CommandPosBrush);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLSE, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLSE, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BRUSH) == 0 && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED) && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSESON) && aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CommandPosBrush.x, CommandPosBrush.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosBrush);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			{
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList l1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_BRUSH, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALL_VOL, Caller, 0, false);
				}
				else
				{
					if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
					else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.EnableBlueLights(true);
						
					GameObjectList gate02a = Game::GetGameObjects(OBJ_GATE02A);  
					for(int i=0; i < gate02a.GetNumObjects(); i++)
						GameObject *gate = gate02a.GetObject(i);	

					float dx = 0.f, dy = -345.f, dz = 0.f;
					Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
						float r[9];
						float childr[9];
					v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
					Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
					Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
					Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.2f);

					if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosBrush);

					if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
					{
						v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
						v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
					}
					if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
					{
						v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
						v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
						v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
					}
					if (v.HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
					{
						v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
						v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
						v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
					}
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				}
				return;
			}
		}
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOENGINE);
		return;
	}
};

object PcmdCallBrushTruck : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBrushTruck()
	{
		SetIcon("callusar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{	
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_BRUSH) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDBrushOnMap = false;
			VehicleList bt1(NAME_BCFD_BRUSH);

			if(bt1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDBrushOnMap = true;
			else
				FDBrushOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOBRUSH);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD Brush Truck");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 1200)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOBRUSH);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 1200;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!FDBrushOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_BRUSH, NAME_BCFD_BRUSH);

			else if(FDBrushOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOBRUSH);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSpeed(11.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 17.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 18.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD BCFD Brush Truck dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallLightForce : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallLightForce()
	{
		SetIcon("calllightforce");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATLIGHTFORCE, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSLIGHTFORCE, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_LADDER) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDLadderOnMap = false;
			VehicleList lf1(NAME_BCFD_LADDER);

			if(lf1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDLadderOnMap = true;
			else
				FDLadderOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOLADDER);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD Ladder Truck");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 4000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOLADDER);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!FDLadderOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_LADDER, NAME_BCFD_LADDER);

			else if(FDLadderOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOLADDER);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSpeed(9.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(4);
			n.SetMaxTransports(2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 14.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.5f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Ladder dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallUSARSquad : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallUSARSquad()
	{
		SetIcon("callusarsquad");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATUSAR, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSUSAR, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_USAR) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_HES) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDLightRescueOnMap = false;
			bool FDHeavyRescueOnMap = false;

			VehicleList r1(NAME_BCFD_LRESCUE);
			VehicleList r2(NAME_BCFD_HRESCUE);

			if(r1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDLightRescueOnMap = true;
			else
				FDLightRescueOnMap = false;

			if(r2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDHeavyRescueOnMap = true;
			else
				FDHeavyRescueOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSAR);
				return;
			}

			bool LightRescue = false;
			if (Input::LCtrlPressed() || Input::RCtrlPressed())
				LightRescue = true;

			System::Log("Buy BCFD Rescue Squad");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 3500)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSAR);
				return;
			}

			else if (Money <= 1500)
				LightRescue = true;

			if (LightRescue)
				int NewMoney = Money - 1500;
			else
				int NewMoney = Money - 3500;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;		

			if(LightRescue)
			{
				if(!FDLightRescueOnMap)
					n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_HES, NAME_BCFD_LRESCUE);

				else if(FDLightRescueOnMap)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSAR);
					return;
				}
				n.SetSpeed(10.0f);
			}
			else
			{
				if(!FDHeavyRescueOnMap)
					n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_USAR, NAME_BCFD_HRESCUE);

				else if(FDHeavyRescueOnMap)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSAR);
					return;
				}
				n.SetSpeed(9.0f);
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USARFF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USARFF, UNNAMED);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);	
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 14.3f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 17.5f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.8f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Rescue Squad dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallHazmat : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallHazmat()
	{
		SetIcon("callhazmatsquad");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATHAZMAT, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSHAZMAT, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_HAZMAT) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDHazmatOnMap = false;
			VehicleList h1(NAME_BCFD_HAZMAT);

			if(h1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDHazmatOnMap = true;
			else
				FDHazmatOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHAZMAT);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD Hazmat Squad");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 4000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHAZMAT);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;
			Person p3;
			Person p4;

			if(!FDHazmatOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_HAZMAT, NAME_BCFD_HAZMAT);

			else if(FDHazmatOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHAZMAT);
				return;
			}
			n.SetSpeed(9.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_HAZMATFF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_HAZMATFF, UNNAMED);
			p3 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_HAZMATFF, UNNAMED);
			p4 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_HAZMATFF, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p3.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p4.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p3.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p4.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(4);
			n.SetMaxTransports(2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p3);
			n.AddPassenger(&p4);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.8f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 13.5f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Hazmat Squad dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBCFDTanker : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBCFDTanker()
	{
		SetIcon("callwatertender");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_TANKER) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDTanker01OnMap = false;
			bool FDTanker02OnMap = false;
			VehicleList t1(NAME_BCFD_TANKER01);
			VehicleList t2(NAME_BCFD_TANKER02);

			if(t1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDTanker01OnMap = true;
			else
				FDTanker01OnMap = false;

			if(t2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDTanker02OnMap = true;
			else
				FDTanker02OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTANKER);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD Tanker Squad");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 2000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTANKER);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 2000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!FDTanker01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_TANKER, NAME_BCFD_TANKER01);
			else if(!FDTanker02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_TANKER, NAME_BCFD_TANKER02);

			else if(FDTanker01OnMap && FDTanker02OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTANKER);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSpeed(9.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 64.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 66.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 73.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Tanker dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBCFDWaterRescue : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBCFDWaterRescue()
	{
		SetIcon("callhazmatsquad");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);

	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)

			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)

			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))

	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{	
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSALSE, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TFMB, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TFMB);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_SWR) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDWaterRescueOnMap = false;
			VehicleList r3(NAME_BCFD_MARINE);

			if(r3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDWaterRescueOnMap = true;
			else
				FDWaterRescueOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTANKER);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD Water Rescue Truck");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 1500)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSWR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 1500;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!FDWaterRescueOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_SWR, NAME_BCFD_MARINE);

			else if(FDWaterRescueOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSWR);
				return;
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSpeed(9.0f);

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCFD_FF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_DIVERFF, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 14.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 13.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Water Rescue Truck dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallUSFSEngine : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallUSFSEngine()
	{
		SetIcon("calllightforce");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATLIGHTFORCE, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSLIGHTFORCE, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_USFS_ENGINE) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_USFS_UTILITY) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && !aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED) && !aCar->IsInstalled() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
