```cpp
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool USFSVehicle01OnMap = false;
			bool USFSVehicle02OnMap = false;

			VehicleList usfs1(NAME_USFS_UTILITY);
			VehicleList usfs2(NAME_USFS_ENGINE);

			if(usfs1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				USFSVehicle01OnMap = true;
			else
				USFSVehicle01OnMap = false;

			if(usfs2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				USFSVehicle02OnMap = true;
			else
				USFSVehicle02OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN07);
			ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE07);

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSFS);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy USFS vehicles");
			bool BuyEngineOnly = false;
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 4000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSFS);
				return;
			}
			else if (Input::LCtrlPressed() || Input::RCtrlPressed())
				BuyEngineOnly = true;
			else if (Money <= 3000)
				BuyEngineOnly = true;
			if (BuyEngineOnly)
				int NewMoney = Money - 3000;
			else
				int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;
			Person p3;
			Person p4;

			if(!USFSVehicle02OnMap)
			{
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_USFS_ENGINE, NAME_USFS_ENGINE);
			}
			else if(USFSVehicle02OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSFS);
				return;
			}
			n.SetSpeed(9.0f);
			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USFS_FF, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USFS_FF, UNNAMED);
			p3 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USFS_FF, UNNAMED);
			p4 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USFS_FF, UNNAMED);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p3.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p4.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p3.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p4.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(5);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p3);
			n.AddPassenger(&p4);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
			n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 80.0f);
			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}
			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			if (BuyEngineOnly)
			{
				System::Log("USFS Fire Engine dispatched");
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if (!BuyEngineOnly)
			{
				Vehicle m;
				Person p5;
				Person p6;
				if(!USFSVehicle01OnMap)
					m = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_USFS_UTILITY, NAME_USFS_UTILITY);

				else if(USFSVehicle01OnMap)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOUSFS);
					int NewMoney = Money + 1000;
					Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
					return;
				}
				m.SetSpeed(12.0f);
				p5 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USFS_FF, UNNAMED);
				p6 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_USFS_FF, UNNAMED);

				Game::FindFreePosition(&m, Spawn, 500.0f);

				m.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
				m.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p5.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p6.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p5.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				p6.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				m.SetMaxPassengers(2);
				m.SetMaxTransports(0);
				m.AddPassenger(&p5);
				m.AddPassenger(&p6);
						m.SetPosition(Spawn);
						m.UpdatePlacement();
				m.Hide();
				m.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
				m.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 80.0f);
				m.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
				m.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (Game::IsMission())
				{
					if(m.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
						m.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
				}
				if (!m.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && m.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &m, &m);

				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
			}
			return;
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBCFDRescueDog : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBCFDRescueDog()
	{
		SetIcon("callambulance1");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_AMBULANCE_RHF, VT_AMBULANCE_RHF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_K9_VAN) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool FDRescueDogOnMap = false;
			VehicleList c5(NAME_BCFD_K9_VAN);

			if(c5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				FDRescueDogOnMap = true;
			else
				FDRescueDogOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NODOG);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCFD rescue dog van");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 1200)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NODOG);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 1200;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!FDRescueDogOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_K9_VAN, NAME_BCFD_K9_VAN);

			else if(FDRescueDogOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NODOG);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_RESCUE_DOG_LEADER, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_RESCUE_DOG, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(10.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(1);
			n.SetMaxTransports(1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddTransport(&p2);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 44.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 36.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 33.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCFD Rescue Dog van dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallRescueCrane : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallRescueCrane()
	{
		SetIcon("callcrane");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MPFD_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_THW_FGRR_BKF, VT_THW_FGRR_BKF);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CRANE) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool TECRescueCraneOnMap = false;
			VehicleList cr1(NAME_RESCUE_CRANE);

			if(cr1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				TECRescueCraneOnMap = true;
			else
				TECRescueCraneOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
			}
			
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCRANE);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy rescue crane");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 5000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCRANE);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 5000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;

			if(!TECRescueCraneOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CRANE, NAME_RESCUE_CRANE);

			else if(TECRescueCraneOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCRANE);
				return;
			}

			n.SetSpeed(8.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 34.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 26.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 23.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}

			System::Log("Heavy rescue crane dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object DummyVehicleCalled : CommandScript
{
	DummyVehicleCalled()
	{
 		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
	}
};

object DummyDriveToScene : CommandScript
{
	DummyDriveToScene()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return true;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if(ChildID == 0) //For MPFD Engine 1
		{
			if(v.GetNumPassengers() == 4 && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
			{
				System::Log("MPFD Engine 1 detected");
				if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true);

				GameObjectList gate01a = Game::GetGameObjects(OBJ_GATE01A);  
				for(int i=0; i < gate01a.GetNumObjects(); i++)
					GameObject *gate = gate01a.GetObject(i);
					
				float dx = 750.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);	

				if (gate->GetUserData() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 3, false);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.2f);
					if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine1);
				} else
				{
					if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine1);
				}

				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				System::Log("MPFD Engine 1 sent");
			}
		}
		if(ChildID == 1) //For MPFD Engine 2
		{
			if(v.GetNumPassengers() == 4 && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
			{
				System::Log("MPFD Engine 2 detected");
				if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true);

				GameObjectList gate02a = Game::GetGameObjects(OBJ_GATE01A);  
				for(int i=0; i < gate02a.GetNumObjects(); i++)
					GameObject *gate = gate02a.GetObject(i);

				float dx = 750.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);	

				if (gate->GetUserData() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 3, false);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.2f);
					if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine2);
				} else
				{
					if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosEngine2);
				}

				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				System::Log("MPFD Engine 2 sent");
			}
		}
		if(ChildID == 2) //For MPFD Attack Brush
		{
			if(v.GetNumPassengers() == 2 && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
			{
				System::Log("MPFD Attack Brush detected");
				if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true);

				float dx = 350.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

				v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.2f);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CommandPosBrush);

				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
	7			if (v.HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				System::Log("MPFD Brush sent");
			}
		}
		System::Log("Person triggered script");
	}
};

```

## DispatchCommand_CallBCFDFirstAlarmDispatch.script

```cpp
// DispatchCommand_CallBCFDFirstAlarmDispatch.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: DummyFirstAlarmPrep, DummyFirstAlarmSelected, PcmdCallBCFDFirstAlarm
const char CMD_SIREN[]					= "VcmdSiren";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF[]		= "VcmdWarningLightsOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON[]		= "VcmdWarningLightsOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_ON[]				= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char DUMMY_CALLCREW[]				= "DummyCallCrew";
const char DUMMY_GATES[]				= "DummyGates";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[]				= "DummyHasSiren";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[]				= "DummyPatrol";
const char DUMMY_FIRSTALARM[]			= "DummyFirstAlarmSelected";

const char OBJ_ENGINE4051[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/fire_engine1.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINE4052[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_engine2.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINE4451[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_engine4.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINE4151[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_engine3.e4p";
const char OBJ_BATTALION40[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief_vehicle.e4p";
const char OBJ_CHIEF400[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfdcar400new.e4p";
const char OBJ_CHIEF401[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_car401.e4p";
const char OBJ_TANKER4153[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 4.e4p";
const char OBJ_TANKER4454[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/water_tender2.e4p";

const char OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_battalion_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_DIVISION_CHIEF[]	= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_division_chief.e4p";

const char VO_SQUAD01[]					= "fs_squad01";
const char VO_SQUAD02[]					= "fs_squad02";
const char VO_SQUAD03[]					= "fs_squad03";
const char VO_SQUAD05[]					= "fs_squad05";

const char SND_FIRSTALARM[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/bcfd_first_alarm.wav";

object PcmdCallBCFDFirstAlarm : CommandScript
{
	Vector CommandPos;

	PcmdCallBCFDFirstAlarm()
	{
		SetIcon("callbcfdfirstalarm");
		SetCursor("callbcfdfirstalarm");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList selected = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (selected.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!isChief(&p))
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!isChief(&p))
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		CommandPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_FIRSTALARM);

		clearSelectedFlags();

		const char *Unit1 = dispatchClosestEngine(0);
		const char *Unit2 = dispatchClosestEngine(1);
		const char *Unit3 = dispatchClosestEngine(2);
		const char *Unit4 = dispatchClosestChief(3);
		const char *Unit5 = dispatchClosestChief(4);
		const char *Unit6 = dispatchClosestTanker(5);

		clearSelectedFlags();

		char Text[255];
		snprintf(Text, 255, "BCFD First Alarm - Units responding:%s%s%s%s%s%s", Unit1, Unit2, Unit3, Unit4, Unit5, Unit6);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 5.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
	}

	const char *dispatchClosestEngine(int slot)
	{
		Vehicle v = findClosestEngine();
		if (v.IsValid())
		{
			dispatchVehicle(&v, slot);
			return getUnitName(&v);
		}
		return "";
	}

	const char *dispatchClosestChief(int slot)
	{
		Vehicle v = findClosestChief();
		if (v.IsValid())
		{
			dispatchVehicle(&v, slot);
			return getUnitName(&v);
		}
		return "";
	}

	const char *dispatchClosestTanker(int slot)
	{
		Vehicle v = findClosestTanker();
		if (v.IsValid())
		{
			dispatchVehicle(&v, slot);
			return getUnitName(&v);
		}
		return "";
	}

	const char *getUnitName(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0)
			return " Engine 4051,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0)
			return " Engine 4052,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0)
			return " Engine 4451,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0)
			return " Engine 4151,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0)
			return " Battalion 40,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0)
			return " Chief 400,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0)
			return " Chief 401,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0)
			return " Tanker 4153,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0)
			return " Tanker 4454,";
		return " Unknown unit,";
	}

	Vehicle findClosestEngine()
	{
		Vehicle best;
		float bestDist = 9999999.f;
		VehicleList list(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle v(list.GetVehicle(i));
			if (isAvailable(&v) && isEngine(&v))
			{
				float dist = v.Distance(CommandPos.x, CommandPos.y, CommandPos.z);
				if (dist < bestDist)
				{
					bestDist = dist;
					best = v;
				}
			}
		}
		if (best.IsValid())
			best.AssignCommand(DUMMY_FIRSTALARM);
		return best;
	}

	Vehicle findClosestChief()
	{
		Vehicle best;
		float bestDist = 9999999.f;
		VehicleList list(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle v(list.GetVehicle(i));
			if (isAvailable(&v) && isChiefVehicle(&v))
			{
				float dist = v.Distance(CommandPos.x, CommandPos.y, CommandPos.z);
				if (dist < bestDist)
				{
					bestDist = dist;
					best = v;
				}
			}
		}
		if (best.IsValid())
			best.AssignCommand(DUMMY_FIRSTALARM);
		return best;
	}

	Vehicle findClosestTanker()
	{
		Vehicle best;
		float bestDist = 9999999.f;
		VehicleList list(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle v(list.GetVehicle(i));
			if (isAvailable(&v) && isTanker(&v))
			{
				float dist = v.Distance(CommandPos.x, CommandPos.y, CommandPos.z);
				if (dist < bestDist)
				{
					bestDist = dist;
					best = v;
				}
			}
		}
		if (best.IsValid())
			best.AssignCommand(DUMMY_FIRSTALARM);
		return best;
	}

	void dispatchVehicle(Vehicle v, int slot)
	{
		Vector destination = getStagingPosition(&v, slot);

		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		openStationGates(&v);

		if (v.GetNumPassengers() == 0 && v.GetFreePassengers() > 0)
			pushCrewActions(&v);
		else
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);

		if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL) || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, &v, 1, false);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyFirstAlarmPrep", &v, 0, false);
		v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, destination);
	}

	Vector getStagingPosition(Vehicle v, int slot)
	{
		Vector destination = CommandPos;

		if (slot == 0)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(-220.f, -120.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 1)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(220.f, -120.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 2)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(0.f, 260.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 3)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(-420.f, 210.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 4)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(420.f, 210.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 5)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(0.f, -470.f, 0.f);

		Game::FindFreePosition(&v, destination, 350.f);
		return destination;
	}

	void pushCrewActions(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (isChiefVehicle(&v))
		{
			if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0)
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 6, false);
			else
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 8, false);
		}
		else if (isTanker(&v))
		{
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
		}
		else
		{
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 4, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
		}
	}

	void openStationGates(Vehicle v)
	{
		int gateID = getStationGateID(&v);
		if (gateID > 0)
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, &v, gateID, false);
	}

	int getStationGateID(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0)
			return 1;
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0)
			return 3;
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0)
			return 5;
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0)
			return 7;
		return 0;
	}

	bool isAvailable(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (!v.IsValid() || v.IsSmoking() || v.IsDestroyed() || !v.HasCommand("MoveTo") || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FIRSTALARM))
			return false;
		if (v.IsInstalled())
			return false;
		if (!isInAssignedStation(&v))
			return false;
		if (v.GetNumPassengers() == 0 && v.GetFreePassengers() == 0)
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool isInAssignedStation(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05);
		return false;
	}

	bool isEngine(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0;
	}

	bool isChiefVehicle(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0;
	}

	bool isTanker(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0;
	}

	bool isChief(Person p)
	{
		return StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION) == 0
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF) == 0
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_DIVISION_CHIEF) == 0;
	}

	void clearSelectedFlags()
	{
		VehicleList list(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle v(list.GetVehicle(i));
			if (v.IsValid() && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FIRSTALARM))
				v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FIRSTALARM);
		}
	}
};

object DummyFirstAlarmPrep : CommandScript
{
	DummyFirstAlarmPrep()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (!v.IsValid())
			return;

		if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &v, &v);
		if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
		{
			v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
			v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
		}
		if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
		{
			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
			v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
			v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
		}
	}
};

object DummyFirstAlarmSelected : CommandScript
{
	DummyFirstAlarmSelected()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}
};

```

## DispatchCommand_CallBCFDSecondAlarmDispatch.script

```cpp
// DispatchCommand_CallBCFDSecondAlarmDispatch.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: DummySecondAlarmPrep, DummySecondAlarmSelected, PcmdCallBCFDSecondAlarm
const char CMD_SIREN[]					= "VcmdSiren";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF[]		= "VcmdWarningLightsOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON[]		= "VcmdWarningLightsOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_ON[]				= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char DUMMY_CALLCREW[]				= "DummyCallCrew";
const char DUMMY_GATES[]				= "DummyGates";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[]				= "DummyHasSiren";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[]				= "DummyPatrol";
const char DUMMY_SECONDALARM[]			= "DummySecondAlarmSelected";

const char OBJ_ENGINE4051[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/fire_engine1.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINE4052[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_engine2.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINE4451[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_engine4.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINE4151[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_engine3.e4p";
const char OBJ_BATTALION40[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief_vehicle.e4p";
const char OBJ_CHIEF400[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfdcar400new.e4p";
const char OBJ_CHIEF401[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_car401.e4p";
const char OBJ_DIV402[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_car402.e4p";
const char OBJ_TANKER4153[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 4.e4p";
const char OBJ_TANKER4454[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/water_tender2.e4p";
const char OBJ_BRUSH4453[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/brush_truck.e4p";
const char OBJ_WILDLAND1[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/BCFDWildland1.e4p";

const char OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_battalion_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_DIVISION_CHIEF[]	= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_division_chief.e4p";

const char VO_SQUAD01[]					= "fs_squad01";
const char VO_SQUAD02[]					= "fs_squad02";
const char VO_SQUAD03[]					= "fs_squad03";
const char VO_SQUAD05[]					= "fs_squad05";

const char SND_SECONDALARM[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/bcfd_second_alarm.wav";

object PcmdCallBCFDSecondAlarm : CommandScript
{
	Vector CommandPos;

	PcmdCallBCFDSecondAlarm()
	{
		SetIcon("callbcfdsecondalarm");
		SetCursor("callbcfdsecondalarm");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList selected = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (selected.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!isChief(&p))
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!isChief(&p))
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		CommandPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_SECONDALARM);

		clearSelectedFlags();

		const char *Unit1 = dispatchClosestUnit(0);
		const char *Unit2 = dispatchClosestUnit(1);
		const char *Unit3 = dispatchClosestUnit(2);
		const char *Unit4 = dispatchClosestUnit(3);
		const char *Unit5 = dispatchClosestUnit(4);
		const char *Unit6 = dispatchClosestUnit(5);
		const char *Unit7 = dispatchClosestUnit(6);
		const char *Unit8 = dispatchClosestUnit(7);
		const char *Unit9 = dispatchClosestUnit(8);
		const char *Unit10 = dispatchClosestUnit(9);
		const char *Unit11 = dispatchClosestUnit(10);
		const char *Unit12 = dispatchClosestUnit(11);

		clearSelectedFlags();

		char Text[255];
		snprintf(Text, 255, "BCFD Second Alarm - Units responding:%s%s%s%s%s%s%s%s%s%s%s%s", Unit1, Unit2, Unit3, Unit4, Unit5, Unit6, Unit7, Unit8, Unit9, Unit10, Unit11, Unit12);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 5.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
	}

	const char *dispatchClosestUnit(int slot)
	{
		Vehicle v = findClosestUnit();
		if (v.IsValid())
		{
			dispatchVehicle(&v, slot);
			return getUnitName(&v);
		}
		return "";
	}

	Vehicle findClosestUnit()
	{
		Vehicle best;
		float bestDist = 9999999.f;
		VehicleList list(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle v(list.GetVehicle(i));
			if (isAvailable(&v) && isSecondAlarmUnit(&v))
			{
				float dist = v.Distance(CommandPos.x, CommandPos.y, CommandPos.z);
				if (dist < bestDist)
				{
					bestDist = dist;
					best = v;
				}
			}
		}
		if (best.IsValid())
			best.AssignCommand(DUMMY_SECONDALARM);
		return best;
	}

	void dispatchVehicle(Vehicle v, int slot)
	{
		Vector destination = getStagingPosition(&v, slot);

		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		openStationGates(&v);

		if (v.GetNumPassengers() == 0 && v.GetFreePassengers() > 0)
			pushCrewActions(&v);
		else
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);

		if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL) || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, &v, 1, false);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummySecondAlarmPrep", &v, 0, false);
		v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, destination);
	}

	Vector getStagingPosition(Vehicle v, int slot)
	{
		Vector destination = CommandPos;
		if (slot == 0)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(-240.f, -170.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 1)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(240.f, -170.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 2)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(-480.f, 60.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 3)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(480.f, 60.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 4)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(-240.f, 310.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 5)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(240.f, 310.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 6)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(0.f, -520.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 7)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(-620.f, -240.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 8)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(620.f, -240.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 9)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(-620.f, 330.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 10)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(620.f, 330.f, 0.f);
		else if (slot == 11)
			destination = CommandPos + Vector(0.f, 620.f, 0.f);

		Game::FindFreePosition(&v, destination, 350.f);
		return destination;
	}

	void pushCrewActions(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0)
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 6, false);
		else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_DIV402) == 0)
		{
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 7, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 5, false);
		}
		else if (isChiefVehicle(&v))
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 8, false);
		else if (isTanker(&v) || isBrush(&v))
		{
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
		}
		else
		{
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, &v, 3, false);
		}
	}

	void openStationGates(Vehicle v)
	{
		int gateID = getStationGateID(&v);
		if (gateID > 0)
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, &v, gateID, false);
	}

	int getStationGateID(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0)
			return 1;
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BRUSH4453) == 0)
			return 3;
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_DIV402) == 0)
			return 5;
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_WILDLAND1) == 0)
			return 7;
		return 0;
	}

	bool isAvailable(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (!v.IsValid() || v.IsSmoking() || v.IsDestroyed() || !v.HasCommand("MoveTo") || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_SECONDALARM))
			return false;
		if (v.IsInstalled())
			return false;
		if (!isInAssignedStation(&v))
			return false;
		if (v.GetNumPassengers() == 0 && v.GetFreePassengers() == 0)
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool isInAssignedStation(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BRUSH4453) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_DIV402) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_WILDLAND1) == 0)
			return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05);
		return false;
	}

	bool isSecondAlarmUnit(Vehicle v)
	{
		return isEngine(&v) || isChiefVehicle(&v) || isTanker(&v) || isBrush(&v) || isWildland(&v);
	}

	bool isEngine(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0;
	}

	bool isChiefVehicle(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_DIV402) == 0;
	}

	bool isTanker(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0
			|| StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0;
	}

	bool isBrush(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BRUSH4453) == 0;
	}

	bool isWildland(Vehicle v)
	{
		return StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_WILDLAND1) == 0;
	}

	bool isChief(Person p)
	{
		return StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION) == 0
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF) == 0
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_DIVISION_CHIEF) == 0;
	}

	const char *getUnitName(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4051) == 0)
			return " Engine 4051,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0)
			return " Engine 4052,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4451) == 0)
			return " Engine 4451,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0)
			return " Engine 4151,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0)
			return " Battalion 40,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF400) == 0)
			return " Chief 400,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHIEF401) == 0)
			return " Chief 401,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_DIV402) == 0)
			return " Division 402,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4153) == 0)
			return " Tanker 4153,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0)
			return " Tanker 4454,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BRUSH4453) == 0)
			return " Brush 4453,";
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_WILDLAND1) == 0)
			return " Wildland 1,";
		return " Unknown unit,";
	}

	void clearSelectedFlags()
	{
		VehicleList list(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle v(list.GetVehicle(i));
			if (v.IsValid() && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_SECONDALARM))
				v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_SECONDALARM);
		}
	}
};

object DummySecondAlarmPrep : CommandScript
{
	DummySecondAlarmPrep()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (!v.IsValid())
			return;

		if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &v, &v);
		if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
		{
			v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
			v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
		}
		if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
		{
			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
			v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
			v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
		}
	}
};

object DummySecondAlarmSelected : CommandScript
{
	DummySecondAlarmSelected()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}
};

```

## DispatchCommand_CallHelicopterDispatch.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
 #Version 1.3#

 		Includes: Backup command for police units.

	- PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter
	- PcmdCallRescueHelicopter

		Script by Hoppah
		Thanks to Bass-Ti for his help
		
	Heavilly edited by itchboy for Montana Mod v2.
		
		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah

******************************************************************************************/

const char HINT_NOHELICOPTER[] 			= "No helicopter available!";
const char HINT_PDHELOBOUGHT[] 			= "Helicopter dispatched!";
const char HINT_AIRAMBUBOUGHT[] 		= "Helicopter dispatched!";
const char ANI_MIKE[] 				= "talkmike";
const char ANI_IDLE[] 				= "idle";
const char SND_PDHELO[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/pd_air.wav";
const char SND_BATHELO[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/bat_medflight.wav";
const char SND_EMSHELO[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/ems_medflight.wav";

//helicopters
const char PROTO_BCSO_PDHELO[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/as350_lasd.e4p";
const char PROTO_MHP_PDHELO[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/as350_chp.e4p";
const char PROTO_AIRAMBULANCE[] 		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/helicopter_rescue.e4p";
const char PROTO_BLACKHAWK[]	 		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/05 US Army/blackhawk.e4p";
const char PROTO_CAYUSE[] 				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/05 US Army/oh6cayuse.e4p";

const char OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_MHP_OFFICER[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_PM[]						= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p";
const char OBJ_US_SOLDIER_MEDIC[] 		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/05 US Army/us_army_medic_combat.e4p";
const char OBJ_US_SOLDIER[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/05 US Army/us_army_soldier.e4p";

const char OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ems_paramedic_captain.e4p";

//PD helicopters
const char NAME_PD_HELI01[]			= "bcso_heli";
const char NAME_PD_HELI02[]			= "mhp_heli";
const char NAME_US_HELI01[]			= "army_cayuse";
const char NAME_US_HELI02[]			= "army_blackhawk";
const char NAME_EMS_HELI01[]		= "ems_heli";

//Spawn VO's
const char VO_SPAWN05[] 			= "spawn05";
const char VO_SPAWN06[] 			= "spawn06";
const char VO_SPAWN07[] 			= "spawn07";
const char VO_SPAWN08[] 			= "spawn08";
const char VO_SPAWN09[] 			= "spawn09";

//Rotation VO's
const char VO_ROTATE05[] 			= "rotate05";
const char VO_ROTATE06[] 			= "rotate06";
const char VO_ROTATE07[] 			= "rotate07";
const char VO_ROTATE08[] 			= "rotate08";
const char VO_ROTATE09[] 			= "rotate09";

const char UNNAMED[] 				= "Unnamed";

object PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter()
	{
		SetIcon("callpolicehelicopter");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		bool PDHeli01OnMap = false;
		bool PDHeli02OnMap = false;

		VehicleList h1(NAME_PD_HELI01);
		VehicleList h2(NAME_PD_HELI02);

		if(h1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
			PDHeli01OnMap = true;
		else
			PDHeli01OnMap = false;

		if(h2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
			PDHeli02OnMap = true;
		else
			PDHeli02OnMap = false;

		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_MIKE);
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_IDLE);
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDHELO, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vector Spawn;
		Vector Rotate;

		ActorList l1;
		ActorList l2;

		int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
		switch(randomLocation)
		{
			case 0:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE06);
			}
			break;
			
			case 1:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN07);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE07);
			}
			break;
			
			case 2:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN08);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE08);
			}
			break;
			
			case 3:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE05);
			}
			break;
		}
		if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		if(l2.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}
		System::Log("Buy police helicopter");
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money <= 4000)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}

		int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
		Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
		Vehicle n;
		Person p1;
		Person p2;
		if(!PDHeli01OnMap)
		{
			n = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_BCSO_PDHELO, NAME_PD_HELI01);
			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
		}
		else if(!PDHeli02OnMap)
		{
			n = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_MHP_PDHELO, NAME_PD_HELI02);
			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
		}
		else if(PDHeli01OnMap && PDHeli02OnMap)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}
		n.SetSpeed(20.0f);
		n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
		n.SetMaxTransports(1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
			n.UpdatePlacement();
		n.Hide();
			float r[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
		float dx = 0.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 1000.f;
		Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
		Vector Spawn2 = Spawn + Vector(dx, dy, dz);
		n.SetPosition(Spawn2);
		n.SetAnimation("fly");

		int randomWait = Math::rand()%2;
		switch(randomWait)
		{
			case 0:		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 27.0f);	break;
			case 1:		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 23.0f);	break;
		}
		n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Rotate);
		n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);

		GameObject obj(Target);
		float landingDirection = n.GetValidLandingAngle(&obj, CmdPos);
		if (landingDirection >= 0.f)
		{
			n.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, true, landingDirection);
		} else
		{
			n.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, false, -1.0f);
		}		

		if (Game::IsMission())
		{
			if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
				n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
		}
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_PDHELOBOUGHT);
	}
};

object PcmdCallArmyHelicopter : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallArmyHelicopter()
	{
		SetIcon("callpolicehelicopter");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		bool ArmyHeli01OnMap = false;
		bool ArmyHeli02OnMap = false;

		VehicleList h3(NAME_US_HELI01);
		VehicleList h4(NAME_US_HELI02);

		if(h3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
			ArmyHeli01OnMap = true;
		else
			ArmyHeli01OnMap = false;

		if(h4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
			ArmyHeli02OnMap = true;
		else
			ArmyHeli02OnMap = false;

		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_MIKE);
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_IDLE);
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDHELO, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vector Spawn;
		Vector Rotate;

		ActorList l1;
		ActorList l2;

		int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
		switch(randomLocation)
		{
			case 0:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE06);
			}
			break;
			
			case 1:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN07);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE07);
			}
			break;
			
			case 2:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN08);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE08);
			}
			break;
			
			case 3:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE05);
			}
			break;
		}
		if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		if(l2.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}
		System::Log("Buy army helicopter");
		bool BuyCayuseOnly = false;
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money <= 8000)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}
		else if (Input::LCtrlPressed() || Input::RCtrlPressed())
			BuyCayuseOnly = true;
		else if (Money <= 4000)
			BuyEngineOnly = true;
		if (BuyEngineOnly)
			int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
		else
			int NewMoney = Money - 8000;
		Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

		Vehicle n;
		Person p1;
		Person p2;
		if(!ArmyHeli01OnMap)
		{
			n = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_CAYUSE, NAME_US_HELI01);
			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_US_SOLDIER, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_US_SOLDIER, UNNAMED);
		}
		else if(ArmyHeli01OnMap)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}
		n.SetSpeed(22.5f);
		n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
		n.SetMaxTransports(0);
		n.AddPassenger(&p1);
		n.AddPassenger(&p2);
			float r[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
		float dx = 0.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 1000.f;
		Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
		Vector Spawn2 = Spawn + Vector(dx, dy, dz);
		n.SetPosition(Spawn2);
		n.SetAnimation("fly");
		n.UpdatePlacement();
		n.Hide();

		int randomWait = Math::rand()%2;
		switch(randomWait)
		{
			case 0:		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 26.0f);	break;
			case 1:		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 29.0f);	break;
		}
		n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Rotate);
		n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);

		GameObject obj(Target);
		float landingDirection = n.GetValidLandingAngle(&obj, CmdPos);
		if (landingDirection >= 0.f)
		{
			n.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, true, landingDirection);
		} else
		{
			n.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, false, -1.0f);
		}

		if(BuyCayuseOnly)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_PDHELOBOUGHT);
			return;
		}
		else if(!BuyCayuseOnly)
		{
			Vehicle m;
			Person p3;
			Person p4;
			Person p5;
			Person p6;
			if(!ArmyHeli02OnMap)
				m = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_BLACKHAWK, NAME_US_HELI02);

			else if(ArmyHeli02OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
				int NewMoney = Money + 4000;
				Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
				return;
			}
			m.SetSpeed(22.0f);
			p3 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_US_SOLDIER, UNNAMED);
			p4 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_US_SOLDIER, UNNAMED);
			p5 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_US_SOLDIER_MEDIC, UNNAMED);
			p6 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_US_SOLDIER_MEDIC, UNNAMED);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&m, Spawn, 500.0f);

			m.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p3.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p4.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p5.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p6.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p3.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p4.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p5.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p6.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			m.SetMaxPassengers(6);
			m.SetMaxTransports(4);
			m.AddPassenger(&p3);
			m.AddPassenger(&p4);
			m.AddPassenger(&p5);
			m.AddPassenger(&p6);
				m.SetPosition(Spawn2);
				m.SetAnimation("fly");
				m.UpdatePlacement();
			m.Hide();
			m.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0:		m.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 26.0f);	break;
				case 1:		m.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 29.0f);	break;
			}
			m.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Rotate);
			m.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);

			landingDirection = m.GetValidLandingAngle(&obj, CmdPos);
			if (landingDirection >= 0.f)
			{
				m.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, true, landingDirection);
			} else
			{
				m.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, false, -1.0f);
			}
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(m.HasCommand("VcmdToFireStation"))
					m.RemoveCommand("VcmdToFireStation");
			}
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_PDHELOBOUGHT);
		}
		return;
	}
};

object PcmdCallRescueHelicopter : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallRescueHelicopter()
	{
		SetIcon("callrescuehelicopter");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		bool MedicHelicopter01OnMap = false;

		VehicleList h5(NAME_EMS_HELI01);

		if(h5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
			MedicHelicopter01OnMap = true;
		else
			MedicHelicopter01OnMap = false;

		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_MIKE);
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_IDLE);
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATHELO, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSHELO, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vector Spawn;
		Vector Rotate;

		ActorList l1;
		ActorList l2;

		int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
		switch(randomLocation)
		{
			case 0:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE06);
			}
			break;
			
			case 1:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN07);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE07);
			}
			break;
			
			case 2:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN08);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE08);
			}
			break;
			
			case 3:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE05);
			}
			break;
		}
		if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		if(l2.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}
		System::Log("Buy medic helicopter");
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money <= 4000)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}

		int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
		Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
		Vehicle n;
		Person p1;
		Person p2;
		if(!MedicHelicopter01OnMap)
		{
			n = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_AIRAMBULANCE, NAME_EMS_HELI01);
			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PM, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PM, UNNAMED);
		}
		else if(MedicHelicopter01OnMap)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOHELICOPTER);
			return;
		}
		n.SetSpeed(20.0f);
		n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
		p2.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
		p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
		n.SetMaxTransports(1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
			n.UpdatePlacement();
		n.Hide();
			float r[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
		float dx = 0.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 1000.f;
		Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
		Vector Spawn2 = Spawn + Vector(dx, dy, dz);
		n.SetPosition(Spawn2);
		n.SetAnimation("fly");

		int randomWait = Math::rand()%2;
		switch(randomWait)
		{
			case 0:		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 34.0f);	break;
			case 1:		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 38.0f);	break;
		}
		n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Rotate);
		n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);

		GameObject obj(Target);
		float landingDirection = n.GetValidLandingAngle(&obj, CmdPos);
		if (landingDirection >= 0.f)
		{
			n.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, true, landingDirection);
		} else
		{
			n.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos, false, -1.0f);
		}		

		if (Game::IsMission())
		{
			if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToHospital"))
				n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToHospital");
		}
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_AIRAMBUBOUGHT);
	}
};
```

## DispatchCommand_CallPatrolCarDispatch.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
 #Version 1.3#

 		Includes: Backup command for police units.

	- PcmdCallPatrolCar

	Script by Hoppah
	Thanks to Bass-Ti for his help
	
	HEAVILLY MODIFIED BY ITCHBOY FOR MONTANA MOD V2.

	Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah

******************************************************************************************/

const char CMD_SIREN[]					= "VcmdSiren";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOn";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF[] 		= "VcmdFloodLightsOff";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON[] 		= "VcmdFloodLightsOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_ON[]				= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[] 			= "DummyHasSiren";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[] 			= "DummyPatrol";
const char DUMMY_CALLCREW[]			= "DummyCallCrewPolice";
const char DUMMY_VCALLED[]			= "DummyVehicleCalled";
const char HINT_NOPATROLCAR[] 			= "No vehicle available!";
const char HINT_BACKUP[] 				= "Backup is on its way!";
const char HINT_PATROLCARBOUGHT[] 		= "Patrol car bought for $200 and dispatched!";
const char SND_BATBACKUP[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/bat_pd.wav";
const char SND_EMSBACKUP[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/ems_pd.wav";
const char SND_PDBACKUP[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/pd_backup.wav";
const char OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_battalion_chief.e4p";
const char OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ems_paramedic_captain.e4p";
const char VO_SQUAD01[]				= "policestation_mppd";
const char VO_SQUAD02[]				= "policestation_uspr";
const char VO_SQUAD03[]				= "policestation_mhp";
const char VO_SQUAD04[]				= "policestation_bcso";
const char VO_PARK01[] 				= "policestation_park01";
const char VO_PARK02[] 				= "policestation_park02";
const char VO_PARK03[] 				= "policestation_park03";
const char VO_PARK04[] 				= "policestation_park04";
const char VO_PARK_MHP01[] 				= "policestation_mhp_park01";
const char VO_PARK_BCSO01[] 				= "policestation_bcso_park01";
const char VO_PARK_RANGER01[] 				= "rangerstation_park01";
const char VO_PARK_RANGER02[] 				= "rangerstation_park02";

//Spawn VO's
const char VO_SPAWN01[] 			= "spawn01";
const char VO_SPAWN02[] 			= "spawn02";
const char VO_SPAWN03[] 			= "spawn03";
const char VO_SPAWN04[] 			= "spawn04";
const char VO_SPAWN05[] 			= "spawn05";
const char VO_SPAWN06[] 			= "spawn06";

//on map units
const char OBJ_CV_MPPD1[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_cvpi.e4p";
const char OBJ_IM_MPPD1[]			  	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_impala_unit10.e4p";
const char OBJ_IM_MPPD2[]			  	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_impala_unit20.e4p";

//off map units BCSO
const char OBJ_CV_BCSO1[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_cvpi.e4p";
const char OBJ_CV_BCSO2[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_traffic_cvpi.e4p";
const char OBJ_HONDA_BCSO[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_civic.e4p";
const char OBJ_CHARGER_BCSO[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/dodge_charger_lapd.e4p";
const char OBJ_CV_ST_BCSO[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_lapd_slicktop.e4p";
const char OBJ_SUV_BCSO[] 				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_expedition01.e4p";
const char OBJ_TAURUS_BCSO[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/ccpd_taurus.e4p";
const char OBJ_SWAT_BCSO[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_transport_van.e4p";

const char NAME_BCSO_CAR02[]			= "bcso_car02";

const char NAME_BCSO_CAR05[]			= "bcso_car05";
const char NAME_BCSO_CAR06[]			= "bcso_car06";
const char NAME_BCSO_CAR07[]			= "bcso_car07";

const char OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCSO_SWAT_OFFICER[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccsd_swat_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCSO_BOMB_SQUAD_OFFICER[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_bomb_squad.e4p";

//misc off map units
const char OBJ_CORONERS_VAN[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/coroners_van.e4p";
const char OBJ_CORONER[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/coroners_single.e4p";
const char NAME_CORONERS_VAN[]				= "coroners_van";

const char OBJ_ENGINEERS_VAN01[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/04 LA Tec/engineer_vehicle.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINEERS_VAN02[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/04 LA Tec/mputil_f350.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINEER[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/04 LA Tec/engineer.e4p";
const char NAME_ENGINEERS_VAN01[]				= "engineers_van01";
const char NAME_ENGINEERS_VAN02[]				= "engineers_van02";

//off map units MHP
const char OBJ_CHARGER_MHP[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/dodge_charger_chp.e4p";
const char OBJ_CV_MHP1[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_caprice.e4p";
const char OBJ_CV_MHP2[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_tahoe.e4p";
const char OBJ_CV_MHP3[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_umpc.e4p";
const char OBJ_SWAT_MHP[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/oshkosh_tpv.e4p";
const char OBJ_SWAT_MRAP_MHP[]			    	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_cougar_mrap.e4p";

const char NAME_MHP_CAR01[]			= "mhp_car01";
const char NAME_MHP_CAR02[]			= "mhp_car02";
const char NAME_MHP_CAR03[]			= "mhp_car03";

const char NAME_MHP_NEGOTIATOR[]			= "mhp_car05";

const char NAME_MHP_SWAT01[]			= "mhp_swat01";
const char NAME_MHP_SWAT02[]			= "mhp_swat02";
```
