const char OBJ_MHP_OFFICER1[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_MHP_SWAT_OFFICER[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p";
const char OBJ_MHP_NEGOTIATOR[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/negotiator.e4p";

const char HINT_NO_MHP[] 			= "MHP Patrol car at Hospital unavailable!";
const char HINT_NO_BCSO[] 			= "BCSO Patrol car at City Hall unavailable!";

const char HINT_DISPATCHED[] 			= "Vehicle dispatched!";

const char UNNAMED[] 				= "Unnamed";

object PcmdCallPatrolCar : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallPatrolCar()
	{
		SetIcon("callpatrolcar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");

		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
		else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
		else
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_MTW, VT_POLICE_STW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK01) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK02) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK03) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK04) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER01) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER02) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_BCSO01) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_MHP01)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.)
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01)) //mppd station
			{
				bool Police02 = false;
				bool Police03 = false;
				bool Police04 = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList l1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police02 = true;
					} else
					Police02 = true;
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police02)
				{
					GameObjectList l2;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK02, l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l2.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l2.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police03 = true;
					} else
					Police03 = true;	
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police03)
				{
					GameObjectList l3;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK03, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l3.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police04 = true;
					} else
					Police04 = true;	
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police04)
				{
					GameObjectList l4;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK04, l4, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l4.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l4.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02)) //park ranger station
			{
				bool Police05 = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList l5;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER01, l5, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l5.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l5.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police05 = true;
					} else
					Police05 = true;	
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police05)
				{
					GameObjectList l6;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER02, l6, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l6.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l6.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03))//mhp patrol car @ hospital
			{
				bool VehicleCalled = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					bool HasOfficer = false;
					GameObjectList l7;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_MHP01, l7, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l7.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l7.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							GameObjectList pl7;
							Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03, pl7, ACTOR_PERSON);
							if(pl7.GetNumObjects() > 0)
							{
								for(int i=0; i < pl7.GetNumObjects(); i++)
								{
									GameObject *obj = pl7.GetObject(i);
									if(StrCompare(obj->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MHP_OFFICER1) == 0)
									{
										HasOfficer = true;
										System::Log("MHP officer found");	
									}
								}
								if(!HasOfficer)
								{
									System::Log("No MHP officer found");
									Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_MHP);
									return;
								}
							}
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04)) //bcso patrol car @ city hall
			{
				bool VehicleCalled = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					bool HasOfficer = false;
					GameObjectList l8;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_BCSO01, l8, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l8.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l8.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							GameObjectList pl8;
							Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04, pl8, ACTOR_PERSON);
							if(pl8.GetNumObjects() > 0)
							{
								for(int i=0; i < pl8.GetNumObjects(); i++)
								{
									GameObject *obj = pl8.GetObject(i);
									if(obj->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON && StrCompare(obj->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER) == 0)
									{
										HasOfficer = true;
										System::Log("BCSO officer found");
									}
								}
								if(!HasOfficer)
								{
									System::Log("No BCSO officer found");	
									Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_BCSO);
									return;
								}
							}
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_F150_USPR) == 0)
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 2, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 6.5f);
					}
					else
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 8.f);
					}
				}
				/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

				float dx = 250.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool Sheriff01OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff02OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff03OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff04OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff05OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff06OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff07OnMap = false;

			bool HighwayPatrol01OnMap = false;
			bool HighwayPatrol02OnMap = false;
			bool HighwayPatrol03OnMap = false;

			VehicleList so1(NAME_BCSO_CAR01);
			VehicleList so2(NAME_BCSO_CAR02);
			VehicleList so3(NAME_BCSO_CAR03);
			VehicleList so4(NAME_BCSO_CAR04);
			VehicleList so5(NAME_BCSO_CAR05);
			VehicleList so6(NAME_BCSO_CAR06);
			VehicleList so7(NAME_BCSO_CAR07);

			VehicleList mhp1(NAME_MHP_CAR01);
			VehicleList mhp2(NAME_MHP_CAR02);
			VehicleList mhp3(NAME_MHP_CAR03);

			if(so1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff01OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff01OnMap = false;

			if(so2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff02OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff02OnMap = false;

			if(so3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff03OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff03OnMap = false;

			if(so4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff04OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff04OnMap = false;

			if(so5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff05OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff05OnMap = false;

			if(so6.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff06OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff06OnMap = false;

			if(so7.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff07OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff07OnMap = false;
				
			if(mhp1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrol01OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrol01OnMap = false;

			if(mhp2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrol02OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrol02OnMap = false;

			if(mhp3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrol03OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrol03OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE04);
				}
				break;
				
				case 2:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 3:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
				}
				break;
			}

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy assorted patrol car");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 500)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 500;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!Sheriff01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_BCSO1, NAME_BCSO_CAR01);

			else if(!Sheriff02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_BCSO2, NAME_BCSO_CAR02);

			else if(!Sheriff03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_HONDA_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR03);

			else if(!Sheriff04OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CHARGER_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR04);

			else if(!Sheriff05OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_ST_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR05);

			else if(!Sheriff06OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SUV_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR06);

			else if(!Sheriff07OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_TAURUS_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR07);
			
			else if(!HighwayPatrol01OnMap)
			n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CHARGER_MHP, NAME_MHP_CAR01);

			else if(!HighwayPatrol02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_MHP1, NAME_MHP_CAR02);

			else if(!HighwayPatrol03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_MHP2, NAME_MHP_CAR03);

			else if(Sheriff01OnMap && Sheriff02OnMap && Sheriff03OnMap && Sheriff04OnMap && Sheriff05OnMap && Sheriff06OnMap && Sheriff07OnMap && HighwayPatrol01OnMap && HighwayPatrol02OnMap && HighwayPatrol03OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			if(n.HasName(NAME_BCSO_CAR01) || n.HasName(NAME_BCSO_CAR02) || n.HasName(NAME_BCSO_CAR03) || n.HasName(NAME_BCSO_CAR04) || n.HasName(NAME_BCSO_CAR05) || n.HasName(NAME_BCSO_CAR06) || n.HasName(NAME_BCSO_CAR07))
			{
				p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
				p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			}
			else
			{
				p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_OFFICER1, UNNAMED);
				p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_OFFICER1, UNNAMED);
			}

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHARGER_BCSO) == 0 || OBJ_CHARGER_MHP)
				n.SetSpeed(14.0f);
			else if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TAURUS_BCSO) == 0)
				n.SetSpeed(13.0f);
			else if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SUV_BCSO) == 0 || StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_HONDA_BCSO) == 0)
				n.SetSpeed(11.0f);
			else
				n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%4;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 27.0f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 21.0f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 18.0f);   break;

				case 3 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("assorted patrol car dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallMPPDPatrolCar : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallMPPDPatrolCar()
	{
		SetIcon("callpatrolcar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");

			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_MTW, VT_POLICE_STW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK01) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK02) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK03) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK04)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			{
				bool Police02 = false;
				bool Police03 = false;
				bool Police04 = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList l1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police02 = true;
					} else
					Police02 = true;
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police02)
				{
					GameObjectList l2;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK02, l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l2.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l2.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police03 = true;
					} else
					Police03 = true;	
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police03)
				{
					GameObjectList l3;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK03, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l3.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police04 = true;
					} else
					Police04 = true;	
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police04)
				{
					GameObjectList l4;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK04, l4, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l4.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l4.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 8.f);
				
					/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
						v.EnableBlueLights(false);
					else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
						v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

					float dx = 250.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
					Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
						float r[9];
						float childr[9];
					v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
					Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
					Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
					Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);
				}
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}

				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
			return;
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallParkRanger : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallParkRanger()
	{
		SetIcon("callpatrolcar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");

			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_MTW, VT_POLICE_MTW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if (aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER01) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER02)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02))
			{
				bool Police06 = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					GameObjectList l1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						} else
						Police06 = true;
					} else
					Police06 = true;	
				}
				if (!VehicleCalled && Police06)
				{
					GameObjectList l2;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_RANGER02, l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l2.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l2.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 2, false);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 6.5f);
				}
				/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

				float dx = 250.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
			return;
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar()
	{
		SetIcon("callpatrolcar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;
			
		if(p.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_MTW, VT_POLICE_STW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_BCSO1) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_BCSO2) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_HONDA_BCSO) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHARGER_BCSO) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_ST_BCSO) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SUV_BCSO) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TAURUS_BCSO) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_BCSO01)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04))
			{
				bool VehicleCalled = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					bool HasOfficer = false;
					GameObjectList l1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_BCSO01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							GameObjectList l2;
							Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
							if(l2.GetNumObjects() > 0)
							{
								for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
								{
									GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
									if(obj->HasCommand("MoveTo") && obj->HasCommand("Arrest") && !obj->HasCommand("ReleaseArrested"))
										HasOfficer = true;
								}
								if(!HasOfficer)
								{
									Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_BCSO);
									return;
								}
							}
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_BCSO1) == 0 || 
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_BCSO2) == 0 ||
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_HONDA_BCSO) == 0 ||
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHARGER_BCSO) == 0 ||
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_ST_BCSO) == 0 ||
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SUV_BCSO) == 0 ||
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TAURUS_BCSO) == 0)
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 0, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 7.0f);
					}
				}
				/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

				float dx = 250.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool Sheriff01OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff02OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff03OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff04OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff05OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff06OnMap = false;
			bool Sheriff07OnMap = false;

			VehicleList so1(NAME_BCSO_CAR01);
			VehicleList so2(NAME_BCSO_CAR02);
			VehicleList so3(NAME_BCSO_CAR03);
			VehicleList so4(NAME_BCSO_CAR04);
			VehicleList so5(NAME_BCSO_CAR05);
			VehicleList so6(NAME_BCSO_CAR06);
			VehicleList so7(NAME_BCSO_CAR07);

			if(so1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff01OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff01OnMap = false;

			if(so2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff02OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff02OnMap = false;

			if(so3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff03OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff03OnMap = false;

			if(so4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff04OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff04OnMap = false;

			if(so5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff05OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff05OnMap = false;

			if(so6.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff06OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff06OnMap = false;

			if(so7.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				Sheriff07OnMap = true;
			else
				Sheriff07OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE04);
				}
				break;
				
				case 2:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 3:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
				}
				break;
			}

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCSO Patrol Car");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 500)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 500;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!Sheriff01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_BCSO1, NAME_BCSO_CAR01);

			else if(!Sheriff02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_BCSO2, NAME_BCSO_CAR02);

			else if(!Sheriff03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_HONDA_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR03);

			else if(!Sheriff04OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CHARGER_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR04);

			else if(!Sheriff05OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_ST_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR05);

			else if(!Sheriff06OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SUV_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR06);

			else if(!Sheriff07OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_TAURUS_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_CAR07);

			else if(Sheriff01OnMap && Sheriff02OnMap && Sheriff03OnMap && Sheriff04OnMap && Sheriff05OnMap && Sheriff06OnMap && Sheriff07OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_OFFICER, UNNAMED);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHARGER_BCSO) == 0)
				n.SetSpeed(14.0f);
			else if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TAURUS_BCSO) == 0)
				n.SetSpeed(13.0f);
			else if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SUV_BCSO) == 0 || StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_HONDA_BCSO) == 0)
				n.SetSpeed(11.0f);
			else
				n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%4;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 27.0f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 21.0f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 18.0f);   break;

				case 3 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCSO Patrol Car dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBCSOSWAT : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBCSOSWAT()
	{
		SetIcon("callswatteam");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_SW, VT_POLICE_SW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SWAT_BCSO) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool SheriffSwat01OnMap = false;
			bool SheriffSwat02OnMap = false;

			VehicleList swat1(NAME_BCSO_SWAT01);
			VehicleList swat2(NAME_BCSO_SWAT02);

			if(swat1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				SheriffSwat01OnMap = true;
			else
				SheriffSwat01OnMap = false;

			if(swat2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				SheriffSwat02OnMap = true;
			else
				SheriffSwat02OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
				}
				break;
			}

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy SWAT Van");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 2000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 2000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;
			Person p3;
			Person p4;
			Person p5;
			Person p6;

			if(!SheriffSwat01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SWAT_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_SWAT01);
			else if(!SheriffSwat02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SWAT_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_SWAT02);
			else if(SheriffSwat01OnMap && SheriffSwat02OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p3 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p4 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p5 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p6 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(11.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p3.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p4.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p5.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p6.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p3.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p4.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p5.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p6.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(6);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p3);
			n.AddPassenger(&p4);
			n.AddPassenger(&p5);
			n.AddPassenger(&p6);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 44.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 36.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 33.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
			}
			System::Log("SWAT Van dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallBombSquad : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallBombSquad()
	{
		SetIcon("callbombsquadcar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_SW, VT_POLICE_SW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BOMB_SQUAD_BCSO) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool SheriffBombSquadOnMap = false;
			VehicleList bq1(NAME_BCSO_BOMBSQUAD);

			if(bq1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				SheriffBombSquadOnMap = true;
			else
				SheriffBombSquadOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
				}
				break;

				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN07);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE07);
				}
				break;

				case 2:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE05);
				}
				break;
			}

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy Bomb Squad Pickup");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 2000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 2000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!SheriffBombSquadOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BOMB_SQUAD_BCSO, NAME_BCSO_BOMBSQUAD);

			else if(SheriffBombSquadOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_BOMB_SQUAD_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCSO_BOMB_SQUAD_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(0);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 10.0f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 15.0f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
			}
			System::Log("Bomb Squad Pickup dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar()
	{
		SetIcon("callpatrolcar");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson") || p.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
			else
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACKUP, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_MTW, VT_POLICE_STW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHARGER_MHP) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_MHP1) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_MHP2) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL) || aCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK_MHP01)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}
		if (theCar)
		{
			bool VehicleCalled = false;
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else if (theCar->IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03))
			{
				bool VehicleCalled = false;
				if (!VehicleCalled)
				{
					bool HasOfficer = false;
					GameObjectList l1;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK_MHP01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
					{
						Vehicle v = l1.GetObject(0);
						if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
						{
							GameObjectList l2;
							Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
							if(l2.GetNumObjects() > 0)
							{
								for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
								{
									GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
									if(obj->HasCommand("MoveTo") && obj->HasCommand("Arrest") && !obj->HasCommand("ReleaseArrested"))
										HasOfficer = true;
								}
								if(!HasOfficer)
								{
									Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_MHP);
									return;
								}
							}
							v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
							VehicleCalled = true;
						}
					}
				}
			}
			if (VehicleCalled)
			{
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
				{
					if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHARGER_MHP) == 0 || 
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_MHP1) == 0 ||
					StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_MHP2) == 0)
					{
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 0, false);
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 9.0f);
					}
				}
				/* if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				else if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled() && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.EnableBlueLights(true); */

				float dx = 280.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Vector Move = v.GetPosition();
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Move = Move + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VCALLED, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartEngine", &v, 0, false);
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_SIREN, Caller, 0, false);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Move);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
				return;
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool HighwayPatrol01OnMap = false;
			bool HighwayPatrol02OnMap = false;
			bool HighwayPatrol03OnMap = false;

			VehicleList mhp1(NAME_MHP_CAR01);
			VehicleList mhp2(NAME_MHP_CAR02);
			VehicleList mhp3(NAME_MHP_CAR03);

			if(mhp1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrol01OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrol01OnMap = false;

			if(mhp2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrol02OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrol02OnMap = false;

			if(mhp3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrol03OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrol03OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE03);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE04);
				}
				break;
				
				case 2:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 3:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
				}
				break;
			}

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy BCSO Patrol Car");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 500)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 500;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!HighwayPatrol01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CHARGER_MHP, NAME_MHP_CAR01);

			else if(!HighwayPatrol02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_MHP1, NAME_MHP_CAR02);

			else if(!HighwayPatrol03OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_MHP2, NAME_MHP_CAR03);

			else if(HighwayPatrol01OnMap && HighwayPatrol02OnMap && HighwayPatrol03OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_OFFICER1, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_OFFICER1, UNNAMED);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CHARGER_MHP) == 0)
				n.SetSpeed(14.0f);
			else if(StrCompare(n.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_MHP1) == 0)
				n.SetSpeed(13.0f);
			else
				n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%4;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 38.0f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 31.0f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 28.0f);   break;

				case 3 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 25.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
			}

			if (!n.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && n.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &n, &n);

			System::Log("BCSO Patrol Car dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BACKUP);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallMHPSWAT : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallMHPSWAT()
	{
		SetIcon("callhrt");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_POLICE_SW, VT_POLICE_SW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CV_MHP3) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SWAT_MHP) == 0 || StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SWAT_MRAP_MHP) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool HighwayPatrolSwat01OnMap = false;
			bool HighwayPatrolSwat02OnMap = false;
			bool HighwayPatrolNegotiatorOnMap = false;

			VehicleList swat3(NAME_MHP_SWAT01);
			VehicleList swat4(NAME_MHP_SWAT02);
			VehicleList swat5(NAME_MHP_NEGOTIATOR);

			if(swat3.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrolSwat01OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrolSwat01OnMap = false;

			if(swat4.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrolSwat02OnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrolSwat02OnMap = false;

			if(swat5.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				HighwayPatrolNegotiatorOnMap = true;
			else
				HighwayPatrolNegotiatorOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
			ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE04);

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy MHP Swat Team");
			bool BuyNegotiatorOnly = false;
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 4000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			else if (Input::LCtrlPressed() || Input::RCtrlPressed())
				BuyNegotiatorOnly = true;
			else if (Money <= 1000)
				BuyNegotiatorOnly = true;
			if (BuyNegotiatorOnly)
				int NewMoney = Money - 1000;
			else
				int NewMoney = Money - 4000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;
			Person p2;

			if(!HighwayPatrolNegotiatorOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CV_MHP3, NAME_MHP_NEGOTIATOR);
			else if(HighwayPatrolNegotiatorOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_NEGOTIATOR, UNNAMED);
			p2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p2.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			p2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(2);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
			n.AddPassenger(&p2);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
			n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 50.0f);
			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
			}
			if (BuyNegotiatorOnly)
			{
				System::Log("MHP Negotiator dispatched");
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
			else if(!BuyNegotiatorOnly)
			{
				Vehicle m1;
				Person p3;
				Person p4;
				Person p5;
				Person p6;
				if(!HighwayPatrolSwat01OnMap)
					m = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SWAT_MHP, NAME_MHP_SWAT01);
				else if(!HighwayPatrolSwat02OnMap)
					m = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SWAT_MRAP_MHP, NAME_MHP_SWAT02);
				else if(HighwayPatrolSwat01OnMap && HighwayPatrolSwat02OnMap)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
					int NewMoney = Money + 3000;
					Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
					return;
				}
				if(StrCompare(m.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SWAT_MRAP_MHP) == 0)
					m.SetSpeed(7.0f);
				else
					m.SetSpeed(11.0f);
				p3 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
				p4 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
				p5 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);
				p6 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_MHP_SWAT_OFFICER, UNNAMED);

				Game::FindFreePosition(&m, Spawn, 500.0f);

				m.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
				m.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p3.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p4.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p5.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p6.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
				p3.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				p4.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				p5.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				p6.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				m.SetMaxPassengers(4);
				m.SetMaxTransports(0);
				m.AddPassenger(&p3);
				m.AddPassenger(&p4);
				m.AddPassenger(&p5);
				m.AddPassenger(&p6);
						m.SetPosition(Spawn);
						m.UpdatePlacement();
				m.Hide();
				m.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
				m.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 50.0f);
				m.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
