```cpp
				m.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (Game::IsMission())
				{
					if(m.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
						m.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
				}
				if (!m.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && m.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &m, &m);

				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallCoronersVan : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallCoronersVan()
	{
		SetIcon("callcoroner");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_AMBULANCE_ITW, VT_AMBULANCE_ITW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CORONERS_VAN) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool CoronersVanOnMap = false;
			VehicleList cr1(NAME_CORONERS_VAN);

			if(cr1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				CoronersVanOnMap = true;
			else
				CoronersVanOnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
				}
				break;
			}

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy coroners van");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 900)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 900;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;

			if(!CoronersVanOnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CORONERS_VAN, NAME_CORONERS_VAN);

			else if(CoronersVanOnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_CORONER, UNNAMED);
			n.SetSpeed(10.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(4);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 44.0f);   break;
				
				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 36.0f);   break;
				
				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 33.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			if (Game::IsMission())
			{
				if(n.HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"))
					n.RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation");
			}
			System::Log("Coroner's van dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdCallEngineersVan : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallEngineersVan()
	{
		SetIcon("callengineer");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if(Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo"))
		{
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkmike");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF2) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_BATBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
			else if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMS_CAPTAIN) == 0)
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_EMSBLS, Caller->GetPosition());
		}

		Vehicle *theCar = NULL;
		float bestCar = 0.;
		VehicleList patrolCars(VT_THW_FGRI_EKW, VT_THW_FGRI_EKW);
		for (int i = 0; i < patrolCars.GetNumVehicles(); i++) 
		{
			Vehicle *aCar = patrolCars.GetVehicle(i);
			if ((StrCompare(aCar->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINEERS_VAN) == 0) && aCar->GetPlayerMP() == Caller->GetPlayerMP() && (aCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || aCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL)))
			{
				float distCurrCar = Math::dist(CmdPos.x, CmdPos.y, aCar->GetPosition().x, aCar->GetPosition().y);
				if (distCurrCar < bestCar || bestCar == 0.) 
				{
					theCar = aCar;
					bestCar = distCurrCar;
				}
			}
		}

		if (theCar)
		{
			if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF) || theCar->HasObjectPath(NULL))
			{
				theCar->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.3f);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
					theCar->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PATROL, theCar, 1, false);
				theCar->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				if (!theCar->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && theCar->HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
					Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, theCar, theCar);
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF)) 
				{
					theCar->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (theCar->HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					theCar->EnableSpecialLights(false);
					theCar->RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					theCar->AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				theCar->EnableHeadLights(true);
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
				return;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			bool EngineersVan01OnMap = false;
			bool EngineersVan02OnMap = false;
			VehicleList ev1(NAME_ENGINEERS_VAN01);
			VehicleList ev2(NAME_ENGINEERS_VAN02);

			if(ev1.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				EngineersVan01OnMap = true;
			else
				EngineersVan01OnMap = false;

			if(ev2.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				EngineersVan02OnMap = true;
			else
				EngineersVan02OnMap = false;

			Vector Spawn;
			Vector Rotate;

			ActorList l1;
			ActorList l2;

			int randomLocation = Math::rand()%2;
			switch(randomLocation)
			{
				case 0:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE01);
				}
				break;
				
				case 1:
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
					l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
				}
				break;
			}

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			}
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			System::Log("Buy engineers van");
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			if (Money <= 1000)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}
			int NewMoney = Money - 1000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);

			Vehicle n;
			Person p1;

			if(!EngineersVan01OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_ENGINEERS_VAN01, NAME_ENGINEERS_VAN01);

			else if(!EngineersVan02OnMap)
				n = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_ENGINEERS_VAN02, NAME_ENGINEERS_VAN02);

			else if(EngineersVan01OnMap && EngineersVan02OnMap)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOPATROLCAR);
				return;
			}

			p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_ENGINEER, UNNAMED);
			p1.SetEquipment(EQUIP_THW_CASE);
			n.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			Game::FindFreePosition(&n, Spawn, 500.0f);

			n.SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
			n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			n.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			n.SetMaxTransports(4);
			n.AddPassenger(&p1);
					n.SetPosition(Spawn);
					n.UpdatePlacement();
			n.Hide();
			n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);

			int randomWait = Math::rand()%3;
			switch(randomWait)
			{
				case 0 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 22.0f);   break;

				case 1 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);   break;

				case 2 :   n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 17.0f);   break;
			}

			n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);

			System::Log("Engineer's van dispatched");
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DISPATCHED);
		}
	}
};

```

## DispatchCommand_CallTowTruckDispatch.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
 #Version 1.3#
 		Includes: Backup command for police units.

	    - PcmdCallTow
	
		Script by Hoppah, Edited By QuincyC
		Thanks to Bass-Ti for his help
		
		Modified to call tow truck script by itchboy for Montana Mod V2
		
		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah

******************************************************************************************/

const char HINT_NOTOW[] 			= "No Tow Truck Available!";
const char HINT_TOW_BOUGHT[] 		= "Tow Truck Dispatched!";
const char HINT_NOVAN[] 			= "No Engineer's Van Available!";
const char HINT_VAN_BOUGHT[] 		= "Engineer's Van Dispatched!";
const char HINT_NOCRANE[] 			= "No Heavy Rescue Crane Available!";
const char HINT_CRANE_BOUGHT[] 		= "Heavy Rescue Crane Dispatched!";
const char ANI_MIKE[] 				= "talkmike";
const char ANI_IDLE[] 				= "idle";
const char SND_PDBACK[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/1023.wav";
const char PROTO_TOW[] 				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/04 LA Tec/asf.e4p";
const char PROTO_VAN[] 				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/04 LA Tec/engineer_vehicle.e4p";
const char PROTO_CRANE_NORMAL[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/heavy_rescue_crane.e4p";
const char OBJ_EMT[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p";
const char OBJ_ENGINEER[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/04 LA Tec/engineer.e4p";
const char OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p";

const char VO_SPAWN02[] 			= "spawn02";
const char VO_SPAWN06[] 			= "spawn06";
const char VO_SPAWN05[] 			= "spawn05";
const char VO_SPAWN09[] 			= "spawn09";
const char VO_ROTATE02[] 			= "rotate02";
const char VO_ROTATE06[] 			= "rotate06";
const char VO_ROTATE05[] 			= "rotate05";
const char VO_ROTATE09[] 			= "rotate09";

const char UNNAMED[] 				= "Unnamed";

object PcmdCallTow : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallTow()
	{
		SetIcon("calltow");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos;
		CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_MIKE);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_IDLE);

		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACK, Caller->GetPosition());
		else
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACK, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vector Spawn;
		Vector Rotate;

		ActorList l1;
		ActorList l2;

		int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
		switch(randomLocation)
		{
			case 0:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
			}
			break;
			
			case 1:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE06);
			}
			break;
			
			case 2:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE05);
			}
			break;
			
			case 3:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
			}
			break;
		}

		if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTOW);
			return;
		}
		System::Log("Buy Tow Truck");
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money <= 550)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTOW);
			return;
		}
		int NewMoney = Money - 550;
		Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
		Vehicle n;
		n = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_TOW, UNNAMED);
		n.SetSpeed(9.0f);
		n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
               	n.SetPosition(Spawn);
               	n.UpdatePlacement();
		n.Hide();
		n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);
		n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
		n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_TOW_BOUGHT);
	}
};
	
object PcmdCallEngineer : CommandScript
{
	PcmdCallEngineer()
	{
		SetIcon("callengineer");
		SetCursor("callassistance");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos;
		CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_MIKE);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_IDLE);

		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACK, Caller->GetPosition());
		else
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACK, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vector Spawn;
		Vector Rotate;
		int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
		switch(randomLocation)
		{
			case 0:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE02);
			}
			break;
			
			case 1:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE06);
			}
			break;
			
			case 2:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE05);
			}
			break;
			
			case 3:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN09);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ROTATE09);
			}
			break;
		}
		if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			Rotate = l3.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else if(l2.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			Rotate = l4.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOVAN);
			return;
		}
		System::Log("Buy Engineer");
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money <= 450)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOVAN);
			return;
		}
		int NewMoney = Money - 450;
		Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
		Vehicle n;
		Person p1;
		n = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_VAN, UNNAMED);
		n.SetSpeed(9.0f);
		p1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_ENGINEER, UNNAMED);
		p1.SetEquipment(EQUIP_THW_CASE);
		n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
		p1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		n.SetMaxPassengers(1);
		n.SetMaxTransports(0);
		n.AddPassenger(&p1);
               	n.SetPosition(Spawn);
               	n.UpdatePlacement();
		n.Hide();
		n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.5f);
		n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
		n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_VAN_BOUGHT);
	}
};

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)

			return false;

			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))

		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACK, Caller->GetPosition());
		else
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_PDBACK, Caller->GetPosition());

		Vector Rotate;
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN_ALL);
		ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN_AMBU);
		ActorList l3 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN_ALLR);
		ActorList l4 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN_AMBUR);
		if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			Rotate = l3.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else if(l2.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			Rotate = l4.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCRANE);
			return;
		}
		System::Log("Buy Crane");
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money <= 2550)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOCRANE);
			return;
		}
		int NewMoney = Money - 2550;
		Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
		Vehicle n;
		n = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_CRANE_NORMAL, UNNAMED);
		n.SetSpeed(8.0f);
		n.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
               	n.SetPosition(Spawn);
               	n.UpdatePlacement();
		n.Hide();
		n.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
		n.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.5f);
		n.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
		n.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
		Mission::PlayHint(HINT_CRANE_BOUGHT);
	}
};
```

## DispatchCommand_MPFDStation1FillIn.script

```cpp
// Monida Pass Fire Department Station 1 fill-in command.
// Command: PcmdCallMPFDStation1FillIn
//
// Add this command to the battalion chief persons that should be able to request a fill-in.

const char MPFD_OBJ_EXPEDITION[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_expedition_s1.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_BRUSH[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_brush.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_ENGINE1[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_engine1.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_ENGINE2[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_engine2.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_battalion_chief.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_FF[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff.e4p";

const char MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION2[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_battalion_chief.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_chief.e4p";
const char MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_DIVISION[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_division_chief.e4p";

const char MPFD_VO_ENGINE4052[]				= "fs_Engine4052";
const char MPFD_VO_ENGINE4052_T[]			= "fs_Engine4052_t";
const char MPFD_VO_LADDER4054[]				= "fs_Ladder4054";
const char MPFD_VO_LADDER4054_T[]			= "fs_Ladder4054_t";
const char MPFD_VO_RESCUE4053[]				= "fs_Rescue4053";
const char MPFD_VO_RESCUE4053_T[]			= "fs_Rescue4053_t";
const char MPFD_VO_TANKER4153[]				= "fs_Tanker4153";
const char MPFD_VO_TANKER4153_T[]			= "fs_Tanker4153_t";
const char MPFD_VO_SPAWN[]					= "spawn_firedept";
const char MPFD_VO_SPAWN_R[]				= "spawn_firedeptr";

const char MPFD_CMD_GATES[]					= "DummyGates";
const char MPFD_CMD_SIREN[]					= "VcmdSiren";
const char MPFD_CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char MPFD_CMD_STANDBY_ON[]			= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char MPFD_CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char MPFD_CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON[]		= "VcmdWarningLightsOn";
const char MPFD_CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF[]		= "VcmdWarningLightsOff";
const char MPFD_DUMMY_HASSIREN[]			= "DummyHasSiren";
const char MPFD_DUMMY_ARRIVED[]				= "DummyMPFDStation1FillInArrived";

const char MPFD_ICON_FILLIN[]				= "callmpfdfillin";
const char MPFD_SOUND_FILLIN[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MPFD_Station1_FillIn.wav";

object DummyMPFDStation1FillInArrived : CommandScript
{
	DummyMPFDStation1FillInArrived()
	{
		SetGroupID(32);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		v.EnableBlueLights(false);
		v.EnableHeadLights(false);
		v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);

		if (v.HasCommand(MPFD_DUMMY_HASSIREN))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(MPFD_CMD_SIREN, &v, &v);
	}
};

object PcmdCallMPFDStation1FillIn : CommandScript
{
	bool MPFD_IsChief(Person p)
	{
		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION) == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_BATTALION2) == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_CHIEF) == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), MPFD_OBJ_BCFD_DIVISION) == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), MPFD_OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF) == 0)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool MPFD_IsSpotFree(const char *VO)
	{
		GameObjectList blockers;
		Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO, blockers, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		if (blockers.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void MPFD_AddPassenger(Vehicle v, const char *Prototype, int PlayerMP)
	{
		Person p = Game::CreatePerson(Prototype, "Unnamed");
		p.SetPlayerMP(PlayerMP);
		p.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		v.AddPassenger(&p);
	}

	void MPFD_AddFirefighters(Vehicle v, int Count, int PlayerMP)
	{
		for (int i = 0; i < Count; i++)
			MPFD_AddPassenger(&v, MPFD_OBJ_FF, PlayerMP);
	}

	bool MPFD_CreateFillInUnit(const char *VehiclePrototype, const char *Name, const char *ParkVO, const char *TurnVO, int CrewType, int PlayerMP, GameObject *Caller, float SpawnDelay)
	{
		Vector Spawn;
		Vector Rotate;
		Vector Park;
		Vector Turn;

		ActorList spawnList = Game::GetActors(MPFD_VO_SPAWN);
		if (spawnList.GetNumActors() == 0)
			return false;
		Spawn = spawnList.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

		ActorList rotateList = Game::GetActors(MPFD_VO_SPAWN_R);
		if (rotateList.GetNumActors() > 0)
			Rotate = rotateList.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		else
			Rotate = Spawn;

		ActorList parkList = Game::GetActors(ParkVO);
		if (parkList.GetNumActors() == 0)
			return false;
		Park = parkList.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

		ActorList turnList = Game::GetActors(TurnVO);
		if (turnList.GetNumActors() > 0)
			Turn = turnList.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		else
			Turn = Park;

		Vehicle v = Game::CreateVehicle(VehiclePrototype, Name);
		v.Hide();
		v.SetPlayerMP(PlayerMP);
		v.SetPosition(Spawn);
		v.SetSpeed(9.0f);
		v.SetMaxTransports(0);
		v.EnableBlueLights(false);
		v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
		v.UpdatePlacement();

		if (CrewType == 1)
		{
			v.SetMaxPassengers(1);
			MPFD_AddPassenger(&v, MPFD_OBJ_BATTALION_CHIEF, PlayerMP);
		}
		else if (CrewType == 2)
		{
			v.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			MPFD_AddFirefighters(&v, 2, PlayerMP);
		}
		else
		{
			v.SetMaxPassengers(4);
			MPFD_AddFirefighters(&v, 4, PlayerMP);
		}

		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, SpawnDelay);
		v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Rotate);
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
		v.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, MPFD_CMD_GATES, Caller, 1, false);
		v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Turn);
		v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Turn);
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
		v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Park);
		v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Turn);
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, MPFD_DUMMY_ARRIVED, Caller, 0, false);

		return true;
	}

	PcmdCallMPFDStation1FillIn()
	{
		SetIcon(MPFD_ICON_FILLIN);
		SetCursor(MPFD_ICON_FILLIN);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPriority(-800);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!MPFD_IsChief(&p))
			return false;

		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!MPFD_IsChief(&p))
			return false;

		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		int PlayerMP = Caller->GetPlayerMP();

		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "talkmike");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.0f);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");

		Audio::PlaySample(MPFD_SOUND_FILLIN);

		char Unit1[64];
		char Unit2[64];
		char Unit3[64];
		char Unit4[64];
		char Full1[64];
		char Full2[64];
		char Full3[64];
		char Full4[64];
		snprintf(Unit1, 63, "");
		snprintf(Unit2, 63, "");
		snprintf(Unit3, 63, "");
		snprintf(Unit4, 63, "");
		snprintf(Full1, 63, "");
		snprintf(Full2, 63, "");
		snprintf(Full3, 63, "");
		snprintf(Full4, 63, "");
		int Responding = 0;
		int FullSpots = 0;

		if (MPFD_IsSpotFree(MPFD_VO_TANKER4153))
		{
			if (MPFD_CreateFillInUnit(MPFD_OBJ_EXPEDITION, "mpfd_fillin_chief_s1", MPFD_VO_TANKER4153, MPFD_VO_TANKER4153_T, 1, PlayerMP, Caller, 0.0f))
			{
				snprintf(Unit1, 63, " MPFD Expedition,");
				Responding++;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			snprintf(Full1, 63, " Tanker 4153 spot is full.");
			FullSpots++;
		}

		if (MPFD_IsSpotFree(MPFD_VO_RESCUE4053))
		{
			if (MPFD_CreateFillInUnit(MPFD_OBJ_BRUSH, "mpfd_fillin_brush_s1", MPFD_VO_RESCUE4053, MPFD_VO_RESCUE4053_T, 2, PlayerMP, Caller, 5.0f))
			{
				snprintf(Unit2, 63, " MPFD Brush,");
				Responding++;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			snprintf(Full2, 63, " Rescue 4053 spot is full.");
			FullSpots++;
		}

		if (MPFD_IsSpotFree(MPFD_VO_ENGINE4052))
		{
			if (MPFD_CreateFillInUnit(MPFD_OBJ_ENGINE1, "mpfd_fillin_engine1_s1", MPFD_VO_ENGINE4052, MPFD_VO_ENGINE4052_T, 4, PlayerMP, Caller, 10.0f))
			{
				snprintf(Unit3, 63, " MPFD Engine 1,");
				Responding++;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			snprintf(Full3, 63, " Engine 4052 spot is full.");
			FullSpots++;
		}

		if (MPFD_IsSpotFree(MPFD_VO_LADDER4054))
		{
			if (MPFD_CreateFillInUnit(MPFD_OBJ_ENGINE2, "mpfd_fillin_engine2_s1", MPFD_VO_LADDER4054, MPFD_VO_LADDER4054_T, 4, PlayerMP, Caller, 15.0f))
			{
				snprintf(Unit4, 63, " MPFD Engine 2,");
				Responding++;
			}
		}
		else
		{
			snprintf(Full4, 63, " Ladder 4054 spot is full.");
			FullSpots++;
		}

		char Text[255];
		if (Responding > 0)
			snprintf(Text, 254, "Monida Pass Fire Department filling Station 1:%s%s%s%s", Unit1, Unit2, Unit3, Unit4);
		else
			snprintf(Text, 254, "Monida Pass Fire Department fill-in unavailable.%s%s%s%s", Full1, Full2, Full3, Full4);

		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 6.f);

		if (Responding > 0 && FullSpots > 0)
		{
			char Full[255];
			snprintf(Full, 254, "%s%s%s%s", Full1, Full2, Full3, Full4);
			Mission::PlayHint(Full);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Full, 5.f);
		}
	}
};

```

## DispatchCommand_SendPeople.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - Compatible with 'Lift person' command.
//
//******************************************************************************************

object SendPeople : CommandScript
{
       	MoveResult mr;

	SendPeople()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR|ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (!p.IsEquipped() || p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_REDIRECTSIGN) && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1)
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		mr = Commands::CheckMoveConditions(Caller, Target, childID);
		if(mr.Mode == MOVE_ABORT)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (!p.IsEquipped() || p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_REDIRECTSIGN) && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1 && p.IsCommandInRange(800.f))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Caller->PushActionSendPeople(ACTION_NEWLIST, 250.f, Game::GetCommandPos());
	}
};

```

## DrawWeapon.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.4#
//
// 		Changes: - Shoot and Holsterweapon commands will be added.
//			   - DrawWeapon will be removed.
//			   - Command cannot be executed when caller is carrying person.
//			   - Sound will be played.
//			   - Compatible with Armed Arrest mod.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_SHOOTGUN[] 		= "Shoot";
const char CMD_HOLSTERGUN[] 		= "HolsterWeapon";
const char CMD_DRAWGUN[] 		= "DrawWeapon";
const char CMD_ARREST[] 		= "Arrest";
const char CMD_ARREST2[] 		= "PcmdArrest2";
const char SND_DRAW[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/DrawWeapon.wav";
const char SND_AXON_BEEP[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Axon_Beep.wav";
const char DUMMY_AXON_NOTICE[]		= "DummyAxonBodyCamNotice";
const char HINT_AXON_NOTICE[]		= "Axon Body Worn Camera Activated";

object DrawWeapon : CommandScript
{

	DrawWeapon()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_DRAW_WEAPON);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(700);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		if(Input::LCtrlPressed() && Input::RCtrlPressed())
			return false;
		return !Caller->IsEquipped();
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1)
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && !p.IsEquipped() && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson())
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Caller->PushActionEquipWeapon(ACTION_NEWLIST, true);
		Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_SHOOTGUN);
		Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_HOLSTERGUN);
		Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_DRAWGUN);
		Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_ARREST2);
		Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_ARREST);

		Vector Pos = Caller->GetPosition();
		Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_DRAW, Pos);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.6f);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_AXON_NOTICE, Caller, 0, false);
	}
};

object DummyAxonBodyCamNotice : CommandScript
{
	DummyAxonBodyCamNotice()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_AXON_BEEP);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HINT_AXON_NOTICE, 4.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HINT_AXON_NOTICE, 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
	}
};

```

## emptycar.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
 #Version 1.3#

 		Changes: - ObjectPath will be removed if vehicle has one.

		EDITED BY ITCHBOY FOR MONTANA MOD V2
******************************************************************************************/

const char DUMMY_PATROL[] 			= "DummyPatrol";
const char DUMMY_TILLERGOHOME[]		= "DummyTillerGoHome";
//const char OBJ_DOG[] 				= "mod:Models/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_dog";
//const char OBJ_DOG[] 				= "mod:Models/Persons/03 LA Police/usar_rescuedog";
const char DUMMY_DOG[] 				= "DummyDog";
const char DUMMY_DOGTAKEN[]			= "DummyDogTaken";
const char DUMMY_ENGINE[]			= "DummyStartEngine";

const char CMD_OPENDOOR3[] = "OpenDoor3";
const char CMD_CLOSEDOOR3[] = "CloseDoor3";

const char OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE01[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/bcfd_ambulance01.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE02[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/ambulance03.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE03[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/topkick_ambulance.e4p";
const char OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE04[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/ambulance02.e4p";
const char OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/ambulance04.e4p";
const char OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/ambulance01.e4p";

object EmptyCar : CommandScript
{

	EmptyCar()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(100);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if(v.HasCommand("FlyTo") && !v.IsOnGround())
			return false;
		return v.GetNumPassengers() > 0;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE && Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID())
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if (!v.IsValid() ||  v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;
			if(v.HasCommand("FlyTo") && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;		
			if(v.GetNumPassengers() > 0)
				return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if(v.HasObjectPath(NULL))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
		if (!v.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool") && !v.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish"))
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.05f);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_TILLERGOHOME))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_TILLERGOHOME);
		if (v.HasCommand("DummyFollow"))
			v.RemoveCommand("DummyFollow");
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_lapdk9.e4p") == 0 && !v.HasCommand(DUMMY_DOGTAKEN))
		{
			PersonList l = v.GetPassengers();
			for(int i=0; i<l.GetNumPersons(); i++)
			if (StrCompare(l.GetPerson(i)->GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_dog_leader.e4p") == 0)
			{
				Person p = l.GetPerson(0);
				p.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_DOG, Target, 1, false);
			}
		}
		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
		Vector Pos = v.GetPosition();

		PersonList l = v.GetPassengers();
		for(int i=0; i<l.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			if(!l.GetPerson(i)->HasAnimation("bark"))
			{
				Person passenger = l.GetPerson(i);
				if(passenger.HasCommand("GetStryker") && i == 0) //make paramedic spawn at the rear
				{
					if(v.HasCommand("DummyHasSiren"))
						Game::ExecuteCommand("VcmdSiren", &v);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_OPENDOOR3, Caller, 1, false);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.7f);
					if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE01 == 0))
						float dx = -235.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
					else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE04 == 0) || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE03 == 0) || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE02 == 0))
						float dx = -245.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
					else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PRIVATE_AMBULANCE01 == 0) || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_AMBULANCE02 == 0))
						float dx = -350.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
					v.RemovePassenger(&passenger);
					Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
					Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
					Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);

					Pos = Pos + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

					Game::FindFreePosition(&passenger, Pos);
					passenger.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.7f);
					passenger.SetPosition(Pos);
					passenger.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					passenger.UpdatePlacement();
					passenger.Hide();
					passenger.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
					passenger.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_CLOSEDOOR3, Caller, 1, false);
				}
				else
					l.GetPerson(i)->PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
			}
		}
		if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRT_BH)
		{
			PersonList l2 = v.GetTransports();
			for(int i=0; i<l2.GetNumPersons(); i++)
				if (!l2.GetPerson(i)->HasAnimation("bark"))
					l2.GetPerson(i)->PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
		}
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ENGINE, &v, 1, false);
	}
};

```

## entercar.script

```cpp
/********************************************************************************************
#Version 1.6#
		Changes: - Doctor (paramedic) will enter Ambulance via REARDOOR.
			 - Almost all units can enter all police type cars.
			 - Units in FBI command vehicle will be healed
			 - Compatible with police dog
********************************************************************************************/

const char NAME_DOG[]					= "LASDDog";
const char DUMMY_DOG[]					= "DummyDog";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object EnterCar : CommandScript
{
	Vector TargetPos;
	bool NotInLandingStage;
	
	EnterCar()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED);
		SetNeedsConnectedHose(CFN_FAIL);
		SetPriority(200);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyHasStretcher") && !Caller->IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient"))
			return false;
		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		SetPriority(200);
		if (Input::PriorityKeyPressed())
			SetPriority(2000);
		
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.GetEnergy() < = 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
				return false;
			
			if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP)
			{
				if (!p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && v.GetFreePassengers()==0 && !p.IsContaminated())
					return false;
				else if (!p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.IsContaminated() &&  v.GetFreeTransports() < 1)
				     	return false;
				else if ((p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson()) && v.GetFreeTransports() < 2)
					return false;
			}
			else
			{
				if(v.GetFreePassengers()==0 && !(p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson()))
					return false;
				if ((p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson()) && v.GetFreeTransports() == 0)
					return false;
				if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
					return false;				
				if (p.IsPulling() || (p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && p.GetFirehoseID() > 0))
					return false;
				if (p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher"))
					return false;
				if (p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient") && v.GetFreeTransports() == 0)
					return false;
				if (p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient") && (v.GetVehicleType() != VT_AMBULANCE_RTW && v.GetVehicleType() != VT_AMBULANCE_RHC))
					return false;
			}

			switch(v.GetVehicleType())
			{
				case VT_NOSQUAD :
				case VT_TAXI :
				case VT_BUS :
				case VT_DRIVERCAR :
				case VT_THW_FGRB_BLF :
				case VT_THW_FGRR_BKF :
				case VT_POLICE_GETAWAY :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_ASF :
					return false;
				break;

				case VT_THW_FGRI_EKW :
				case VT_THW_FGRT_BH :
					if(!p.HasCommand("Moveto") && !p.HasCommand("Repair") && !p.HasCommand("Dive") && !p.HasCommand("Use"))
						return false;
				break;

				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LF :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_FLB :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TFMB :
				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF :
					if(p.GetBehaviour()	!= BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER && p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_RESCUE)
						return false;
					if(p.IsParamedicTeam())
						return false;
					if(p.HasCommand("SendDog") || p.HasCommand("CallDog"))
						return false;
				break;

				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP :
					if(!p.HasCommand("DriveAwayPerson") && !p.IsContaminated())
						return false;
					if(!p.CanEnterDekonP())
						return false;
				break;

				case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_FMB:
					if(p.GetBehaviour()	!= BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER && p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_RESCUE && p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_THW)
						return false;
					if(v.IsInLandingStage(false, TargetPos, -0.2f) >= 0)
					{
						NotInLandingStage = false;
						return true;
					}
					if(v.IsInLandingStage(true, TargetPos, -0.2f) >= 0)
					{
						NotInLandingStage = false;
						return true;
					}
					NotInLandingStage = true;
				break;

				case VT_POLICE_STW :
				case VT_POLICE_MTW :
				case VT_POLICE_SW :
				case VT_POLICE_WAW :
				case VT_POLICE_GTW :
					if(p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsContaminated())
					   	return false;
					if(p.GetBehaviour()	!= BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_POLICE && p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_THW)
						return false;
				break;
				case VT_POLICE_PHC :
					if(p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsParamedicTeam() || p.IsContaminated() || p.HasCommand("SendDog"))
					   	return false;
				break;

				case VT_AMBULANCE_RHF :
					if(!p.HasCommand("SendDog") && !p.HasCommand("CallDog"))
						return false;
				break;

				case VT_AMBULANCE_ITW :
					if(p.HasCommand("SendDog") || p.HasCommand("CallDog"))
						return false;
					if(p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient"))
						return false;
					if(p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_RESCUE && p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_POLICE)
						return false;
				break;

				case VT_AMBULANCE_NEF :
					if(p.HasCommand("SendDog") || p.HasCommand("CallDog"))
						return false;
					if(p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_RESCUE)
						return false;
					if(p.IsParamedicTeam())
						return false;
				break;
						
				case VT_AMBULANCE_RHC :
				case VT_AMBULANCE_RTW :
					if(v.GetFreePassengers() == 0)
						return false;
					if(p.HasCommand("SendDog") || p.HasCommand("CallDog"))
						return false;
					if(p.GetBehaviour()	!= BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER && p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_RESCUE && p.GetBehaviour() != BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_THW)
						return false;
				break;
				default : return false;
			}

			if((p.HasCommand("extinguish") && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson())) || p.IsContaminated())
			{
				if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP)
					return true;
				else
					return false;
			}
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vehicle v(Target);

		/* if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_dog_leader.e4p") == 0 && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_lapdk9.e4p") == 0)
		{
			int PersonID = p.GetID();
			GameObjectList list = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_DOG);
			for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = list.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetUserData() == PersonID)
				{	
					Person d = list.GetObject(0);
					if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&d) < 500.f)
					{
						Vector TargetPos = v.GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);
						p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
						p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
						p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_DOG, Target, 3, false);
						d.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
						d.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
						d.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_DOG, Target, 4, false);
						d.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 900.f);
						return;
					} else
					 Mission::PlayHint("Police dog is not in range!");
				}
			}		
		} */
		
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson())
		{
			Person carried = p.GetCarried();
			bool carriedClassified = false;
			if (carried.IsClassified())
				carriedClassified = true;
			if(!carriedClassified && (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC))
			{
				ScriptInterface::ShowMessageTickerTextForSinglePlayer(Caller, "ALLM_CLASSIFY_FIRST");
				return;
			}
		}

		TargetPoint targetPoint;
		if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW)
			targetPoint = TARGET_REARDOOR;
		else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRT_BH)
			targetPoint = TARGET_REARDOOR;
		else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_FMB)
		{
			if (NotInLandingStage)
				targetPoint = TARGET_OBJECTSURFACE;
			else
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				Caller->PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/Fire Department/fmb.e4p") == 0)
					Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyMotorboat", &v, 3, false);
				return;
			}
		}
		// diese Abfrage auf jeden Fall erst nach ITW und FMB
		if((p.HasCommand("extinguish") && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson())) || p.IsContaminated())
		{
			if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP)
				targetPoint = TARGET_REARDOOR;
		}
		else if (p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient") && (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC))
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, targetPoint);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyPutStretcherInCar", &v, 0, false);
			return;
		}

		if (p.HasCommand("SendDog") && p.GetArrestedID() != -1)
		{
			targetPoint = TARGET_REARDOOR;
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, targetPoint);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionPutInCar(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			targetPoint = TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR;
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Target, targetPoint);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		}
		else
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, targetPoint);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/Fire Department/fmb.e4p") == 0)
				Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyMotorboat", &v, 3, false);
		}
	}
};

object DummyFullHeal : CommandScript
{
	DummyFullHeal()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
 		return false;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
 		return false;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.SetHealth(p.GetMaxHealth() * 1.0f);
	}
};
```

## EnterHouse.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
//	    Search HOUSE script v2 by Hoppah
//		Added ability to search normal House objects with random search results
//******************************************************************************************

const char NAME_SEARCHHOUSE[] 		= "SearchHouse";	//only houses with a child with this name can be searched
float TIME_SEARCH					= 30.f; 			//search time in seconds

object EnterHouse : CommandScript
{
	Vector EntrancePos;
	bool moveOut, fromDLK;
	int h0;
	EnterHouse()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE | ACTOR_HOUSE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsConnectedHose(CFN_FAIL);
		//SetPossibleExists(CPE_ACCESSIBLE_HOUSE);
		SetPriority(110);
	}
	
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		if(Caller->GetFirehoseID() > 0)
			return false;
		return true;
		//return Game::ExistsAccessibleHouse();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType()!=ACTOR_PERSON || Caller->HasCommand("DummySniper"))
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE)
		{			
			SetCommandName("Enter building");		
			OpenHouse targetHouse(Target);
			Person person(Caller);
			if(person.GetFirehoseID() > 0)
				return false;

			if (person.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 && !targetHouse.HasGroundEntrance() && person.CanEnterHouseFromDLK(&targetHouse))
			{
				fromDLK = true;
				return true;
			}
			fromDLK = false;
			// check if house can be entered
			if (!targetHouse.IsValid() || targetHouse.IsOpen() || !targetHouse.HasGroundEntrance() || !targetHouse.IsFlagSet(OF_ACCESSIBLE))
			{
				/*if ( !targetHouse.IsValid() )
					System::Print("EnterHouse: target house is not valid");
				if ( targetHouse.IsOpen() )
					System::Print("EnterHouse: door is open");
				if ( !targetHouse.HasGroundEntrance() )
					System::Print("EnterHouse: !targetHouse.HasGroundEntrance()");
				if ( !targetHouse.IsFlagSet(OF_ACCESSIBLE) )
					System::Print("EnterHouse: !targetHouse.IsFlagSet(OF_ACCESSIBLE)");*/
				return false;
			}
			if(targetHouse.GetEntranceDoorID() == 0)
			{
				//System::Print("EnterHouse: target house has no entrance door.");
				return false;
			}

			if (person.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
				return false;
			
			// if house is locked and caller carries an axe, ignore EnterHouse Command so that UseEquipment is the only available command
			if (targetHouse.IsLocked() && person.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREAXE)
				return false;

			// check if inside house
			if (person.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1)
			{
				// check if source house has ground entrance
				Actor ha = Game::GetActor(person.GetEnteredHouseID());
				OpenHouse sourceHouse(&ha);
				if (!sourceHouse.HasGroundEntrance() || sourceHouse.GetEntranceDoorID() == 0)
				{
				//	System::Print("EnterHouse: source house has no ground entrance");
					return false;
				}

				moveOut = true;
				h0 = sourceHouse.GetID();
				EntrancePos = sourceHouse.GetEntrancePosition(false);
			}
			else
				moveOut = false;
				
			return true;			
		}	
		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_HOUSE)
		{
			SetCommandName("Search building");		
			GameObject targetHouse(Target);
			if (targetHouse.IsChildEnabled(NAME_SEARCHHOUSE) && targetHouse.GetUserData() != 99)
			{
				EntrancePos = targetHouse.GetChildPosition(NAME_SEARCHHOUSE);
				return true;
			}
			return false;			
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_HOUSE)
		{
			GameObject targetHouse(Target);	
			Vector TargetPos = targetHouse.GetPosition();
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, EntrancePos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "opendoor");
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummySearchHouse", Target, 0, false);
		} 
		else if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE)
		{	
			OpenHouse targetHouse(Target);
			Vector DoorFront, DoorBack;
			Vector DoorFront = targetHouse.GetEntrancePosition(true);
			Vector DoorBack = targetHouse.GetEntrancePosition(false);
			if (fromDLK)
			{
				Caller->PushActionEnterHouse(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
				return;
			}
			if (moveOut)
			{
				Actor house = Game::GetActor(h0);
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, EntrancePos, true);
				Caller->PushActionLeaveHouse(ACTION_APPEND, &house);
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, DoorFront, true);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, DoorBack);
				Caller->PushActionEnterHouse(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
			else
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, DoorFront, true);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, DoorBack);
				Caller->PushActionEnterHouse(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
		}
	}
};

const int MAX_POOL = 15;
const char *CivilPool[MAX_POOL];

object DummySearchHouse : CommandScript
{
 	DummySearchHouse()
 	{
		CivilPool[0] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p";
		CivilPool[1] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilminister01.e4p";
		CivilPool[2] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/dealer01.e4p";
		CivilPool[3] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/dealer02.e4p";
		CivilPool[4] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman06_yellow.e4p";
		CivilPool[5] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_red.e4p";
		CivilPool[6] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman02_silver.e4p";
		CivilPool[7] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold01.e4p";
		CivilPool[8] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold02.e4p";
		CivilPool[9] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman03_blue.e4p";
		CivilPool[10] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman01_yellow.e4p";
		CivilPool[11] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman05.e4p";
		CivilPool[12] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwomanold01.e4p";
		CivilPool[13] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilboy02_green.e4p";
		CivilPool[14] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilgirl02_blue.e4p";
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		return true;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
		Person p(Caller);
		GameObject targetHouse(Target);
		Vector Pos = targetHouse.GetChildPosition(NAME_SEARCHHOUSE);
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			if (targetHouse.GetUserData() != 99)
			{
				targetHouse.SetUserData(99);
				GameObject m = Game::CreateObject("mod:Prototypes/Objects/Fences/constrfence03.e4p", "Unnamed");
				m.SetPosition(Pos);
				m.SetRotation(Caller);
				m.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, TIME_SEARCH-0.5f);
				m.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
			}
			if (p.IsSelected())
				p.Deselect();
			p.Hide();
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, TIME_SEARCH);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummySearchHouse", &targetHouse, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			p.Show();
			if (targetHouse.GetUserData() == 99 && (targetHouse.IsBurning() || targetHouse.GetBurningStatus() == OBS_HALFBURNED || targetHouse.GetBurningStatus() == OBS_FULLBURNED))
			{
				//OUTCOME FOR BUILDINGS ON FIRE OR BURNED DOWN
				
				targetHouse.SetUserData(0);					
				int Random = Math::rand()%10;					
				if (Random == 0 || Random == 3 || Random == 6)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("Nothing suspicious found after searching a building!");
				}
				else if (Random == 1 || Random == 9)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("A resident has been found and evacuated!");
					int RandomPerson = Math::rand()%MAX_POOL;
					Person t = Game::CreatePerson(CivilPool[RandomPerson], "Unnamed");
					//Game::FindFreePosition(&t, Pos, 500.f);
					t.SetPosition(Pos);
					if (!p.IsEquipped() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsPulling() && (p.HasCommand("Arrest") || p.HasCommand("DriveAwayPerson")))
						p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_NEWLIST, &t);
					else
						p.SetIdleAnimation();
				}
				else if (Random == 2 || Random == 7 || Random == 4)
				{
					if (p.GetPersonType() == PT_FIREFIGHTER_MASK)
					{
						Mission::PlayHint("Fire fighter received minor injuries while searching a building!");
						p.Hurt(INJUREREASON_ENERGY, p.GetMaxHealth() * 0.45f);
					} 
					else
					{
						int InjureRandom = Math::rand()%3;
						if (InjureRandom == 2)
						{
							Mission::PlayHint("Fire fighter got severly injured while searching a building!");
							p.Injure(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, true);								
						}
						else
						{
							Mission::PlayHint("Fire fighter received minor injuries while searching a building!");
							p.Hurt(INJUREREASON_ENERGY, p.GetMaxHealth() * 0.9f);
						}
					}
				}
				else if (Random == 5 || Random == 8)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("A victim has been found while searching a building!");	
					int RandomPerson = Math::rand()%MAX_POOL;
					Person t = Game::CreatePerson(CivilPool[RandomPerson], "Unnamed");
					//Game::FindFreePosition(&t, Pos, 500.f);
					t.SetPosition(Pos);
					t.Injure(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, false);
					t.SetBloodPuddle(false);
					if (!p.IsEquipped() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsPulling() && p.HasCommand("Lift") && p.HasCommand("UnloadPerson"))
						p.PushActionLift(ACTION_NEWLIST, &t);
					else
						p.SetIdleAnimation();
				}				
			} 
			else if (targetHouse.GetUserData() == 99)
			{
				//OUTCOME FOR NORMAL BUILDINGS (no injuries or victims)
				
				targetHouse.SetUserData(0);					
				int Random = Math::rand()%3;				
				if (Random == 1)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("Nothing suspicious found after searching a building!");
				}
				else if (Random == 0 || Random == 2)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("A resident has been found and evacuated!");
					int RandomPerson = Math::rand()%MAX_POOL;
					Person t = Game::CreatePerson(CivilPool[RandomPerson], "Unnamed");
					//Game::FindFreePosition(&t, Pos, 500.f);
					t.SetPosition(Pos);
					if (!p.IsEquipped() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsPulling() && (p.HasCommand("Arrest") || p.HasCommand("DriveAwayPerson")))
						p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_NEWLIST, &t);
					 else
						p.SetIdleAnimation();
				}					
			}
		}
	}
};
```

## extinguish.script

```cpp
// PersonCommand_ExtinguishFire.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: Extinguish
object Extinguish : CommandScript
{
	bool useDLKlogic;

	Extinguish()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_BURNING);
		SetKeepAsCurrentCommand(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_FIRE_EXTINGUISHER | EQUIP_FIREHOSE);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_EXTINGUISHABLE_OBJECTS);
		SetNeedsConnectedHose(CFN_NEEDED);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;
		if(Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		GameObject o(Target);
		if(!o.IsValid() || !o.IsBurning() || o.GetNumActiveFireChilds() == 0)
			return false;
		if (StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/engine4.e4p") == 0 && Caller->GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(Target) >= 650.f)
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if (p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && o.GetParentHouseID() > -1)
				return false;
			if (p.CanUseDLKCannon())
			{
				useDLKlogic = true;
				if (o.GetNumActiveFireChilds() == 0)
					return false;
				if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != -1 && p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != Target->GetID())
					return false;
				if (p.GetEnteredCarID() == Target->GetID())
					return false;
				
				if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != -1 && !o.IsBurningInside())
					return false;
				else 
				if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() == -1 && !o.IsBurningOutside())
					return false;
				return true;
			}
			if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
				return false;
		}
		useDLKlogic = false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE || Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIRE_EXTINGUISHER || Caller->GetEquipment()== EQUIP_FIREHOSE)
		{
			if (Caller->GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Caller->GetFirehoseID() == 0)
				return false;
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (useDLKlogic)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if (p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() == -1)
			{
				Caller->PushActionTurnBase(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
				Caller->PushActionCannonExtinguish(ACTION_APPEND, Target, 35.f, false);
			}
			else
				Caller->PushActionCannonExtinguish(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, 35.f, false);
			return;
		}

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			float Energy;
			if(v.GetVehicleType()==VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF)
				Energy = 30.0f;
			else
			if(v.GetVehicleType()==VT_FIREFIGHTERS_FLB)
				Energy = 70.0f;
			else
			if(v.GetVehicleType()==VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF)
				Energy = 40.0f;
			else
				Energy = 70.0f;

			Energy = Energy*1.4f;

			GameObject o(Target);
			if (v.IsCurrentAnimation("activate"))
			{
				int UnitID = v.GetID();	
				GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix("engine_water_cannon");
				for(int i = 0; i < l1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
				{
					if (l1.GetObject(i)->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
					{
						Vehicle obj(l1.GetObject(i));
						if (obj.GetUserData() == UnitID && obj.CheckExtinguishDistance(o) && obj.GetVehicleType()==VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF)
							obj.PushActionExtinguish(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, Energy);
					}
				}
				return;
			}			
			else if (!v.CheckExtinguishDistance(o))
			{
				if (v.HasCommand("VcmdRotateLightmast"))
					return;
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_EXTINGUISH);
				Caller->PushActionExtinguish(ACTION_APPEND, Target, Energy);
			}
			else
				Caller->PushActionExtinguish(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, Energy);
		}
		else
		{
			if (Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_ENGINE_EXTINGUISH);
				Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_ENGINE);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
			}
			else
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_EXTINGUISH_PERSON);
				Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_FLAME_EFFECT);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
			}
			float Energy = (Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIREHOSE) ? 5.0f : 2.0f;
			Caller->PushActionExtinguish(ACTION_APPEND, Target, Energy*1.4);
		}
	}
};
```

## GetAxe.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.2#
//
// 		Changes: - UseAxe will assigned.
//			   - Person with HolsterWeapon can't use this command.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char DUMMY_EQUIPMENT[] 		= "DummyEquipmentCommands";

object GetAxe : CommandScript
{
	GetAxe()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFIREAXE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.HasCommand("DummyHasStrether") || p.HasCommand("Dummy_HasSpineboard") && (p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher") || p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient")))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID()))
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;
		}

		GameObject obj(Target);
		if (Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON && Caller->GetEquipment()!=EQUIP_FIREAXE &&
			obj.IsValid() && obj.IsFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE))
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson()|| p.HasCommand("HolsterWeapon") || p.IsLinkedWithPerson()|| p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
				return false;
			
			return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_FIREAXE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_EQUIPMENT, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

```

## GetFlashgrenade.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.2#
//
// 		Changes: - Throw will assigned.
//			   - Person with HolsterWeapon can't use this command.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char DUMMY_EQUIPMENT[] 		= "DummyEquipmentCommands";

object GetFlashgrenade : CommandScript
{
	GetFlashgrenade()
	{
		SetIcon("getgrenade");
		SetCursor("getgrenade");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFLASHGRENADE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FLASHGRENADE || p.IsCarryingPerson()||p.IsLinkedWithPerson()|| p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE))
			return false;
		return true;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID()))
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;
		}
			
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && p.IsLinkedWithPerson() ||  p.HasCommand("HolsterWeapon") || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		GameObject obj(Target);
		if (Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON && Caller->GetEquipment()!=EQUIP_FLASHGRENADE &&
			obj.IsValid() && obj.IsFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE))
		{
			return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (Input::PriorityKeyPressed() || (Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed()))
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_FLASHGRENADE);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_EQUIPMENT, Target, 7, false);
		}
		else
		{
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);

			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_FLASHGRENADE);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_EQUIPMENT, Target, 7, false);
		}
	}
};

```

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.2#
//
// 		Changes: - UseRoadBlock will assigned.
//			   - Person with HolsterWeapon can't use this command.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char DUMMY_EQUIPMENT[] 		= "DummyEquipmentCommands";

object GetRoadBlock : CommandScript
{
	GetRoadBlock()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEquipment()==EQUIP_ROADBLOCK || p.IsCarryingPerson()||p.IsLinkedWithPerson()|| p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
			return false;
		return true;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID()))
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;
		}

		GameObject obj(Target);
		if (Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON && Caller->GetEquipment()!=EQUIP_ROADBLOCK &&
			obj.IsValid() && obj.IsFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
		{
			if (obj.GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Vehicle vec(&obj);
				if (vec.IsDestroyed())
					return false;
			}
			Person p(Caller);
			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson()|| p.HasCommand("HolsterWeapon") || p.IsLinkedWithPerson()|| p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
				return false;
			
			return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_EQUIPMENT, Target, 6, false);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_ROADBLOCK);
	}
};
```

```cpp
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_SHEARS);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_EQUIPMENT, Target, 5, false);
	}
};

```

## Halt.script

```cpp
// PersonCommand_HaltPerson.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: Halt
object Halt : CommandScript
{

	Halt()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}
	
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (!p.IsEquipped() || p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_REDIRECTSIGN) && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1)
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (!p.IsEquipped() || p.GetEquipment() == EQUIP_REDIRECTSIGN) && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1)
			return true;
		
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Caller->PushActionHalt(ACTION_NEWLIST, 250, HALT_PERSONS); 
		Caller->AssignCommand("Stop");
	}
};

```
