```cpp
const char BIG57[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/Wrecks_sliceable/trainwreckwreck11_part2.e4p";
const char BIG58[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/Wrecks_sliceable/trainwreckwreck12.e4p";
const char BIG59[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/Wrecks_sliceable/truckwreck10.e4p";
const char BIG60[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/Wrecks_sliceable/twinkletruck02.e4p";

object LoadUp : CommandScript
{
	LoadUp()
	{
		SetIcon("liftwithcrane");
		SetCursor("liftwithcrane");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_TRANSPORTABLE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		return !Caller->IsCarryingAnything() && Game::ExistsObjectWithFlagSet(OF_TRANSPORTABLE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID()))
			return false;

		if(Caller->GetObjectType()!=TYPE_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		// check if caller already carries an object
		GameObjectList ol = Caller->GetCarriedObjects();
		if(ol.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;
			
		// check if target object can be picked up
		GameObject obj(Target);
		if (!obj.IsValid() || obj.IsFlagSet(OF_PERSON_ENCLOSED) || !obj.IsFlagSet(OF_TRANSPORTABLE))
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.GetEnergy() <= 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy() && !v.IsSmoking())
				return true; // Fahrzeug kaputt und gel�scht
			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return true; // Fahrzeug zerst�rt
			if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), MOTORCYCLE) == 0 && v.IsCurrentAnimation("Getoff"))
				return true; // Motorcycle without officer
			if (!v.IsParking())
				return true; // normales Fahrzeug, welches nicht parkt
		}

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), NYPD_TOW01) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), NYPD_TOW02) == 0)
		{
			bool TooBig = false;
			GameObject t(Target);
			if (StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG01) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG02) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG03) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG04) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG05) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG06) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG07) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG08) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG09) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG10) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG11) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG12) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG13) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG14) == 0)
				TooBig = true;			
			else if (StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG15) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG16) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG17) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG18) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG19) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG20) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG21) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG22) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG23) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG24) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG25) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG26) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG27) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG28) == 0)
				TooBig = true;			
			else if (StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG29) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG30) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG31) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG32) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG33) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG34) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG35) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG36) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG37) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG38) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG39) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG40) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG41) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG42) == 0)
				TooBig = true;
			else if (StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG43) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG44) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG45) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG46) == 0 ||	
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG47) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG48) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG49) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG50) == 0 ||	
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG51) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG52) == 0 ||	StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG53) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG54) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG55) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG56) == 0)
				TooBig = true;
			else if (StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG57) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG58) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG59) == 0 || StrCompare(t.GetPrototypeFileName(), BIG60) == 0)
				TooBig = true;
			else if (t.GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Vehicle vt(&t);
				switch(vt.GetVehicleType())
				{
					case VT_BUS :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_ASF :
					case VT_THW_FGRR_BKF :
					case VT_THW_FGRB_BLF :
					case VT_THW_FGRI_EKW :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_ASF :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_FLB :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF :
					case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TFMB :				
						TooBig = true;
					break;
				}
			}			
			if (TooBig && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), NYPD_TOW01) == 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_TOO_BIG);
				return;
			}
			else if (!TooBig && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), NYPD_TOW02) == 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_TOO_SMALL);
				return;
			}	
		}
	
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_LOADUP);
		if (StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), NYPD_TOW01) == 0 || StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), NYPD_TOW02) == 0)
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyTow", Target, 0, false);	
		else
			Caller->PushActionLoadUp(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
	
	}	
};

```

## move.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
 #Version 1.6#
	Changes: - Activates sirens if vehicle has AutoSirenOn.
		   - Disables sirens after arriving on targetpoint.
		   - Disables warninglights and/or directional lights.
		   - ObjectPath will be removed if vehicle has one.
******************************************************************************************/

const char CMD_SIREN[]					= "VcmdSiren";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF_OLD[]		= "VCmdAutoSirenOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_ON[]				= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char CMD_WHITELIGHT[]				= "VcmdWhiteLight";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[] 			= "DummyHasSiren";
const char DUMMY_DISABLE[] 				= "DummyDisableSiren";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[] 				= "DummyPatrol";
const char DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY[]			= "DummyFuelEmpty";

class move : CommandScript
{
	bool parkMarkerPossible(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.GetFreePassengers() > 0 && v.GetNumPassengers() == 0)
			return false;
		if (v.IsInstalled())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	void onMove(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.HasCommand("DummyVehicleCalled"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyVehicleCalled");
		if (v.HasCommand("DummyFollow"))			v.RemoveCommand("DummyFollow");
		if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL) || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
		Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
		if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF, &v, &v);
		if (v.GetBlinkerStatus() != BLT_NONE)
			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
	}
};

object MoveTo : CommandScript
{
	MoveResult mr;

	MoveTo()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VIRTUAL | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{	
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if (v.GetNumPassengers() == 0 && v.GetFreePassengers() > 0)
				return false;
			if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
				return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		mr = Commands::CheckMoveConditions(Caller, Target, childID);
		if(mr.Mode == MOVE_ABORT)
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if (v.GetNumPassengers() == 0 && v.GetFreePassengers() > 0)
				return false;
			if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
				return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (mr.Mode == MOVE_ABORT)
			return;
		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
		{
			Mission::PlayHint("Vehicle out of fuel!");
			return;
		}
		if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn") || Caller->HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle") || Caller->HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyFromVehicle") || Caller->HasCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn"))
			return;
		if (Input::PriorityKeyPressed() && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && !Caller->IsInsideWater())		//for parking marker logic
		{
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, "DummyParkingMarker", Game::GetCommandPos());
			return;
		}

		switch(mr.Mode)
		{
			case MOVE_TO_POSITION:
			{
				if (Caller->GetFirehoseID() > 0)
				{
					Caller->PushActionMoveWithHose(ACTION_NEWLIST, mr.Target);
					return;
				}
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, mr.Target, true);
				break;
			}
			
			case MOVE_INTO_HOUSE:
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, mr.Intermediate1, true);
				Caller->PushActionEnterHouse(ACTION_APPEND, &mr.EnterHouse);
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, mr.Target, true);
				break;
			}
			
			case MOVE_HOUSE_TO_HOUSE:
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, mr.Intermediate1, true);
				Caller->PushActionLeaveHouse(ACTION_APPEND, &mr.LeaveHouse);
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, mr.Intermediate2, true);
				Caller->PushActionEnterHouse(ACTION_APPEND, &mr.EnterHouse);
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, mr.Target, true);
				break;
			}
			
			case MOVE_HOUSE_TO_POSITION:
			{
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, mr.Intermediate1, true);
				Caller->PushActionLeaveHouse(ACTION_APPEND, &mr.LeaveHouse);
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, mr.Target, true);
				break;
			}
		}

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if (v.IsLightOn())
				v.PushActionLightOn(ACTION_INSERT, false);

			if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/swr_boat.e4p") == 0)
				Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_INSERT, "DummyMotorboat", Caller, 3, false);					

			if (v.HasCommand("DummyFollow"))
				v.RemoveCommand("DummyFollow");
			if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && (v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) || v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF_OLD)) && !Input::LShiftPressed() && !Input::RShiftPressed())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &v, &v);
			if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled())
				Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_WHITELIGHT, &v, &v);
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyVehicleCalled"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyVehicleCalled");
			if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL) || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_PATROL))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
			if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
			{
				v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
				v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
			}
			if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
			{
				v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
				v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
				v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
			}
		}

		// Special code for fgrr (Bergefahrzeug). Deinstalls itself automatically
		if (mr.UnInstall) 
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRR_BKF)
			{
				//System::Print("FGRR: Mode 1 - DeInstall");
				Caller->PushActionDeinstall(ACTION_INSERT);
			}
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK)
			{
				if (mr.BasketDown && mr.UnInstall)
				{
					Caller->PushActionDeinstall(ACTION_INSERT);
					Caller->PushActionBasketDown(ACTION_INSERT, Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f));
				}
				else if (mr.BasketDown)	    Caller->PushActionBasketDown(ACTION_INSERT, Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f));
				else if (mr.UnInstall)	    Caller->PushActionDeinstall(ACTION_INSERT);
			}
		}
	}
};

object VcmdRotateVehicle : CommandScript
{
	VcmdRotateVehicle()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetIcon("rotate_cw");
		SetCursor("rotate_cw");
		SetPriority(-700);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		if (StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/parking_script_object.e4p") == 0)
			SetGroupID(0);
		else
			SetGroupID(21);
		return Input::LCtrlPressed() || Input::RCtrlPressed();
	}

 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject("policestation_lapd")
			|| v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject("fs_squad01") 
			|| v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject("fs_squad02"))
				return false;
			if(v.HasCommand("DummyIsTrailed"))		return false;
			if(v.IsInstalled())		return false;
 		}
 		return true;
 	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())		return false;
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
	}
};

object DummyParkingMarker : CommandScript
{
	DummyParkingMarker()
	{}

	void PushActionsWithPosition(GameObject *Caller, float x, float y, float z)
	{
		Vector CmdPos; 		CmdPos.Set(x, y, z);
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (!move::parkMarkerPossible(&v))
		{
			Mission::PlayHint("Cannot create park marker!");
			return;
		}

		Vehicle pScriptMarker;
		char name[32];  	snprintf(name, 32, "%d_parkScriptMarker", v.GetID());
		
		VehicleList l1(name);	//only one park marker per unit
		if (l1.GetVehicle(0))
			pScriptMarker = l1.GetVehicle(0);
		else
			pScriptMarker = Game::CreateVehicle("mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/parking_script_object.e4p", name);

		Game::FindFreePosition(&pScriptMarker, CmdPos, 100.f);
		pScriptMarker.SetCommandable(true);
		pScriptMarker.SetPlayerMP(v.GetPlayerMP());
		pScriptMarker.SetPosition(CmdPos);
		pScriptMarker.AssignCommand("VcmdRotateVehicle");
		pScriptMarker.AssignCommand("VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo");
		if (pScriptMarker.IsValid() && (v.IsValid() && v.IsSelected()))
		{
			pScriptMarker.Select();
			v.Deselect();
		}

		/***********INVISIBLE TLRED DUMMY TO KEEP AI OUT*********/

		if (pScriptMarker.IsValid())
		{
			GameObject mParkingBlocker;
			char block[32];  	snprintf(block, 32, "%d_parkScriptBlock", v.GetID());

			GameObjectList l2(block);	//only one park marker per unit
			if (l2.GetObject(0))
				mParkingBlocker = l2.GetObject(0);
			else
				mParkingBlocker = Game::CreateObject("mod:Prototypes/Objects/06 LA Misc/parking_script_blocker.e4p", block);

			mParkingBlocker.SetUserData(pScriptMarker.GetID());		//match the blocker to the marker
			mParkingBlocker.SetPosition(pScriptMarker.GetPosition());
			mParkingBlocker.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, "VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo", &pScriptMarker, 19, false);
		}
	}
};

object VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo : CommandScript
{
	VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo()
	{
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{	return true;	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			bool deleteMarker = false;
			if (Input::PriorityKeyPressed())		//delete marker using key press
				deleteMarker = true;

			char *vehicleName = Caller->GetName();
			int vehicleID = Math::atoi(vehicleName);
			Actor act = Game::GetActor(vehicleID);
			if (act.IsValid() && act.GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Vehicle v(&act);
				if (deleteMarker)
				{
					deselectMarker(&GameObject(Caller), &v);
					Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.f);
					return;
				}

				if (!move::parkMarkerPossible(&v))
				{	Mission::PlayHint("Vehicle cannot move right now. Park marker deleted!");	deselectMarker(&GameObject(Caller), &v);	Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);	return;		}
				else if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
				{	Mission::PlayHint("Vehicle out of fuel! Park marker deleted!");	deselectMarker(&GameObject(Caller), &v);	Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);	return;		}
				else
				{
					move::onMove(&v);
					Vector Pos = Caller->GetPosition();
					v.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Pos, false);
					v.PushActionMoveToPoint(ACTION_APPEND, Caller, 5.f, 0.5f);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo", Caller, 1, false);
				}
			}
			else
				Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			GameObject marker(Target);
			Vehicle v(Caller);		v.SetCommandable(false);
			v.SetPosition(marker.GetPosition());
			v.SetLookatDir(marker.GetLookatDir());
			v.UpdatePlacement();
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyIsTrailed"))
			{
				GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects("equipment_trailer");
				for(int i=0; i<l1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
				{
					GameObject Trailer = l1.GetObject(i);
					if (Trailer.GetUserData() == v.GetID())
					{
						float x, y, z;
						v.GetLookatDir(x,y,z);
						Trailer.SetLookatDir(x,y,z);
						Vector HookPos = v.GetChildPosition("trailer_coupling");
						Trailer.SetPosition(HookPos);
					}
				}
			}
			Game::ExecuteCommand("DummyPatrol", &v, &v);
			deselectMarker(&marker, &v);
			marker.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo", &marker, 2, false);
		}
		else if (childID == 2)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			float multiplier = 1000000.f;
			float x, y, z;		v.GetLookatDir(x,y,z);
			Vector Face;		Face.Set(x*multiplier, y*multiplier, z*multiplier);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Face);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo", &v, 3, false);
		}
		else if (childID == 3)
		{
			Caller->SetCommandable(true);
			ActorList pList;
			Game::GetPotentialCollisions(Caller, pList, 15.f, ACTOR_PERSON);

			for (int i=0; i<pList.GetNumActors(); i++)
			{
				System::Log("Potential collision found %d", pList.GetActor(i)->GetID());
				Actor act = Game::GetActor(pList.GetActor(i)->GetID());
				if(act.IsValid())
				{
					Person p(&act);
					if (p.HasObjectPath(NULL) && (p.GetRole() == ROLE_CIVILIAN || p.GetRole() == ROLE_ANIMAL))
						p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				}
			}
		}

		else if (childID == 19)	//dummy blocker checks if marker is valid
		{
			if (Target->IsValid())
			{
				GameObject obj(Target);
				Caller->SetLookatDir(obj.GetLookatDir());
				Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.f);
				Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdParkingMarkerMoveTo", &obj, 19, false);
			}
			else
				Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}
	}

	void deselectMarker(GameObject marker, Vehicle v)
	{
		if (marker.IsValid() && marker.IsSelected())
		{
			marker.Deselect();
			v.Select();
		}
	}
};

```

## Negotiate.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - Person with HolsterWeapon can't use this command.
//
//******************************************************************************************

object Negotiate : CommandScript
{
	Negotiate()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_NONIJURED_PERSON | CPE_USABLE_WM_OBJECTS);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetPriority(650);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		return Game::ExistsNonInjuredPerson() || Game::ExistsObjectWithFlagSet(OF_USABLE_WITH_MEGAPHONE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID()))
			return false;
			
		GameObject obj(Target);		

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON &&	obj.IsValid() &&
			obj.GetType() == ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE && obj.IsFlagSet(OF_USABLE_WITH_MEGAPHONE))
		{
			return true;
		}
		
		if (obj.GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON )
		{
			Person pers(Target);
			PersonRole role = pers.GetRole();
			if (Caller->GetType()==ACTOR_PERSON && obj.IsValid() && !pers.IsInjured())
			{
				if (role==ROLE_GANGSTER)
				{
					return true;
				}
			   	if ((role==ROLE_CIVILIAN) && (pers.GetBehaviour()==BEHAVIOUR_CIVILIAN_PANIC))
			   	{
					return true;
			   	}
			}			
			
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject obj(Target);		

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON && obj.IsValid() &&
			obj.GetType() == ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE && obj.IsFlagSet(OF_USABLE_WITH_MEGAPHONE))
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_MEGAPHONE_DISTANCE);
		}
		else if (obj.GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON )
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_FOLLOW);
		}

		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionNegotiate(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_AskPersonInterview.script

```cpp
/**************************************************************************************************
 #Version 1.1#										
												
 		Adds: - Script imports ExamineVehicle from Emergency3.				
		
		Itchboy edit:
		Cannot be done when caller has equipment.
**************************************************************************************************/

object AskPerson : CommandScript
{
	AskPerson()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(600);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		Person c(Caller);
		if (c.IsLinkedWithPerson() || c.IsCarryingPerson() || c.IsEquipped())
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType()!=ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person c(Caller);
		if (c.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || c.IsLinkedWithPerson() || c.IsCarryingPerson() || c.IsEquipped())
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Target);
			if (p.GetRole() == ROLE_GANGSTER || !p.CanBeAsked() || p.IsInjured() || p.IsDead() || p.IsArrested() || p.IsCarried() || p.IsDrowning())
				return false;

			return true;
		}

		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsParking())
				return true;

			return false;
		}
		
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_FOLLOW);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionAskPerson(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		}

		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionExamineVehicle(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		}
	}	
};

```

## PersonCommand_BallisticShieldEquipment.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 2.5#
//
// 		Includes: All Ballistic Shield commands
//
//	- PcmdBallisticShieldGet
//	- PcmdBallisticShieldRemove
//	- DummyBallisticShield
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_GETSHIELD[]		= "PcmdBallisticShieldGet";
const char CMD_REMOVESHIELD[]		= "PcmdBallisticShieldRemove";
const char CMD_DOORS[]			= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char DUMMY_SHIELD[]		= "DummyBallisticShield";
const char OBJ_SHIELD[]			= "01 LA Equipment/ballistic_shield.V3O";

const int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdBallisticShieldGet : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdBallisticShieldGet()
	{
    		SetIcon("ballisticshield");
    		SetCursor("ballisticshield");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFLASHGRENADE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson()||p.IsLinkedWithPerson()|| p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE))
			return false;
		return true;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/suv_lapd.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/hummerh2_lasd.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_bearcat.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_tac.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_armoured_vehicle.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_mcp.e4p") == 0 ||	
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_nru.e4p") == 0 ||	
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_suv.e4p") == 0 ||			
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_truck.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);

		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_SHIELD, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdBallisticShieldRemove : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdBallisticShieldRemove()
	{
    		SetIcon("ballisticshieldremove");
    		SetCursor("ballisticshieldremove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFLASHGRENADE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson()||p.IsLinkedWithPerson()|| p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE))
			return false;
		return true;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/suv_lapd.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/hummerh2_lasd.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_bearcat.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_tac.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_armoured_vehicle.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_mcp.e4p") == 0 ||	
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_nru.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_suv.e4p") == 0 ||			
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_truck.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);

		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_SHIELD, Target, 2, false);
	}
};

object DummyBallisticShield : CommandScript
{
	DummyBallisticShield()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SHIELD);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 999.f);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVESHIELD);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETSHIELD);
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			p.RemoveCommand("Arrest");
			p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.RemoveCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("AskPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("Halt");
			p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
			p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			p.RemoveCommand("PickUp");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
			p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 100.f);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVESHIELD);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETSHIELD);
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet"); 
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
			p.AssignCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
			p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("Halt");
			p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
			p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
			p.AssignCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			p.AssignCommand("PickUp");
			p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter"); 
			if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_swat.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}

	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_BombRobotDeployUseRemove.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.0#
//
// 		Includes: All bomb squad robot scripts.
//
//	- PcmdRobotGet
//	- PcmdRobotRemove
//	- PcmdRobotSendTo 
//	- PcmdRobotUse
//	- PcmdDummyRobot
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON[]		= "VCmdFloodLightsOn";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF[]		= "VCmdFloodLightsOff";
const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char HINT_MAXREACHED[] 			= "Only one robot is allowed!";
const char ANI_MIKE[] 				= "talkmike";
const char ANI_IDLE[] 				= "idle";
const char CMD_GETROBOT[]			= "PcmdRobotGet";
const char CMD_REMOVEROBOT[]			= "PcmdRobotRemove";
const char CMD_SENDROBOT[]			= "PcmdRobotSendTo";
const char CMD_USEROBOT[]			= "PcmdRobotUse";
const char OBJ_RADIO[]				= "01 LA Equipment/radio.V3O";
const char OBJ_ROBOT[] 				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/bomb_squad_robot.e4p";
const char OBJ_BOMBSQUAD_SUV[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/suv_bomb_squad.e4p";
const char OBJ_BOMBSQUAD_BCSO[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/BCSO_Bomb_Squad.e4p";
const char NAME_ROBOT[] 			= "BombRobot";
const char NAME_BOMB01[]			= "bomb";
const char NAME_BOMB02[]			= "m03_bomb";
const char DUMMY_ROBOT[]			= "DummyRobot";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdRobotGet : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdRobotGet()
	{
    		SetIcon("robotget");
    		SetCursor("robotget");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() > 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() &&
				(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BOMBSQUAD_SUV) == 0 ||
				StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BOMBSQUAD_BCSO) == 0))
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}	

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObjectList list = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_ROBOT);
		if (list.GetNumObjects() > 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_MAXREACHED);
			return;
		}

		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);

		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdRobotRemove : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdRobotRemove()
	{
    		SetIcon("robotremove");
    		SetCursor("robotremove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() &&
				(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BOMBSQUAD_SUV) == 0 ||
				StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BOMBSQUAD_BCSO) == 0))
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
 		Person p(Caller);
		int UnitID = p.GetID();
		VehicleList list(NAME_ROBOT);
		if (list.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
		{
			if (list.GetVehicle(0)->GetUserData() == UnitID) 
			{
				Vehicle obj = list.GetVehicle(0);
				if (!obj.IsValid() || obj.IsDestroyed() || obj.IsSmoking() || obj.IsCarried())
				{
					System::Log("Robot not capable of performing actions!");
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Caller, 3, false);
					return;
				}
				else if (!obj.IsCurrentAction("EActionUse") && !obj.IsDestroyed() && obj.IsValid())
				{
					System::Log("Robot found!");	
					Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
					p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
					p.PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Target, 2, false);

					obj.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
					obj.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				}
				else
				{
					System::Log("Robot found, but has EactionUse!");	
				}
			}
		} 
		else
		{
			System::Log("Robot not found!");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Caller, 3, false);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdRobotSendTo : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRobotSendTo()
	{
    		SetIcon("sendto");
    		SetCursor("sendto");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetPriority(200);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
 		Person p(Caller);
		Vector CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_MIKE);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_IDLE);

		int UnitID = p.GetID();
		VehicleList list(NAME_ROBOT);
		if (list.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
		{
			if (list.GetVehicle(0)->GetUserData() == UnitID) 
			{
				Vehicle obj = list.GetVehicle(0);
				if (!obj.IsValid() || obj.IsDestroyed() || obj.IsSmoking() || obj.IsCarried())
				{
					System::Log("Robot not capable of performing actions!");
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Caller, 3, false);
					return;
				}
				else if (!obj.IsCurrentAction("EActionUse") && !obj.IsDestroyed() && obj.IsValid())
				{
					System::Log("Robot found!");	
					obj.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.2f);
					obj.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
				}
				else
				{
					System::Log("Robot found, but has EactionUse!");	
				}
			}
		} 
		else
		{
			System::Log("Robot not found!");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Caller, 3, false);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdRobotUse : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdRobotUse()
	{
    		SetIcon("use");
    		SetCursor("use");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_USABLE);
		SetPriority(700);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		return Game::ExistsObjectWithFlagSet(OF_USABLE);
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID())
			return false;
		
		GameObject obj(Target);
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!obj.IsValid() || (!obj.HasName(NAME_BOMB01) && !obj.HasName(NAME_BOMB02)))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
 		Person p(Caller);
		Vector CmdPos = Target->GetPosition();
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_MIKE);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.5f);
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, ANI_IDLE);

		int UnitID = p.GetID();
		VehicleList list(NAME_ROBOT);
		if (list.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
		{
			if (list.GetVehicle(0)->GetUserData() == UnitID) 
			{
				Vehicle obj = list.GetVehicle(0);
				if (!obj.IsValid() || obj.IsDestroyed() || obj.IsSmoking() || obj.IsCarried())
				{
					System::Log("Robot not capable of performing actions!");
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Caller, 3, false);
					return;
				}
				else if (!obj.IsCurrentAction("EActionUse") && !obj.IsDestroyed() && obj.IsValid())
				{
					System::Log("Robot found!");	
					obj.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_USE);
					obj.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
					obj.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, &obj, 4, false);
					obj.PushActionUse(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
					obj.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
					obj.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, &obj, 5, false);
				}
				else
				{
					System::Log("Robot found, but has EactionUse!");	
				}
			}
		} 
		else
		{
			System::Log("Robot not found!");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ROBOT, Caller, 3, false);
		}
	}
};

object DummyRobot : CommandScript
{
	DummyRobot()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 
 
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
 		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			Vector CarPos = v.GetPosition();
				float r[9];
			v.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

			Vehicle m = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_ROBOT, NAME_ROBOT);
			if (!m.IsValid())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint("Unable to deploy robot!");
				return;
			}

			if (Game::FindFreePosition(&m, CarPos))
			{
				p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_RADIO);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEROBOT);
				p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETROBOT);
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_SENDROBOT);
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_USEROBOT);
				p.RemoveCommand("Use");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterHouse");

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
           			m.SetPosition(CarPos);
            			m.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
            			m.UpdatePlacement();
            			m.Hide();
				m.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.6f);
				m.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
				m.SetUserData(p.GetID());
				m.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
				m.SetSpeed(4.5f);
				m.SetParking(true);
			}
			else
			{
				m.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				Mission::PlayHint("No space to deploy robot!");
			}
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
 			Person p(Caller);
			int UnitID = p.GetID();

			VehicleList list(NAME_ROBOT);
			if (list.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
			{
				if (list.GetVehicle(0)->GetUserData() == UnitID) 
				{
					Vehicle obj = list.GetVehicle(0);
					if (!obj.IsCurrentAction("EActionFindPath"))
					{
						p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
						p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idle");
						p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEROBOT);
						p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETROBOT); 
						p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SENDROBOT);
						p.RemoveCommand(CMD_USEROBOT); 
						p.AssignCommand("Use");
						p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
						p.AssignCommand("EnterHouse");

						obj.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);

						Vehicle v(Target);
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
					} else
						Mission::PlayHint("Robot is still moving!");
				}
			}
		}
		if(childID == 3)
		{
 			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEROBOT);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETROBOT); 
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SENDROBOT);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_USEROBOT); 
			p.AssignCommand("Use");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterHouse");
		}
		if(childID == 4)
		{
			System::Log("Open door");
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			v.PlayAnimOpenDoor(DAT_SPECIAL, 2.0f, NULL);

		}
		if(childID == 5)
		{
			System::Log("Close door");
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			v.PlayAnimCloseDoor(DAT_SPECIAL, 1.6f, NULL);
		}
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_ChangeUniformClothes.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
 #Version 2.5#

 		Includes: All Changing clothes commands

	- PcmdChangeToFF
	- PcmdChangeToMask
	- PcmdGetTrafficVest
	- PcmdRemoveTrafficVest
	- PcmdGetTacVest
	- PcmdRemoveTacVest

		Original script for Emergency 3 by Rev Bem
		Made compatible for Emergency 4 by Hoppah

		EDITED BY ITCHBOY FOR MONTANA MOD V2

		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
******************************************************************************************/

const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor2";

const char VO_CHANGE[] 			= "fs_change";

const char VO_SQUAD01[]			= "fs_squad01";

const char OBJ_FF[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff.e4p";
const char OBJ_FF_SCBA[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff_scba.e4p";
const char OBJ_EMT[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p";
const char OBJ_EMT_SCBA[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_scba.e4p";
const char OBJ_PM[]						= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_nohelmet.e4p";
const char OBJ_PM_SCBA[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p";
const char OBJ_USFS_FF[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff.e4p";
const char OBJ_USFS_FF_SCBA[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff_scba.e4p";
const char OBJ_OFFICER_M[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p";
const char OBJ_OFFICER_F[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/bcpd_officer_01.e4p";
const char OBJ_OFFICER_M2[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p";
const char OBJ_OFFICER_LASD[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_OFFICER_CHP[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_M[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p";
const char OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_F[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/bcpd_traffic_officer_m.e4p";
const char OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_LASD[]	= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_CHP[]	= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p";
const char OBJ_FBI[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/07 Government/fbi_agent.e4p";
const char OBJ_FBI_TAC[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/07 Government/fbi_agent_tac.e4p";
const char OBJ_ATF[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_agent.e4p";
const char OBJ_ATF_TAC[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_swat.e4p";
const char OBJ_OFFICER_M_TAC[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p";
const char DUMMY_CHANGE_CLOTHES[]		= "DummyVolunteerClothes"; //For volunteer script DO NOT TOUCH ALSO
const char DUMMY_VOLSTATION[]			= "DummyToVolStation";
const char SND_SCBA[]					= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/SCBA.wav";

object PcmdChangeToFF : CommandScript
{
	PcmdChangeToFF()
	{
		SetCursor("clothes");
		SetIcon("clothes");
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFIREAXE);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE))
			return false;
		return true;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW)
		{
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.HasNamePrefix("Volunteer") && p.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01) && StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PM_SCBA) != 0)
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VOLSTATION, &p, 3, false);
		else
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if(childID == 0)
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdChangeToFF", Target, 1, false);
			}
			if(childID == 1)
			{
				p.SetCommandable(false);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "useobjmid");
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.0f);
				p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdChangeToFF", Target, 2, false);
				Vehicle v(Target);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);				
			}
			if(childID == 2)
			{
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMT_SCBA) == 0)
							p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_EMT);
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_FF_SCBA) == 0)
							p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_FF);
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PM_SCBA) == 0)
							p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_PM);
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_USFS_FF_SCBA) == 0)
							p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_USFS_FF);
				p.SetCommandable(true);
			}
		}
	}
};

object PcmdChangeToMask : CommandScript
{
	PcmdChangeToMask()
	{
		SetCursor("clothes");
		SetIcon("clothes");
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFIREAXE);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		if (p.HasCommand("DummyHasStrether") || p.HasCommand("Dummy_HasSpineboard"))
			return false;
		/* if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE))
			return false; */

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW)
		{
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdChangeToMask", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "useobjmid");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.0f);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdChangeToMask", Target, 2, false);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_SCBA, Pos, false);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_EMT) == 0)
						p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_EMT_SCBA);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_FF) == 0)
							p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_FF_SCBA);			
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PM) == 0)
						p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_PM_SCBA);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_USFS_FF) == 0)
						p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_USFS_FF_SCBA);
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			int NewMoney = Money - 50;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdGetTrafficVest: CommandScript
{
	PcmdGetTrafficVest()
	{
		SetCursor("clothes");
		SetIcon("clothes");
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
			return false;
		return true;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{

		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW)
		{
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdGetTrafficVest", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "useobjmid");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.0f);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdGetTrafficVest", Target, 2, false);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_OFFICER_M) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_M);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_OFFICER_F) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_F);
 			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_OFFICER_LASD) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_LASD);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_OFFICER_CHP) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_CHP);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdRemoveTrafficVest: CommandScript
{
	PcmdRemoveTrafficVest()
	{
		SetCursor("clothes");
		SetIcon("clothes");
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);

		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)

		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))

		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)

		{
			return true;
		}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{

		{

			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);

		if(childID == 2)

			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_M) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_OFFICER_M);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_F) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_OFFICER_F);
 			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_LASD) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_OFFICER_LASD);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TRAFFIC_OFFICER_CHP) == 0)
            			p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_OFFICER_CHP);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
		}
	}
};


object PcmdGetTacVest : CommandScript
{
	PcmdGetTacVest()
	{
		SetCursor("clothes");
		SetIcon("clothes");
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
			return false;
		return true;
	}*/

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW)
		{
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdGetTacVest", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "useobjmid");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.0f);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdGetTacVest", Target, 2, false);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_FBI) == 0)
					p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_FBI_TAC);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ATF) == 0)
					p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_ATF_TAC);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_OFFICER_M) == 0)
					p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_OFFICER_M_TAC);
			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			int NewMoney = Money - 200;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdRemoveTacVest : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRemoveTacVest()
	{
		SetCursor("clothes");
		SetIcon("clothes");
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
			
		Person p(Caller);	
		if (p.HasCommand("PcmdPSGGet"))
			SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);		
			
		/*Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
			return false;*/
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW)
		{
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdRemoveTacVest", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "useobjmid");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.0f);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdRemoveTacVest", Target, 2, false);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_FBI_TAC) == 0)
					p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_FBI);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ATF_TAC) == 0)
					p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_ATF);
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_OFFICER_M_TAC) == 0)
					p.ChangePrototype(OBJ_OFFICER_M);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdChangeToCivil : CommandScript
{
	PcmdChangeToCivil()
	{
		SetCursor("clothes");
		SetIcon("clothes");
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;
		if (!p.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_VOLSTATION, &p, 4, false);
	}
};
```
