## PersonCommand_CheckVictimStatus.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - Dead bodies will be covered with a tarp
//
//		By Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char OBJ_CORONER[] 		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/coroners.e4p";
const char CMD_DEAD[]			= "PcmdDead";

object CheckVictim : CommandScript
{	
	CheckVictim()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		//SetPriority(1000);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_INJURED_PERSON);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		
		if (!Caller->HasCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet") && !Caller->HasCommand("Lift"))
			return false;
			
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsValid() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsPhysicsSimulationEnabled())
			return false;
			
		return true;	
		//return Game::IsHomicideEventRunning();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->IsEquipped() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);
		
		if (t.IsDead() && StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CORONER) != 0)
			SetPriority(1000);
			
		if(p.IsValid() && t.IsValid() && t.IsDead() && !t.IsCarried() && t.GetRole()!=ROLE_ANIMAL && !t.IsRescueDog() && !t.IsDrowning())
		{
			if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 && p.GetEnteredCarTargetID() != t.GetEnteredHouseID())
				return false;
			if (p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1 && t.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1 && t.GetEnteredHouseID() != p.GetEnteredHouseID() && !t.IsInHouseWithGroundEntrance())
				return false;
			//if (!t.IsVictim())
			//	return false;
			if(!t.IsVictim() && t.HasCommand("DummyBlanket"))
				return false;
				
			return true;
		}		
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1)
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		}
		else
		{
			Person pt(Target);
			if (pt.GetEnteredHouseID() == p.GetEnteredCarTargetID())
			{
				Caller->PushActionEnterHouse(ACTION_NEWLIST, pt.GetEnteredHouseID());
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Target, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
			else
				Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
		}
		if (t.IsVictim())
			Caller->PushActionCheckVictim(ACTION_APPEND, &t, 5.f); 
		if (t.IsDead() && t.IsClassified() && !t.HasCommand("DummyBlanket"))
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DEAD, &t, 0, false);
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_DeadPersonHandling.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Includes: All commands to cover dead bodies with a blanket
//
//	- PcmdDead
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_DEAD[]			= "PcmdDead";
const char OBJ_BLANKET[] 		= "mod:Models/Objects/06 LA Misc/body_cover";
const char PROTO_BLANKET[] 		= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/06 LA Misc/body_cover.e4p";
const char HINT_DEAD[]			= "This person is deceased.";

int DummyGroup = 22;

object PcmdDead : CommandScript
{
	PcmdDead()
	{
		SetIcon("heal");
		SetCursor("heal");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_CARRY_PERSON);
		SetPriority(410);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_INJURED_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsValid() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsPhysicsSimulationEnabled())
			return false;
			
		if(p.IsParamedicTeam() && p.IsCarryingPerson())
			return false;

		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() ||  Caller->IsEquipped() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		
		Person t(Target);
		if (t.GetRole() == ROLE_ANIMAL)
			return false;
	
		if(t.IsDead())
			SetPriority(420);			
		
		return (t.IsDead() && !t.IsCarried() && t.IsClassified());
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);
		
		if (p.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1)
		{
			Actor ha = Game::GetActor(p.GetEnteredHouseID());
			OpenHouse sourceHouse(&ha);
			if (!sourceHouse.HasGroundEntrance())
				return;
		}		
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DEAD);
			if (p.IsParamedicTeam())
			{
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "paramedictreat_down");
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.f);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "paramedictreat");
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DEAD, &t, 1, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DEAD, &t, 2, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.f);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "paramedictreat_up");
			} else
			{
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "treatinjured1");
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DEAD, &t, 1, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DEAD, &t, 2, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.f);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			}
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			Vector Pos = t.GetPosition();
				float r[9];
			t.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			GameObject o = Game::CreateObject(PROTO_BLANKET, "Unnamed");
			o.SetPosition(Pos);
			o.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			o.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "cover");
			o.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
			o.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
		}
		if (childID == 2)
		{
			t.ChangeModel(OBJ_BLANKET);
			t.AssignCommand("DummyBlanket");
		}
	}
};

object DummyBlanket : CommandScript
{
	DummyBlanket()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return false;
	}

  	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_DriveAwayCivilian.script

```cpp
// PersonCommand_DriveAwayCivilian.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: DriveAwayPerson
object DriveAwayPerson : CommandScript
{
	bool enterHouse;

	DriveAwayPerson()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_ARREST);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED | RESTRICT_NOTINJURED | RESTRICT_NOTLINKED);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_NONIJURED_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		return !p.IsLinkedWithPerson();
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		if(Caller->HasCommand("DummyHasStrether") || Caller->HasCommand("Dummy_HasSpineboard"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->IsEquipped() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID() )
			return false;

		if(Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
			
		Person p(Caller);		
		if(/*p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || */p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		enterHouse = false;
		Person t(Target);
		if (t.GetRole() == ROLE_ANIMAL)
			return false;
		if(p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
		{
			if(!p.CanLeaveDLK())
				return false;
			if (!t.IsValid() || t.GetEnteredHouseID() != p.GetEnteredCarTargetID())
				return false;
			enterHouse = true;
		}
		else if(t.IsValid() && p.GetEnteredHouseID() != t.GetEnteredHouseID())
		{
			if(p.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1 && !p.IsInHouseWithGroundEntrance())	
				return false;
			if(t.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1 && !t.IsInHouseWithGroundEntrance())
				return false;
		}

		Person t(Target);
		if(t.GetRole()==ROLE_SQUAD || t.IsDrowning() || t.GetState() != PERSONSTATE_NORMAL)
			return false;
					
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person ps(Target);
		bool gangster = (ps.GetRole() == ROLE_GANGSTER);
		if(enterHouse)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Caller->PushActionEnterHouse(ACTION_NEWLIST, p.GetEnteredCarTargetID());
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Target, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);			
			if (gangster)
				Caller->PushActionFistFight(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		}
		else
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
			if (gangster)
				Caller->PushActionFistFight(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		}
		
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		if (!gangster)
		{
			Caller->PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		}
	}	
};

```

## PersonCommand_DroneOperations.script

```cpp
// PersonCommand_DroneOperations.script
// EM4Resource police/fire drone operations.
//
// Commands to assign to operator prototypes:
// - PcmdGetPoliceDroneFromVehicle
// - PcmdGetFireDroneFromVehicle
//
// Workflow:
// - Operator clicks any vehicle to retrieve a drone kit.
// - Operator uses the launch command on the map.
// - A drone is created, moves to the selected area, and performs a delayed scan.
// - The drone can be selected for another scan or recalled.

const char DRONE_PROTO[]						= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/drone.e4p";
const char DRONE_NAME_POLICE[]					= "EM4ResourcePoliceDrone";
const char DRONE_NAME_FIRE[]					= "EM4ResourceFireDrone";

const char CMD_GET_POLICE_DRONE[]				= "PcmdGetPoliceDroneFromVehicle";
const char CMD_GET_FIRE_DRONE[]					= "PcmdGetFireDroneFromVehicle";
const char CMD_LAUNCH_POLICE_DRONE[]			= "PcmdLaunchPoliceDrone";
const char CMD_LAUNCH_FIRE_DRONE[]				= "PcmdLaunchFireDrone";
const char CMD_STOW_DRONE_KIT[]					= "PcmdStowDroneKit";
const char CMD_DRONE_SCAN[]						= "VcmdDroneScanArea";
const char CMD_DRONE_FLY[]						= "VcmdDroneFlyToPoint";
const char CMD_DRONE_RECALL[]					= "VcmdRecallDrone";

const char DUMMY_POLICE_DRONE_KIT[]				= "DummyPoliceDroneKit";
const char DUMMY_FIRE_DRONE_KIT[]				= "DummyFireDroneKit";
const char DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE[]					= "DummyDroneActive";
const char DUMMY_DRONE_POLICE_SERVICE[]			= "DummyDronePoliceService";
const char DUMMY_DRONE_FIRE_SERVICE[]			= "DummyDroneFireService";

const char DRONE_ICON_POLICE[]					= "dronepolice";
const char DRONE_ICON_FIRE[]					= "dronefire";
const char DRONE_ICON_SCAN[]					= "dronescan";
const char DRONE_ICON_FLY[]						= "dronefly";
const char DRONE_ICON_RECALL[]					= "dronerecall";
const char DRONE_ICON_STOW[]					= "dronestow";

const char SND_DRONE_POLICE_RETRIEVE[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Police_Retrieved.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_FIRE_RETRIEVE[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Fire_Retrieved.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_POLICE_LAUNCH[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Police_Launch.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_FIRE_LAUNCH[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Fire_Launch.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_POLICE_FIND[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Police_Target_Located.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_FIRE_FIND[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Fire_Hazard_Located.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_00[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_00.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_01[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_01.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_02[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_02.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_03[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_03.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_04[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_04.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_05[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_05.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_06[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_06.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_07[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_07.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_08[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_08.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_09[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Hazmat_Placard_09.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_MISSING_FIND[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_MissingPerson_Located.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_NEGATIVE[]					= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Scan_Negative.wav";
const char SND_DRONE_RECALL[]					= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Drone_Recalled.wav";

const char NAME_MISSING_PERSON[]				= "EM4ResourceMissingPersonVictim";
const char NAME_HOMICIDE_SUSPECT[]				= "EM4ResourceHomicideSuspect";
const char NAME_HOMICIDE_LEAD[]					= "EM4ResourceHomicideLead";
const char NAME_HOMICIDE_VICTIM[]				= "EM4ResourceHomicideVictim";
const char NAME_JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT[]			= "EM4ResourceJailEscapeSuspect";
const char NAME_CHEM_SOURCE[]					= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorSource";
const char NAME_CHEM_VICTIM[]					= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorVictim";

const char CMD_MISSING_FOUND[]					= "DummyMissingPersonFound";
const char CMD_CHEM_SECURED[]					= "DummyChemicalOdorSourceSecured";

const float DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS					= 1850.f;
const float DRONE_DEPLOY_OFFSET					= 120.f;
const float DRONE_SCAN_DELAY					= 8.f;

bool DronePointNearObject(Vector Pos, GameObject *Obj, float Radius)
{
	if (!Obj->IsValid())
		return false;

	Vector objPos = Obj->GetPosition();
	if (Math::dist(Pos.x, Pos.y, objPos.x, objPos.y) <= Radius)
		return true;

	return false;
}

void DroneClearOperatorActive(int OperatorID)
{
	PersonList squads(ROLE_SQUAD);
	for (int i = 0; i < squads.GetNumPersons(); i++)
	{
		Person *p = squads.GetPerson(i);
		if (!p->IsValid())
			continue;

		if (p->GetID() == OperatorID && p->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE))
			p->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE);
	}
}

void DroneDeleteOperatorDrones(int OperatorID)
{
	GameObjectList policeDrones(DRONE_NAME_POLICE);
	for (int i = 0; i < policeDrones.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject *objPolice = policeDrones.GetObject(i);
		if (objPolice->IsValid() && objPolice->GetUserData() == OperatorID)
			objPolice->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}

	GameObjectList fireDrones(DRONE_NAME_FIRE);
	for (int j = 0; j < fireDrones.GetNumObjects(); j++)
	{
		GameObject *objFire = fireDrones.GetObject(j);
		if (objFire->IsValid() && objFire->GetUserData() == OperatorID)
			objFire->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}
}

void DroneRevealMissingPerson(GameObject *VictimObject)
{
	if (!VictimObject->IsValid() || VictimObject->HasCommand(CMD_MISSING_FOUND))
		return;

	Person victim(VictimObject);
	victim.AssignCommand(CMD_MISSING_FOUND);
	victim.Injure(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, true);
	victim.SetLife(victim.GetMaxLife() * 0.45f);
	victim.SetAnimation("injured");
	victim.SetSelectable(true);
	victim.SetCommandable(false);
	victim.SetFoundByDog(true);
}

int DroneCountNamedObjects(Vector Pos, const char *Name, float Radius)
{
	int Count = 0;
	GameObjectList objects(Name);
	for (int i = 0; i < objects.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject *obj = objects.GetObject(i);
		if (obj->IsValid() && DronePointNearObject(Pos, obj, Radius))
			Count++;
	}

	return Count;
}

const char *DroneGetHazmatPlacardText(int CaseID)
{
	switch (CaseID)
	{
		case 0: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read from aerial camera. UN 1993, flammable liquid, class 3. Container appears to be leaking. Establish ignition control, isolate downwind, and keep non-hazmat personnel out of the hot zone.";
		case 1: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1017, chlorine, class 2.3 toxic gas with corrosive hazard. Visible vapor reported. Approach from upwind, use full hazmat PPE, and prepare respiratory decon.";
		case 2: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1760, corrosive liquid, class 8. Product may cause severe burns and respiratory irritation. Keep civilians uphill and upwind until source control is complete.";
		case 3: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1005, ammonia anhydrous, class 2.3. Expect strong vapor cloud and respiratory hazard. Establish a wide exclusion zone and request atmospheric monitoring.";
		case 4: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1090, acetone, class 3 flammable liquid. Container is compromised. Eliminate ignition sources and stage fire suppression outside the vapor area.";
		case 5: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 2922, corrosive liquid toxic, class 8 with toxic subsidiary risk. Multiple exposure patients possible. Hazmat entry should identify product before moving container.";
		case 6: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 3082, environmentally hazardous liquid. Leak appears limited but civilians are symptomatic. Control runoff and keep EMS outside the contaminated area.";
		case 7: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 2672, ammonia solution, class 8. Odor and irritation consistent with corrosive vapor. Use splash protection, respiratory protection, and upwind entry.";
		case 8: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1789, hydrochloric acid, class 8 corrosive. Avoid contact with runoff and vapor. Request decon corridor before patient removal.";
	}

	return "Drone Size-Up: Placard partially obscured. Aerial camera indicates an unknown hazardous material container with active leak indicators. Treat as toxic and corrosive until hazmat confirms product.";
}

const char *DroneGetHazmatPlacardSound(int CaseID)
{
	switch (CaseID)
	{
		case 0: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_00;
		case 1: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_01;
		case 2: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_02;
		case 3: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_03;
		case 4: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_04;
		case 5: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_05;
		case 6: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_06;
		case 7: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_07;
		case 8: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_08;
	}

	return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_09;
}

void DroneReportHazmatPlacard(GameObject *Source)
{
	if (!Source->IsValid())
		return;

	int CaseID = Source->GetUserData();
	const char *TextSource = DroneGetHazmatPlacardText(CaseID);
	Audio::PlaySample(DroneGetHazmatPlacardSound(CaseID));
	Mission::PlayHint(TextSource);
	Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextSource, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextSource, 7.f);
	Game::ShowEvent(TextSource, Source->GetPosition());
}

void DroneRunPoliceScan(Vector Pos)
{
	GameObjectList escapees(NAME_JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT);
	for (int i = 0; i < escapees.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject *foundEscape = escapees.GetObject(i);
		if (DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundEscape, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
		{
			const char *TextEscape = "Drone Unit: Possible jail escapee located from aerial scan. Marking last known position for responding officers.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_FIND);
			Mission::PlayHint(TextEscape);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextEscape, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextEscape, 7.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextEscape, foundEscape->GetPosition());
			return;
		}
	}

	GameObjectList suspects(NAME_HOMICIDE_SUSPECT);
	for (int j = 0; j < suspects.GetNumObjects(); j++)
	{
		GameObject *foundSuspect = suspects.GetObject(j);
		if (DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundSuspect, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
		{
			const char *TextSuspect = "Drone Unit: Possible homicide suspect located. Maintain containment and move officers into position.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_FIND);
			Mission::PlayHint(TextSuspect);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextSuspect, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextSuspect, 7.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextSuspect, foundSuspect->GetPosition());
			return;
		}
	}

	GameObjectList missing(NAME_MISSING_PERSON);
	for (int k = 0; k < missing.GetNumObjects(); k++)
	{
		GameObject *foundMissing = missing.GetObject(k);
		if (DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundMissing, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
		{
			DroneRevealMissingPerson(foundMissing);
			const char *TextMissingPolice = "Drone Unit: Missing person located from aerial search. Marking subject position and requesting EMS evaluation.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_MISSING_FIND);
			Mission::PlayHint(TextMissingPolice);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextMissingPolice, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextMissingPolice, 7.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextMissingPolice, foundMissing->GetPosition());
			return;
		}
	}

	GameObjectList leads(NAME_HOMICIDE_LEAD);
	for (int l = 0; l < leads.GetNumObjects(); l++)
	{
		GameObject *foundLead = leads.GetObject(l);
		if (DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundLead, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
		{
			const char *TextLead = "Drone Unit: Investigative lead located in the search area. Detectives should make contact.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_FIND);
			Mission::PlayHint(TextLead);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextLead, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextLead, 7.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextLead, foundLead->GetPosition());
			return;
		}
	}

	GameObjectList victims(NAME_HOMICIDE_VICTIM);
	for (int m = 0; m < victims.GetNumObjects(); m++)
	{
		GameObject *foundVictim = victims.GetObject(m);
		if (DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundVictim, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
		{
			const char *TextVictim = "Drone Unit: Possible victim located from aerial scan. Secure the scene and notify detectives.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_FIND);
			Mission::PlayHint(TextVictim);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextVictim, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextVictim, 7.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextVictim, foundVictim->GetPosition());
			return;
		}
	}

	const char *TextNegative = "Drone Unit: Aerial scan complete. No police target located in this search area.";
	Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_NEGATIVE);
	Mission::PlayHint(TextNegative);
	Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextNegative, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextNegative, 7.f);
}

void DroneRunFireScan(Vector Pos)
{
	GameObjectList sources(NAME_CHEM_SOURCE);
	for (int i = 0; i < sources.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject *foundSource = sources.GetObject(i);
		if (DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundSource, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS) && !foundSource->HasCommand(CMD_CHEM_SECURED))
		{
			DroneReportHazmatPlacard(foundSource);
			return;
		}
	}

	int exposed = DroneCountNamedObjects(Pos, NAME_CHEM_VICTIM, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS);
	if (exposed > 0)
	{
		const char *TextVictims = "Drone Size-Up: Exposed civilians visible inside the hazard area. Request hazmat rescue and EMS staging.";
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_FIRE_FIND);
		Mission::PlayHint(TextVictims);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextVictims, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextVictims, 7.f);
		Game::ShowEvent(TextVictims, Pos);
		return;
	}

	GameObjectList missing(NAME_MISSING_PERSON);
	for (int j = 0; j < missing.GetNumObjects(); j++)
	{
		GameObject *foundMissingFire = missing.GetObject(j);
		if (DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundMissingFire, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
		{
			DroneRevealMissingPerson(foundMissingFire);
			const char *TextMissing = "Drone Size-Up: Missing person located from aerial search. Fire command requesting EMS to the marked area.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_MISSING_FIND);
			Mission::PlayHint(TextMissing);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextMissing, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextMissing, 7.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextMissing, foundMissingFire->GetPosition());
			return;
		}
	}

	GameObjectList objects;
	for (int k = 0; k < objects.GetNumObjects(); k++)
	{
		GameObject *foundFire = objects.GetObject(k);
		if (foundFire->IsValid() && foundFire->IsBurning() && DronePointNearObject(Pos, foundFire, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
		{
			const char *TextFire = "Drone Size-Up: Active fire visible from aerial scan. Marking the seat of the fire for command.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_FIRE_FIND);
			Mission::PlayHint(TextFire);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextFire, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextFire, 7.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextFire, foundFire->GetPosition());
			return;
		}
	}

	const char *TextNegative = "Drone Size-Up: Aerial scan complete. No visible victim, fire, or hazmat source located in this area.";
	Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_NEGATIVE);
	Mission::PlayHint(TextNegative);
	Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextNegative, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextNegative, 7.f);
}

object DummyPoliceDroneKit : CommandScript
{
	DummyPoliceDroneKit() { SetGroupID(20); }
	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
};

object PcmdGetPoliceDroneFromVehicle : CommandScript
{
	PcmdGetPoliceDroneFromVehicle()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_POLICE);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_POLICE);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPriority(120);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsPulling())
			return false;

		return !p.HasCommand(DUMMY_POLICE_DRONE_KIT);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsDestroyed() || v.IsBurning())
			return false;

		bool ValidPoliceVehicle = false;
		switch (v.GetVehicleType())
		{
			case VT_POLICE_SW:
			case VT_POLICE_MTW:
			case VT_POLICE_PHC:
			case VT_POLICE_STW:
			case VT_POLICE_WAW:
			case VT_POLICE_GTW:
			case VT_POLICE_GETAWAY:
				ValidPoliceVehicle = true;
				break;
		}

		if (!ValidPoliceVehicle)
			return false;

		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_ANY);
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_GET_POLICE_DRONE, Target, 1, false);
			return;
		}

		p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_POLICE_DRONE_KIT);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_LAUNCH_POLICE_DRONE);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_STOW_DRONE_KIT);
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_RETRIEVE);
		const char *Text = "Drone Unit: Police drone kit retrieved from vehicle. Select launch area to begin aerial search.";
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
	}
};

object PcmdGetFireDroneFromVehicle : CommandScript
{
	PcmdGetFireDroneFromVehicle()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_FIRE);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_FIRE);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPriority(120);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsPulling())
			return false;

		return !p.HasCommand(DUMMY_FIRE_DRONE_KIT);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsDestroyed() || v.IsBurning())
			return false;

		bool ValidFireVehicle = false;
		switch (v.GetVehicleType())
		{
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_ASF:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LF:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_FLB:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TFMB:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF:
			case VT_FIREFIGHTERS_FMB:
				ValidFireVehicle = true;
				break;
		}

		if (!ValidFireVehicle)
			return false;

		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
```
