```cpp
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_ANY);
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_GET_FIRE_DRONE, Target, 1, false);
			return;
		}

		p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_FIRE_DRONE_KIT);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_LAUNCH_FIRE_DRONE);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_STOW_DRONE_KIT);
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_FIRE_RETRIEVE);
		const char *Text = "Drone Size-Up: Fire drone kit retrieved from vehicle. Select launch area for aerial reconnaissance.";
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
	}
};

object PcmdLaunchPoliceDrone : CommandScript
{
	PcmdLaunchPoliceDrone()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_POLICE);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_POLICE);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(110);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.HasCommand(DUMMY_POLICE_DRONE_KIT) || p.HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE))
			return false;

		return p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vector scanPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Vector deployPos = p.GetPosition();
		if (!Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, deployPos, DRONE_DEPLOY_OFFSET))
			deployPos = p.GetPosition();

		Vehicle drone = Game::CreateVehicle(DRONE_PROTO, DRONE_NAME_POLICE);
		if (!drone.IsValid())
		{
			const char *TextFail = "Drone Unit: Unable to launch drone. Prototype could not be created.";
			Mission::PlayHint(TextFail);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextFail, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextFail, 7.f);
			return;
		}

		drone.SetPosition(deployPos);
		drone.UpdatePlacement();
		drone.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
		drone.SetSelectable(true);
		drone.SetCommandable(true);
		drone.SetUserData(p.GetID());
		drone.AssignCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_POLICE_SERVICE);
		drone.AssignCommand(CMD_DRONE_FLY);
		drone.AssignCommand(CMD_DRONE_SCAN);
		drone.AssignCommand(CMD_DRONE_RECALL);
		p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE);

		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_LAUNCH);
		const char *TextLaunch = "Drone Unit: Police drone airborne. Beginning aerial search pattern.";
		Mission::PlayHint(TextLaunch);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextLaunch, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextLaunch, 7.f);
		drone.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, scanPos);
		drone.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, DRONE_SCAN_DELAY);
		drone.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DRONE_SCAN, &drone, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdLaunchFireDrone : CommandScript
{
	PcmdLaunchFireDrone()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_FIRE);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_FIRE);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(110);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.HasCommand(DUMMY_FIRE_DRONE_KIT) || p.HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE))
			return false;

		return p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vector scanPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		Vector deployPos = p.GetPosition();
		if (!Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, deployPos, DRONE_DEPLOY_OFFSET))
			deployPos = p.GetPosition();

		Vehicle drone = Game::CreateVehicle(DRONE_PROTO, DRONE_NAME_FIRE);
		if (!drone.IsValid())
		{
			const char *TextFail = "Drone Size-Up: Unable to launch drone. Prototype could not be created.";
			Mission::PlayHint(TextFail);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextFail, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextFail, 7.f);
			return;
		}

		drone.SetPosition(deployPos);
		drone.UpdatePlacement();
		drone.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
		drone.SetSelectable(true);
		drone.SetCommandable(true);
		drone.SetUserData(p.GetID());
		drone.AssignCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_FIRE_SERVICE);
		drone.AssignCommand(CMD_DRONE_FLY);
		drone.AssignCommand(CMD_DRONE_SCAN);
		drone.AssignCommand(CMD_DRONE_RECALL);
		p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE);

		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_FIRE_LAUNCH);
		const char *TextLaunch = "Drone Size-Up: Fire drone airborne. Beginning overhead reconnaissance.";
		Mission::PlayHint(TextLaunch);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(TextLaunch, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(TextLaunch, 7.f);
		drone.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, scanPos);
		drone.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, DRONE_SCAN_DELAY);
		drone.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DRONE_SCAN, &drone, 1, false);
	}
};

object VcmdDroneFlyToPoint : CommandScript
{
	VcmdDroneFlyToPoint()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_FLY);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_FLY);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(105);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		return Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_POLICE_SERVICE) || Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_FIRE_SERVICE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector flyPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		if (Target && Target->IsValid() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT)
		{
			GameObject targetObj(Target);
			flyPos = targetObj.GetPosition();
		}

		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, flyPos);
	}
};

object VcmdDroneScanArea : CommandScript
{
	VcmdDroneScanArea()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_SCAN);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_SCAN);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(100);
	}

	void DS_Notice(const char *Text)
	{
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
	}

	bool DS_Near(Vector Pos, GameObject *Obj, float Radius)
	{
		if (!Obj->IsValid())
			return false;

		Vector objPos = Obj->GetPosition();
		if (Math::dist(Pos.x, Pos.y, objPos.x, objPos.y) <= Radius)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void DS_RevealMissingPerson(GameObject *VictimObject)
	{
		if (!VictimObject->IsValid() || VictimObject->HasCommand(CMD_MISSING_FOUND))
			return;

		Person victim(VictimObject);
		victim.AssignCommand(CMD_MISSING_FOUND);
		victim.Injure(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, true);
		victim.SetLife(victim.GetMaxLife() * 0.45f);
		victim.SetAnimation("injured");
		victim.SetSelectable(true);
		victim.SetCommandable(false);
		victim.SetFoundByDog(true);
	}

	const char *DS_GetHazmatPlacardText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read from aerial camera. UN 1993, flammable liquid, class 3. Container appears to be leaking. Establish ignition control, isolate downwind, and keep non-hazmat personnel out of the hot zone.";
			case 1: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1017, chlorine, class 2.3 toxic gas with corrosive hazard. Visible vapor reported. Approach from upwind, use full hazmat PPE, and prepare respiratory decon.";
			case 2: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1760, corrosive liquid, class 8. Product may cause severe burns and respiratory irritation. Keep civilians uphill and upwind until source control is complete.";
			case 3: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1005, ammonia anhydrous, class 2.3. Expect strong vapor cloud and respiratory hazard. Establish a wide exclusion zone and request atmospheric monitoring.";
			case 4: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1090, acetone, class 3 flammable liquid. Container is compromised. Eliminate ignition sources and stage fire suppression outside the vapor area.";
			case 5: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 2922, corrosive liquid toxic, class 8 with toxic subsidiary risk. Multiple exposure patients possible. Hazmat entry should identify product before moving container.";
			case 6: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 3082, environmentally hazardous liquid. Leak appears limited but civilians are symptomatic. Control runoff and keep EMS outside the contaminated area.";
			case 7: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 2672, ammonia solution, class 8. Odor and irritation consistent with corrosive vapor. Use splash protection, respiratory protection, and upwind entry.";
			case 8: return "Drone Size-Up: Placard read as UN 1789, hydrochloric acid, class 8 corrosive. Avoid contact with runoff and vapor. Request decon corridor before patient removal.";
		}

		return "Drone Size-Up: Placard partially obscured. Aerial camera indicates an unknown hazardous material container with active leak indicators. Treat as toxic and corrosive until hazmat confirms product.";
	}

	const char *DS_GetHazmatPlacardSound(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_00;
			case 1: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_01;
			case 2: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_02;
			case 3: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_03;
			case 4: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_04;
			case 5: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_05;
			case 6: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_06;
			case 7: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_07;
			case 8: return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_08;
		}

		return SND_DRONE_HAZMAT_PLACARD_09;
	}

	void DS_ReportHazmatPlacard(GameObject *Source)
	{
		if (!Source->IsValid())
			return;

		int CaseID = Source->GetUserData();
		const char *TextSource = DS_GetHazmatPlacardText(CaseID);
		Audio::PlaySample(DS_GetHazmatPlacardSound(CaseID));
		DS_Notice(TextSource);
		Game::ShowEvent(TextSource, Source->GetPosition());
	}

	int DS_CountNamedObjects(Vector Pos, const char *Name, float Radius)
	{
		int Count = 0;
		GameObjectList objects(Name);
		for (int i = 0; i < objects.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = objects.GetObject(i);
			if (obj->IsValid() && DS_Near(Pos, obj, Radius))
				Count++;
		}

		return Count;
	}

	void DS_RunPoliceScan(Vector Pos)
	{
		GameObjectList escapees(NAME_JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT);
		for (int i = 0; i < escapees.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *foundEscape = escapees.GetObject(i);
			if (DS_Near(Pos, foundEscape, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
			{
				const char *TextEscape = "Drone Unit: Possible jail escapee located from aerial scan. Marking last known position for responding officers.";
				Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_FIND);
				DS_Notice(TextEscape);
				Game::ShowEvent(TextEscape, foundEscape->GetPosition());
				return;
			}
		}

		GameObjectList suspects(NAME_HOMICIDE_SUSPECT);
		for (int j = 0; j < suspects.GetNumObjects(); j++)
		{
			GameObject *foundSuspect = suspects.GetObject(j);
			if (DS_Near(Pos, foundSuspect, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
			{
				const char *TextSuspect = "Drone Unit: Possible homicide suspect located. Maintain containment and move officers into position.";
				Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_POLICE_FIND);
				DS_Notice(TextSuspect);
				Game::ShowEvent(TextSuspect, foundSuspect->GetPosition());
				return;
			}
		}

		GameObjectList missing(NAME_MISSING_PERSON);
		for (int k = 0; k < missing.GetNumObjects(); k++)
		{
			GameObject *foundMissing = missing.GetObject(k);
			if (DS_Near(Pos, foundMissing, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
			{
				DS_RevealMissingPerson(foundMissing);
				const char *TextMissingPolice = "Drone Unit: Missing person located from aerial search. Marking subject position and requesting EMS evaluation.";
				Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_MISSING_FIND);
				DS_Notice(TextMissingPolice);
				Game::ShowEvent(TextMissingPolice, foundMissing->GetPosition());
				return;
			}
		}

		const char *TextNegative = "Drone Unit: Aerial scan complete. No police target located in this search area.";
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_NEGATIVE);
		DS_Notice(TextNegative);
	}

	void DS_RunFireScan(Vector Pos)
	{
		GameObjectList sources(NAME_CHEM_SOURCE);
		for (int i = 0; i < sources.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *foundSource = sources.GetObject(i);
			if (DS_Near(Pos, foundSource, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS) && !foundSource->HasCommand(CMD_CHEM_SECURED))
			{
				DS_ReportHazmatPlacard(foundSource);
				return;
			}
		}

		int exposed = DS_CountNamedObjects(Pos, NAME_CHEM_VICTIM, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS);
		if (exposed > 0)
		{
			const char *TextVictims = "Drone Size-Up: Exposed civilians visible inside the hazard area. Request hazmat rescue and EMS staging.";
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_FIRE_FIND);
			DS_Notice(TextVictims);
			Game::ShowEvent(TextVictims, Pos);
			return;
		}

		GameObjectList missing(NAME_MISSING_PERSON);
		for (int j = 0; j < missing.GetNumObjects(); j++)
		{
			GameObject *foundMissingFire = missing.GetObject(j);
			if (DS_Near(Pos, foundMissingFire, DRONE_SCAN_RADIUS))
			{
				DS_RevealMissingPerson(foundMissingFire);
				const char *TextMissing = "Drone Size-Up: Missing person located from aerial search. Fire command requesting EMS to the marked area.";
				Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_MISSING_FIND);
				DS_Notice(TextMissing);
				Game::ShowEvent(TextMissing, foundMissingFire->GetPosition());
				return;
			}
		}

		const char *TextNegative = "Drone Size-Up: Aerial scan complete. No visible victim, fire, or hazmat source located in this area.";
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_NEGATIVE);
		DS_Notice(TextNegative);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		return Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_POLICE_SERVICE) || Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_FIRE_SERVICE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;

		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector scanPos = Caller->GetPosition();

		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_POLICE_SERVICE))
			DS_RunPoliceScan(scanPos);
		else
			DS_RunFireScan(scanPos);
	}
};

object VcmdRecallDrone : CommandScript
{
	VcmdRecallDrone()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_RECALL);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_RECALL);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(90);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		return Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_POLICE_SERVICE) || Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_FIRE_SERVICE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;

		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		int OperatorID = Caller->GetUserData();
		PersonList squads(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int i = 0; i < squads.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person *p = squads.GetPerson(i);
			if (!p->IsValid())
				continue;

			if (p->GetID() == OperatorID && p->HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE))
				p->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE);
		}

		Audio::PlaySample(SND_DRONE_RECALL);
		const char *Text = "Drone Unit: Drone recalled. Operator may launch again when ready.";
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
		Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}
};

object PcmdStowDroneKit : CommandScript
{
	PcmdStowDroneKit()
	{
		SetIcon(DRONE_ICON_STOW);
		SetCursor(DRONE_ICON_STOW);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(80);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_POLICE_DRONE_KIT) || Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_FIRE_DRONE_KIT);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		return Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID() && CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		int OperatorID = p.GetID();
		GameObjectList policeDrones(DRONE_NAME_POLICE);
		for (int i = 0; i < policeDrones.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *objPolice = policeDrones.GetObject(i);
			if (objPolice->IsValid() && objPolice->GetUserData() == OperatorID)
				objPolice->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}

		GameObjectList fireDrones(DRONE_NAME_FIRE);
		for (int j = 0; j < fireDrones.GetNumObjects(); j++)
		{
			GameObject *objFire = fireDrones.GetObject(j);
			if (objFire->IsValid() && objFire->GetUserData() == OperatorID)
				objFire->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}

		if (p.HasCommand(DUMMY_POLICE_DRONE_KIT))
			p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_POLICE_DRONE_KIT);
		if (p.HasCommand(DUMMY_FIRE_DRONE_KIT))
			p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FIRE_DRONE_KIT);
		if (p.HasCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE))
			p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_DRONE_ACTIVE);
		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_LAUNCH_POLICE_DRONE))
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_LAUNCH_POLICE_DRONE);
		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_LAUNCH_FIRE_DRONE))
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_LAUNCH_FIRE_DRONE);
		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_STOW_DRONE_KIT))
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_STOW_DRONE_KIT);

		const char *Text = "Drone Unit: Drone kit stowed.";
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_EnterAerialBasket.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - Cannot enter basket when target is in fire station.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char VO_SQUAD[]				= "fs_squad";

object EnterBasket: CommandScript
{
	bool install;

	EnterBasket()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_DLK_BASKET);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_IDLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_FREE_DLK);
		SetPriority(250);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		return !p.IsInDLKBasket();
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		return !p.IsInDLKBasket()/* && Game::ExistsFreeDLK()*/;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE ||
			Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (/*!v.IsInstalled() || */v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD) || v.GetVehicleType() != VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK || v.IsUplifting() || !v.IsBasketEmpty())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		install = false;
		if (!v.IsInstalled())
		{
			if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson())
				return false;
			install = true;
		}

		if (p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
		{
			// person is in open area
			return true;
		}
		else
		{
			// person is in house
			// check if house has ground entrance
			if (p.IsInHouseWithGroundEntrance())
				return true;
			else
			{
				// check if vehicle is installed at this house
				if (p.GetEnteredHouseID() == v.GetInstallTargetID())
					return true;
			}
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		Person p(Caller);
		Vector TargetPos;
		if (p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1 || p.IsInHouseWithGroundEntrance())
			TargetPos = v.GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_DLK_BASKET_BASE);
		else
			TargetPos = p.GetEnteredHouseEntrancePosition(false);

		int mode;	// 0 - enter direct, 1 - call up, 2 - call down
		if (p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
		{
			// person is in open area
			if (v.IsUplifted())
				mode = 2;
			else
				mode = 0;
		}
		else
		{
			// person is in house
			// check if house has ground entrance
			if (p.IsInHouseWithGroundEntrance())
			{
				// Need to leave house
				if (v.IsUplifted())
					mode = 1;
				else
					mode = 0;
			}
			else
			{
				// check if vehicle is installed at this house
				if (p.GetEnteredHouseID() == v.GetInstallTargetID())
				{
					if (v.IsUplifted())
						mode = 0;
					else
						mode = 1;
				}
			}
		}

		switch (mode)
		{
			case 0:	// enter directly
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
				Caller->PushActionEnterBasket(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				break;
			case 1:	// call up
				v.PushActionBasketUp(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
				Caller->PushActionEnterBasket(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				break;
			case 2:	// call down
				v.PushActionBasketDown(ACTION_NEWLIST, Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f));
				Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
				Caller->PushActionEnterBasket(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				break;
		}
		if (install)
			v.PushActionInstall(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target);
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_FireHydrant.script

```cpp
/*******************************************************************************************
	FIRE HYDRANT LOCK / UNLOCK SCRIPT VERSION 1.1 BY ITCHBOY
	Made by request for SlateDragon
	Usage not allowed without permission of SlateDragon!
********************************************************************************************/

object PcmdHydrant : CommandScript
{
	PcmdHydrant()
	{
		SetCursor("unlockhydrant");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions2(RESTRICT2_ISHYDRANT);
		SetPriority(50);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(Game::GetNumSelectedGameObjects() == 1 && p.IsValid() && !p.IsEquipped() && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1 && !p.IsPhysicsSimulationEnabled())
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsValid() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1) 
			return false;
		if(Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT)
		{
			GameObject obj(Target);
			if(obj.IsHydrant() && !obj.IsHydrantInUse())
			{
				if(obj.HasCommand("PcmdHydrant"))
					SetCursor("unlockhydrant");
				else
					SetCursor("lockhydrant");
				return true;
			}
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject obj(Target);
		Person p(Caller);
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_FREE_CONNECTOR);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdHydrant", &obj, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "usescissors");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.0f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if(obj.HasCommand("PcmdHydrant"))
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdHydrant", &obj, 2, false);
			else
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdHydrant", &obj, 3, false);
		}
		if (childID == 2 || childID == 99)	//unlock hydrant
		{
			obj.SetChildEnabled("spray_effect", true);
			if (childID == 2)
			{
				obj.RemoveCommand("PcmdHydrant");
				Mission::PlayHint("BCFD Command Be Advised - Hydrant Water Supply Established");
				p.SetCommandable(true);
			}
		}
		if (childID == 3 || childID == 100)	//lock hydrant
		{
			obj.SetChildEnabled("spray_effect", false);
			if (childID == 3)
			{
				obj.AssignCommand("PcmdHydrant");
				Mission::PlayHint("BCFD Command Be Advised - Hydrant Water Supply Established");
				p.SetCommandable(true);
			}
		}
		if (childID == 4)	//rapid deploy
		{
			obj.RemoveCommand("PcmdHydrant");
			obj.SetChildEnabled("spray_effect", false);
			Mission::PlayHint("BCFD Command Be Advised - Hydrant Water Supply Established");
		}
		if (childID == 5)	//rapid undeploy and removeFirehose
		{
			obj.AssignCommand("PcmdHydrant");
			obj.SetChildEnabled("spray_effect", false);
			Mission::PlayHint("BCFD Command Be Advised - Hydrant Water Supply Shut Down");
		}

		if (childID == 20)	//remove firehose from caller
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
		}
		if (childID == 21)	//give firehose to caller
		{
			p.SetCommandable(true);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_FIREHOSE);
		}
	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_FirstAid.script

```cpp
/*******************************************************

First Aid Script Version 1.1 by itchboy
Version 1.1 
	-Added limitation to prevent first aid twice
	-Cannot first aid when person IsHealing()

Recommended usage is to give this command only to PD and TEC units.

********************************************************/

const char CMD_CHECK[]			= "CheckVictim";
const char CMD_DEAD[]			= "PcmdDead";
const char CMD_AID[]			= "PcmdFirstAid";
const char HINT_DEAD[]			= "Unfortunately, this person is dead!";
const char HINT_UNKNOWN[]		= "This person has been injured and requires medical treatment!";
const char HINT_SHOT[]			= "This person has been shot and requires medical treatment!";
const char HINT_FIRE[]			= "This person has serious burns and requires medical treatment!";
const char HINT_DROWN[]			= "This person has drowned and requires medical treatment!";
const char HINT_ENERGY[]		= "This person has suffered physical trauma and requires medical treatment!";
const char HINT_CHEM[]			= "This person been exposed to a poisonous chemical substance and requires medical treatment!";
const char HINT_BIO[]			= "This person has been exposed to a unknown biological substance and requires medical treatment!";
const char DUMMY_ISAIDED[]		= "DummyIsAided";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdFirstAid : CommandScript
{
	PcmdFirstAid()
	{
		SetIcon("heal");
		SetCursor("heal");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_INJURED_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() > 1)
			return false;

		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson") || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (p.IsParamedicTeam() && p.IsCarryingPerson())
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		Person t(Target);
		Person p(Caller);

		if (t.HasCommand("DummyBlanket") || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISAIDED))
			return false;

		if (t.IsDead() && !t.HasCommand("DummyBlanket"))
			SetPriority(410);
		else if(p.IsFireFighterABC())
			SetPriority(0);
		else if (!t.IsClassified())
			SetPriority(500);
		else if(Input::LShiftPressed() || Input::RShiftPressed())
			SetPriority(2000);

		if (p.IsParamedicTeam() && t.GetRole() == ROLE_SQUAD && !t.IsInjured())
			return false;

		if (!t.IsHealing() && !t.IsDrowning() && t.GetRole() != ROLE_ANIMAL && !t.IsRescueDog() && (t.IsInjured()) && t.GetEnteredCarID() == -1 && !t.IsCarried() && !t.IsHealing())
			return true;
	
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_TREATMENT);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_AID, Target, 1, false);
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST,"treatinjured1");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);

			if (!t.IsClassified())
				t.SetClassified(true);

			else if (t.IsDead())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DEAD);
				if (p.HasCommand(CMD_CHECK));
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DEAD, &t, 0, false);
				return;
			}
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.f);
			t.SetInjuredLifeDrain(p.GetInjuredLifeDrain()*0.8);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_AID, Target, 2, false);
		}
		if (childID == 2)
		{
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_ISAIDED);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idle");
			t.GetInjuryReason();
			{
				if (t.GetInjuryReason()==INJUREREASON_SHOT)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_SHOT);
					return;
				}
				else if (t.GetInjuryReason()==INJUREREASON_FIRE)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_FIRE);
					return;
				}
				else if (t.GetInjuryReason()==INJUREREASON_ENERGY)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_ENERGY);
					return;
				}
				else if (t.GetInjuryReason()==INJUREREASON_DROWN)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DROWN);
					return;
				}
				else if (t.GetInjuryReason()==INJUREREASON_CONTAM_CHEM)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_CHEM);
					return;
				}
				else if (t.GetInjuryReason()==INJUREREASON_CONTAM_BIO)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BIO);
					return;
				}
				else if (t.GetInjuryReason()==INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_UNKNOWN);
					return;
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyIsAided : CommandScript
{
	DummyIsAided()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return false;
	}

  	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_FlareDeployRemove.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.5#
//
// 		Includes: All Traffic Cone commands
//
//	- PcmdFlareGet
//	- PcmdFlareRemove
//	- PcmdFlarePlace
//	- DummyFlare
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_GETFLARE[]			= "PcmdFlareGet";
const char CMD_REMOVEFLARE[]			= "PcmdFlareRemove";
const char CMD_PLACEFLARE[]			= "PcmdFlarePlace";
const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char CMD_ARREST[]				= "Arrest";
const char CMD_GETAXE[]				= "GetAxe";
const char OBJ_FLAREGROUND[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/flare.e4p";
const char NAME_FLARE[]				= "Flare";
const char OBJ_FLARE[]				= "01 LA Equipment/flare.V3O";
const char DUMMY_FLARE[]			= "DummyFlare";

const char DUMMY_3FLARES[]			= "Dummy3Flares";
const char DUMMY_2FLARES[]			= "Dummy2Flares";
const char DUMMY_1FLARE[]			= "Dummy1Flare";

int DummyGroup = 16;

object PcmdFlareGet : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdFlareGet()
	{
    		SetIcon("flare");
    		SetCursor("flare");
		SetPriority(170);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_GETAXE))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFIREAXE);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE))
				return false;
		}

		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_ARREST))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
				return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRI_EKW)
				return true;

			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;

			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);

		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_FLARE, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdFlareRemove : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdFlareRemove()
	{
    		SetIcon("flareremove");
    		SetCursor("flareremove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;

		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_GETAXE))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFIREAXE);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE))
				return false;
		}

		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_ARREST))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
				return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.HasCommand("EmptyCar") && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRI_EKW)
				return true;

			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);

		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_FLARE, Target, 2, false);
	}
};

object PcmdFlarePlace : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdFlarePlace()
	{
    		SetIcon("flareplace");
    		SetCursor("flareplace");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
 		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
 		{
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
 			return true;
 
 		return true;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);

		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		Vector Pos = Caller->GetPosition();
			float r[9];
			float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		if (Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, Pos, 1.f))
		{
                	Vehicle v = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_FLAREGROUND, NAME_FLARE);
			if (v.IsValid())
			{
				float dx = 35.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(90.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Pos = Pos + Vector(dx, dy, 0);
				v.SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
				v.SetPosition(Pos);
				v.UpdatePlacement();
			}
			int PlayerID = p.GetPlayerMP();
			v.SetPlayerMP(PlayerID);
		}

		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "getsmallobj");
		if(Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_3FLARES))
		{
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_3FLARES);
			Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES);
		}
		else if(Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES))
		{
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES);
			Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE);
		}
		else if(Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE))
		{
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_FLARE, Target, 2, false);
		}
	}
};

object DummyFlare : CommandScript
{
	DummyFlare()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_FLARE);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_FLARE, Caller, 4, false);
			p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_3FLARES);

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_PLACEFLARE);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEFLARE);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETFLARE);
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet"); 

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.HasCommand("EmptyCar"))
			{
				if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_3FLARES))
					p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_3FLARES);
				if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES))
					p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES);
				if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE))
					p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE);

				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
			}

			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0  
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usar_ff.e4p") == 0)
			{
				//p.AssignCommand("PcmdStabilize");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
				p.AssignCommand("GetShears");
				p.AssignCommand("GetAxe");
				p.AssignCommand("GetChainsaw");
				p.AssignCommand("GetFirehose");
				p.AssignCommand("GetJumppad");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterBasket");
				p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
				p.AssignCommand("StopUseCannon");
				p.AssignCommand("Pull");
				p.AssignCommand("StopPull");
				p.AssignCommand("BasketDown");
				p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
				p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				//p.AssignCommand("PickUp");
				p.AssignCommand("Extinguish");
				p.AssignCommand("Cool");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdWye");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff_scba.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToFF");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff_scba.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToFF");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_nohelmet.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToCivil");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_paramedic_nohelmet.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("GetStryker");
					p.AssignCommand("GetSpineboard");
					p.AssignCommand("RemoveSpineboardFromPatient");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_nohelmet.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdHeal");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
				} else
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdStabilize");
			} else
			{
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet"); 
				p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.AssignCommand("GetRoadBlock");
				p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
				p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
				p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
				p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
				p.AssignCommand("Halt");
				p.AssignCommand("PickUp");
				p.AssignCommand("CheckVictim");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_agent.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/bp_officer.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
					p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
					p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
					p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
					p.AssignCommand("Stop");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallTow");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdFirstAid");
				// Taser disabled.

					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 ||
					StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || 
					StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/bp_officer.e4p") == 0)
					{
						if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0)
						{
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
						}
						else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0)
						{
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
						}
						else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0) 
						{
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
						}
						else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0) 
						{
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
						}
						else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/bp_officer.e4p") == 0)
						{
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallParkRanger");
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
						}
						else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_agent.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p") == 0)
							p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTacVest");
					}
				}
				else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccsd_swat_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_swat.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet");
					p.AssignCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0)
					{
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPSWAT");
					}
					else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccsd_swat_officer.e4p") == 0)
					{	
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOSWAT");
					}
					else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p") == 0)
					{
				// Taser disabled.
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
					}
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
					if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_swat.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p") == 0)
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
				}
				else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/05 US Army/us_army_soldier.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdM4Get");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdStabilize");
					p.AssignCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
					p.AssignCommand("GetAxe");
					p.AssignCommand("GetShears");
					p.AssignCommand("GetChainsaw");
					p.AssignCommand("Pull");
					p.AssignCommand("StopPull");
					p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
					//p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
					p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
					p.AssignCommand("Stop");
				}
			}
		}
		if(childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES))
			{
				p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES);
				p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_3FLARES);
			}
			else if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE))
			{
				p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE);
				p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_2FLARES);
			} else
			{
				p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_1FLARE);
				p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_FLARE);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_FLARE, Caller, 4, false);
			}
 			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}
		if(childID == 4)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_PLACEFLARE);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEFLARE);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETFLARE);
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet"); 
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0  
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff_scba.e4p") == 0 
			|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usar_ff.e4p") == 0)
			{
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdStabilize");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetShears");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetAxe");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetChainsaw");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetFirehose");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetJumppad");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterBasket");
				p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
				p.RemoveCommand("StopUseCannon");
				p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
				p.RemoveCommand("StopPull");
				p.RemoveCommand("BasketDown");
				p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				//p.RemoveCommand("PickUp");
				p.RemoveCommand("Extinguish");
				p.RemoveCommand("Cool");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdWye");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff_scba.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToFF");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff_scba.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToFF");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_nohelmet.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_ff.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToCivil");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_paramedic_nohelmet.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("GetStryker");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetSpineboard");
					p.RemoveCommand("RemoveSpineboardFromPatient");
				}
				if (p.HasCommand("PcmdStabilize"))
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdStabilize");
				if (p.HasCommand("PcmdHeal"))
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdHeal");
				if (p.HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag"))
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
			} else
			{
				if(p.HasCommand("GetExtinguisher"))
					p.RemoveCommand("GetExtinguisher");
				if(p.HasCommand("Lift"))
					p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
				if (p.HasCommand("UnloadPerson"))
					p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetRoadBlock");
				p.RemoveCommand("Arrest");
				p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.RemoveCommand("DrawWeapon");
				if(p.HasCommand("DrawTaser"))
					p.RemoveCommand("DrawTaser");
				p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("AskPerson");
				p.RemoveCommand("Halt");
				p.RemoveCommand("CheckVictim");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFirstAid");

				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_agent.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/bp_officer.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
					p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
					p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
 					p.RemoveCommand("Stop");
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/mppd_officer_01.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0) 
					{
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");	
					}
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0) 
					{
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
					}
					if (p.HasCommand("PcmdGetTacVest"))
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetTacVest");
				}
				else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/atf_swat.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccsd_swat_officer.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade"); 
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0)
					{
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallMHPSWAT");
					}
					else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccsd_swat_officer.e4p") == 0)
					{
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallBCSOSWAT");
					}
					else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p") == 0)
					{
						p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
						p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
					}
					if (p.HasCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest"))
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
				}
				else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/05 US Army/us_army_soldier.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdM4Get");
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdStabilize");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetAxe");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetShears");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetChainsaw");
					p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
					p.RemoveCommand("StopPull");
					p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
					//p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
					p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
					p.RemoveCommand("Stop");
				}
			}
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallParkRanger"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallParkRanger");	
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallTow"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallTow");	
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter");
		}
	}
};

	{

	}
```
