
## PersonCommand_FriskDetainSuspect.script

```cpp
// PersonCommand_FriskDetainSuspect.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: DummyFriskDetainedNotice, PcmdFriskSuspect
const char SND_FRISK_DETAINED[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/pd_one_detained.wav";
const char HINT_DETAINED[]				= "One detained pending investigation";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS[]	= "DummyMDTChargeNarcotics";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON[]	= "DummyMDTChargeWeapon";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENPROP[]	= "DummyMDTChargeStolenProperty";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FALSEID[]	= "DummyMDTChargeFalseID";
int FriskCommandGroup					= 45;

object PcmdFriskSuspect : CommandScript
{
	PcmdFriskSuspect()
	{
		SetIcon("frisk");
		SetCursor("frisk");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTINJURED | RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED | RESTRICT_NOTLINKED | RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_NONIJURED_PERSON);
		SetGroupID(FriskCommandGroup);
		SetPriority(-100);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid() || p.GetPersonType() != PT_POLICEMEN)
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsPhysicsSimulationEnabled())
			return false;
		if (p.IsEquipped())
			return false;

		GameObjectList selected = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (selected.GetNumObjects() > 1)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		return p.IsValid() && p.GetPersonType() == PT_POLICEMEN && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid() || p.GetPersonType() != PT_POLICEMEN)
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsPhysicsSimulationEnabled())
			return false;

		Person t(Target);
		if (!t.IsValid() || t.GetState() != PERSONSTATE_NORMAL || t.IsArrested())
			return false;
		if (t.GetRole() == ROLE_ANIMAL || t.GetRole() == ROLE_SQUAD)
			return false;
		if (t.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1 && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			return false;
		if (p.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1 && t.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			return false;

		SetPriority(-100);
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);
		if (!p.IsValid() || !t.IsValid())
			return;

		int Finding = Math::rand() % 6;

		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &t, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &t);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "treatinjured2");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 4.0f);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, &t, false);
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.8f);
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyFriskDetainedNotice", &t, Finding, false);
	}
};

object DummyFriskDetainedNotice : CommandScript
{
	DummyFriskDetainedNotice()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person suspect(Target);
		if (p.IsValid())
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_FRISK_DETAINED, p.GetPosition());

		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Frisk result: no contraband found. | One detained pending investigation", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("Frisk result: no contraband found. | One detained pending investigation", 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
		}
		else if (childID == 1)
		{
			if (suspect.IsValid() && !suspect.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS))
				suspect.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Frisk result: small amount of narcotics found. | One detained pending investigation", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("Frisk result: small amount of narcotics found. | One detained pending investigation", 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
		}
		else if (childID == 2)
		{
			if (suspect.IsValid() && !suspect.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON))
				suspect.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Frisk result: concealed weapon found. | One detained pending investigation", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("Frisk result: concealed weapon found. | One detained pending investigation", 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
		}
		else if (childID == 3)
		{
			if (suspect.IsValid() && !suspect.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENPROP))
				suspect.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENPROP);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Frisk result: stolen property found. | One detained pending investigation", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("Frisk result: stolen property found. | One detained pending investigation", 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
		}
		else if (childID == 4)
		{
			if (suspect.IsValid() && !suspect.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS))
				suspect.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Frisk result: drug paraphernalia found. | One detained pending investigation", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("Frisk result: drug paraphernalia found. | One detained pending investigation", 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
		}
		else
		{
			if (suspect.IsValid() && !suspect.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FALSEID))
				suspect.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FALSEID);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Frisk result: suspicious identification found. | One detained pending investigation", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("Frisk result: suspicious identification found. | One detained pending investigation", 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
		}
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_GetReturnStretcherAndPatientTransport.script

```cpp
/*******************************************************************************
	Get Stretcher script originally by GoKa | modified by a-rescue & GrisuStefan

	HEAVILLY MODIFIED BY ITCHBOY FOR MONTANA MOD V2.0
*******************************************************************************/

const char OBJ_INV[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Equipment/invisible.e4p";
const char NAME_SB[]				= "SB";
const char OBJ_DUMMY[]				= "01 LA Equipment/invisible.V3O";
const char OBJ_SB_OBJECT[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/spineboard.e4p";

const char HINT_SPINEBOARD[] 		= "This person has suffered physical trauma and requires a spineboard for transport!";
const char HINT_DEAD[] 				= "This person has died and cannot be put on the stretcher.";
const char HINT_CLASSIFIED[] 		= "This person has not yet been treated by a paramdeic and cannot be put on the stretcher!";

object GetStretcher : CommandScript
{
	Vector pos;
	GetStretcher()
	{
		SetCursor("use");
		SetIcon("stretcher");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!= 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson") || p.HasCommand("DummyHasSpineboard"))
			return false;
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetFreeTransports() > 0 && (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC))
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			pos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, pos);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "GetStretcher", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_DUMMY);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped3");
			p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher", true);
			p.AssignCommand("DummyHasStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("DropStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("ReturnStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdPutVictimInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetStretcher");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetSpineboard");
			p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
			p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag"))		p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdHeal");
			p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("RemoveEquipment");
			if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0)
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
			else if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_traffic.e4p") == 0)
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
		}
	}
};

object ReturnStretcher : CommandScript
{
	ReturnStretcher()
	{
		SetCursor("use");
		SetIcon("stretcher");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson") || p.HasCommand("DummyHasStretcherPatient") || p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient"))
			return false;
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetFreeTransports() > 0 && (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC))
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		Vector pos;

		if (childID == 0)
		{
			pos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, pos);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "ReturnStretcher", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if (childID == 1 || childID == 99) //general code to remove commands when getting rid of stretcher
		{
			p.SetUserData(0);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			if(p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient"))		p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher_patient", false);
			if(p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher"))				p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher", false);
			p.RemoveCommand("DropStretcher");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdPutVictimInCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher");
			p.RemoveCommand("DummyHasStretcher"); 
			p.RemoveCommand("DummyHasStretcherPatient");
			p.RemoveCommand("ReturnStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("GetStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("GetSpineboard");
			p.AssignCommand("Pull");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdHeal");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
			p.AssignCommand("RemoveEquipment");
			if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
			else if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_traffic.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			if (childID == 99)
			{
				Vector TargetPos = v.GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
				p.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
		}
	}
};

object PcmdPutVictimInCar : CommandScript
{
	TargetPoint targetPoint;
	PcmdPutVictimInCar()
	{
		SetIcon("putintocar");
		SetCursor("putintocar");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
	}
	
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		if(!p.HasChild("stretcher_patient"))
			return false;
		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE || Caller->GetType()!=ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (!v.IsAmbulance() || v.GetFreeTransports() == 0)
			return false;
		if(!v.IsDestroyed())
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsContaminated())
				return false;
			targetPoint = TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR;
			return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Vector pos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);	
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, pos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdPutVictimInCar", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vector pos;
			if (v.GetFreePassengers() > 0 && v.GetFreeTransports() > 0)
			{
				Actor aP = Game::GetActor(p.GetUserData());
				if (aP.IsValid() && aP.GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person pT(&aP);
					if (v.AddTransport(&pT))
						p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "ReturnStretcher", &v, 99, false);
					else
					{
						pT.ClearFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
						System::Error("PcmdPutVictimInCar(): Patient could not be added to transport! %s %i", p.GetName(), p.GetUserData());
					}
				}
				else	{	System::Error("PcmdPutVictimInCar(): Patient actor could not be found! %s %i", p.GetName(), p.GetUserData());	}
			}
		}
	}
};

object PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher()
	{
		SetIcon("drop");
		SetCursor("drop");
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		if(!p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient"))
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);	//paramedic
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "scout_work");	//the stretcher child has this anim too, so it makes the stretcher go down in animation
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.2f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher", &p, 1, false);
		}
		if (childID == 1)	/* Show patient and position them next to paramedic with stretcher, also hide child objects */
		{
			Actor ap = Game::GetActor(p.GetUserData());
			if (ap.IsValid() && ap.GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			{
				Person pT(&ap);
				float dx = 0.f, dy = 50.f, dz = 0.f;
					float r[9];
					float childr[9];
				p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Vector Put = p.GetPosition() + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

				Game::FindFreePosition(&pT, Put, 250.f);
				pT.SetPosition(Put);
				if(pT.HasCommand("DummyPatientOnSpineboard"))
				{
					float r[9];
					pT.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					Vector SpinePos = pT.GetPosition();

					Vehicle s = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SB_OBJECT, NAME_SB);
					s.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
					s.SetPosition(SpinePos);
					s.UpdatePlacement();
					s.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
					s.SetUserData(pT.GetID());
					s.SetSelectable(false);
				}
				pT.ClearFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
				pT.RemoveCommand("DummyIsOnStretcher");
				p.SetUserData(0);
				p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher", true);
				p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher_patient", false);
				p.SetAnimation("scout_standup");	//the stretcher child has this anim too, so it makes the stretcher go up in animation
				p.RemoveCommand("DummyHasStretcherPatient");
				p.AssignCommand("Lift");
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.2f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyUnloadStretcher", &p, 2, false);
			}
			else
			{
				System::Error("PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher(): Could not find hidden patient! %s %i", p.GetName(), p.GetUserData());
				p.SetCommandable(true);
			}
		}
		if(childID == 2)	/* Command completion, delete stretcher anim obj, make commandable */
		{
			p.SetCommandable(true);
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("ReturnStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
		}
	}
};

object DummyLiftVictimStretcher : CommandScript
{
	DummyLiftVictimStretcher()
	{}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person pT(Target); //patient
		Person p(Caller); //paramedic
		if(childID == 0) // Remove commands from medic and set user data of patient to be = to paramedic
		{
			if (pT.IsDead())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DEAD);
				return;
			}
			else if(!pT.IsClassified())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_CLASSIFIED);
				return;
			}
			if(pT.GetInjuryReason() == INJUREREASON_ENERGY && !pT.HasCommand("DummyPatientOnSpineboard"))
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_SPINEBOARD);
				return;
			}
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyLiftVictimStretcher", &pT, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1) // Put person on stretcher
		{
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdPutVictimInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemovePersonFromStretcher");
			p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
			p.RemoveCommand("ReturnStretcher");
			p.RemoveCommand("DropStretcher");
			p.SetUserData(pT.GetID());
			p.AssignCommand("DummyHasStretcherPatient");
			pT.AssignCommand("DummyIsOnStretcher");

			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "scout_work");	//the stretcher child has this anim too, so it makes the stretcher go down in animation
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.2f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyLiftVictimStretcher", &pT, 2, false); //function call for hide patient & create child object on paramedic
		}
		if(childID == 2) //Hide patient, create child object on paramedic
		{
			Person pT(Target);
			bool SpineboardFound = false;
			if(pT.HasCommand("DummyPatientOnSpineboard"))
			{
				VehicleList spineboards(NAME_SB);
				for (int i = 0; i < spineboards.GetNumVehicles() && !SpineboardFound; i++) 
				{
					Vehicle *sB = spineboards.GetVehicle(i);
					if(sB->GetUserData() == pT.GetID())
					{
						sB->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
						SpineboardFound = true;
					}
				}
				if(!SpineboardFound)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("ERROR in deleting spineboard");
					System::Error("Something went wrong! %s %i", pT.GetName(), pT.GetID());
				}
			}
			if(pT.IsSelected())
			{
				p.Select();
				pT.Deselect();
			}
			pT.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_NEWLIST, true);
			pT.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			pT.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.01f);
			pT.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyLiftVictimStretcher", &pT, 66, false);
			p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher", false);
			p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher_patient", true);
			p.SetAnimation("scout_standup");	//the stretcher child has this anim too, so it makes the stretcher go up in animation
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.2f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyLiftVictimStretcher", &pT, 3, false);
		}
		if(childID == 3)
		{
			p.SetCommandable(true);
		}
		if(childID == 66) //Hide patient via SetFlag(OF_HIDDEN)
		{
			Person pT(Caller);
			pT.SetFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
		}
	}
};

object DummyHasStretcher : CommandScript
{
	DummyHasStretcher()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}
};

object DummyHasStretcherPatient : CommandScript
{
	DummyHasStretcherPatient()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}
};

object DummyIsOnStretcher : CommandScript
{
	DummyIsOnStretcher()
	{}
};

```

## PersonCommand_HoseExtensionHydrant.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
//	    Hose Extension and Gated Wye script for the New York City mod by MikeyPI and Hoppah
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//******************************************************************************************

object PcmdExtendhose : CommandScript
{
	PcmdExtendhose()
	{
		SetIcon("extinguish");
		SetCursor("extinguish");
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		//SetRestrictions2(RESTRICT2_ISHYDRANTORSELF);
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		GameObject o = Caller->GetHydrant();
		if (o.HasName("extend_wye") || o.HasName("extend_hose") || StrCompare(o.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 Fire Department/water_tender.e4p") == 0)
			return false;
		return Caller->GetFirehoseID() != 0;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetEquipment()==EQUIP_FIREHOSE && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON && Caller->GetFirehoseID() != 0)
		{
			if (Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID())
				return true;
			GameObject o = Caller->GetHydrant();
			if (o.HasName("extend_wye") || o.HasName("extend_hose") || StrCompare(o.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 Fire Department/water_tender.e4p") == 0)
				return false;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			GameObject hydrant = Caller->GetHydrant();
			p.SetCommandable(false);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "kneeldown");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdExtendhose", &hydrant, 1, false);			
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			GameObject hydrant(Target);
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
				float r[9];
				float childr[9];
			p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			Vehicle m = Game::CreateVehicle("mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/fire_hose_extension.e4p", "extend_hose");
			float dx = 9.f, dy = -24.f, dz = 21.f;
			Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
			Math::EulerToMatrix(20.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
			Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
			Pos = Pos + Vector(dx, dy, dz);
			m.SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
			m.SetPosition(Pos);
			m.UpdatePlacement();
			m.SetUserData(hydrant.GetID());						
			m.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
			m.SetSelectable(false);
			Vector PerPos = p.GetPosition();			
			Person n = Game::CreatePerson(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), Caller->GetName());
			if (n.IsValid()) && Game::FindFreePosition(&n, PerPos))
			{
				n.SetEquipment(EQUIP_FIREHOSE);
				float dx = -30.f, dy = -20.f, dz = 0.f;
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				PerPos = PerPos + Vector(dx, dy, dz);
				n.SetPosition(PerPos);
				n.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				n.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &m, TARGET_FREE_CONNECTOR);
				n.PushActionCheckFreeConnector(ACTION_APPEND, &m);
				n.PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, &m, 0, 1.0f);
				n.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyEquipmentCommands", &n, 3, false);
				n.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
				n.SetHealth(p.GetHealth());
				n.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
			}
			p.SetUserData(m.GetID());
			p.EnableAutoTarget(false);
			if (p.IsSelected())
			{
				p.Deselect();
				n.Select();
			}
			if (!p.IsFlagSet(OF_HIDDEN))
				p.SetFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, 100000.0f);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_ATOM, 100000.0f);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_CHEM, 100000.0f);
			p.SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_BIO, 100000.0f);			
		}
		if (childID == 2 || childID == 3)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if(!v.IsInstalled())
			{
				PersonList list(ROLE_SQUAD);
				for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumPersons(); i++)
				{
					if (list.GetPerson(i)->GetUserData() == v.GetID() && list.GetPerson(i)->IsFlagSet(OF_HIDDEN))
					{
						Person *n = list.GetPerson(i);
						n->ClearFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
						n->SetCommandable(true);
						n->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idle");
						if (p.IsSelected())
							n->Select();
						n->EnableAutoTarget(true);
						n->SetResistance(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, 0.0f);
						n->SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_ATOM, 0.0f);
						n->SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_CHEM, 0.0f);
						n->SetResistance(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_BIO, 0.0f);
						v.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
						p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
						n->SetUserData(0);
						if (childID == 3)
							n->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "RemoveFirehose", n, 3, false);
					} else
						v.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				}
			} else
				return;
		}	
	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_M4A1RifleWeapon.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 2.4#										
//												
// 		Includes: All M4 Commands								
//												
//	- PcmdM4Get										
//	- PcmdM4Remove									
//	- PcmdM4Shoot	
//	- PcmdM4Aim									
//	- PcmdM4AimEnd	
//	- PcmdM4MoveTo	
//	- DummyM4
//						
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_GETM4[]				= "PcmdM4Get";
const char CMD_REMOVEM4[]			= "PcmdM4Remove";
const char CMD_SHOOTM4[]			= "PcmdM4Shoot";
const char CMD_AIMM4[]				= "PcmdM4Aim";
const char CMD_AIMENDM4[]			= "PcmdM4AimEnd";
const char CMD_MOVEM4[]				= "PcmdM4MoveTo";
const char DUMMY_M4[]				= "DummyM4";
const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char OBJ_M4_IDLE[]			= "01 LA Equipment/m4_idle.V3O";
const char OBJ_M4_AIM[]				= "01 LA Equipment/m4_aim.V3O";
const char SND_GETM4[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/m4_get.wav";
const char SND_FIREM4[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/m4_shoot.wav";
const char SND_UNLOCK[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/unlock_weapon.wav";
const char PARTICLE_FLASH[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/05 LA Particles/muzzleflash04.e4p";
const char NAME_FLASH[]				= "MuzzleFlash";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdM4Get : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdM4Get()
	{
    		SetIcon("m4");
    		SetCursor("m4");
		SetPriority(190);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && isPoliceVehicleForM4Get(&v))
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}

		return false;
	}

	bool isPoliceVehicleForM4Get(Vehicle v)
	{
		return v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GETAWAY ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_M4, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdM4Remove : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdM4Remove()
	{
		SetIcon("m4remove");
    		SetCursor("m4remove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && isPoliceVehicleForM4Remove(&v))
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}

		return false;
	}

	bool isPoliceVehicleForM4Remove(Vehicle v)
	{
		return v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GETAWAY ||
			v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_M4, Caller, 4, false);
	}
};

object PcmdM4Shoot : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	PcmdM4Shoot()
	{
    		SetIcon("shoot");
    		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SHOOTABLE | RESTRICT_NOTINJURED);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetKeepAsCurrentCommand(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		Range = 900.f;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(Target) > Range)
			return false;

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_PERSON)
		{	
			Person t(Target);
			if (t.IsValid() && t.GetEnteredHouseID() == p.GetEnteredHouseID())
			{
				if(p.IsAiming())
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (!v.IsCivilCar())
				SetPriority(-700);
			
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.IsFlagSet(OF_SHOOTABLE) && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			{
				if ((v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRT_BH) && !v.IsOnGround())
					return false;
				if(p.IsAiming())
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}
					
		return false;	
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsAiming())
		{
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_UNLOCK, Pos);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_M4_AIM);
			p.PushActionPrepareAim(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMENDM4);
   			p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVEM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMM4);
			p.RemoveCommand("DrawTaser");
			p.RemoveCommand("HolsterTaser");
			p.RemoveCommand("ShootTaser");
		} 
		else
		{
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_FIREM4, Pos);

				float r[9];
			p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
                	GameObject f = Game::CreateObject(PARTICLE_FLASH, NAME_FLASH);
			f.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			f.SetPosition(Pos);
			f.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.5f);
			f.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);

			if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			{
				Person t(Target);
				if (t.IsValid() && !t.IsDead())
				{
					if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 50.f)
					{
						t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
					}
					else if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 100.f)
					{
						t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 200.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 600.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 300.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 500.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 400.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 400.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 500.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 300.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 600.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 200.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 1000.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 100.f);
					}
				}
			}
			if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Vehicle v(Target);
				if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed())
				{
					if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 300.f)
					{
						v.Damage(330.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 500.f)
					{
						v.Damage(230.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 700.f)
					{
						v.Damage(140.f);
					} 
					else 	if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 1000.f)
					{
						v.Damage(100.f);
					}
				}
			}
		}  
	}
};

object PcmdM4Aim : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	PcmdM4Aim()
	{
    		SetIcon("aim");
     		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(220);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->IsAiming() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;
			
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
		Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_UNLOCK, Pos);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_M4_AIM);
		p.PushActionPrepareAim(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMENDM4);
   		p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVEM4);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEM4);   
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMM4);  
		p.RemoveCommand("DrawTaser");
		p.RemoveCommand("HolsterTaser");
		p.RemoveCommand("ShootTaser");
	}
};

object PcmdM4AimEnd : CommandScript
{

	PcmdM4AimEnd()
	{
    		SetIcon("aimend");
     		SetCursor("aimed");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(600);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		return Caller->IsAiming();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()) || !Caller->IsAiming())
			return false;
				
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_M4_IDLE);
		p.PushActionAimEnd(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDM4);
   		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_MOVEM4);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMM4);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEM4);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
	}
};

object PcmdM4MoveTo : CommandScript
{
	MoveResult mr;

	PcmdM4MoveTo()
	{
    		SetIcon("moveto");
    		SetCursor("moveto");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VIRTUAL | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		mr = Commands::CheckMoveConditions(Caller, Target, childID);
		if(mr.Mode == MOVE_ABORT)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsAiming() || p.IsCurrentAnimation("shootrifle"))
		{
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_M4_IDLE);
			p.PushActionAimEnd(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.5f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_M4, Caller, 3, false);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, mr.Target);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_MOVEM4);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMM4);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEM4);
		}
	}
};

object DummyM4 : CommandScript
{
	DummyM4()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_M4_IDLE);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMM4);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_SHOOTM4);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETM4);
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFirstAid");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			p.RemoveCommand("Arrest");
			p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.RemoveCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.RemoveCommand("DrawTaser");
			p.RemoveCommand("HolsterTaser");
			p.RemoveCommand("ShootTaser");
			p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("AskPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("Halt");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			p.RemoveCommand("PickUp");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetAxe");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetShears");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetChainsaw");
			p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
			p.RemoveCommand("StopPull");
			p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
			p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
			//p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");

			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_GETM4, Pos);

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMM4);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETM4);
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFirstAid");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.AssignCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
			p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("Halt");
			p.AssignCommand("PickUp"); 
			p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
			//p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("Redirect");

			// Door animation is skipped on return because this command can be
			// called from a custom deploy flow where forcing OpenCloseDoor can crash.
		}
		if(childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_M4_IDLE);
		}
		if(childID == 4)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.SetAnimation("idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDM4);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_MOVEM4);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETM4);
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFirstAid");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.AssignCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
			p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("Halt");
			p.AssignCommand("PickUp"); 
			p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
			p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
		}
  	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_MP5Weapon.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 2.6#										
//												
// 		Includes: All MP5 Commands								
//												
//	- PcmdMP5Get										
//	- PcmdMP5Remove									
//	- PcmdMP5Shoot	
//	- PcmdMP5Aim									
//	- PcmdMP5AimEnd	
//	- PcmdMP5MoveTo	
//	- DummyMP5
//						
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_GETMP5[]				= "PcmdMP5Get";
const char CMD_REMOVEMP5[]			= "PcmdMP5Remove";
const char CMD_SHOOTMP5[]			= "PcmdMP5Shoot";
const char CMD_AIMMP5[]				= "PcmdMP5Aim";
const char CMD_AIMENDMP5[]			= "PcmdMP5AimEnd";
const char CMD_MOVEMP5[]			= "PcmdMP5MoveTo";
const char DUMMY_MP5[]				= "DummyMP5";
const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char OBJ_MP5_IDLE[]			= "01 LA Equipment/mp5_idle.V3O";
const char OBJ_MP5_AIM[]			= "01 LA Equipment/mp5_aim.V3O";
const char SND_GETMP5[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/mp5_get.wav";
const char SND_FIREMP5[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/mp5_shoot.wav";
const char SND_UNLOCK[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/unlock_weapon.wav";
const char PARTICLE_FLASH[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/05 LA Particles/muzzleflash04.e4p";
const char NAME_FLASH[]				= "MuzzleFlash";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdMP5Get : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdMP5Get()
	{
    		SetIcon("mp5");
    		SetCursor("mp5");
		SetPriority(190);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFLASHGRENADE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/suv_lapd.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/hummerh2_lasd.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/oshkosh_tpv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_bearcat.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_tac.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_armoured_vehicle.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_truck.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/09 Government/fbi_suv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_suv.e4p") == 0 ||			
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/09 Government/fbi_command.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/ATF_cv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_mcp.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_nru.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_civic.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_expedition01.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_transport_van.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_lapd_slicktop.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_umpc.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_unmarked_cvpi.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_cougar_mrap.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/oshkosh_tpv.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_MP5, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdMP5Remove : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdMP5Remove()
	{
    		SetIcon("mp5remove");
    		SetCursor("mp5remove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFLASHGRENADE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/suv_lapd.e4p") == 0 ||
 			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/hummerh2_lasd.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/oshkosh_tpv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_bearcat.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_tac.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_armoured_vehicle.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_truck.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/09 Government/fbi_suv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_suv.e4p") == 0 ||			
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/09 Government/fbi_command.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/ATF_cv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_mcp.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_nru.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_civic.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_expedition01.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_transport_van.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_lapd_slicktop.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_umpc.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_unmarked_cvpi.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_cougar_mrap.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/oshkosh_tpv.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_MP5, Target, 2, false);
	}
};

object PcmdMP5Shoot : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	PcmdMP5Shoot()
	{
    		SetIcon("shoot");
    		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SHOOTABLE | RESTRICT_NOTINJURED);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetKeepAsCurrentCommand(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		Range = 900.f;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(Target) > Range)
			return false;

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_PERSON)
		{	
			Person t(Target);
			if (t.IsValid() && t.GetEnteredHouseID() == p.GetEnteredHouseID())
			{
				if(p.IsAiming())
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (!v.IsCivilCar())
				SetPriority(-700);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.IsFlagSet(OF_SHOOTABLE) && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			{
				if ((v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRT_BH) && !v.IsOnGround())
					return false;
				if(p.IsAiming())
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}
		return false;	
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsAiming())
		{
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_UNLOCK, Pos);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_MP5_AIM);
			p.PushActionPrepareAim(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMENDMP5);
   			p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVEMP5);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEMP5);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMMP5);
		} 
		else
		{
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_FIREMP5, Pos);

				float r[9];
			p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
                	GameObject f = Game::CreateObject(PARTICLE_FLASH, NAME_FLASH);
			f.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			f.SetPosition(Pos);
			f.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.5f);
			f.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);

			if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			{
				Person t(Target);
				if (t.IsValid() && !t.IsDead())
				{
					if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 50.f)
					{
						t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
					}
					else if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 100.f)
					{
						t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 200.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 600.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 300.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 500.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 400.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 400.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 500.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 300.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 600.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 200.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 1000.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 100.f);
					}
				}
			}

			if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Vehicle v(Target);
				if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed())
				{
					if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 300.f)
					{
						v.Damage(330.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 500.f)
					{
						v.Damage(230.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 700.f)
					{
						v.Damage(140.f);
					} 
					else 	if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 1000.f)
					{
						v.Damage(100.f);
					}
				}
			}
		}  
	}
};

object PcmdMP5Aim : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	PcmdMP5Aim()
	{
    		SetIcon("aim");
     		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(220);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->IsAiming() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;
			
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
		Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_UNLOCK, Pos);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_MP5_AIM);
		p.PushActionPrepareAim(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMENDMP5);
   		p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVEMP5);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEMP5);   
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMMP5);  
	}
};

object PcmdMP5AimEnd : CommandScript
{

	PcmdMP5AimEnd()
	{
    		SetIcon("aimend");
     		SetCursor("aimed");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(600);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		return Caller->IsAiming();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()) || !Caller->IsAiming())
			return false;
				
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_MP5_IDLE);
		p.PushActionAimEnd(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDMP5);
   		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_MOVEMP5);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMMP5);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEMP5);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
	}
};

object PcmdMP5MoveTo : CommandScript
{
	MoveResult mr;

	PcmdMP5MoveTo()
	{
    		SetIcon("moveto");
    		SetCursor("moveto");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VIRTUAL | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		mr = Commands::CheckMoveConditions(Caller, Target, childID);
		if(mr.Mode == MOVE_ABORT)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsAiming() || p.IsCurrentAnimation("shootrifle"))
		{
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_MP5_IDLE);
			p.PushActionAimEnd(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.5f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_MP5, Caller, 3, false);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, mr.Target);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDMP5);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_MOVEMP5);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMMP5);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEMP5);
		}
	}
};

object DummyMP5 : CommandScript
{
	DummyMP5()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_MP5_IDLE);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMMP5);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_SHOOTMP5);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEMP5);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETMP5);
			p.RemoveCommand("Arrest");
			p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.RemoveCommand("DrawWeapon");
			if(p.HasCommand("DrawTaser"))
				p.RemoveCommand("DrawTaser");
			p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("AskPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("Halt");
			if(p.HasCommand("HaltVehicle"))
				p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
			if(p.HasCommand("Redirect"))
				p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			if(p.HasCommand("GetExtinguisher"))
				p.RemoveCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.RemoveCommand("PickUp");
			if(p.HasCommand("Lift"))
				p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
			if(p.HasCommand("UnloadPerson"))
				p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("CheckVictim");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdFlareGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");

			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/09 Government/fbi_agent_tac.e4p") == 0)
			{
				p.RemoveCommand("CheckVictim");
				p.RemoveCommand("Negotiate");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdPSGGet");
			}

			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_GETMP5, Pos);

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTMP5);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEMP5);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMMP5);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETMP5);
			p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
			p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("Halt");
			p.AssignCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			p.AssignCommand("PickUp");
			p.AssignCommand("CheckVictim");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p") == 0)
			{
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
				p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
				p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
				p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
			// Taser disabled.
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
			}
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");

			else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccsd_swat_officer.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");

			else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/09 Government/fbi_agent_tac.e4p") == 0)
			{
				p.AssignCommand("CheckVictim");
				p.AssignCommand("Negotiate");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdPSGGet");
			}

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_MP5_IDLE);
		}
  	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_PatientCareTreatment.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.0#										
//												
// 		Includes: Heal command for healing without bag								
//												
//	- PcmdHeal										
//						
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_HEAL[]			= "PcmdHeal";
const char HINT_NOSTABILIZE[]		= "This person is too severely injured and can't be stabilized!";
const char HINT_BAG[]			= "You need a FF/Paramedic with EMT bag to defibrillate this person!";
const char HINT_DEAD[]			= "This person is dead and can't be treated anymore!";
const char HINT_CPR_PROGRESS[]		= "CPR in progress. Requesting EMS to step it up.";
const char CMD_DEAD[]			= "PcmdDead";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdHeal : CommandScript
{
	PcmdHeal()
	{
		SetIcon("heal");
		SetCursor("heal");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_INJURED_PERSON | CPE_WOUNDED_SQUAD);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() > 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson") || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if(p.HasCommand("DummyHasStretcher") || p.HasCommand("DummyHasStretcherPatient") || p.HasCommand("Dummy_HasSpineboard"))
			return false;

		if (p.IsParamedicTeam() && p.IsCarryingPerson())
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		Person t(Target);
		Person p(Caller);
		if (t.HasCommand("DummyBlanket"))
			return false;
		SetPriority(300);
		if (t.IsDead() && !t.HasCommand("DummyBlanket"))
			SetPriority(410);
		else if (!t.IsClassified())
			SetPriority(410);
		else if (t.IsClassified() && t.GetLife() < 0.33f * t.GetMaxLife())
			SetPriority(410);

		if (p.IsParamedicTeam() && t.GetRole() == ROLE_SQUAD && !t.IsInjured())
			return false;

		if (!t.IsDrowning() && t.GetRole() != ROLE_ANIMAL && !t.IsRescueDog() && (t.IsInjured() || t.IsWoundedSquad()) && t.GetEnteredCarID() == -1 && !t.IsCarried())
			return true;
	
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_TREATMENT);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			if (t.IsDead())
			{
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DEAD, &t, 0, false);
				return;
			}
			if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_nohelmet.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ems_paramedic_captain.e4p") == 0)
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 1, false);
			else
			{
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 3, false);
			}
		}
		if (childID == 1) // heal person for paramedic
		{
			if (!t.IsClassified())
				t.SetClassified(true);
			if (t.IsComatose())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BAG);
				return;
			}
			if (t.GetRole() == ROLE_SQUAD && !t.IsInjured() && t.GetHealth() < 1.f * t.GetMaxHealth())
			{
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST,"treatinjured2");
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				t.Heal(2.0f * t.GetMedicalLifeGain());
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 6, false);
				return;
			}
			else if (t.GetLife() < 1.f * t.GetMaxLife())
			{
				t.Heal(2.0f * t.GetMedicalLifeGain());
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST,"treatinjured1");
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 4, false);
			} else
			{
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST,"idle");
			}
		}
		if (childID == 2) //heal person for paramedics stretcher
		{
			if (!t.IsClassified())
				t.SetClassified(true);
			if (t.IsComatose())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_BAG);
				return;
			}
			else if (t.IsDead())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DEAD);
				return;
			}
			//t.SetInjuredLifeDrain(0.0f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "paramedictreat_down");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "paramedictreat");
			if (t.GetLife() < 1.f * t.GetMaxLife())
			{
				t.Heal(2.0f * t.GetMedicalLifeGain());
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 5, false);
			}
			else
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "paramedictreat_up");
		}
		if (childID == 3) // firefighter assessment and stabilization
		{
			if (!t.IsClassified())
				t.SetClassified(true);
			if (t.IsDead())
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_DEAD);
				return;
			}

			t.SetInjuredLifeDrain(0.0f);
			if (t.IsComatose())
			{
				Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HINT_CPR_PROGRESS, 5.f);
				Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HINT_CPR_PROGRESS, 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.0f);
			}
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "treatinjured1");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.f);
			if (t.GetLife() < 0.35f * t.GetMaxLife())
				t.SetLife(0.35f * t.GetMaxLife());
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		}
		if (childID == 4)
		{
			if (!t.IsCarried() && t.GetLife() < 1.f * t.GetMaxLife())
			{
				t.Heal(0.9f * t.GetMedicalLifeGain());
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 4, false);
			}
			else
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idle");
		}
		if (childID == 5)
		{
			if (!t.IsCarried() && t.GetLife() < 1.f * t.GetMaxLife())
			{
				t.Heal(1.8f * t.GetMedicalLifeGain());
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 5, false);
			}
			else
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "paramedictreat_up");
		}
		if (childID == 6)
		{
			if (t.IsIdle() && t.GetHealth() < 1.f * t.GetMaxHealth())
			{
				t.Heal(2.0f * t.GetMedicalLifeGain());
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_HEAL, Target, 6, false);
			}
			else
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idle");
		}
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_PIOStandDeployRemove.script

```cpp
// PIO Stand deploy / remove script
// Commands: PcmdPIOStandInstall, PcmdPIOStandRemove, VcmdPIOStandRotateClockwise, VcmdPIOStandRotateCounterClockwise
//

const char CMD_INSTALL_PIO_STAND[]		= "PcmdPIOStandInstall";
const char CMD_REMOVE_PIO_STAND[]		= "PcmdPIOStandRemove";
const char CMD_ROTATE_PIO_STAND_CW[]		= "VcmdPIOStandRotateClockwise";
const char CMD_ROTATE_PIO_STAND_CCW[]		= "VcmdPIOStandRotateCounterClockwise";
const char CMD_MOVETO[]				= "MoveTo";
const char CMD_ENTERCAR[]			= "EnterCar";
const char CMD_USE[]				= "Use";
const char CMD_ENTERHOUSE[]			= "EnterHouse";
const char OBJ_PIO_STAND[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/PIOStand1.e4p";
const char NAME_PIO_STAND[]			= "PIOStandEM4Resource";
const char HINT_PIO_STAND_NOSPACE[]		= "No space to deploy PIO stand!";

object PcmdPIOStandInstall : CommandScript
{
	PcmdPIOStandInstall()
	{
		SetCursor("use");
		SetIcon("use");
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPriority(300);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return;

		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Vector StandPos = Caller->GetPosition();
		float dx = 65.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
		Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
		StandPos = StandPos + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

		if (!Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, StandPos, 90.f))
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_PIO_STAND_NOSPACE);
			return;
		}

		Vehicle stand = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_PIO_STAND, NAME_PIO_STAND);
		if (!stand.IsValid())
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_PIO_STAND_NOSPACE);
			return;
		}

		Math::EulerToMatrix(0.f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
		stand.SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
		stand.SetPosition(StandPos);
		stand.UpdatePlacement();
		stand.SetCommandable(true);
		stand.SetUserData(p.GetID());
		stand.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
		stand.SetSelectable(true);
		stand.AssignCommand(CMD_ROTATE_PIO_STAND_CW);
		stand.AssignCommand(CMD_ROTATE_PIO_STAND_CCW);

		Vector BackPos = Caller->GetPosition();
		float bx = -80.f, by = 0.f, bz = 0.f;
		Math::RotateVector(bx, by, bz, r);
		BackPos = BackPos + Vector(bx, by, 0);
		if (Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, BackPos, 140.f))
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, BackPos);

		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_INSTALL_PIO_STAND);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVE_PIO_STAND);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_MOVETO))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVETO);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_USE))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_USE);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE);
	}
};

object PcmdPIOStandRemove : CommandScript
{
	PcmdPIOStandRemove()
	{
		SetIcon("use");
		SetCursor("use");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetObjectType() == TYPE_PERSON && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle stand(Target);

			if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
				return false;

			if (stand.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if (stand.HasName(NAME_PIO_STAND) && stand.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
				return true;

			if (StrCompare(stand.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_PIO_STAND) == 0 && stand.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);

		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_ANY);
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_REMOVE_PIO_STAND, Target, 1, false);
			return;
		}

		Vehicle stand(Target);
		if (stand.IsValid() && stand.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
		{
			stand.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_INSTALL_PIO_STAND);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVE_PIO_STAND);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_MOVETO))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVETO);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_USE))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_USE);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE);
		}
	}
};

object VcmdPIOStandRotateClockwise : CommandScript
{
	VcmdPIOStandRotateClockwise()
	{
		SetIcon("rotate_cw");
		SetCursor("rotate_cw");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(120);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_PIO_STAND))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_PIO_STAND))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Math::EulerToMatrix(-25.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);

		Caller->SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
	}
};

	{

		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(120);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_PIO_STAND))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_PIO_STAND))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Math::EulerToMatrix(25.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);

		Caller->SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
	}
};
```
