## PersonCommand_PoliceArrestAndTransport.script

```cpp
/**********************************************************************
Festnahme mit Waffe by Woltep
Edited for LA Mod by Hoppah

	Really edited by itchboy for personal LA MOD

	Edited again by itchboy for Montana Mod V2
***********************************************************************/

const int MAX_POOL = 15;
const char *CivilPool[MAX_POOL];
const char DUMMY_ARREST[]		= "DummyArrest";
const char DUMMY_ARREST2[]		= "DummyArrest2";
const char DUMMY_ARREST3[]		= "DummyArrestVehicle";
const char CMD_ARREST[] 		= "Arrest";
const char CMD_ARREST2[] 		= "PcmdArrest2";
const char CMD_SHOOTGUN[]		= "Shoot";
const char CMD_HOLSTERGUN[]		= "HolsterWeapon";
const char CMD_DRAWGUN[]		= "DrawWeapon";
const char CMD_SHOOTTASER[]		= "ShootTaser";
const char CMD_HOLSTERTASER[]		= "HolsterTaser";
const char CMD_DRAWTASER[]		= "DrawTaser";

object PcmdArrest2 : CommandScript
{
	PcmdArrest2()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_ARREST);
		SetPriority(800);
		SetIcon("arrest");
		SetCursor("arrest");
		//SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_PISTOL);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTINJURED | RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED | RESTRICT_NOTLINKED | RESTRICT_SHOOTABLE | RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_NONIJURED_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsValid() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsPhysicsSimulationEnabled())
			return false;

		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() > 1)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		return !p.IsLinkedWithPerson();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() ||  Caller->IsEquipped() && Caller->GetEquipment() != EQUIP_PISTOL || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsValid() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		if(Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
		{
			Person t(Target);
			// if(!t.IsValid() || t.GetState() != PERSONSTATE_NORMAL || t.IsCurrentAnimation("pistolshoot") || t.IsCurrentAnimation("shootrifle"))
				// return false;
			if(!t.IsValid() || t.GetState() != PERSONSTATE_NORMAL)
				return false;
		}

		else if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (!v.IsValid() || v.IsParking() || v.IsUplifted() || v.IsDestroyed() || v.IsSmoking() || (v.GetVehicleType() != VT_NOSQUAD && v.GetVehicleType() != VT_GANGSTER_GETAWAY))
				return false;

			if(Game::IsMultiplayer() || Game::IsMission())
				return false;	
		}

		Person t(Target);
		if(t.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1 && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			return false;

		if(p.GetEnteredHouseID() != -1 && t.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			return false;

		return (t.GetRole() != ROLE_ANIMAL && t.GetRole() != ROLE_SQUAD);

			return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON) 
		{
			Person t(Target);
			Vector CmdPos, TargetPos;
			CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
			TargetPos = CmdPos;

			Person p(Caller);
			if (!p.IsValid() || !t.IsValid())
				return;
			if (t.IsCurrentAnimation("hostage_down"))
			{
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.5f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &t, TARGET_FOLLOW);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Caller, 3, false);
				p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, &t, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", &t, 5, false);
				return;
			}
			if (p.GetThrowPosition(TargetPos))
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			}
			else
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "pistoltarget");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST, Target, 0, false);
		}
		else if(Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			Vector CmdPos, TargetPos;
			CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
			TargetPos = CmdPos;

			if (!p.IsValid() || !v.IsValid())
				return;
			if (p.GetThrowPosition(TargetPos))
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
			}
			else
			{
				if(v.GetNumPassengers() == 0)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, "DummyInsertPassenger", &v, 0, false);
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "pistoltarget");
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST3, &v, 0, false);
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyArrest : CommandScript
{
	DummyArrest()
	{
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person t(Target);
		Person p(Caller);

		if (t.GetRole() != ROLE_GANGSTER)
		{
			t.ClearActions();
			t.RemoveObjectPath();
			t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "hostage_down");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.0f);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &t, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Caller, 3, false);
			p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, &t, false);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", &t, 5, false);
		}
		else if (t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_ATTACKALL || t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_ATTACKSQUAD || t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_ATTACKSQUAD_SMART)
		{
			int Chance = Math::rand() % 2;
			if (Chance == 0)
			{
				t.ClearActions();
				t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_CIVILARMED);
				t.SetDisableGangsterSymbol(false);
				t.RemoveObjectPath();
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				if (t.IsEquipped())
				{
					t.PushActionRemoveEquipment(ACTION_APPEND);
					t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				}
				t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "hostage_down");
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);
				t.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Target, 1, false);	
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 4.5f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &t, TARGET_FOLLOW);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Caller, 3, false);
				p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, &t, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", &t, 5, false);
			}
			else
			{
				t.SetPrimaryTarget(&p);
				p.PushActionShoot(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
		}
		else if (t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_GUARDHOSTAGE || t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_GUARDPASSAGE)
		{
			int Chance = Math::rand() % 3;
			if (Chance == 0)
			{
				t.ClearActions();
				t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_CIVILARMED);
				t.SetDisableGangsterSymbol(false);
				t.RemoveObjectPath();
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				if (t.IsEquipped())
				{
					t.PushActionRemoveEquipment(ACTION_APPEND);
					t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				}
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);
				t.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Target, 1, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 4.5f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &t, TARGET_FOLLOW);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Caller, 3, false);
				p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, &t, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", &t, 5, false);
			}
			else
			{
				t.SetPrimaryTarget(&p);
				p.PushActionShoot(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
		}
		else if (t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_THROWSTONES || t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_THROWMOLOTOV || t.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_FISTFIGHT)
		{
			int Chance = Math::rand() % 3;
			if (Chance == 0)
			{
				t.ClearActions();
				t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_CIVILARMED);
				t.SetDisableGangsterSymbol(false);
				t.RemoveObjectPath();
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				if (t.IsEquipped())
				{
					t.PushActionRemoveEquipment(ACTION_APPEND);
					t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				}
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);
				t.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Target, 2, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 4.5f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &t, TARGET_FOLLOW);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Caller, 3, false);
				p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, &t, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", &t, 5, false);
			}
			else if (Chance == 1)
			{
				t.SetFleeing(true);
				if (!t.HasObjectPath(NULL))
				{
					t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_FISTFIGHT);
					t.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &p, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
					t.PushActionFistFight(ACTION_APPEND, &p, true);		
				}
			}
			else if (Chance == 2)
			{
				t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_FISTFIGHT);
				t.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &p, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
				t.PushActionFistFight(ACTION_APPEND, &p, true);
			}
		}
		else
		{
			int Chance = Math::rand() % 2;
			if (Chance == 0)
			{
				t.ClearActions();
				t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_CIVILARMED);
				t.SetDisableGangsterSymbol(false);
				t.RemoveObjectPath();
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				if (t.IsEquipped())
				{
					t.PushActionRemoveEquipment(ACTION_APPEND);
					t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.1f);
				}
				t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "hostage_down");
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.0f);
				t.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Target, 2, false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 4.5f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &t, TARGET_FOLLOW);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ARREST2, Caller, 3, false);
				p.PushActionArrest(ACTION_APPEND, &t, false);
				//p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.f);
				//p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "Arrest", &t, 5, false);
			}
			else
			{
				t.SetPrimaryTarget(&p);
				p.PushActionShoot(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyArrest2 : CommandScript
{
	DummyArrest2()
	{
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			Person t(Target);
			t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_ATTACKSQUAD);
		}
		if (childID == 2)
		{
			Person t(Target);
			t.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_FISTFIGHT);
		}
		if (childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if(p.HasCommand(CMD_SHOOTTASER))
			{
				p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
				p.SetAnimation("arrestidle");
				p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTTASER);
				p.RemoveCommand(CMD_HOLSTERTASER);
				// Taser disabled.
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_DRAWGUN);
				p.RemoveCommand(CMD_ARREST2);
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ARREST);
			}
			else
			{
				p.PushActionEquipWeapon(ACTION_APPEND, false);
				p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTGUN);
				p.RemoveCommand(CMD_HOLSTERGUN);
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_DRAWGUN);
				p.RemoveCommand(CMD_ARREST2);
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ARREST);
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyArrestVehicle : CommandScript
{
	DummyArrestVehicle()
	{
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		Person p(Caller);
		v.RemoveObjectPath();
		v.SetParking(true);

		PersonList pl = v.GetPassengers();
		for(int i=0; i < pl.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person cp = pl.GetPerson(i);
			cp.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			cp.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.0f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ARREST2, &cp, 0, false);
		}
	}
};

object DummyInsertPassenger : CommandScript
{
	DummyInsertPassenger()
	{
		CivilPool[0] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p";
		CivilPool[1] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilminister01.e4p";
		CivilPool[2] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilrocker01.e4p";
		CivilPool[3] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/fatman01.e4p";
		CivilPool[4] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman06_yellow.e4p";
		CivilPool[5] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_red.e4p";
		CivilPool[6] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman02_silver.e4p";
		CivilPool[7] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold01.e4p";
		CivilPool[8] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold02.e4p";
		CivilPool[9] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman03_green.e4p";
		CivilPool[10] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman01_yellow.e4p";
		CivilPool[11] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman05.e4p";
		CivilPool[12] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwomanold01.e4p";
		CivilPool[13] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmother01_blue.e4p";
		CivilPool[14] = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilpizza01.e4p";
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle c(Caller);
		int RandomPerson = Math::rand()%MAX_POOL;
		if(v.GetNumPassengers() == 0)
		{
			Person cp = Game::CreatePerson(CivilPool[RandomPerson], "Unnamed");
			c.SetMaxPassengers(1);
			c.AddPassenger(&cp);
		}
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_PSG1SniperWeapon.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.0#										
//												
// 		Includes: All PSG Commands								
//												
//	- PcmdPSGGet										
//	- PcmdPSGRemove
//	- PcmdPSGShoot	
//	- PcmdPSGAim									
//	- PcmdPSGAimEnd	
//	- DummyPSG
//						
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_GETPSG[]				= "PcmdPSGGet";
const char CMD_REMOVEPSG[]			= "PcmdPSGRemove";
const char CMD_TARGETPSG[]			= "PcmdPSGSTarget";
const char CMD_SHOOTPSG[]			= "PcmdPSGShoot";
const char CMD_AIMPSG[]				= "PcmdPSGAim";
const char CMD_AIMENDPSG[]			= "PcmdPSGAimEnd";
const char DUMMY_PSG[]				= "DummyPSG";
const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char OBJ_PSG_IDLE[]			= "01 LA Equipment/psg1_idle.V3O";
const char OBJ_PSG_AIM[]			= "01 LA Equipment/psg1_aim.V3O";
const char OBJ_PSG_TARGET[]			= "01 LA Equipment/psg1_target.V3O";
const char SND_GETPSG[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/m4_get.wav";
const char SND_FIREPSG[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/psg_shoot.wav";
const char SND_UNLOCK[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/unlock_weapon.wav";
const char PARTICLE_FLASH[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/05 LA Particles/muzzleflash05.e4p";
const char NAME_FLASH[]				= "MuzzleFlash";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdPSGGet : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdPSGGet()
	{
    		SetIcon("psg1");
    		SetCursor("psg1");
		SetPriority(190);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFLASHGRENADE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE);
	}

 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money < 1000)
			return false;

		return true;
 	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/09 Government/fbi_suv.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PSG, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdPSGRemove : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdPSGRemove()
	{
    		SetIcon("psg1remove");
    		SetCursor("psg1remove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFLASHGRENADE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FLASHGRENADE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/09 Government/fbi_suv.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PSG, Target, 2, false);
	}
};

object PcmdPSGAim : CommandScript
{
	PcmdPSGAim()
	{
    		SetIcon("aim");
     		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(220);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->IsAiming() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;
			
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_PSG_TARGET);
		p.PushActionPrepareAim(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMENDPSG);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_SHOOTPSG);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEPSG);   
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMPSG);
		p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar"); 
		p.RemoveCommand("MoveTo");  
	}
};

object PcmdPSGShoot : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	PcmdPSGShoot()
	{
    		SetIcon("shoot");
    		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SHOOTABLE | RESTRICT_NOTINJURED);
		SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
		//SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetKeepAsCurrentCommand(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		Range = 3072.f; //2048x1,5
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(Target) > Range)
			return false;

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_PERSON)
		{	
			Person t(Target);
			if (t.IsValid() && t.GetEnteredHouseID() == p.GetEnteredHouseID())
			{
				if(p.IsAiming() || p.IsCurrentAnimation("mg_lie01"))
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (!v.IsCivilCar())
				SetPriority(-700);
			
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.IsFlagSet(OF_SHOOTABLE) && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			{
				if ((v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRT_BH) && !v.IsOnGround())
					return false;
				if(p.IsAiming() || p.IsCurrentAnimation("mg_lie01"))
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}
					
		return false;	
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsCurrentAnimation("mg_lie01"))
		{
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_PSG_AIM);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "mg_lie01");
		}
		else
		{
			Vector CallerPos = Caller->GetPosition();
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetPosition();
			float TargetPosX = (int)CallerPos.x - (int)TargetPos.x;
			float TargetPosY = (int)CallerPos.y - (int)TargetPos.y;
			float TargetPosL = Math::sqrt((TargetPosX * TargetPosX) + (TargetPosY * TargetPosY));
			float r[9];
			float childr[9];
			Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			float dx = TargetPosL, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
			Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
			Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
			Vector VectorPos = CallerPos + Vector(dx, dy, dz);
			float VectorPosX = (int)CallerPos.x - (int)VectorPos.x;
			float VectorPosY = (int)CallerPos.y - (int)VectorPos.y;
			float VectorPosL = Math::sqrt((VectorPosX * VectorPosX) + (VectorPosY * VectorPosY));
			float CallerAngle = Math::acos(((TargetPosX * VectorPosX) + (TargetPosY * VectorPosY)) / (TargetPosL * VectorPosL));
			float CallerAngle2 = CallerAngle * 180 / 3.1415926536;
			if(CallerAngle2 < 30)
			{
				Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_FIREPSG, Pos);

					float r[9];
				p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
                		GameObject f = Game::CreateObject(PARTICLE_FLASH, NAME_FLASH);
				f.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				f.SetPosition(Pos);
				f.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.0f);
				f.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				p.SetCommandable(false);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 2.0f);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_PSG, Caller, 4, false);
				if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person t(Target);
					if (t.IsValid() && !t.IsDead())
					{
						int random = Math::rand()%5;
						if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 700.f)
						{
							if (random == 2)
								t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
							else
								t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
						}
						else if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 1300.f)
						{
							if (random == 1 || random == 3)
								t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
							else
								t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
						}
						else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 1900.f)
						{
							if (random == 0 || random == 2 || random == 4)
								t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
							else
								t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
						}
						else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 2500.f)
						{
							if (random == 1 || random == 3)
								t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
							else if (random == 0 || random == 2)
								t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
							else
								t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 800.f);
						}
						else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) >= 2500.f)
						{
							if (random == 2)
								t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
							else if (random == 1)
								t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
							else if (random == 3)
								t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 600.f);
							else
								Mission::PlayHint("Sniper missed!");
						}
					}
				}
				else if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
				{
					Vehicle v(Target);
					if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && !v.IsBurning())
						v.Damage(200.f);
				}
			}
			else
				Mission::PlayHint("Sniper can't hit target from this angle!");
		}  
	}
};

object PcmdPSGAimEnd : CommandScript
{

	PcmdPSGAimEnd()
	{
    		SetIcon("aimend");
     		SetCursor("aimed");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(600);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		if(!Caller->IsAiming() && !Caller->IsCurrentAnimation("mg_lie01"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if(!Caller->IsAiming() && !Caller->IsCurrentAnimation("mg_lie01"))
			return false;
				
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_PSG_IDLE);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDPSG);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTPSG);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMPSG);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEPSG);
		p.AssignCommand("MoveTo"); 
		p.AssignCommand("EnterCar"); 
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "mg_standup01");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
	}
};

object DummyPSG : CommandScript
{
	DummyPSG()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
      		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_PSG_IDLE);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMPSG);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVEPSG);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETPSG);
			p.RemoveCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			p.RemoveCommand("AskPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("Arrest");
			p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("Halt");
			p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
			p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
			p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
			p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
			p.RemoveCommand("CheckVictim");
			p.RemoveCommand("Negotiate");
			//p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
			//p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			//p.RemoveCommand("Stop");
			p.RemoveCommand("PickUp");

			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_GETPSG, Pos);

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);

			int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
			int NewMoney = Money - 1000;
			Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
		}

		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVEPSG);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMPSG);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETPSG);
			p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
			p.AssignCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
			p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("Halt");
			p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
			p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
			p.AssignCommand("CheckVictim");
			p.AssignCommand("Negotiate");
			//p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
			//p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			//p.AssignCommand("Stop");
			p.AssignCommand("PickUp");

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}

            	if(childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_PSG_IDLE);
		}


            	if(childID == 4)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
		}
  	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_RescueTarpDeployRemove.script

```cpp
// Rescue tarp deploy / remove script
// Commands: PcmdRescueTarpInstall, PcmdRescueTarpRemove, VcmdRescueTarpRotateClockwise, VcmdRescueTarpRotateCounterClockwise
//

const char CMD_INSTALL_RESCUE_TARP[]		= "PcmdRescueTarpInstall";
const char CMD_REMOVE_RESCUE_TARP[]		= "PcmdRescueTarpRemove";
const char CMD_ROTATE_RESCUE_TARP_CW[]		= "VcmdRescueTarpRotateClockwise";
const char CMD_ROTATE_RESCUE_TARP_CCW[]		= "VcmdRescueTarpRotateCounterClockwise";
const char CMD_MOVETO_RESCUE_TARP[]		= "MoveTo";
const char CMD_ENTERCAR_RESCUE_TARP[]		= "EnterCar";
const char CMD_USE_RESCUE_TARP[]		= "Use";
const char CMD_ENTERHOUSE_RESCUE_TARP[]		= "EnterHouse";
const char OBJ_RESCUE_TARP[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/rescuetarp.e4p";
const char NAME_RESCUE_TARP[]			= "RescueTarpEM4Resource";
const char HINT_RESCUE_TARP_NOSPACE[]		= "No space to deploy rescue tarp!";

object PcmdRescueTarpInstall : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRescueTarpInstall()
	{
		SetCursor("rescuetarp");
		SetIcon("rescuetarp");
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPriority(300);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return;

		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Vector TarpPos = Caller->GetPosition();
		float dx = 170.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
		Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
		TarpPos = TarpPos + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

		if (!Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, TarpPos, 220.f))
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_RESCUE_TARP_NOSPACE);
			return;
		}

		Vehicle tarp = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_RESCUE_TARP, NAME_RESCUE_TARP);
		if (!tarp.IsValid())
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_RESCUE_TARP_NOSPACE);
			return;
		}

		Math::EulerToMatrix(0.f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
		tarp.SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
		tarp.SetPosition(TarpPos);
		tarp.UpdatePlacement();
		tarp.SetCommandable(true);
		tarp.SetUserData(p.GetID());
		tarp.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
		tarp.SetSelectable(true);
		tarp.SetFlag(OF_HAS_SHEARS);
		tarp.SetFlag(OF_HAS_CHAINSAW);
		tarp.AssignCommand(CMD_ROTATE_RESCUE_TARP_CW);
		tarp.AssignCommand(CMD_ROTATE_RESCUE_TARP_CCW);

		Vector BackPos = Caller->GetPosition();
		float bx = -90.f, by = 0.f, bz = 0.f;
		Math::RotateVector(bx, by, bz, r);
		BackPos = BackPos + Vector(bx, by, 0);
		if (Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, BackPos, 150.f))
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, BackPos);

		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_INSTALL_RESCUE_TARP);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVE_RESCUE_TARP);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_MOVETO_RESCUE_TARP))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVETO_RESCUE_TARP);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR_RESCUE_TARP))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR_RESCUE_TARP);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_USE_RESCUE_TARP))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_USE_RESCUE_TARP);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE_RESCUE_TARP))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE_RESCUE_TARP);
	}
};

object PcmdRescueTarpRemove : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRescueTarpRemove()
	{
		SetIcon("rescuetarp");
		SetCursor("rescuetarp");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPriority(900);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetObjectType() == TYPE_PERSON && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			GameObject tarp(Target);

			if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
				return false;

			if (tarp.HasName(NAME_RESCUE_TARP) && tarp.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
				return true;

			if (StrCompare(tarp.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_RESCUE_TARP) == 0 && tarp.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);

		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_ANY);
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_REMOVE_RESCUE_TARP, Target, 1, false);
			return;
		}

		Vehicle tarp(Target);
		if (tarp.IsValid() && tarp.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
		{
			tarp.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_INSTALL_RESCUE_TARP);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVE_RESCUE_TARP);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_MOVETO_RESCUE_TARP))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVETO_RESCUE_TARP);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR_RESCUE_TARP))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR_RESCUE_TARP);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_USE_RESCUE_TARP))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_USE_RESCUE_TARP);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE_RESCUE_TARP))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE_RESCUE_TARP);
		}
	}
};

object VcmdRescueTarpRotateClockwise : CommandScript
{
	VcmdRescueTarpRotateClockwise()
	{
		SetIcon("rotate_cw");
		SetCursor("rotate_cw");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(120);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_RESCUE_TARP))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_RESCUE_TARP))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Math::EulerToMatrix(-25.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);

		Caller->SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
	}
};

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_RESCUE_TARP))

		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Math::EulerToMatrix(25.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);

};
```

## PersonCommand_RoadsideLightDeployRemove.script

```cpp
// Roadside light deploy / remove script
// Commands: PcmdRoadsideLightInstall, PcmdRoadsideLightRemove, VcmdRoadsideLightRotateClockwise, VcmdRoadsideLightRotateCounterClockwise
//

const char CMD_INSTALL_ROADSIDE_LIGHT[]		= "PcmdRoadsideLightInstall";
const char CMD_REMOVE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT[]		= "PcmdRoadsideLightRemove";
const char CMD_ROTATE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT_CW[]	= "VcmdRoadsideLightRotateClockwise";
const char CMD_ROTATE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT_CCW[]	= "VcmdRoadsideLightRotateCounterClockwise";
const char CMD_MOVETO[]				= "MoveTo";
const char CMD_ENTERCAR[]			= "EnterCar";
const char CMD_USE[]				= "Use";
const char CMD_ENTERHOUSE[]			= "EnterHouse";
const char OBJ_ROADSIDE_LIGHT[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/RoadSideLightVeh.e4p";
const char NAME_ROADSIDE_LIGHT[]		= "RoadsideLightEM4Resource";
const char HINT_ROADSIDE_LIGHT_NOSPACE[]	= "No space to deploy roadside light!";

object PcmdRoadsideLightInstall : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRoadsideLightInstall()
	{
		SetCursor("use");
		SetIcon("use");
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPriority(300);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return;

		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Vector LightPos = Caller->GetPosition();
		float dx = 65.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
		Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
		LightPos = LightPos + Vector(dx, dy, 0);

		if (!Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, LightPos, 90.f))
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_ROADSIDE_LIGHT_NOSPACE);
			return;
		}

		Vehicle light = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_ROADSIDE_LIGHT, NAME_ROADSIDE_LIGHT);
		if (!light.IsValid())
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_ROADSIDE_LIGHT_NOSPACE);
			return;
		}

		Math::EulerToMatrix(0.f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
		light.SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
		light.SetPosition(LightPos);
		light.UpdatePlacement();
		light.SetCommandable(true);
		light.SetUserData(p.GetID());
		light.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
		light.SetSelectable(true);
		light.EnableSpecialLights(true);
		light.AssignCommand(CMD_ROTATE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT_CW);
		light.AssignCommand(CMD_ROTATE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT_CCW);

		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_INSTALL_ROADSIDE_LIGHT);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_MOVETO))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVETO);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_USE))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_USE);
		if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE))
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE);
	}
};

object PcmdRoadsideLightRemove : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRoadsideLightRemove()
	{
		SetIcon("use");
		SetCursor("use");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetObjectType() == TYPE_PERSON && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle light(Target);

			if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
				return false;

			if (light.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if (light.HasName(NAME_ROADSIDE_LIGHT) && light.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
				return true;

			if (StrCompare(light.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ROADSIDE_LIGHT) == 0 && light.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);

		if (childID == 0)
		{
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_ANY);
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_REMOVE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT, Target, 1, false);
			return;
		}

		Vehicle light(Target);
		if (light.IsValid() && light.GetUserData() == p.GetID())
		{
			light.EnableSpecialLights(false);
			light.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_INSTALL_ROADSIDE_LIGHT);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVE_ROADSIDE_LIGHT);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_MOVETO))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVETO);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERCAR);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_USE))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_USE);
			if (!p.HasCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE))
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_ENTERHOUSE);
		}
	}
};

object VcmdRoadsideLightRotateClockwise : CommandScript
{
	VcmdRoadsideLightRotateClockwise()
	{
		SetIcon("rotate_cw");
		SetCursor("rotate_cw");
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(120);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_ROADSIDE_LIGHT))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_ROADSIDE_LIGHT))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Math::EulerToMatrix(-25.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);

		Caller->SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
	}
};

object VcmdRoadsideLightRotateCounterClockwise : CommandScript

	VcmdRoadsideLightRotateCounterClockwise()

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())

		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && Caller->HasName(NAME_ROADSIDE_LIGHT))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		float r[9];
		float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

		Math::EulerToMatrix(25.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
		Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
```
