```cpp
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_ShotgunWeapon.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************									
//	Shotgun Script 												
// 	Based off the MP5 Script by Hoppah, modified by Bama1234 for the Montana Mod							
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_GETSHOTGUN[]			= "PcmdShotgunGet";
const char CMD_REMOVESHOTGUN[]			= "PcmdShotgunRemove";
const char CMD_SHOOTSHOTGUN[]			= "PcmdShotgunShoot";
const char CMD_AIMSHOTGUN[]			= "PcmdShotgunAim";
const char CMD_AIMENDSHOTGUN[]			= "PcmdShotgunAimEnd";
const char CMD_MOVESHOTGUN[]			= "PcmdShotgunMoveTo";
const char DUMMY_SHOTGUN[]			= "DummyShotgun";
const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char OBJ_SHOTGUN_IDLE[]			= "01 LA Equipment/shotgun_idle.V3O";
const char OBJ_SHOTGUN_AIM[]			= "01 LA Equipment/shotgun_aim.V3O";
const char SND_GETSHOTGUN[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/shotgun_get.wav";
const char SND_FIRESHOTGUN[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/shotgun_shoot.wav";
const char SND_UNLOCK[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/shotgun_get.wav";
const char PARTICLE_FLASH[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/05 LA Particles/muzzleflash04.e4p";
const char NAME_FLASH[]				= "MuzzleFlash";

int DummyGroup = 20;

object PcmdShotgunGet : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdShotgunGet()
	{
    		SetIcon("shotgun");
    		SetCursor("shotgun");
		SetPriority(190);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_impala_unit20.e4p") == 0 ||
 			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_impala_unit10.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_vic_50.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_cvpi.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_expedition01.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_tahoe.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_caprice.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/ATF_cv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_mcp.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_nru.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_civic.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_expedition01.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_transport_van.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_umpc.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_cougar_mrap.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_SHOTGUN, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdShotgunRemove : CommandScript
{
	
	PcmdShotgunRemove()
	{
    		SetIcon("Shotgunremove");
    		SetCursor("Shotgunremove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_impala_unit20.e4p") == 0 ||
 			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_impala_unit10.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_cvpi.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_unmarked_cvpi.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_vic_50.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/ATF_cv.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_mcp.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_nru.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			else if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_civic.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_expedition01.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_transport_van.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_umpc.e4p") == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_cougar_mrap.e4p") == 0)
			{
				return true;
			}
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_SHOTGUN, Target, 2, false);
	}
};

object PcmdShotgunShoot : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	PcmdShotgunShoot()
	{
    		SetIcon("shoot");
    		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SHOOTABLE | RESTRICT_NOTINJURED);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetKeepAsCurrentCommand(true);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		Range = 800.f;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(Target) > Range)
			return false;

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_PERSON)
		{	
			Person t(Target);
			if (t.IsValid() && t.GetEnteredHouseID() == p.GetEnteredHouseID())
			{
				if(p.IsAiming())
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}

		if(Target->GetType()==ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (!v.IsCivilCar())
				SetPriority(-700);

			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.IsFlagSet(OF_SHOOTABLE) && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			{
				if ((v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_PHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRT_BH) && !v.IsOnGround())
					return false;
				if(p.IsAiming())
				{
					Game::ActivateSceneLens(true);
				}
				return true;
			}
		}
		return false;	
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(!p.IsAiming())
		{
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_UNLOCK, Pos);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SHOTGUN_AIM);
			p.PushActionPrepareAim(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMENDSHOTGUN);
   			p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVESHOTGUN);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVESHOTGUN);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMSHOTGUN);
		} 
		else
		{
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_FIRESHOTGUN, Pos);

				float r[9];
			p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
                	GameObject f = Game::CreateObject(PARTICLE_FLASH, NAME_FLASH);
			f.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			f.SetPosition(Pos);
			f.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.2f);
			f.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);

			if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
			{
				Person t(Target);
				if (t.IsValid() && !t.IsDead())
				{
					if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 100.f)
					{
						t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
					}
					else if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 200.f)
					{
						t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 250.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 600.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 300.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 500.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 400.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 400.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 500.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 300.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 600.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 200.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) < 800.f)
					{
						t.Hurt(INJUREREASON_SHOT, 100.f);
					}
				}
			}

			if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			{
				Vehicle v(Target);
				if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed())
				{
					if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 300.f)
					{
						v.Damage(330.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 500.f)
					{
						v.Damage(230.f);
					}
					else if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 700.f)
					{
						v.Damage(140.f);
					} 
					else 	if(p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&v) < 1000.f)
					{
						v.Damage(100.f);
					}
				}
			}
		}  
	}
};

object PcmdShotgunAim : CommandScript
{
	float Range;

	PcmdShotgunAim()
	{
    		SetIcon("aim");
     		SetCursor("aim");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(220);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->IsAiming() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;
			
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
		Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_UNLOCK, Pos);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SHOTGUN_AIM);
		p.PushActionPrepareAim(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMENDSHOTGUN);
   		p.AssignCommand(CMD_MOVESHOTGUN);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVESHOTGUN);   
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMSHOTGUN);  
	}
};

object PcmdShotgunAimEnd : CommandScript
{

	PcmdShotgunAimEnd()
	{
    		SetIcon("aimend");
     		SetCursor("aimed");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(600);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		/*if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;*/
		return Caller->IsAiming();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()) || !Caller->IsAiming())
			return false;
				
		return true;		
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SHOTGUN_IDLE);
		p.PushActionAimEnd(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDSHOTGUN);
   		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_MOVESHOTGUN);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMSHOTGUN);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVESHOTGUN);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
	}
};

object PcmdShotgunMoveTo : CommandScript
{
	MoveResult mr;

	PcmdShotgunMoveTo()
	{
    		SetIcon("moveto");
    		SetCursor("moveto");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VIRTUAL | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		//SetActivationByLeftClick(true);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		mr = Commands::CheckMoveConditions(Caller, Target, childID);
		if(mr.Mode == MOVE_ABORT)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsAiming() || p.IsCurrentAnimation("shootrifle"))
		{
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SHOTGUN_IDLE);
			p.PushActionAimEnd(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.5f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_SHOTGUN, Caller, 3, false);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, mr.Target);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMENDSHOTGUN);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_MOVESHOTGUN);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMSHOTGUN);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVESHOTGUN);
		}
	}
};

object DummyShotgun : CommandScript
{
	DummyShotgun()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SHOTGUN_IDLE);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_AIMSHOTGUN);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_SHOOTSHOTGUN);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVESHOTGUN);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETSHOTGUN);
			p.RemoveCommand("Arrest");
			p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.RemoveCommand("DrawWeapon");
			if(p.HasCommand("DrawTaser"))
				p.RemoveCommand("DrawTaser");
			p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("AskPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("Halt");
			if(p.HasCommand("HaltVehicle"))
				p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
			if(p.HasCommand("Redirect"))
				p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
			if(p.HasCommand("GetExtinguisher"))
				p.RemoveCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.RemoveCommand("PickUp");
			if(p.HasCommand("Lift"))
				p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
			if(p.HasCommand("UnloadPerson"))
				p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.RemoveCommand("CheckVictim");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdFlareGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
			if(p.HasCommand("SendPeople"))
				p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
			if(p.HasCommand("EnterVehicle"))
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterVehicle");
			if(p.HasCommand("EnterBuilding"))
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterBuilding");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdShotgunMoveTo"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdShotgunMoveTo");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdFirstAid"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFirstAid");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdShotgunMoveTo"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdShotgunMoveTo");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdCallTowTruck"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallTowTruck");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
			if(p.HasCommand("PcmdGetTacVest"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetTacVest");

			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_GETSHOTGUN, Pos);

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTSHOTGUN);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVESHOTGUN);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_AIMSHOTGUN);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETSHOTGUN);
			p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
			p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
			// Taser disabled.
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("RedirectVehicles");
			p.AssignCommand("Halt");
			p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
			p.AssignCommand("PickUp");
			p.AssignCommand("CheckVictim");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("GetRoadBlock");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterVehicle");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterBuilding");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFirstAid");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallTowTruck");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTacVest");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetExtinguisher");


			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccpd_tacofficer.e4p") == 0)
			{
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
				p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
				p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
				p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
			// Taser disabled.
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTacVest");
			}
			if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallMHPPatrolCar");

			else if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/ccsd_swat_officer.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallBCSOPatrolCar");

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SHOTGUN_IDLE);
		}
  	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_SpineboardPatient.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
Spineboard Script Version 1.2 by itchyboy
******************************************************************************************/

const char OBJ_SB_MODEL[]		= "mod:Models/Objects/01 LA Equipment/Spineboard/Spineboard.v3o";
const char OBJ_SB_OBJECT[] 		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/spineboard.e4p";
const char OBJ_SB[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Equipment/spineboard_patient.e4p";
const char NAME_SB[]			= "SB";
const char OBJ_RESCUE_TARP_SPINEBOARD[]	= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/rescuetarp.e4p";
const char NAME_RESCUE_TARP_SPINEBOARD[] = "RescueTarpEM4Resource";

object GetSpineboard : CommandScript
{
	GetSpineboard()
	{
    	SetIcon("spine");
    	SetCursor("use");
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
 			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsEquipped() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->HasCommand("DummyHasSpineboard") && !Caller->HasCommand("DummyHasStretcher") && !Caller->IsChildEnabled("stretcher"))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsEquipped() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsInDLKBasket() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		GameObject obj(Target);
		if (obj.IsValid() && (obj.HasName(NAME_RESCUE_TARP_SPINEBOARD) || StrCompare(obj.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_RESCUE_TARP_SPINEBOARD) == 0))
			return true;

		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC))
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			p.PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "GetSpineboard", Target, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_SB_MODEL);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped");

			p.AssignCommand("DummyHasSpineboard");
			p.AssignCommand("UseSpineboard");
			p.AssignCommand("RemoveSpineboard");
			if (p.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER)
			{
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
				p.RemoveCommand("RemoveFirehose");
				p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
				p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetExtinguisher");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetShears");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetAxe");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetChainsaw");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetFirehose");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetJumppad");
				p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
				p.RemoveCommand("StopPull");
				p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdPumpSwitch");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
				if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/eastfalls_ff.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToHazmat");
			}
			else
			{
				p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
				p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetStretcher");
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdHeal");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("RemoveEquipment");
				if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
				else if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_traffic.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
			}
		}
	}
};

object UseSpineboard : CommandScript
{
	UseSpineboard()
	{
	    SetIcon("spine");
    	SetCursor("use");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_INJURED_PERSON);
		SetPriority(500);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
 			return false;
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 1)
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		if (Target->GetType()==ACTOR_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Target);
			if (!p.IsDrowning() && p.GetRole() != ROLE_ANIMAL && !p.IsRescueDog() && p.IsInjured() && (p.IsClassified() && !p.IsDead() && !p.IsComatose()) && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1 && !p.IsCarried())
				return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Person t(Target);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &t, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &t);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "treatinjured1");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND,"UseSpineboard", &t, 1, false);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Person t(Target);

			if (t.GetLife() > 0.5f * t.GetMaxLife())
				Mission::PlayHint("Patient placed on backboard!");
			else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint("Patient requires additional treatment!");
				return;
			}

			float r[9];
			t.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			Vector SpinePos = t.GetPosition();

			Vehicle s = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_SB_OBJECT, NAME_SB);
			s.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			s.SetPosition(SpinePos);
			s.UpdatePlacement();
			s.SetPlayerMP(p.GetPlayerMP());
			s.SetUserData(t.GetID());
			s.SetSelectable(false);

			t.AssignCommand("DummyPatientOnSpineboard");
			t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "unconscious03");
			t.SetInjuredLifeDrain(0.0f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();

			p.AssignCommand("GetSpineboard");
			p.RemoveCommand("UseSpineboard");
			p.RemoveCommand("RemoveSpineboard");
			p.RemoveCommand("DummyHasSpineboard");
			if (p.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER)
			{
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
				p.AssignCommand("RemoveFirehose");
				p.AssignCommand("Lift");
				p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
				p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
				p.AssignCommand("GetShears");
				p.AssignCommand("GetAxe");
				p.AssignCommand("GetChainsaw");
				p.AssignCommand("GetFirehose");
				p.AssignCommand("Pull");
				p.AssignCommand("StopPull");
				p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
				p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdPumpSwitch");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
				if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/eastfalls_ff.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToHazmat");
			}
			else
			{
				p.AssignCommand("Pull");
				p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				p.AssignCommand("Lift");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
				p.AssignCommand("GetStretcher");
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdHeal");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
				p.AssignCommand("RemoveEquipment");
				if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
				else if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_traffic.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
			}
		}
	}
};

object RemoveSpineboard : CommandScript
{
	RemoveSpineboard()
	{
    	SetIcon("drop");
    	SetCursor("drop");
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.IsValid() && p.HasCommand("UseSpineboard") && !p.IsLinkedWithPerson() && !p.IsCarryingPerson() && p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1 && p.GetEnteredHouseID() == -1)
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.AssignCommand("GetSpineboard");
		p.RemoveCommand("UseSpineboard");
		p.RemoveCommand("RemoveSpineboard");
		p.RemoveCommand("DummyHasSpineboard");
		if (p.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER)
		{
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdTrafficConeGet");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.AssignCommand("RemoveFirehose");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
			p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.AssignCommand("GetShears");
			p.AssignCommand("GetAxe");
			p.AssignCommand("GetChainsaw");
			p.AssignCommand("GetFirehose");
			p.AssignCommand("Pull");
			p.AssignCommand("StopPull");
			p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
			p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
			p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdPumpSwitch");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
			if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/eastfalls_ff.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToHazmat");
		}
		else
		{
			p.AssignCommand("Pull");
			p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
			p.AssignCommand("GetStretcher");
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdHeal");
			p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
			p.AssignCommand("RemoveEquipment");
			if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
			else if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_traffic.e4p") == 0)
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
		}
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, .1f);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
	}
};

object DummyHasSpineboard  : CommandScript
{
	DummyHasSpineboard()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}
};

object DummyPatientOnSpineboard  : CommandScript
{
	DummyPatientOnSpineboard()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_StopSignTrafficControl.script

```cpp
/* *********************************************************************************
   **** make civilan vehicles wait a stop signs				                    ****
   *********************************************************************************
   **** Created by Benjamin Meier-Andersen (BMA)					            ****
   **** For Montana mod												            ****
   **** - StopSign				                                                ****
   **** - Dummy_TriggerActivated				                                ****
   *********************************************************************************
   
   Remember to put this in your freeplay script:
   // Stop Sign Script
	GameObjectList gol = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix("StopSign");
	GameObject *go;
	for (int i = 0; i < gol.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		go = *gol.GetObject(i);
		go->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "StopSign", go, 0, false);
	}
   ********************************************************************************* */

 
float Time_Stop = 2.f;	//Time the vehicles are waiting at the stop sign
float Time_Reset = 1.f;	//Time the script waits after a vehicle has left untill it checks for the next one. 
 
object StopSign : CommandScript
{
	StopSign()
	{
		SetIcon("bma");
		SetCursor("bma");
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle go(Caller);
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			ActorList gatesVO(go.GetName());
			Actor * gate_vo = gatesVO.GetActor(0);

			char NameCheck[20];
			char *OrgName = gate_vo->GetName();
			snprintf(NameCheck, 20, "%s_Check", OrgName);
			//Mission::PlayHint(NameCheck);

			if (Game::IsCivilianInVirtualObject(NameCheck) && !go.HasCommand("Dummy_TriggerActivated"))
			{
				char NameStop[20];
				char *OrgName = gate_vo->GetName();
				snprintf(NameStop, 20, "%s_Stop", OrgName);
				//Mission::PlayHint(NameStop);
				
				ActorList gatesVOStop(NameStop);
				Actor * gate_voStop = gatesVOStop.GetActor(0);
				
				gate_voStop->SetVirtualObjectTerrain("Barricade");
				
				go.AssignCommand("Dummy_TriggerActivated");
				go.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, Time_Stop);
				go.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "StopSign", Target, 1, false);
			}
			else
			{
				go.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.0);
				go.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "StopSign", Target, 0, false);
			}
		}
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			//Mission::PlayHint("Trigger deactivated");
			ActorList gatesVO(go.GetName());
			Actor * gate_vo = gatesVO.GetActor(0);
			
			char NameStop[20];
			char *OrgName = gate_vo->GetName();
			snprintf(NameStop, 20, "%s_Stop", OrgName);
			//Mission::PlayHint(NameStop);
			
			ActorList gatesVOStop(NameStop);
			Actor * gate_voStop = gatesVOStop.GetActor(0);
			gate_voStop->SetVirtualObjectTerrain("Road");
			
			go.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, Time_Reset);
			go.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "StopSign", Target, 2, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			//Mission::PlayHint("Command Removed");
			go.RemoveCommand("Dummy_TriggerActivated");
			go.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "StopSign", Target, 0, false);
		}
	}
};

object Dummy_TriggerActivated: CommandScript
{
	Dummy_TriggerActivated()
	{
 		SetGroupID(20);
	}
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_StretcherTeam.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.3#
//
// 		Includes: All Stretcher commands
//
//	- PcmdStretcherDrop
//	- PcmdStretcherGet
//	- DummyStretcher
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_DOORS[]			= "OpenCloseDoor3";
const char UNNAMED[] 			= "Unnamed";

const char OBJ_EMT_STRETCHER[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_stretcher.e4p";
const char OBJ_PM_STRETCHER[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_stretcher.e4p";
const char OBJ_EMT[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p";
const char OBJ_PM[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p";

const char OBJ_CORONER_SINGLE[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/coroners_single.e4p";
const char OBJ_CORONERS[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/coroners.e4p";

const char PROTO_STRETCHER[] 		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/stretcher_coroners.e4p";
const char NAME_STRETCHER[] 		= "EmptyStretcherOnGround";
const char DUMMY_STRETCHER[] 		= "DummyStretcher";

object PcmdStretcherDrop : CommandScript
{ 
	PcmdStretcherDrop()
	{
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetIcon("drop");
		SetCursor("drop");
		//SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() > 1)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;
		
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);
			float rot[9];
		Vector PPos = Caller->GetPosition();
		Caller->GetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);
		Vehicle mDroppedStretcher = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_STRETCHER, NAME_STRETCHER);
	
		mDroppedStretcher.SetPosition(PPos);
		mDroppedStretcher.SetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);
		
		int PlayerID = Caller->GetPlayerMP();

		int VehicleID = Caller->GetID();
		mDroppedStretcher.SetUserData(VehicleID);
		mDroppedStretcher.SetSelectable(false);

		if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CORONERS) == 0)
		{
			Person Med1 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_CORONER_SINGLE, UNNAMED);
			Person Med2 = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_CORONER_SINGLE, UNNAMED);
		}
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsInHouseWithGroundEntrance())
		{
			int HouseID = p.GetEnteredHouseID();
			Med1.SetEnteredHouseID(HouseID);
			Med2.SetEnteredHouseID(HouseID);
		}

		if (Game::IsMultiplayer())
		{
			int PlayerID = Caller->GetPlayerMP();
			mDroppedStretcher.SetPlayerMP(PlayerID);
			Med1.SetPlayerMP(PlayerID);
			Med2.SetPlayerMP(PlayerID);
		}

		Vector BackPos = mDroppedStretcher.GetTargetPoint(&Med1, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Vector FrontPos = mDroppedStretcher.GetTargetPoint(&Med2, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);

		Med1.SetPosition(BackPos);
		Med1.SetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);
		Med2.SetPosition(FrontPos);
		Med2.SetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);
		Med1.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		Med2.SetUpgradeLevel(3);

		mDroppedStretcher.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.f);
		mDroppedStretcher.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);

		if (Caller->IsSelected())
		{
			Caller->Deselect();
			Med1.Select();
		}
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		int NewMoney = Money - 25;
		Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
	}
};

object PcmdStretcherGet : CommandScript
{ 
	PcmdStretcherGet()
	{
		SetIcon("stretcher");
		SetCursor("stretcher");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE | RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		GameObjectList SelectPer = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
		if (SelectPer.GetNumObjects() != 2)
			return false;

		if (!SelectPer.GetObject(0)->HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag") && SelectPer.GetObject(1)->HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag"))
			return false;
		else if (SelectPer.GetObject(0)->HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag") && !SelectPer.GetObject(1)->HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag"))
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1))
			return false;

		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 0)
		{
			GameObjectList persons = Game::GetSelectedGameObjects();
			if (persons.GetNumObjects() == 2)
			{
				Person paramedic1(persons.GetObject(0));
				Person paramedic2(persons.GetObject(1));

				if ((paramedic1.HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag") && paramedic2.HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag")) || (paramedic1.HasCommand("PcmdStabilize") && paramedic2.HasCommand("PcmdStabilize")))
				{
					paramedic1.SetUserData(0);
					paramedic2.SetUserData(1);
				} else
					return;
			} else
				return;

			Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
			v.SetCommandable(false);

 			Caller->SetCommandable(false);
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "PcmdStretcherGet", Target, 1, false);
		}

		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Vehicle v(Target);
			Vector CarPos = v.GetPosition();
			CarPos.x -= 0.f;
			CarPos.y -= 0.f;

       			float r[9];
        		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			int PlayerID = Caller->GetPlayerMP();

			Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.4f);
			Caller->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);

			if (Caller->GetUserData() != 1)
			{
				return;
			}
			else
			{
				if(StrCompare(Caller->GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_CORONER_SINGLE) == 0)
					Person p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_CORONERS, UNNAMED);

				Game::FindFreePosition(&p, CarPos, 100);
           			p.SetPosition(CarPos);
				p.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
				p.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
				p.SetPlayerMP(PlayerID);
				p.UpdatePlacement();
				p.Hide();
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 3.0f);
				p.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false); 

				v.SetCommandable(true);
				v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 2.3f);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);

				int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
				int NewMoney = Money + 25;
				Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);
			}
		}
	}
};
```

## PersonCommand_TaserWeapon.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
Queensland Mod Taser Script Version 1.1
By eggcarton
Please see the readme for usage information
qldmod.dyndns.org

Modified for Montana Mod by itchboy
******************************************************************************************/

const char CMD_SHOOTTASER[] 		= "ShootTaser";
const char CMD_HOLSTERTASER[] 	= "HolsterTaser";
const char CMD_DRAWTASER[] 		= "DrawTaser";
const char CMD_DRAWGUN[] 		= "DrawWeapon";
const char CMD_ARREST[] 		= "Arrest";
const char CMD_ARREST2[] 		= "PcmdArrest2";
const char DUMMY_SHOOT[]		= "DummyShootTaser";
const char SND_DRAW[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/DrawWeapon.wav";
const char SND_HOLSTER[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/HolsterWeapon.wav";
const char SND_TASER[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/Misc/taser.wav";
const char OBJ_TASER_AIM[]		= "01 LA Equipment/taser.v3o";
const char OBJ_TASER_IDLE[]			= "01 LA Equipment/taser_idle.v3o";
const char HINT_MISSED[] 		  	= "The taser missed the target. Try moving closer.";

int DummyGroup = 24;

object DrawTaser : CommandScript
{
	DrawTaser()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDoubleClickable(false);
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(600);
		SetIcon("DrawTaser");
		SetCursor("DrawTaser");
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_TASER_AIM);
		//p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idlegun");
		p.SetAnimation("idlegun");
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_SHOOTTASER);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_HOLSTERTASER);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_ARREST2);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_DRAWTASER);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_DRAWGUN);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_ARREST);
		
		Vector Pos = Caller->GetPosition();
		Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_DRAW, Pos);
	}
};

object HolsterTaser : CommandScript
{
	HolsterTaser()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetDoubleClickable(false);
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetIcon("HolsterTaser");
		SetCursor("HolsterTaser");
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(2000);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			//p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.SetAnimation("idle");
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_SHOOTTASER);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_HOLSTERTASER);
		p.RemoveCommand(CMD_ARREST2);
		// Taser disabled.
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_DRAWGUN);
		p.AssignCommand(CMD_ARREST);
		Vector Pos = Caller->GetPosition();
		Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_HOLSTER, Pos);
	}
};

object ShootTaser : CommandScript
{
	ShootTaser()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_NONE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTINJURED | RESTRICT_NOTARRESTED | RESTRICT_NOTLINKED);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetIcon("ShootTaser");
		SetCursor("ShootTaser");
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_NONIJURED_PERSON);
		SetPriority(700);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);

		p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_TASER_AIM);
		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &t, TARGET_FOLLOW);
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "pistolshoot");
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_SHOOT, &t, 0, false);
	}
};

object DummyShootTaser : CommandScript
{
	DummyShootTaser()
	{
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);
		//if in range
		if (p.GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(&t) <= 120.f)
		{
			t.ClearActions();
			Vector Pos = p.GetPosition();
			Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_TASER, Pos);

			float r[9];
			float childRot[9];
			p.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
		
			Vector offset(60.f, 0.f, 95.f);
			Math::EulerToMatrix(0.f, 90.f, 0.f, childRot); 
			Math::RotateVector(offset.x, offset.y, offset.z, r);
			Vector pos = p.GetPosition();	
			pos.x += offset.x;
			pos.y += offset.y;
			pos.z += offset.z;
			GameObject particle = Game::CreateObject("mod:Prototypes/Objects/Particles/exhaust01.e4p", "Unnamed");
			particle.SetPosition(pos);	
			Math::MultiplyMatrices(r, childRot);
			particle.SetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);

			particle.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 3.9f);
			particle.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);

			t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "becomeunconsc");
			t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
			t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "layingcont");
			t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 4.0f);
			t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "standup3");
			t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
			t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "hostage_down");

			int random = Math::rand()%9;

			if (random <= 6) //target obeys
			{
				t.SetRole(ROLE_CIVILIAN);
				t.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
			}
			else if (random == 7) //target resists	
				t.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "fistfight");
			else if (random == 8) //target injured
				t.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
			//else if (random == 9) //target killed
			//	t.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
		}	
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_MISSED);
			return;
		}
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.2f);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "pistoltarget");
	}
};

```

## PersonCommand_TrafficConeDeployRemove.script

```cpp
/********************************************************************************************
#Version 1.5#
	Includes: All Traffic Cone commands

	- PcmdTrafficConeGet
	- PcmdTrafficConeRemove
	- PcmdTrafficConePlace
	- DummyTrafficCone

	Script by Hoppah	
	Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
********************************************************************************************/

const char CMD_GETCONE[]			= "PcmdTrafficConeGet";
const char CMD_REMOVECONE[]			= "PcmdTrafficConeRemove";
const char CMD_PLACECONE[]			= "PcmdTrafficConePlace";
const char CMD_DOORS[]				= "OpenCloseDoor";
const char CMD_ARREST[]				= "Arrest";
const char CMD_GETAXE[]				= "GetAxe";
const char OBJ_CONEGROUND[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/06 Objects/traffic_cone.e4p";
const char NAME_CONE[]				= "Cone";
const char OBJ_CONE[]				= "01 LA Equipment/traffic_cone.V3O";
const char DUMMY_CONE[]				= "DummyTrafficCone";

const char DUMMY_3CONES[]			= "Dummy3Cones";
const char DUMMY_2CONES[]			= "Dummy2Cones";
const char DUMMY_1CONE[]			= "Dummy1Cone";

int DummyGroup = 16;

object PcmdTrafficConeGet : CommandScript
{
	PcmdTrafficConeGet()
	{
    		SetIcon("trafficcone");
    		SetCursor("trafficcone");
		SetPriority(180);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_GETEQUIPMENT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;
		if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionTreatPerson") || p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher") || p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient"))
			return false;
		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_GETAXE))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFIREAXE);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE))
				return false;
		}

		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_ARREST))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
				return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if (v.IsDestroyed() || v.GetEnergy() <= 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy())
				return false;
			if (p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;
			if (p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher") || p.IsChildEnabled("stretcher_patient"))
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRI_EKW)
				return true;
			if ((v.HasCommand("FlyTo") || v.HasCommand("VcmdDeInstallRope")) && !v.IsOnGround())
				return false;
			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CONE, Target, 1, false);
	}
};

object PcmdTrafficConeRemove : CommandScript
{
	PcmdTrafficConeRemove()
	{
    		SetIcon("trafficconeremove");
    		SetCursor("trafficconeremove");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.IsPulling())
			return false;

		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_GETAXE))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASFIREAXE);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_FIREAXE))
				return false;
		}

		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_ARREST))
		{
			SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED | RESTRICT_NOTBURNING | RESTRICT_HASROADBLOCK);
			SetNeedsCarWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK);

			if (!Game::ExistsNormalObjectWithFlagSet(OF_HAS_ROADBLOCK))
				return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || !Target || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType()!=ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		
		if(Caller->GetObjectType()==TYPE_PERSON)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);

			if(v.IsDestroyed() || v.GetEnergy() <= 0.1f * v.GetMaxEnergy())
				return false;

			if(p.IsValid() && (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID()!=0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)) 
				return false;

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if(v.IsValid() && !v.IsDestroyed() && v.HasCommand("EmptyCar") && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_STW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_MTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_SW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_GTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_POLICE_WAW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DEKONP || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_THW_FGRI_EKW)
				return true;

			return false;
		}
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionGetEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, EQUIP_NONE);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CONE, Target, 2, false);
	}
};

object PcmdTrafficConePlace : CommandScript
{
	PcmdTrafficConePlace()
	{
    		SetIcon("trafficconeplace");
    		SetCursor("trafficconeplace");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
 		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
 		{
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
 		{
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return true;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		Vector Pos = Caller->GetPosition();
			float r[9];
			float childr[9];
		Caller->GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
		if (Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, Pos, 1.f))
		{
                	Vehicle v;
			v = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_CONEGROUND, NAME_CONE);
			if (v.IsValid())
			{
				float dx = 40.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
				Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
				Math::EulerToMatrix(0.0f, 0.f, 0.f, childr);
				Math::MultiplyMatrices(childr, r);
				Pos = Pos + Vector(dx, dy, 0);
				v.SetRotation(childr[0], childr[1], childr[2], childr[3], childr[4], childr[5], childr[6], childr[7], childr[8]);
				v.SetPosition(Pos);
				v.UpdatePlacement();
			}
			int PlayerID = p.GetPlayerMP();
			v.SetPlayerMP(PlayerID);
		}
		Caller->PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "getsmallobj");
		if(Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_3CONES))
		{
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_3CONES);
			Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_2CONES);
		}
		else if(Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_2CONES))
		{
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_2CONES);
			Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_1CONE);
		}
		else if(Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_1CONE))
		{
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_1CONE);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CONE, Target, 2, false);
		}
	}
};

object DummyTrafficCone : CommandScript
{
	DummyTrafficCone()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(childID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_CONE);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CONE, Caller, 4, false);
			p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_3CONES);

			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if(childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.RemoveObjectInRightHand();
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_PLACECONE);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_REMOVECONE);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_GETCONE);
			p.AssignCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.AssignCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.AssignCommand("Lift");
			p.AssignCommand("UnloadPerson");
			//p.AssignCommand("PickUp");

			Vehicle v(Target);
			if (v.HasCommand("EmptyCar"))
			{
				if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_3CONES))
					p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_3CONES);
				if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_2CONES))
					p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_2CONES);
				if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_1CONE))
					p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_1CONE);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_DOORS, Caller, 1, false);
			}

			if(p.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER || p.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_RESCUE)
			{
				//p.AssignCommand("PcmdStabilize");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.AssignCommand("GetShears");
				p.AssignCommand("GetAxe");
				p.AssignCommand("GetChainsaw");
				p.AssignCommand("GetFirehose");
				p.AssignCommand("GetJumppad");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterBasket");
				p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
				p.AssignCommand("StopUseCannon");
				p.AssignCommand("Pull");
				p.AssignCommand("StopPull");
				p.AssignCommand("BasketDown");
				p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
				p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff_scba.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToFF");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0)
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdStretcherGet");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdHeal");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");

				} else
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdStabilize");
			} else
			{
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet"); 
				p.AssignCommand("EnterCar");
				p.AssignCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.AssignCommand("GetRoadBlock");
				p.AssignCommand("Arrest");
				p.AssignCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.AssignCommand("DrawWeapon");
				p.AssignCommand("PutInCar");
				p.AssignCommand("AskPerson");
				p.AssignCommand("Halt");
				p.AssignCommand("CheckVictim");

				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
					p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
					p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
					p.AssignCommand("Stop");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter"); 
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0) 
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0) 
						p.AssignCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_motorcycle_officer.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdMotorcycleEnter");
					p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
					p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
					p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
					p.AssignCommand("Stop");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("HaltVehicle");
					p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet");
					p.AssignCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/05 US Army/us_army_soldier.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdM4Get");
					p.AssignCommand("PcmdStabilize");
					p.AssignCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
					p.AssignCommand("GetAxe");
					p.AssignCommand("GetShears");
					p.AssignCommand("GetChainsaw");
					p.AssignCommand("Pull");
					p.AssignCommand("StopPull");
					p.AssignCommand("SendPeople");
					//p.AssignCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
					p.AssignCommand("Redirect");
					p.AssignCommand("Stop");
				}
			}
		}
		if(childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_2CONES))
			{
				p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_2CONES);
				p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_3CONES);
			}
			else if(p.HasCommand(DUMMY_1CONE))
			{
				p.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_1CONE);
				p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_2CONES);
			} else
			{
				p.AssignCommand(DUMMY_1CONE);
				p.PlaceObjectInRightHand(OBJ_CONE);
				p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idleequipped2");
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CONE, Caller, 4, false);
			}
 			Vehicle v(Target);
			v.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}
		if(childID == 4)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_PLACECONE);
			p.AssignCommand(CMD_REMOVECONE);
			p.RemoveCommand(CMD_GETCONE);
			p.RemoveCommand("PcmdFlareGet");
			p.RemoveCommand("GetExtinguisher");
			p.RemoveCommand("Lift");
			p.RemoveCommand("UnloadPerson");
			//p.RemoveCommand("PickUp");

			if(p.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_FIREFIGHTER || p.GetBehaviour() == BEHAVIOUR_SQUAD_RESCUE)
			{
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetShears");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetAxe");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetChainsaw");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetFirehose");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetJumppad");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterBasket");
				p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
				p.RemoveCommand("StopUseCannon");
				p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
				p.RemoveCommand("StopPull");
				p.RemoveCommand("BasketDown");
				p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic_scba.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff_scba.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToFF");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/usfs_ff.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdChangeToMask");
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/01 LA Ambulance/ff_paramedic.e4p") == 0 
				|| StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_emt.e4p") == 0)
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdStretcherGet");
				//if (p.HasCommand("Heal"))
				//	p.RemoveCommand("Heal");
				if (p.HasCommand("PcmdStabilize"))
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdStabilize");
				if (p.HasCommand("PcmdHeal"))
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdHeal");
				if (p.HasCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag"))
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetEMTBag");
				//if (p.HasCommand("PcmdStretcherGet"))
				//	p.RemoveCommand("PcmdStretcherGet");
			} else
			{
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBarricadeGet");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("EnterHouse");
				p.RemoveCommand("GetRoadBlock");
				p.RemoveCommand("Arrest");
				p.RemoveCommand("ReleaseArrested");
				p.RemoveCommand("DrawWeapon");
				p.RemoveCommand("PutInCar");
				p.RemoveCommand("AskPerson");
				p.RemoveCommand("Halt");
				p.RemoveCommand("CheckVictim");

				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
					p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
					p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
 					p.RemoveCommand("Stop");
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_officer.e4p") == 0) 
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdGetTrafficVest");	
					if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_m.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_traffic_officer_f.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/chp_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0 || StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lasd_traffic_officer.e4p") == 0) 
						p.RemoveCommand("PcmdRemoveTrafficVest");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_motorcycle_officer.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdMotorcycleEnter");
					p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
					p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
					p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
					p.RemoveCommand("Stop");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_swat.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("HaltVehicle");
					p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdMP5Get");
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdBallisticShieldGet");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
				}
				if(StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/05 US Army/us_army_soldier.e4p") == 0)
				{
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdM4Get");
					p.RemoveCommand("PcmdStabilize");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetFlashgrenade");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetAxe");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetShears");
					p.RemoveCommand("GetChainsaw");
					p.RemoveCommand("Pull");
					p.RemoveCommand("StopPull");
					p.RemoveCommand("SendPeople");
					//p.RemoveCommand("DriveAwayPerson");
					p.RemoveCommand("Redirect");
					p.RemoveCommand("Stop");
				}
			}
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPatrolCar");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallAmbulance");
			if (p.HasCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter"))
				p.RemoveCommand("PcmdCallPoliceHelicopter");
		}
	}
};
```
