```cpp
object VcmdEmptyFireStation : CommandScript
{
	VcmdEmptyFireStation()
	{
		SetIcon("enterhouse");
		SetCursor("enterhouse");
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (!Game::IsFreeplay())
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL1)) //= fire station 1
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Vector Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2;
			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person p(obj);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Spawn);
					p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			}
		}
		if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL2)) //= fire station 2
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Vector Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2;
			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person p(obj);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Spawn);
					p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			}
		}
		if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL3)) //= fire station 3
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Vector Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2;
			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person p(obj);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Spawn);
					p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			}
		}
		if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL4)) //= fire station 4
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Vector Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2;
			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person p(obj);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Spawn);
					p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			}
		}
		if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL5)) //= fire station 5
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Vector Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2;
			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person p(obj);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Spawn);
					p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			}
		}
		if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL6)) //= fire station 6
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Vector Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2;
			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD06, l2, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person p(obj);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Spawn);
					p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyDisableAlarm : CommandScript
{
	DummyDisableAlarm()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_ALARM))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_ALARM);

		if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL1) || Caller->HasName(NAME_FIRESTATION1)) //= fire station 1
			GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION1);
		else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL2) || Caller->HasName(NAME_FIRESTATION2)) //= fire station 2
			GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION2);
		else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL3) || Caller->HasName(NAME_FIRESTATION3)) //= fire station 3
			GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION3);
		else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL4) || Caller->HasName(NAME_FIRESTATION4)) //= fire station 4
			GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION4);
		else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL5) || Caller->HasName(NAME_FIRESTATION5)) //= fire station 5
			GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION5);
		else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL6) || Caller->HasName(NAME_FIRESTATION6)) //= fire station 6
			GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION6);

		for(int i=0; i < l1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = l1.GetObject(i);
			obj->EnableSpecialLights(false);
			int ref = obj->GetUserData();
			obj->UnattachSound(ref);
			Audio::StopSample(ref);
		}
	}
};

object DummyCallCrew : CommandScript
{
	DummyCallCrew()
	{
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

 	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		return false;
 	} 

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		Vector Spawn = v.GetPosition();
		if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION1);
			for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
				{
					obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
					obj->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 16.0f);
					obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ALARM, Caller, 1, false);
					Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
					int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
					obj->SetUserData(soundID);
					obj->AttachSound(soundID);
				}
			}
		}
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02))
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION2);
			for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
				{
					obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
					obj->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 16.0f);
					obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ALARM, Caller, 1, false);
					Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
					int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
					obj->SetUserData(soundID);
					obj->AttachSound(soundID);
				}
			}
		}
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03))
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION3);
			for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
				{
					obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
					obj->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 16.0f);
					obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ALARM, Caller, 1, false);
					Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
					int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
					obj->SetUserData(soundID);
					obj->AttachSound(soundID);
				}
			}
		}
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04))
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION4);
			for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
				{
					obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
					obj->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 16.0f);
					obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ALARM, Caller, 1, false);
					Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
					int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
					obj->SetUserData(soundID);
					obj->AttachSound(soundID);
				}
			}
		} 
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05))
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			GameObjectList l2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION5);
			for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
				if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
				{
					obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
					obj->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 16.0f);
					obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ALARM, Caller, 1, false);
					Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
					int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
					obj->SetUserData(soundID);
					obj->AttachSound(soundID);
				}
			}
		} 

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		Person p;
		if (ChildID == 1)
		{
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PM, UNNAMED);
			p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_EMERGENCY_CASE);
		}
		else if (ChildID == 2)
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PM_CAPTAIN, UNNAMED);
		else if (ChildID == 3)
		{
			if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_RESCUE4053) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SQUAD4152) == 0)
				p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_RESCUE5_FF, UNNAMED);
			else
				p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_FF, UNNAMED);
		}
		else if (ChildID == 4)
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_LT, UNNAMED);
		else if (ChildID == 5)
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_PIO, UNNAMED);
		else if (ChildID == 6)
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_BCHIEF, UNNAMED);
		else if (ChildID == 7)
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_DCHIEF, UNNAMED);
		else if (ChildID == 8)
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_CHIEF, UNNAMED);
		else if (ChildID == 9)
			p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_HAZMAT_FF, UNNAMED);
		else
			return;

		p.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
		Game::FindFreePosition(&p, Spawn, 250);
		p.SetPosition(Spawn);
		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v, TARGET_ANY);
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
		p.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
	}
};

		if(ChildID == 1) //= Open front gates fire station 1
		{
			for(int i=0; i < gate1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *gate = gate1.GetObject(i);
				Actor *vogate = vogate1.GetActor(i);
				if (gate->GetUserData() == 0)

					gate->SetUserData(1);
					gate->SetAnimation(ANI_OPEN);
					vogate->SetVirtualObjectTerrain(VOSET_ROAD);

					Vector GateSnd = gate->GetPosition();
					if (gate->GetUserData() == 0)
					{
						gate->SetUserData(1);
						gate->SetAnimation(ANI_OPEN);
						vogate->SetVirtualObjectTerrain(VOSET_ROAD);

				}

object VcmdAutoStaffOn : CommandScript
{
	VcmdAutoStaffOn()
	{
		SetIcon("autostaffon");
		SetCursor("autostaffon");
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Game::IsFreeplay())
			return false;
			
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Caller->RemoveCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOn");
		Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff");
	}
};

object VcmdAutoStaffOff : CommandScript
{
	VcmdAutoStaffOff()
	{
		SetIcon("autostaffoff");
		SetCursor("autostaffoff");
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Game::IsFreeplay())
			return false;
			
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Caller->RemoveCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff");
		Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOn");
	}
};

object VcmdRepairVehicles : CommandScript
{
	VcmdRepairVehicles()
	{
		SetCursor("repair");
		SetIcon("repair");
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (!Game::IsFreeplay() && !Game::IsMultiplayer())
			return false;
			
		int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
		if (Money < PRICE_REPAIR)
			return false;			
			
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_ALARM))
			return false;	

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (ChildID == 0)
		{
			Vehicle cp(Caller);
			GameObjectList l1;
			ActorList l2, l3;
			if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL1))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
				l3 = Game::GetActors(VO_MOVETO01);
			}
			else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL2))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
				l3 = Game::GetActors(VO_MOVETO02);
			}
			else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL3))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
				l3 = Game::GetActors(VO_MOVETO03);
			}
			else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL4))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
				l3 = Game::GetActors(VO_MOVETO04);
			}
			else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL5))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
				l3 = Game::GetActors(VO_MOVETO05);
			}
			else if(Caller->HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL6))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD06, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
				l3 = Game::GetActors(VO_MOVETO06);
			}			
			Vector Spawn = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			Vector MoveTo = l3.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			bool repair = false;
			for(int i=0; i < l1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				if (!repair)
				{
					Vehicle obj = l1.GetObject(i);
					if (!obj.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED) && obj.GetEnergy() < obj.GetMaxEnergy())
						repair = true;
				}
			}
			if (repair)
			{
				int Money = Mission::GetMoneyLeft();
				if (Money >= PRICE_REPAIR)
				{
					int NewMoney = Money - PRICE_REPAIR;
					Mission::SetMoney(NewMoney);			
				}			
				Person p = Game::CreatePerson(OBJ_ENGINEER, UNNAMED);
				if (Game::FindFreePosition(&p, Spawn))
				{
					p.SetUpgradeLevel(3);
					p.SetEquipment(EQUIP_THW_CASE);
					Game::FindFreePosition(&p, Spawn);
					p.SetPosition(Spawn);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, MoveTo);
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdRepairVehicles", &cp, 1, false);
				}
			} else
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_REPAIR);
		}
		if (ChildID == 1)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle cp(Target);
			GameObjectList l1;
			ActorList l2;
			bool repair = false;			
			if(cp.HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL1))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
			}	
			if(cp.HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL2))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
			}
			if(cp.HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL3))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
			}
			if(cp.HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL4))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
			}
			if(cp.HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL5))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
			}
			if(cp.HasName(NAME_CONTROLPANEL6))
			{
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD06, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
			}			
			Vector Delete = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();			
			for(int i=0; i < l1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				if (!repair)
				{
					Vehicle obj = l1.GetObject(i);
					if (!obj.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED) && obj.GetEnergy() < obj.GetMaxEnergy())
						repair = true;
				}
			}
			if (repair)
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &obj, TARGET_ANY);
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &obj);
				p.PushActionRepair(ACTION_APPEND, &obj);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdRepairVehicles", &cp, 1, false);
			} else
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_REPAIRED);
				p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			}			
		}
	}
};

```

## StationCommand_FireStationStartupSpawn.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.3#
//
// 		Includes: Start command de spawn vehicles.
//
//	- VcmdStart
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char NAME_FIRESTATION1[]			= "fire_station1";
const char NAME_FIRESTATION2[]			= "fire_station2";
const char NAME_FIRESTATION3[]			= "fire_station3";
const char NAME_FIRESTATION4[]			= "fire_station4";
const char NAME_FIRESTATION5[]			= "fire_station5";
const char NAME_FIRESTATION6[]			= "fire_station6";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL1[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel1";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL2[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel2";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL3[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel3";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL4[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel4";

object VcmdStart : CommandScript
{
	VcmdStart()
	{
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		VehicleList list3("Unnamed");
		for(int i=0; i < list3.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle *c = list3.GetVehicle(i);
			c->SetSmokeLevelDuration(25.f);
		}	
		
		GameObjectList l1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION1); 
		for(int i=0; i < l1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = l1.GetObject(i);
			if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
			{
				obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
				Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
				int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
				obj->SetUserData(soundID);
				obj->AttachSound(soundID);
			}
		}
		GameObjectList l2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION2);
		for(int i=0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = l2.GetObject(i);
			if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
			{
				obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
				Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
				int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
				obj->SetUserData(soundID);
				obj->AttachSound(soundID);
			}
		}
		GameObjectList l3 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION3);
		for(int i=0; i < l3.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = l3.GetObject(i);
			if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
			{
				obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
				Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
				int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
				obj->SetUserData(soundID);
				obj->AttachSound(soundID);
			}
		}
		GameObjectList l4 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION4);
		for(int i=0; i < l4.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = l4.GetObject(i);
			if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
			{
				obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
				Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
				int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
				obj->SetUserData(soundID);
				obj->AttachSound(soundID);
			}
		}
		GameObjectList l5 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_FIRESTATION5);
		for(int i=0; i < l5.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = l5.GetObject(i);
			if (!obj->IsSpecialLightEnabled())
			{
				obj->EnableSpecialLights(true);
				Vector AlarmSnd = obj->GetPosition();
				int soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_ALARM, AlarmSnd, true);
				obj->SetUserData(soundID);
				obj->AttachSound(soundID);
			}
		} 
		GameObjectList controlPanel1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL1);
		for(int i=0; i < controlPanel1.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = controlPanel1.GetObject(i);
			obj->AssignCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOn");
			obj->AssignCommand("VcmdRepairVehicles");			
			obj->AssignCommand(DUMMY_ALARM);
			obj->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.5f);
			obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 1, false);
			obj->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 16.0f);
			obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_ALARM, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		GameObjectList controlPanel2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL2);

			obj->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 3, false);

		for(int i=0; i < l9.GetNumActors(); i++)
		{
			Vector Battalion40 = l9.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			Vehicle m = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BATTALION40, UNNAMED);
			m.EnableBlueLights(false);
			m.EnableHeadLights(true);
			m.SetPosition(Battalion40);
			m.SetLookatDir(-1.f, 0.f, 0.f);
			m.UpdatePlacement();
			m.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			m.SetSpeed(12.0f);

			Vehicle m = Game::CreateVehicle(OBJ_BCFD_MEDIC3, UNNAMED);
			m.EnableBlueLights(false);
			m.EnableHeadLights(true);
			m.SetPosition(BCFDMedic3);
			ActorList t36 = Game::GetActors(VO_BCFD_MEDIC3B);
			if(t36.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Vector TurnTo = t36.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				m.SetLookatDir(TurnTo.x - BCFDMedic3.x, TurnTo.y - BCFDMedic3.y, 0.f);
			}
			else
				m.SetLookatDir(-1.f, 0.f, 0.f);
			m.UpdatePlacement();
			m.SetMaxPassengers(2);
			m.SetMaxTransports(1);
			m.SetSpeed(11.0f);
			m.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
			m.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			m.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CALLCREW, Caller, 1, false);
		}
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER))
			Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 8.0f);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER, Caller, 0, false);
		System::Log("Fire stations activated!");
	}
};

```

## StationCommand_ReturnToFireStation.script

```cpp
//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL1[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel1";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL2[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel2";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL3[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel3";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL4[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel4";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL5[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel5";
const char NAME_CONTROLPANEL6[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel6";
const char VO_SPAWN01[]					= "fs_spawn01";
const char VO_SPAWN02[]					= "fs_spawn02";
const char VO_SPAWN03[]					= "fs_spawn03";
const char VO_SPAWN04[]					= "fs_spawn04";
const char VO_SPAWN05[]					= "fs_spawn05";
const char VO_SPAWN06[]					= "fs_spawn06";
const char VO_SQUAD01[]					= "fs_squad01";
const char VO_SQUAD02[]					= "fs_squad02";
const char VO_SQUAD03[]					= "fs_squad03";
const char VO_SQUAD04[]					= "fs_squad04";
const char VO_SQUAD05[]					= "fs_squad05";
const char VO_SQUAD06[]					= "fs_squad06";

const char SND_TOSTATION[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/1019.wav";
const char HINT_NOTVALID[] 				= "This vehicle doesn't belong in the fire station!";
const char HINT_NOSPACE[] 				= "No space at the fire station, vehicle returns to base!";
const char HINT_TRANSPORTS[] 			= "The ambulance has transports, it will go to the hospital first!";

int DummyGroup = 32;

object VcmdToFireStation : CommandScript
{
	VcmdToFireStation()
	{
		SetCursor("tofirestation");
		SetIcon("tofirestation");
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (!Game::IsFreeplay())
			return false;

 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD06) || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSESON) || v.IsInstalled())
			return false;
			
		if (!v.HasCommand("MoveTo"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()))
			return false;
			
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vector Pos = Caller->GetPosition();
		
		GameObjectList cpl1 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL1);  
		if(cpl1.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			GameObject cp1 = cpl1.GetObject(0);
		GameObjectList cpl2 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL2);  
		if(cpl2.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			GameObject cp2 = cpl2.GetObject(0);
		GameObjectList cpl3 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL3);  
		if(cpl3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			GameObject cp3 = cpl3.GetObject(0);
		GameObjectList cpl4 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL4);  
		if(cpl4.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			GameObject cp4 = cpl4.GetObject(0);
		GameObjectList cpl5 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL5);  
		if(cpl5.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			GameObject cp5 = cpl5.GetObject(0);
		GameObjectList cpl6 = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_CONTROLPANEL6);  
		if(cpl6.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			GameObject cp6 = cpl6.GetObject(0);
		
		bool Station1 = false;
		bool Station2 = false;
		bool Station3 = false;
		bool Station4 = false;
		bool Station5 = false;
		bool Station6 = false;
		bool ParkingSpotOnly = false;
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW && v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
		{
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CMD_TOHOSPITAL, Caller, 0, false);
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_TRANSPORTS);
			return;
		}
		if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled())
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_FLASHINGLIGHTS, &v, &v);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
		{
			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS);
			v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS);
		}
		if (v.HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
		{
			v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
			v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
			v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
		}
		if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_DISABLE, &v, &v);
		
		if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BATTALION40) == 0)
		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_BATTALION40, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
				v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			} else
			{
				Station1 = true;
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_BATTALION40);
				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_BATTALION40B);
			}
		}
		else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4052) == 0)
		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_ENGINE4052, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
				v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			} else
			{
				Station1 = true;
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENGINE4052);
				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENGINE4052B);
			}
		}
		else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_ENGINE4151) == 0)
		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_ENGINE4151, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
				v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			} else
			{
				Station5 = true;
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENGINE4151);
				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENGINE4151B);
			}
		}
		else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TANKER4454) == 0)
		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_TANKER4454, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)

			} else
			{
				Station3 = true;
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENGINE4451);
				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENGINE4451B);
			}
		}
		else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_SQUAD4152) == 0)
 		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD4152, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
				v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			} else
			{
				Station3 = true;
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SQUAD4152);
				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_SQUAD4152B);
			}
		}
		else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_MEDIC401) == 0)
 		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_MEDIC401, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
				v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			} else
			{
				Station3 = true;

				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_HAZMAT4252B);

 		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_TANKER4254, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
				v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			} else
			{
				Station6 = true;
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_TANKER4254);
				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_TANKER4254B);
			}
		}
		else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_BCFD_MEDIC3) == 0)
 		{
			GameObjectList l3;
 			Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_BCFD_MEDIC3, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
			if(l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
				v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			} else
			{
				Station6 = true;
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_BCFD_MEDIC3);
				ActorList l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_BCFD_MEDIC3B);
			}
		} else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTVALID);
			return;
		}
		{

			if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			Vector Park = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			
			if(l2.GetNumActors() > 0)
			Vector Turnto = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			
			{
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Turnto);
				v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Turnto);
				if(!ParkingSpotOnly && Station1)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 11, false);
				else if(Station2)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 12, false);
				else if(Station3)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 13, false);
				else if(Station4)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 14, false);		
				else if(Station5)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 7, false);						
				else if(Station6)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GATES, Caller, 20, false);						
				v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.0f);
				v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Park);
				v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Turnto);
				v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);				
				v.EnableHeadLights(false);
				if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS);
				} else
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
				
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				if (passengers.GetNumPersons() > 0 && (Station1 && cp1.HasCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff")) || (Station2 && cp2.HasCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff")) || (Station3 && cp3.HasCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff")) || (Station4 && cp4.HasCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff")) || (Station5 && cp5.HasCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff")) || (Station6 && cp6.HasCommand("VcmdAutoStaffOff")))
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_FIRESTATION, Caller, 0, false);
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyAtFireStation : CommandScript
{
	DummyAtFireStation()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01))
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN01);
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02))
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN02);
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03))
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN03);
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04))
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN04);
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05))
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN05);
		else if(v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD06))
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN06);
		else
			return;

		if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			Vector Delete = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		if (passengers.GetNumPersons() > 0)
		{
			for(int i=0; i<passengers.GetNumPersons(); i++)
			{
				Person *p = passengers.GetPerson(i);
				p->PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, Caller);
				p->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Delete);
				p->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyEngine : CommandScript
{
	DummyEngine()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
	}
};

```

## SystemScript_BuildingFireAlarmPanel.script

```cpp
// Building fire alarm and control panel script
// Rewritten from the BMA concept for EM4Resource use.
//
// Commands:
// - DummyBuildingFireAlarmMonitor
// - PcmdAcknowledgeBuildingFireAlarmPanel
// - PcmdSilenceBuildingFireAlarmPanel
//
// Map setup:
// - Startup/updater object: EM4ResourceFireAlarmUpdater
// - Panel/alarm/zone sets can be unnumbered or numbered.
// - Unnumbered: EM4ResourceFireAlarmPanel, EM4ResourceFireAlarm, EM4ResourceFireAlarmZone
// - Numbered: EM4ResourceFireAlarmPanel1, EM4ResourceFireAlarm1, EM4ResourceFireAlarmZone1
// - Padded numbers are also supported: EM4ResourceFireAlarmPanel01, EM4ResourceFireAlarm01, EM4ResourceFireAlarmZone01

const char BFA_NAME_UPDATER[]				= "EM4ResourceFireAlarmUpdater";
const char BFA_NAME_PANEL[]					= "EM4ResourceFireAlarmPanel";
const char BFA_NAME_ALARM[]					= "EM4ResourceFireAlarm";
const char BFA_NAME_ZONE[]					= "EM4ResourceFireAlarmZone";

const char BFA_CMD_MONITOR[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmMonitor";
const char BFA_CMD_ACTIVE[]					= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmActive";
const char BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED[]			= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmAcknowledged";
const char BFA_CMD_SILENCED[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmSilenced";
const char BFA_CMD_FALSE_ALARM[]			= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmFalseAlarm";
const char BFA_CMD_ESCALATED[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmEscalated";
const char BFA_CMD_KEYHOLDER[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmKeyholder";
const char BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmEscalate1";
const char BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmEscalate2";
const char BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmEscalate3";
const char BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmEscalate4";
const char BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmEscalate5";
const char BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6[]				= "DummyBuildingFireAlarmEscalate6";

const char BFA_ICON_ACK[]					= "buildingfire";
const char BFA_ICON_SILENCE[]				= "buildingfireoff";
const char BFA_HINT_ACTIVE[]				= "FIRE ALARM ACTIVATION - Building alarm sounding.";
const char BFA_HINT_ACK[]					= "Fire alarm panel acknowledged. Alarm devices remain active.";
const char BFA_HINT_SILENCED[]				= "Fire alarm panel silenced. Alarm devices reset.";
const char BFA_HINT_NOALARM[]				= "Fire alarm panel normal. No active alarm.";
const char BFA_HINT_CLOSE[]					= "Fire chief must be closer to the alarm panel.";
const char BFA_HINT_ESCALATE[]				= "Alarm company reports continued activation. No panel acknowledgement received.";
const char BFA_HINT_KEYHOLDER[]				= "Alarm company notified. Keyholder response requested.";
const char BFA_SOUND_DISPATCH[]				= "mod:Audio/BMA.wav";
const char BFA_SOUND_LOCAL[]				= "mod:Audio/firealarm.wav";

const int BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS				= 20;
const int BFA_FALSE_ALARM_CHANCE			= 6000;
const int BFA_KEYHOLDER_CHANCE				= 2;
const float BFA_UPDATE_TIME					= 5.f;
const float BFA_PANEL_USE_DISTANCE			= 190.f;

bool BFA_IsChief(Person p)
{
	if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p") == 0)
		return true;

	if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_battalion_chief.e4p") == 0)
		return true;

	if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_chief.e4p") == 0)
		return true;

	if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_division_chief.e4p") == 0)
		return true;

	return false;
}

bool BFA_IsPanelName(GameObject panel)
{
	if (panel.HasName(BFA_NAME_PANEL))
		return true;

	char PanelName[64];
	for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
	{
		snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
		if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
			return true;

		snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
		if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
			return true;
	}

	return false;
}

bool BFA_IsFireInAlarmZone(const char *ZoneName)
{
	if (Game::IsBurningObjectInVirtualObject(ZoneName))
		return true;

	return false;
}

void BFA_ClearEscalationCommands(GameObject panel)
{
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6);
}

void BFA_ResetPanelState(GameObject panel)
{
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_FALSE_ALARM);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATED);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_KEYHOLDER);
	BFA_ClearEscalationCommands(panel);
}

void BFA_HandleEscalation(GameObject panel)
{
	if (!panel.IsValid() || !panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATED))
		return;

	if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1))
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1);
	else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2))
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2);
	else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3))
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3);
	else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4))
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4);
	else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5))
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5);
	else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6))
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6);
	else
	{
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATED);
		Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_ESCALATE);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_ESCALATE, 5.f);
		Game::ShowEvent(BFA_HINT_ESCALATE, panel.GetPosition());
	}
}

void BFA_ActivateAlarmSet(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName, bool FalseAlarm)
{
	GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
	if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
		return;

	GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
	if (!panel.IsValid() || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED))
		return;

	panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
	if (FalseAlarm)
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_FALSE_ALARM);

	GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
	for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
		if (!alarm.IsValid())
			continue;

		alarm.EnableSpecialLights(true);
		alarm.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
		Audio::PlaySample3D(BFA_SOUND_LOCAL, alarm.GetPosition());
	}

	Audio::PlaySample(BFA_SOUND_DISPATCH);
	Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_ACTIVE);
	Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_ACTIVE, 5.f);
	Game::ShowEvent(BFA_HINT_ACTIVE, panel.GetPosition());

	if ((Math::rand() % BFA_KEYHOLDER_CHANCE) == 1)
	{
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_KEYHOLDER);
		Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_KEYHOLDER);
	}
}

void BFA_PlayActiveAlarmSetSound(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName)
{
	GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
	if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
		return;

	GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
	if (!panel.IsValid() || !panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED))
		return;

	GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
	for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
		if (!alarm.IsValid())
			continue;

		alarm.EnableSpecialLights(true);
		Audio::PlaySample3D(BFA_SOUND_LOCAL, alarm.GetPosition());
	}
}

void BFA_ClearSilencedAlarmSetIfFireGone(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName, const char *ZoneName)
{
	GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
	if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
		return;

	GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
	if (!panel.IsValid() || !panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED))
		return;

	if (BFA_IsFireInAlarmZone(ZoneName))
		return;

	BFA_ResetPanelState(panel);

	GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
	for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
		if (!alarm.IsValid())
			continue;

		alarm.EnableSpecialLights(false);
		alarm.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
	}
}

void BFA_ProcessAlarmSet(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName, const char *ZoneName)
{
	GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
	if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
		return;

	GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
	if (!panel.IsValid())
		return;

	bool FireDetected = BFA_IsFireInAlarmZone(ZoneName);

	if (FireDetected)
	{
		BFA_ActivateAlarmSet(PanelName, AlarmName, false);
		BFA_PlayActiveAlarmSetSound(PanelName, AlarmName);
		BFA_HandleEscalation(panel);
	}
	else
	{
		BFA_ClearSilencedAlarmSetIfFireGone(PanelName, AlarmName, ZoneName);
		if ((Math::rand() % BFA_FALSE_ALARM_CHANCE) == 1)
			BFA_ActivateAlarmSet(PanelName, AlarmName, true);
		else
			BFA_PlayActiveAlarmSetSound(PanelName, AlarmName);

		BFA_HandleEscalation(panel);
	}
}

void BFA_AcknowledgePanel(GameObject panel)
{
	if (!panel.IsValid())
		return;

	if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE))
	{
		Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_NOALARM);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_NOALARM, 3.f);
		return;
	}

	if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED))
		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED);

	BFA_ClearEscalationCommands(panel);
	Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_ACK);
	Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_ACK, 4.f);
}

void BFA_SilenceAlarmSet(GameObject panel, const char *AlarmName)
{
	if (!panel.IsValid())
		return;

	if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE))
	{
		Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_NOALARM);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_NOALARM, 3.f);
		return;
	}

	if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED))
	{
		Mission::PlayHint("Acknowledge the alarm panel before silencing.");
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Acknowledge the alarm panel before silencing.", 3.f);
		return;
	}

	panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED);
	panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
	BFA_ClearEscalationCommands(panel);

	GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
	for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
	{
		GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
		if (!alarm.IsValid())
			continue;

		alarm.EnableSpecialLights(false);
		alarm.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
	}

	Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_SILENCED);
	Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_SILENCED, 4.f);
}

void BFA_AcknowledgeMatchingPanel(GameObject panel)
{
	if (panel.HasName(BFA_NAME_PANEL))
	{
		BFA_AcknowledgePanel(panel);
		return;
	}

	char PanelName[64];
	for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
	{
		snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
		if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
		{
			BFA_AcknowledgePanel(panel);
			return;
		}

		snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
		if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
		{
			BFA_AcknowledgePanel(panel);
			return;
		}
	}
}

void BFA_SilenceMatchingPanel(GameObject panel)
{
	char AlarmName[64];

	if (panel.HasName(BFA_NAME_PANEL))
	{
		snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s", BFA_NAME_ALARM);
		BFA_SilenceAlarmSet(panel, AlarmName);
		return;
	}

	char PanelName[64];
	for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
	{
		snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
		if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
		{
			snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_ALARM, i);
			BFA_SilenceAlarmSet(panel, AlarmName);
			return;
		}

		snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
		if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
		{
			snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_ALARM, i);
			BFA_SilenceAlarmSet(panel, AlarmName);
			return;
		}
	}
}

object DummyBuildingFireAlarmMonitor : CommandScript
{
	DummyBuildingFireAlarmMonitor()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool IsFireInAlarmZone(const char *ZoneName)
	{
		if (Game::IsBurningObjectInVirtualObject(ZoneName))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void ClearEscalationCommands(GameObject panel)
	{
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6);
	}

	void ResetPanelState(GameObject panel)
	{
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_FALSE_ALARM);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATED);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_KEYHOLDER);
		ClearEscalationCommands(panel);
	}

	void HandleEscalation(GameObject panel)
	{
		if (!panel.IsValid() || !panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATED))
			return;

		if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1);
		else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2);
		else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3);
		else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4);
		else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5);
		else if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6);
		else
		{
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATED);
			Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_ESCALATE);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_ESCALATE, 5.f);
			Game::ShowEvent(BFA_HINT_ESCALATE, panel.GetPosition());
		}
	}

	void ActivateAlarmSet(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName, bool FalseAlarm)
	{
		GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
		if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
		if (!panel.IsValid() || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED))
			return;

		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
		if (FalseAlarm)
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_FALSE_ALARM);

		GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
		for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
			if (!alarm.IsValid())
				continue;

			alarm.EnableSpecialLights(true);
			alarm.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
			Audio::PlaySample3D(BFA_SOUND_LOCAL, alarm.GetPosition());
		}

		Audio::PlaySample(BFA_SOUND_DISPATCH);
		Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_ACTIVE);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_ACTIVE, 5.f);
		Game::ShowEvent(BFA_HINT_ACTIVE, panel.GetPosition());

		if ((Math::rand() % BFA_KEYHOLDER_CHANCE) == 1)
		{
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_KEYHOLDER);
			Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_KEYHOLDER);
		}
	}

	void PlayActiveAlarmSetSound(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName)
	{
		GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
		if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
		if (!panel.IsValid() || !panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED))
			return;

		GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
		for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
			if (!alarm.IsValid())
				continue;

			alarm.EnableSpecialLights(true);
			Audio::PlaySample3D(BFA_SOUND_LOCAL, alarm.GetPosition());
		}
	}

	void ClearSilencedAlarmSetIfFireGone(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName, const char *ZoneName)
	{
		GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
		if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
		if (!panel.IsValid() || !panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED))
			return;

		if (IsFireInAlarmZone(ZoneName))
			return;

		ResetPanelState(panel);

		GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
		for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
			if (!alarm.IsValid())
				continue;

			alarm.EnableSpecialLights(false);
			alarm.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
		}
	}

	void ProcessAlarmSet(const char *PanelName, const char *AlarmName, const char *ZoneName)
	{
		GameObjectList panels(PanelName);
		if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject panel = panels.GetObject(0);
		if (!panel.IsValid())
			return;

		bool FireDetected = IsFireInAlarmZone(ZoneName);

		if (FireDetected)
		{
			ActivateAlarmSet(PanelName, AlarmName, false);
			PlayActiveAlarmSetSound(PanelName, AlarmName);
			HandleEscalation(panel);
		}
		else
		{
			ClearSilencedAlarmSetIfFireGone(PanelName, AlarmName, ZoneName);
			if ((Math::rand() % BFA_FALSE_ALARM_CHANCE) == 1)
				ActivateAlarmSet(PanelName, AlarmName, true);
			else
				PlayActiveAlarmSetSound(PanelName, AlarmName);

			HandleEscalation(panel);
		}
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		char PanelName[64];
		char AlarmName[64];
		char ZoneName[64];

		snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s", BFA_NAME_PANEL);
		snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s", BFA_NAME_ALARM);
		snprintf(ZoneName, 63, "%s", BFA_NAME_ZONE);
		ProcessAlarmSet(PanelName, AlarmName, ZoneName);

		for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
		{
			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_ALARM, i);
			snprintf(ZoneName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_ZONE, i);
			ProcessAlarmSet(PanelName, AlarmName, ZoneName);

			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_ALARM, i);
			snprintf(ZoneName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_ZONE, i);
			ProcessAlarmSet(PanelName, AlarmName, ZoneName);
		}

		GameObjectList updaters = Game::GetGameObjects(BFA_NAME_UPDATER);
		if (updaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
		{
			GameObject updater = updaters.GetObject(0);
			updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, BFA_UPDATE_TIME);
			updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, BFA_CMD_MONITOR, &updater, 0, false);
		}
	}
};

object PcmdAcknowledgeBuildingFireAlarmPanel : CommandScript
{
	PcmdAcknowledgeBuildingFireAlarmPanel()
	{
		SetIcon(BFA_ICON_ACK);
		SetCursor(BFA_ICON_ACK);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(901);
	}

	bool IsChief(Person p)
	{
		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_battalion_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_division_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool IsPanelName(GameObject panel)
	{
		if (panel.HasName(BFA_NAME_PANEL))
			return true;

		char PanelName[64];
		for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
		{
			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
				return true;

			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		return IsChief(p);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() != ACTOR_OBJECT && Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		GameObject panel(Target);
		if (!IsPanelName(panel))
			return false;

		if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED))
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		return IsChief(p);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		GameObject panel(Target);

		p.SetCommandable(false);
		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, panel.GetPosition());
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, panel.GetPosition());
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "treatinjured2");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.f);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyBuildingFireAlarmPanelAcknowledge", Target, 0, false);
	}
};

object PcmdSilenceBuildingFireAlarmPanel : CommandScript
{
	PcmdSilenceBuildingFireAlarmPanel()
	{
		SetIcon(BFA_ICON_SILENCE);
		SetCursor(BFA_ICON_SILENCE);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(900);
	}

	bool IsChief(Person p)
	{
		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/battalion_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_battalion_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/bcfd_division_chief.e4p") == 0)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool IsPanelName(GameObject panel)
	{
		if (panel.HasName(BFA_NAME_PANEL))
			return true;

		char PanelName[64];
		for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
		{
			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
				return true;

			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		return IsChief(p);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() != ACTOR_OBJECT && Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		GameObject panel(Target);
		if (!IsPanelName(panel))
			return false;

		if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE) || !panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED) || panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED))
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		return IsChief(p);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		GameObject panel(Target);

		p.SetCommandable(false);
		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, panel.GetPosition());
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, panel.GetPosition());
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "treatinjured2");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.f);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyBuildingFireAlarmPanelSilence", Target, 0, false);
	}
};

object DummyBuildingFireAlarmPanelAcknowledge : CommandScript
{
	DummyBuildingFireAlarmPanelAcknowledge()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void ClearEscalationCommands(GameObject panel)
	{
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6);
	}

	void AcknowledgePanel(GameObject panel)
	{
		if (!panel.IsValid())
			return;

		if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE))
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_NOALARM);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_NOALARM, 3.f);
			return;
		}

		if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED);

		ClearEscalationCommands(panel);
		Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_ACK);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_ACK, 4.f);
	}

	void AcknowledgeMatchingPanel(GameObject panel)
	{
		if (panel.HasName(BFA_NAME_PANEL))
		{
			AcknowledgePanel(panel);
			return;
		}

		char PanelName[64];
		for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
		{
			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
			{
				AcknowledgePanel(panel);
				return;
			}

			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
			{
				AcknowledgePanel(panel);
				return;
			}
		}
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return true; }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) { return true; }

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		GameObject panel(Target);
		Vector pPos = p.GetPosition();
		Vector panelPos = panel.GetPosition();

		p.SetCommandable(true);

		if (Math::dist(pPos.x, pPos.y, panelPos.x, panelPos.y) > BFA_PANEL_USE_DISTANCE)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_CLOSE);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_CLOSE, 3.f);
			return;
		}

		AcknowledgeMatchingPanel(panel);
	}
};

object DummyBuildingFireAlarmPanelSilence : CommandScript
{
	DummyBuildingFireAlarmPanelSilence()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void ClearEscalationCommands(GameObject panel)
	{
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_1);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_2);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_3);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_4);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_5);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ESCALATE_6);
	}

	void SilenceAlarmSet(GameObject panel, const char *AlarmName)
	{
		if (!panel.IsValid())
			return;

		if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE))
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_NOALARM);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_NOALARM, 3.f);
			return;
		}

		if (!panel.HasCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED))
			panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_ACKNOWLEDGED);

		panel.AssignCommand(BFA_CMD_SILENCED);
		panel.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
		ClearEscalationCommands(panel);

		GameObjectList alarms(AlarmName);
		for (int i = 0; i < alarms.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject alarm = alarms.GetObject(i);
			if (!alarm.IsValid())
				continue;

			alarm.EnableSpecialLights(false);
			alarm.RemoveCommand(BFA_CMD_ACTIVE);
		}

		Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_SILENCED);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_SILENCED, 4.f);
	}

	void SilenceMatchingPanel(GameObject panel)
	{
		char PanelName[64];
		char AlarmName[64];

		if (panel.HasName(BFA_NAME_PANEL))
		{
			snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s", BFA_NAME_ALARM);
			SilenceAlarmSet(panel, AlarmName);
			return;
		}

		for (int i = 1; i <= BFA_MAX_NUMBERED_SETS; i++)
		{
			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
			{
				snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s%d", BFA_NAME_ALARM, i);
				SilenceAlarmSet(panel, AlarmName);
				return;
			}

			snprintf(PanelName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_PANEL, i);
			if (panel.HasName(PanelName))
			{
				snprintf(AlarmName, 63, "%s%02d", BFA_NAME_ALARM, i);
				SilenceAlarmSet(panel, AlarmName);
				return;
			}
		}
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return true; }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) { return true; }

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		GameObject panel(Target);
		Vector pPos = p.GetPosition();
		Vector panelPos = panel.GetPosition();

		p.SetCommandable(true);

		if (Math::dist(pPos.x, pPos.y, panelPos.x, panelPos.y) > BFA_PANEL_USE_DISTANCE)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(BFA_HINT_CLOSE);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(BFA_HINT_CLOSE, 3.f);
			return;
		}

		SilenceMatchingPanel(panel);
	}
};

	DummyBuildingFireAlarmActive()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) { return false; }
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) {}
};

object DummyBuildingFireAlarmAcknowledged : CommandScript
{
	DummyBuildingFireAlarmAcknowledged()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) { return false; }
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) {}
};
```
