
## SystemScript_CountyJailEscapeCallout.script

```cpp
// SystemScript_CountyJailEscapeCallout.script
// EM4Resource county jail escape test callout.
//
// Purpose:
// - Starts immediately from fire station startup while testing.
// - Spawns one escaped inmate/felon at a random jail escape VO.
// - Gives county-wide dispatch text/audio with randomized charges, clothing, and escape details.
// - Sends the escapee down one of the map escape paths if available.
//
// Test map setup:
// - Add virtual objects named jail_escape_spawn01 through jail_escape_spawn18.
// - Add paths named EscapePath01 through EscapePath06.
// - This callout is NOT added to the custom call scheduler yet.

const char JAIL_ESCAPE_EMPTY_OBJECT[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_UPDATER_NAME[]			= "EM4ResourceJailEscapeUpdater";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT_NAME[]			= "EM4ResourceJailEscapeSuspect";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD[]					= "DummyCountyJailEscapeCallout";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_ACTIVE[]				= "DummyCountyJailEscapeActive";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_CUSTODY[]			= "DummyCountyJailEscapeCustody";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_CONFESSION[]			= "DummyCountyJailEscapeHomicideConfession";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE[]				= "POLICE -- County Jail Escape";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_INMATE[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/07 Government/inmate.e4p";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_SOUND_CUSTODY[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Suspect_In_Custody.wav";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_SOUND_CONFESSION[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Homicide_Confession.wav";
const char JAIL_ESCAPE_SOUND_BODY_SCENE[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Homicide_Body_Found.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_UPDATER_NAME[]				= "EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater";
const char HOMICIDE_VICTIM_NAME[]				= "EM4ResourceHomicideVictim";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR[]				= "DummyHomicideCalloutMonitor";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_ACTIVE[]				= "DummyHomicideCaseActive";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM[]				= "DummyHomicideVictim";
const char HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE[]					= "POLICE -- Homicide investigation";

const int JAIL_ESCAPE_MAX_CASES					= 20;
const int JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE_CONFESSION_CHANCE	= 35;
const float JAIL_ESCAPE_INITIAL_WAIT			= 18.f;
const float JAIL_ESCAPE_CHECK_TIME				= 8.f;

int JailEscapeEventID							= -1;

object DummyCountyJailEscapeCallout : CommandScript
{
	DummyCountyJailEscapeCallout()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			StartTestScheduler();
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 1)
		{
			GameObject updater(Caller);
			if (!updater.IsValid())
				return;

			StartEscape(&updater);
			updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, JAIL_ESCAPE_CHECK_TIME);
			updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD, &updater, 2, false);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 2)
		{
			GameObject updater(Caller);
			CheckEscapeStatus(&updater);
			return;
		}
	}

	void StartTestScheduler()
	{
		GameObjectList existing(JAIL_ESCAPE_UPDATER_NAME);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return;

		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject(JAIL_ESCAPE_EMPTY_OBJECT, JAIL_ESCAPE_UPDATER_NAME);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD);
		updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, JAIL_ESCAPE_INITIAL_WAIT);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD, &updater, 1, false);
	}

	void StartEscape(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		if (!CanStartEscape())
		{
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		Vector spawnPos;
		if (!GetSpawnPosition(spawnPos))
		{
			System::Log("JAIL ESCAPE: No jail_escape_spawn01 through jail_escape_spawn18 VO found.");
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		Vector calloutPos = GetCalloutPosition(spawnPos);

		int CaseID = Math::rand() % JAIL_ESCAPE_MAX_CASES;
		Person suspect = Game::CreatePerson(GetSuspectPrototype(CaseID), JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT_NAME);
		suspect.SetPosition(spawnPos);
		Game::FindFreePosition(&suspect, spawnPos, 250.f);
		suspect.SetPosition(spawnPos);
		suspect.SetRole(ROLE_GANGSTER);
		suspect.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_CIVILUNARMED);
		suspect.SetCivilsFleeing(false);
		suspect.SetDisableGangsterSymbol(true);
		suspect.SetUserData(CaseID);
		suspect.AssignCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_ACTIVE);
		AssignCaseCommand(&suspect, CaseID);
		suspect.SetCommandable(false);
		suspect.SetSpeed(2.8f);
		suspect.UpdatePlacement();

		Updater->AssignCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_ACTIVE);

		const char *Text = GetDispatchText(CaseID);
		Audio::PlaySample(GetDispatchSound(CaseID));
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 10.f);

		if (!Mission::HasObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::AddObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE);
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE, false);
		}

		JailEscapeEventID = Game::ShowEvent(Text, calloutPos);
		SendSuspectOnEscapePath(&suspect);
	}

	bool CanStartEscape()
	{
		if (Mission::GetNumObjectivesNotAccomplished() > 0)
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		GameObjectList suspects(JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT_NAME);
		if (suspects.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool GetSpawnPosition(Vector &Position)
	{
		int start = Math::rand() % 18;
		for (int i = 0; i < 18; i++)
		{
			int index = ((start + i) % 18) + 1;
			char voName[32];
			snprintf(voName, 31, "jail_escape_spawn%.2d", index);
			ActorList list = Game::GetActors(voName);
			if (list.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Position = list.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				return true;
			}
		}

		return false;
	}

	Vector GetCalloutPosition(Vector Fallback)
	{
		int direction = Math::rand() % 8;
		float distance = 1800.f + (float)(Math::rand() % 1800);
		float halfDistance = distance * 0.55f;

		if (direction == 0)
			return Fallback + Vector(distance, halfDistance, 0.f);
		if (direction == 1)
			return Fallback + Vector(-distance, halfDistance, 0.f);
		if (direction == 2)
			return Fallback + Vector(distance, -halfDistance, 0.f);
		if (direction == 3)
			return Fallback + Vector(-distance, -halfDistance, 0.f);
		if (direction == 4)
			return Fallback + Vector(halfDistance, distance, 0.f);
		if (direction == 5)
			return Fallback + Vector(-halfDistance, distance, 0.f);
		if (direction == 6)
			return Fallback + Vector(halfDistance, -distance, 0.f);

		return Fallback + Vector(-halfDistance, -distance, 0.f);
	}

	void SendSuspectOnEscapePath(Person *Suspect)
	{
		int start = Math::rand() % 6;
		for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++)
		{
			int index = ((start + i) % 6) + 1;
			char pathName[24];
			snprintf(pathName, 23, "EscapePath%.2d", index);
			PathList paths(pathName);
			if (paths.GetNumPaths() > 0)
			{
				Path pathToUse = (Path*)paths.GetPath(0);
				int point = pathToUse.GetNearestPointIndex(Suspect->GetPosition());
				Vector nearestPoint = pathToUse.GetPoint(point);
				Suspect->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, nearestPoint, true);
				Suspect->PushActionUsePath(ACTION_APPEND, &pathToUse, true, 3.0f, true);
				return;
			}
		}
	}

	void CheckEscapeStatus(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		if (!Updater->HasCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_ACTIVE))
			return;

		if (!Mission::HasObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Updater->RemoveCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_ACTIVE);
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		GameObjectList suspects(JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT_NAME);
		if (suspects.GetNumObjects() == 0)
		{
			Updater->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, JAIL_ESCAPE_CHECK_TIME);
			Updater->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD, Updater, 2, false);
			return;
		}

		for (int i = 0; i < suspects.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			Person suspect(suspects.GetObject(i));
			if (suspect.IsValid() && suspect.IsArrested())
			{
				HandleEscapeeInCustody(&suspect);
				return;
			}
		}

		PersonList officers(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int j = 0; j < officers.GetNumPersons(); j++)
		{
			Person officer = officers.GetPerson(j);
			if (!officer.IsValid() || officer.GetArrestedID() == -1)
				continue;

			Person arrested = officer.GetArrested();
			if (arrested.IsValid() && IsJailEscapeSuspect(&arrested))
			{
				HandleEscapeeInCustody(&arrested);
				return;
			}
		}

		Updater->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, JAIL_ESCAPE_CHECK_TIME);
		Updater->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD, Updater, 2, false);
	}

	bool IsJailEscapeSuspect(Person *Suspect)
	{
		if (Suspect->HasCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_ACTIVE))
			return true;

		if (Suspect->HasName(JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT_NAME))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void HandleEscapeeInCustody(Person *Suspect)
	{
		if (!Suspect->IsValid() || Suspect->HasCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_CUSTODY))
			return;

		Suspect->AssignCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_CUSTODY);
		Audio::PlaySample(JAIL_ESCAPE_SOUND_CUSTODY);
		Mission::PlayHint("County Dispatch: Jail escapee is in custody. Confirm identity, notify jail command, and transport under guard.");
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("County Dispatch: Jail escapee is in custody. Confirm identity, notify jail command, and transport under guard.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("County Dispatch: Jail escapee is in custody. Confirm identity, notify jail command, and transport under guard.", 7.f);

		if (JailEscapeEventID != -1)
			Game::SetEventFinished(JailEscapeEventID, true, 30);

		if ((Math::rand() % 100) < JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE_CONFESSION_CHANCE)
			StartHomicideConfession(Suspect);
	}

	void CompleteEscape(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		if (Mission::HasObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE, true);
			Mission::RemoveObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE);
		}

		Updater->RemoveCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_ACTIVE);
		Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}

	void AssignCaseCommand(Person *Suspect, int CaseID)
	{
		char Cmd[64];
		snprintf(Cmd, 63, "DummyJailEscapeCase%.2d", CaseID);
		Suspect->AssignCommand(Cmd);
	}

	void StartHomicideConfession(Person *Suspect)
	{
		if (!Suspect->IsValid() || Suspect->HasCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_CONFESSION))
			return;

		Vector scenePos;
		if (!GetHomicideConfessionPosition(scenePos))
		{
			System::Log("JAIL ESCAPE: No jail_escape_homicide01 through jail_escape_homicide10 or homicide_spawn VO found.");
			return;
		}

		Suspect->AssignCommand(JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD_CONFESSION);
		int StoryID = Math::rand() % 8;
		bool barelyAlive = ((Math::rand() % 100) < 35);

		Person victim = Game::CreatePerson(GetConfessionVictimPrototype(StoryID), HOMICIDE_VICTIM_NAME);
		victim.SetPosition(scenePos);
		Game::FindFreePosition(&victim, scenePos, 220.f);
		victim.SetPosition(scenePos);
		victim.SetBloodPuddle(true);
		victim.SetClassified(true);
		victim.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM);
		AssignHomicideCaseCommand(&victim, GetConfessionHomicideCase(StoryID));

		if (barelyAlive)
		{
			victim.Injure(INJUREREASON_SHOT, true);
			victim.SetLife(victim.GetMaxLife() * 0.18f);
			victim.SetInjuredLifeDrain(victim.GetInjuredLifeDrain() * 0.5f);
		}
		else
			victim.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);

		GameObjectList updaters(HOMICIDE_UPDATER_NAME);
		GameObject updater;
		if (updaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			updater = updaters.GetObject(0);
		else
		{
			updater = Game::CreateObject(JAIL_ESCAPE_EMPTY_OBJECT, HOMICIDE_UPDATER_NAME);
			updater.Hide();
			updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR);
		}

		updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ACTIVE);
		updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 6.0f);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR, &updater, 1, false);

		if (!Mission::HasObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::AddObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE);
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE, false);
		}

		const char *ConfessionText = GetConfessionDispatchText(StoryID);
		Audio::PlaySample(JAIL_ESCAPE_SOUND_CONFESSION);
		Mission::PlayHint(ConfessionText);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(ConfessionText, 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(ConfessionText, 8.f);

		const char *SceneText = GetBodySceneText(StoryID, barelyAlive);
		Audio::PlaySample(JAIL_ESCAPE_SOUND_BODY_SCENE);
		Mission::PlayHint(SceneText);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(SceneText, 1.0f, 0.45f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(SceneText, 8.f);
		Game::ShowEvent(SceneText, scenePos);
	}

	bool GetHomicideConfessionPosition(Vector &Position)
	{
		int start = Math::rand() % 10;
		for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++)
		{
			int index = ((start + i) % 10) + 1;
			char voName[32];
			snprintf(voName, 31, "jail_escape_homicide%.2d", index);
			ActorList list = Game::GetActors(voName);
			if (list.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Position = list.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				return true;
			}
		}

		for (int j = 0; j < 20; j++)
		{
			int index2 = j + 1;
			char homicideName[32];
			snprintf(homicideName, 31, "homicide_spawn%.2d", index2);
			ActorList list2 = Game::GetActors(homicideName);
			if (list2.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Position = list2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				return true;
			}
		}

		return false;
	}

	void AssignHomicideCaseCommand(Person *Victim, int CaseID)
	{
		char Cmd[64];
		snprintf(Cmd, 63, "DummyHomicideCase%02d", CaseID);
		Victim->AssignCommand(Cmd);
	}

	int GetConfessionHomicideCase(int StoryID)
	{
		switch (StoryID)
		{
			case 0: return 1;
			case 1: return 3;
			case 2: return 10;
			case 3: return 16;
			case 4: return 24;
			case 5: return 27;
			case 6: return 30;
		}

		return 34;
	}

	const char *GetConfessionVictimPrototype(int StoryID)
	{
		switch (StoryID)
		{
			case 0: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p";
			case 1: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman03_blue.e4p";
			case 2: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilworker01.e4p";
			case 3: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman03_green.e4p";
			case 4: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman05_black.e4p";
			case 5: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_red.e4p";
			case 6: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman06_red.e4p";
		}

		return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman06.e4p";
	}

	const char *GetConfessionDispatchText(int StoryID)
	{
		switch (StoryID)
		{
			case 0: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee in custody is making a spontaneous statement. He says he assaulted a man while out and left him at a new location. Detectives and EMS requested to the marked area.";
			case 1: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee now claims he attacked a female victim during the escape period. Location provided by the suspect. Treat as a possible homicide scene until confirmed.";
			case 2: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee admits to striking a worker during the escape. Suspect provided a location and says the victim may still be there. Send detectives and EMS.";
			case 3: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee states he shot a male subject after leaving custody. Location is being marked. All responding units use caution and preserve the scene.";
			case 4: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee reports a female victim down from an assault during his escape. Location provided. Detectives requested for evidence preservation.";
			case 5: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee confession. Subject says there was a shooting while he was out of custody. Location marked from his statement. Homicide detective response requested.";
			case 6: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee states he left another person critically hurt before capture. Location has been obtained. EMS and detectives respond.";
		}

		return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee made a homicide-related admission after being handcuffed. Location provided. Detectives and EMS respond to verify.";
	}

	const char *GetBodySceneText(int StoryID, bool Alive)
	{
		if (Alive)
			return "County Dispatch: Confession location checked. Victim located barely alive with traumatic injuries. EMS expedite, detectives preserve the scene and document suspect statement.";

		return "County Dispatch: Confession location checked. Victim located deceased with visible trauma. Homicide detective requested to investigate and add findings to the jail escape court packet.";
	}

	const char *GetSuspectPrototype(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return JAIL_ESCAPE_INMATE;
			case 1: return JAIL_ESCAPE_INMATE;
			case 2: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p";
			case 3: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman03_green.e4p";
			case 4: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman02_silver.e4p";
			case 5: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilworker01.e4p";
			case 6: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civildeliveryman.e4p";
			case 7: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman06.e4p";
			case 8: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilrocker01.e4p";
			case 9: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/fatman01.e4p";
			case 10: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold01.e4p";
			case 11: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold02.e4p";
			case 12: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_red.e4p";
			case 13: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p";
			case 14: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman03_green.e4p";
			case 15: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman02_silver.e4p";
			case 16: return JAIL_ESCAPE_INMATE;
			case 17: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilworker01.e4p";
			case 18: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civildeliveryman.e4p";
		}

		return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman06.e4p";
	}

	const char *GetDispatchSound(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_00.wav";
			case 1: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_01.wav";
			case 2: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_02.wav";
			case 3: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_03.wav";
			case 4: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_04.wav";
			case 5: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_05.wav";
			case 6: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_06.wav";
			case 7: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_07.wav";
			case 8: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_08.wav";
			case 9: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_09.wav";
			case 10: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_10.wav";
			case 11: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_11.wav";
			case 12: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_12.wav";
			case 13: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_13.wav";
			case 14: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_14.wav";
			case 15: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_15.wav";
			case 16: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_16.wav";
			case 17: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_17.wav";
			case 18: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_18.wav";
		}

		return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/JailEscape_Dispatch_19.wav";
	}

	const char *GetDispatchText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "County Dispatch: Priority traffic for all law enforcement units. County Jail reports a convicted felon escaped approximately 18 minutes ago during exterior movement. Subject is still believed to be wearing orange inmate clothing. Convicted of aggravated assault on a peace officer and felony escape attempt. Last seen moving away from the jail perimeter. Use caution and start containment.";
			case 1: return "County Dispatch: County Jail escape. Male inmate in orange jail clothing escaped approximately 27 minutes ago from a service access area. Convicted of burglary and criminal endangerment. Jail staff reports subject may be desperate but no weapon confirmed. Units establish perimeter and begin search.";
			case 2: return "County Dispatch: All county units be advised, jail escapee possibly changed into white civilian clothing. Escape estimated 33 minutes ago. Convicted of felony theft and probation violation. Subject may be attempting to blend with foot traffic. Check the marked area and watch for evasive behavior.";
			case 3: return "County Dispatch: Escaped inmate alert. Male subject believed changed into green civilian clothing after leaving custody approximately 41 minutes ago. Convicted of drug distribution and resisting arrest. Last direction unknown. Units respond with caution and coordinate search.";
			case 4: return "County Dispatch: County Jail confirms escape of a sentenced inmate approximately 52 minutes ago. Subject may be in light gray or silver civilian clothing. Convicted of armed robbery, no current weapon seen. Treat as high risk. Establish traffic observation and search the marked escape area.";
			case 5: return "County Dispatch: Jail escape update for all police units. Subject may be disguised in work clothing after leaving custody approximately 24 minutes ago. Convicted of vehicle theft and failure to appear. Jail command requests immediate area sweep and notification on any sighting.";
			case 6: return "County Dispatch: Escaped prisoner may be wearing delivery-style work clothing. Time delay approximately 36 minutes. Convicted of fraud, felony theft, and prior eluding. Subject may attempt to flag down or steal transportation. Units check road edges and open lots.";
			case 7: return "County Dispatch: County Jail escape, male in civilian clothing, description limited. Escape believed to have occurred 46 minutes ago. Convicted of domestic assault and violation of protection order. Unknown destination. Responding units use caution and attempt peaceful custody.";
			case 8: return "County Dispatch: Escaped felon possibly in dark casual clothing. Jail reports escape approximately 22 minutes ago. Convicted of aggravated burglary and assault with bodily injury. Subject has prior violent history. Units begin containment and advise if contact is made.";
			case 9: return "County Dispatch: County Jail reports a convicted inmate escaped about 39 minutes ago. Subject changed into plain civilian clothing, heavier build, unknown direction. Convicted of felony DUI and vehicular assault. No weapon information. Begin search and welfare checks along likely travel routes.";
			case 10: return "County Dispatch: Escaped inmate, older male, civilian clothing possible. Escape time approximately 31 minutes ago. Convicted of arson and felony criminal mischief. Jail advises subject may be familiar with rural routes. Search teams check the marked area.";
			case 11: return "County Dispatch: Jail escape notification. Older male inmate may have changed into civilian clothing, approximately 58 minutes since escape. Convicted of embezzlement and custodial interference. Lower violence history but actively fleeing custody. Units respond for search.";
			case 12: return "County Dispatch: All law enforcement units, county jail escapee possibly wearing red civilian clothing. Escape estimated 29 minutes ago. Convicted of assault with a weapon and witness intimidation. Use caution, do not approach alone if located.";
			case 13: return "County Dispatch: Escaped inmate may be wearing white civilian clothing and attempting to pass as a pedestrian. Escape approximately 44 minutes ago. Convicted of possession with intent and resisting arrest. Units search the marked area and check anyone matching description.";
			case 14: return "County Dispatch: County Jail reports escape of male felon, possibly wearing green clothing. Approximately 63 minutes since last confirmed custody. Convicted of burglary and criminal trespass, history of fleeing on foot. Establish search grid.";
			case 15: return "County Dispatch: Escape from county jail, subject may be in light gray clothing. Time delay approximately 21 minutes. Convicted of attempted kidnapping and obstruction. Consider dangerous. Units respond priority and maintain officer safety.";
			case 16: return "County Dispatch: Emergency jail escape broadcast. Inmate still believed in orange jail clothing, escaped about 15 minutes ago after slipping away from staff. Convicted of homicide-related offense and assault on staff. All units use extreme caution and contain the area.";
			case 17: return "County Dispatch: Jail escapee possibly wearing work clothing. Escape time approximately 49 minutes ago. Convicted of forgery, theft, and bail jumping. Subject may be looking for transportation. Check nearby roads, lots, and any suspicious pedestrian movement.";
			case 18: return "County Dispatch: Escaped prisoner possibly in delivery clothing. Approximately 34 minutes since escape from county jail. Convicted of felony eluding and reckless endangerment. Subject has run from police before. Units respond and coordinate search.";
		}

		return "County Dispatch: County Jail escape. Male inmate may be in civilian clothing, escaped approximately 56 minutes ago. Convicted of parole violation and felony theft. No weapon confirmed, but subject is actively fleeing custody. Units establish perimeter and search the marked area.";
	}
};

```

## SystemScript_CustomCallScheduler.script

```cpp
// SystemScript_CustomCallScheduler.script
// EM4Resource custom freeplay call scheduler.
//
// Purpose:
// - Starts custom roleplay callouts on a delayed random cycle.
// - Prevents custom calls from starting while another objective/freeplay event is active.
// - Rotates between custom calls instead of allowing the same one repeatedly.
//
// Current custom calls:
// - Homicide investigation
// - Missing person search
// - County jail escape
// - Unknown chemical odor / hazmat exposure
// - Night power outage

const char CUSTOM_CALL_EMPTY_OBJECT[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_NAME[]			= "EM4ResourceCustomCallScheduler";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_CMD[]			= "DummyCustomCallScheduler";

const char CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_UPDATER[]		= "EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_MONITOR[]		= "DummyHomicideCalloutMonitor";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE[]		= "POLICE -- Homicide investigation";

const char CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_CMD[]			= "DummyMissingPersonCallout";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_OBJECTIVE[]		= "POLICE -- Missing Person Search Area";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_VICTIM[]			= "EM4ResourceMissingPersonVictim";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_UPDATER[]		= "EM4ResourceMissingPersonUpdater";

const char CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD[]		= "DummyCountyJailEscapeCallout";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE[]	= "POLICE -- County Jail Escape";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_UPDATER[]	= "EM4ResourceJailEscapeUpdater";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT[]	= "EM4ResourceJailEscapeSuspect";

const char CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_CMD[]				= "DummyUnknownChemicalOdorCallout";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_OBJECTIVE[]			= "FIRE -- Unknown Chemical Odor";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_UPDATER[]			= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorUpdater";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_SOURCE[]			= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorSource";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_VICTIM[]			= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorVictim";

const char CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_CMD[]				= "DummyNightPowerOutageCallout";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_OBJECTIVE[]		= "TECH -- Night Power Outage";
const char CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_UPDATER[]			= "EM4ResourcePowerOutageUpdater";

const float CUSTOM_CALL_INITIAL_WAIT			= 180.f;
const float CUSTOM_CALL_CHECK_WAIT				= 60.f;
const int CUSTOM_CALL_START_CHANCE				= 8;

object DummyCustomCallScheduler : CommandScript
{
	DummyCustomCallScheduler()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			StartScheduler();
			return;
		}

		GameObject scheduler(Caller);
		if (!scheduler.IsValid())
			return;

		if (CanStartCustomCall())
		{
			if ((Math::rand() % CUSTOM_CALL_START_CHANCE) == 1)
			{
				if (StartRandomCustomCall(&scheduler))
				{
					scheduler.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, CUSTOM_CALL_CHECK_WAIT);
					scheduler.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_CMD, &scheduler, 1, false);
					return;
				}
			}
		}

		scheduler.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, CUSTOM_CALL_CHECK_WAIT);
		scheduler.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_CMD, &scheduler, 1, false);
	}

	void StartScheduler()
	{
		GameObjectList existing(CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_NAME);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return;

		GameObject scheduler = Game::CreateObject(CUSTOM_CALL_EMPTY_OBJECT, CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_NAME);
		scheduler.Hide();
		scheduler.SetUserData(0);
		scheduler.AssignCommand(CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_CMD);
		scheduler.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, CUSTOM_CALL_INITIAL_WAIT);
		scheduler.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CUSTOM_CALL_SCHEDULER_CMD, &scheduler, 1, false);
	}

	bool CanStartCustomCall()
	{
		if (Mission::GetNumObjectivesNotAccomplished() > 0)
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		GameObjectList homicideUpdaters(CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_UPDATER);
		if (homicideUpdaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList missingVictims(CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_VICTIM);
		if (missingVictims.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList missingUpdaters(CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_UPDATER);
		if (missingUpdaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList jailUpdaters(CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_UPDATER);
		if (jailUpdaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList jailSuspects(CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT);
		if (jailSuspects.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList chemUpdaters(CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_UPDATER);
		if (chemUpdaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList chemSources(CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_SOURCE);
		if (chemSources.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList chemVictims(CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_VICTIM);
		if (chemVictims.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList powerUpdaters(CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_UPDATER);
		if (powerUpdaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool StartRandomCustomCall(GameObject *Scheduler)
	{
		int LastCall = Scheduler->GetUserData();
		int Pick = Math::rand() % 5;

		if (LastCall > 0 && Pick == LastCall - 1)
			Pick = (Pick + 1 + (Math::rand() % 4)) % 5;

		if (Pick == 0)
		{
			if (StartHomicideCall())
			{
				Scheduler->SetUserData(1);
				return true;
			}

			return false;
		}

		if (Pick == 1)
		{
			StartMissingPersonCall(Scheduler);
			Scheduler->SetUserData(2);
			return true;
		}

		if (Pick == 2)
		{
			StartJailEscapeCall(Scheduler);
			Scheduler->SetUserData(3);
			return true;
		}

		if (Pick == 3)
		{
			StartChemicalOdorCall(Scheduler);
			Scheduler->SetUserData(4);
			return true;
		}

		if (StartPowerOutageCall(Scheduler))
		{
			Scheduler->SetUserData(5);
			return true;
		}

		StartChemicalOdorCall(Scheduler);
		Scheduler->SetUserData(4);
		return true;
	}

	bool StartHomicideCall()
	{
		GameObjectList existing(CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_UPDATER);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject(CUSTOM_CALL_EMPTY_OBJECT, CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_UPDATER);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_MONITOR);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CUSTOM_CALL_HOMICIDE_MONITOR, &updater, 200, false);
		return true;
	}

	void StartMissingPersonCall(GameObject *Scheduler)
	{
		Scheduler->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CUSTOM_CALL_MISSING_CMD, Scheduler, 0, false);
	}

	void StartJailEscapeCall(GameObject *Scheduler)
	{
		GameObjectList existing(CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_UPDATER);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return;

		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject(CUSTOM_CALL_EMPTY_OBJECT, CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_UPDATER);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CUSTOM_CALL_JAIL_ESCAPE_CMD, &updater, 1, false);
	}

	void StartChemicalOdorCall(GameObject *Scheduler)
	{
		GameObjectList existing(CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_UPDATER);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return;

		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject(CUSTOM_CALL_EMPTY_OBJECT, CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_UPDATER);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_CMD);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CUSTOM_CALL_CHEM_CMD, &updater, 1, false);
	}

	bool StartPowerOutageCall(GameObject *Scheduler)
	{
		if (!IsNightTime())
			return false;

		GameObjectList existing(CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_UPDATER);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject(CUSTOM_CALL_EMPTY_OBJECT, CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_UPDATER);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_CMD);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CUSTOM_CALL_POWER_CMD, &updater, 1, false);
		return true;
	}

	bool IsNightTime()
	{
		int hour;
		int minute;
		int second;
		Game::GetTime(hour, minute, second);

		if (hour >= 22 || hour < 5)
			return true;

		return false;
	}
};

```

## SystemScript_FuelSupplyFreeplay.script

```cpp
// SystemScript_FuelSupplyFreeplay.script
// EM4Resource organized script copy.
// Commands: DummyCheckFuelSupply, DummyFuel100Perc, DummyFuel20Perc, DummyFuel40Perc, DummyFuel60Perc, DummyFuel80Perc, DummyFuelEmpty, DummyFuelLevelRequest, DummyFuelRefueling, DummyStartManualRefuel, DummyStopManualRefuel, DummyStopRefuelVehicle, DummyUpdateFuelLevel, PcmdRefuelVehicle, VcmdFuelSupply, VcmdRefuelVehicle
int MAX_FUEL_DEFAULT		= 1000;
int OUTTAKE_FUEL_MOVING		= 2;
int REFUEL_PER_TICK			= 50;
float FUEL_UPDATE_INTERVAL	= 1.0f;
float FUEL_CHECK_INTERVAL	= 30.0f;

const char FUEL_EMPTY_OBJECT[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p";
const char DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY[]			= "DummyFuelEmpty";
const char DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING[]		= "DummyFuelRefueling";
const char DUMMY_FUEL_LEVEL_REQUEST[]	= "DummyFuelLevelRequest";
const char PROTO_ENGINEER[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/04 LA Tec/engineer.e4p";

const char VO_FUEL_STATION01[]			= "fuel_station01";
const char VO_FUEL_STATION02[]			= "fuel_station02";
const char VO_FUEL_STATION03[]			= "fuel_station03";
const char VO_FUEL_STATION04[]			= "fuel_station04";
const char VO_FUEL_STATION05[]			= "fuel_station05";
const char VO_FUEL_STATION06[]			= "fuel_station06";

object DummyUpdateFuelLevel : CommandScript
{
	int FuelLevel;
	bool FuelEmpty = false;

	DummyUpdateFuelLevel()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject obj(Caller);
		Vehicle v(Target);

		if (!v.IsValid() || v.IsSmoking() || v.IsDestroyed())
		{
			System::Log("FUEL, Removed fuel tank of: %s", v.GetPrototypeFileName());
			obj.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		if (v.HasCommand("DummyUpdateFuelLevel"))
		{
			FuelLevel = getMaxFuel(&v);
			v.RemoveCommand("DummyUpdateFuelLevel");
			System::Log("FUEL, Assigned fuel level of %d to %s", FuelLevel, v.GetPrototypeFileName());
		}
		else
			FuelLevel = childID;

		if (obj.GetUserData() != v.GetID())
		{
			System::Error("FUEL, Unknown fuel tank dummy object!");
			obj.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING) || canRefuel(&v))
			FuelLevel += REFUEL_PER_TICK;
		else if (v.IsMoving() && FuelLevel > 0)
			FuelLevel -= OUTTAKE_FUEL_MOVING;

		if (FuelLevel > getMaxFuel(&v))
			FuelLevel = getMaxFuel(&v);
		if (FuelLevel < 0)
			FuelLevel = 0;

		if (FuelLevel <= 0)
		{
			if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
				v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY);
			if (!FuelEmpty)
			{
				FuelEmpty = true;
				v.ClearActions();
				Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Vehicle out of fuel!", 2.f);
				System::Log("FUEL, Tank of %s empty!", v.GetPrototypeFileName());
			}
		}
		else if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
		{
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY);
			FuelEmpty = false;
		}

		updateFuelIcons(&v, FuelLevel);

		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_LEVEL_REQUEST))
		{
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_LEVEL_REQUEST);
			char Text[255];
			snprintf(Text, 255, "Fuel level: %d (%d%%)", FuelLevel, getRelativeFuel(&v, FuelLevel));
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 2.f);
		}

		childID = FuelLevel;
		obj.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, FUEL_UPDATE_INTERVAL);
		obj.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyUpdateFuelLevel", &v, childID, false);
	}

	int getMaxFuel(Vehicle pV)
	{
		return MAX_FUEL_DEFAULT;
	}

	int getRelativeFuel(Vehicle pV, int fuel)
	{
		return (fuel * 100) / getMaxFuel(pV);
	}

	bool canRefuel(Vehicle pV)
	{
		return pV.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION01)
			|| pV.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION02)
			|| pV.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION03)
			|| pV.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION04)
			|| pV.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION05)
			|| pV.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION06);
	}

	void updateFuelIcons(Vehicle pV, int fuel)
	{
		int RelativeFuelLevel = getRelativeFuel(pV, fuel);

		if (RelativeFuelLevel >= 100)
		{
			if (!pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel100Perc"))	pV.AssignCommand("DummyFuel100Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel80Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel60Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel40Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel20Perc");
		}
		else if (fuel <= 0 || RelativeFuelLevel >= 80)
		{
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel100Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel100Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel80Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel60Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel40Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel20Perc");
		}
		else if (RelativeFuelLevel >= 60)
		{
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel100Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel100Perc");
			if (!pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))	pV.AssignCommand("DummyFuel80Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel60Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel40Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel20Perc");
		}
		else if (RelativeFuelLevel >= 40)
		{
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel100Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel100Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel80Perc");
			if (!pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))	pV.AssignCommand("DummyFuel60Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel40Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel20Perc");
		}
		else if (RelativeFuelLevel >= 20)
		{
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel100Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel100Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel80Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel60Perc");
			if (!pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))	pV.AssignCommand("DummyFuel40Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel20Perc");
		}
		else if (fuel > 0)
		{
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel100Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel100Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel80Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel60Perc");
			if (pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))	pV.RemoveCommand("DummyFuel40Perc");
			if (!pV.HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))	pV.AssignCommand("DummyFuel20Perc");
		}
	}
};

object DummyCheckFuelSupply : CommandScript
{
	DummyCheckFuelSupply()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		VehicleList list(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			if (list.GetVehicle(i)->IsValid()
				&& !list.GetVehicle(i)->IsSmoking()
				&& !list.GetVehicle(i)->IsDestroyed()
				&& list.GetVehicle(i)->HasCommand("MoveTo")
				&& !list.GetVehicle(i)->HasCommand("VcmdFuelSupply"))
			{
				Vehicle v(list.GetVehicle(i));
				v.AssignCommand("VcmdFuelSupply");
				v.AssignCommand("DummyUpdateFuelLevel");

				GameObject mDummy = Game::CreateObject(FUEL_EMPTY_OBJECT, "FuelTankDummy");
				mDummy.Hide();
				mDummy.SetUserData(v.GetID());
				float StartDelay = 0.35f * i;
				mDummy.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, StartDelay);
				mDummy.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyUpdateFuelLevel", &v, 0, false);
			}
		}

		PersonList plist(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int j = 0; j < plist.GetNumPersons(); j++)
		{
			Person p(plist.GetPerson(j));
			if (p.IsValid() && StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_ENGINEER) == 0 && !p.HasCommand("PcmdRefuelVehicle"))
				p.AssignCommand("PcmdRefuelVehicle");
		}

		GameObject obj(Caller);
		obj.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, FUEL_CHECK_INTERVAL);
		obj.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyCheckFuelSupply", Caller, childID, false);
	}
};

object PcmdRefuelVehicle : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRefuelVehicle()
	{
		SetIcon("refuelvehicle");
		SetCursor("refuelvehicle");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_ENGINEER) != 0)
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_ENGINEER) != 0)
			return false;
		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetFirehoseID() != 0 || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (!v.IsValid() || v.IsSmoking() || v.IsDestroyed() || !v.HasCommand("VcmdFuelSupply"))
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector TargetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStartManualRefuel", Target, 0, false);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 20.f);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStopManualRefuel", Target, 0, false);
	}
};

object DummyStartManualRefuel : CommandScript
{
	DummyStartManualRefuel()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && !v.IsSmoking() && !v.IsDestroyed())
		{
			if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING))
				v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Refueling vehicle.", 2.f);
		}
	}
};

object DummyStopManualRefuel : CommandScript
{
	DummyStopManualRefuel()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (v.IsValid() && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING);
	}
};

object VcmdFuelSupply : CommandScript
{
	VcmdFuelSupply()
	{
		SetIcon("fuel100");
		SetCursor("fuel100");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
			SetIcon("fuel0");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))
			SetIcon("fuel20");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))
			SetIcon("fuel40");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))
			SetIcon("fuel60");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))
			SetIcon("fuel80");
		else
			SetIcon("fuel100");

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_EMPTY))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Fuel level: 0%.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel20Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Fuel level: 20%. Refuel vehicle at nearest gas station.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel40Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Fuel level: 40%.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel60Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Fuel level: 60%.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyFuel80Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Fuel level: 80%.", 2.f);
		else
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Fuel level: 100%.", 2.f);
	}
};

object VcmdRefuelVehicle : CommandScript
{
	VcmdRefuelVehicle()
	{
		SetIcon("fuel100");
		SetCursor("fuel100");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		return v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION01)
			|| v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION02)
			|| v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION03)
			|| v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION04)
			|| v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION05)
			|| v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_FUEL_STATION06);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING))
			Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Refueling vehicle.", 2.f);
		Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 20.f);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyStopRefuelVehicle", Caller, 0, false);
	}
};

object DummyStopRefuelVehicle : CommandScript
{
	DummyStopRefuelVehicle()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING))
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FUEL_REFUELING);
	}
};
```

## SystemScript_HomicideCallout.script

```cpp
// SystemScript_HomicideCallout.script
// EM4Resource homicide callout system.
//
// Commands:
// - DummyHomicideCalloutMonitor
// - DummyHomicideCaseActive
// - DummyHomicideVictim
// - DummyHomicideLead
// - DummyHomicideLeadOutstanding
// - DummyHomicideInvestigated
// - DummyHomicideSuspectOutstanding
// - DummyHomicideSuspect
// - DummyHomicideArmedSuspect
// - DummyHomicideMissionComplete
// - PcmdInvestigateHomicideVictim
//
// Map setup:
// - Startup/updater object: EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater
// - Scene VOs: homicide_spawn01 through homicide_spawn20
// - Lead VOs: homicide_lead01 through homicide_lead20
// - Suspect VOs: homicide_suspect01 through homicide_suspect20
//
// Detective setup:
// - Add PcmdInvestigateHomicideVictim directly to any detective person prototype that should use it.

const char HOMICIDE_EMPTY_OBJECT[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p";

const char HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR[]				= "DummyHomicideCalloutMonitor";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_ACTIVE[]				= "DummyHomicideCaseActive";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM[]				= "DummyHomicideVictim";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD[]					= "DummyHomicideLead";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING[]		= "DummyHomicideLeadOutstanding";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED[]			= "DummyHomicideInvestigated";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_PENDING[]		= "DummyHomicideSuspectPending";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING[]	= "DummyHomicideSuspectOutstanding";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT[]				= "DummyHomicideSuspect";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_ARMED_SUSPECT[]			= "DummyHomicideArmedSuspect";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_COMPLETE[]				= "DummyHomicideMissionComplete";
const char HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATE[]			= "PcmdInvestigateHomicideVictim";

const char HOMICIDE_ICON_INVESTIGATE[]			= "investigatehomicide";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_EVIDENCE[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Evidence_Update.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_LEAD_DISPATCH[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_Dispatch.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_LEAD_RESULT[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_Result.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_SUSPECT[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Suspect_Located.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_ARMED[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Armed_Suspect_Warning.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_CUSTODY[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Suspect_In_Custody.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_SUSPECT_SECURED[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Suspect_Secured.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_SCENE_CLEAR[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Scene_Clear.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_SOUND_CASE_COMPLETE[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Case_Complete.wav";
const char HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE[]					= "POLICE -- Homicide investigation";
const char HOMICIDE_MISSING_OBJECTIVE[]			= "POLICE -- Missing Person Search Area";
const char HOMICIDE_MISSING_VICTIM[]			= "EM4ResourceMissingPersonVictim";
const char HOMICIDE_MISSING_UPDATER[]			= "EM4ResourceMissingPersonUpdater";
const char HOMICIDE_HINT_COMPLETE[]				= "Homicide Investigation: Scene cleared. Victim recovered by coroner.";
const char HOMICIDE_HINT_FULL_COMPLETE[]		= "Homicide Investigation: Complete. Victim recovered and suspect secured.";
const char HOMICIDE_HINT_NEED_SUSPECT[]			= "Homicide Investigation: Scene cleared. Suspect remains outstanding.";
const char HOMICIDE_HINT_LEAD_PENDING[]			= "Homicide Investigation: Scene cleared. Detectives are still working an investigative lead.";
const char HOMICIDE_HINT_CUSTODY[]				= "Suspect Custody Update: Homicide suspect detained. Miranda rights read. Transporting to police station.";
const char HOMICIDE_HINT_SUSPECT_SECURED[]		= "Suspect Custody Update: Homicide suspect secured at police station. Suspect objective complete.";
const char HOMICIDE_HINT_ALREADY_ACTIVE[]		= "Homicide Investigation: Case already in progress.";

const int HOMICIDE_MAX_SPAWNS					= 20;
const int HOMICIDE_MAX_CASES					= 35;
const int HOMICIDE_MAX_CIVIL_PROTOTYPES			= 41;
const int HOMICIDE_START_CHANCE					= 18;
const int HOMICIDE_ARMED_SUSPECT_CHANCE			= 35;
const float HOMICIDE_CHECK_TIME					= 30.f;
const float HOMICIDE_INITIAL_WAIT				= 120.f;
const float HOMICIDE_ARMED_CONTACT_DISTANCE		= 500.f;

int HomicideEventID								= -1;
int HomicideLeadEventID							= -1;
int HomicideSuspectEventID						= -1;

object PcmdInvestigateHomicideVictim : CommandScript
{
	PcmdInvestigateHomicideVictim()
	{
		SetIcon(HOMICIDE_ICON_INVESTIGATE);
		SetCursor(HOMICIDE_ICON_INVESTIGATE);
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_NOTDESTROYED);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(-100);
	}

	bool IsDetective(Person p)
	{
		if (p.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATE))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool IsHomicideVictim(Person p)
	{
		if (p.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM))
			return true;

		if (p.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideVictim"))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool IsHomicideLead(Person p)
	{
		if (p.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD))
			return true;

		if (p.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideLead"))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!IsDetective(&p))
			return false;

		if (p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped() || p.IsPulling() || p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!IsDetective(&p))
			return false;

		Person t(Target);
		if (!t.IsValid() || t.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED))
			return false;

		if (IsHomicideVictim(&t) && (t.IsDead() || t.IsInjured()))
			return true;

		if (!t.IsDead() && IsHomicideLead(&t))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person p(Caller);
		Person t(Target);

		p.SetCommandable(false);
		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &t, TARGET_TOUCHPERSON);
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &t);

		if (IsHomicideLead(&t))
		{
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkm");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 7.0f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR, &t, 100, false);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 10.0f);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR, &t, 99, false);
		}
		else
		{
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "treatinjured2");
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 6.0f);
			p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR, &t, 98, false);
		}
	}
};

object DummyHomicideCalloutMonitor : CommandScript
{
	DummyHomicideCalloutMonitor()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 200)
		{
			if (!CanStartHomicideCall())
			{
				GameObject abortUpdater(Caller);
				abortUpdater.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			}

			GameObject updater(Caller);
			StartHomicide(updater);
			updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, HOMICIDE_CHECK_TIME);
			updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR, Caller, 1, false);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 98)
		{
			HandleInvestigation(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 97)
		{
			SpawnLead(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 96)
		{
			PlayLeadDispatch(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 100)
		{
			HandleLeadInvestigation(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 99)
		{
			SpawnSuspect(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		GameObject updater(Caller);

		CheckCompletion(&updater);

		if (childID == 0)
			updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, HOMICIDE_INITIAL_WAIT);
		else
			updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, HOMICIDE_CHECK_TIME);

		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR, Caller, 1, false);
	}

	bool GetSpawnPosition(const char *Prefix, Vector &Position)
	{
		char VOName[64];
		int Start = Math::rand() % HOMICIDE_MAX_SPAWNS;

		ActorList baseVO = Game::GetActors(Prefix);
		if (baseVO.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Position = baseVO.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			return true;
		}

		for (int i = 0; i < HOMICIDE_MAX_SPAWNS; i++)
		{
			int Number = ((Start + i) % HOMICIDE_MAX_SPAWNS) + 1;

			snprintf(VOName, 63, "%s%d", Prefix, Number);

			ActorList voPlain = Game::GetActors(VOName);
			if (voPlain.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Position = voPlain.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				return true;
			}

			snprintf(VOName, 63, "%s%02d", Prefix, Number);

			ActorList voPadded = Game::GetActors(VOName);
			if (voPadded.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				Position = voPadded.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				return true;
			}
		}

		return false;
	}

	const char *GetDispatchText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch(CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "Emergency Communications: EMS / Fire / Police -- Person being stabbed, screaming in background of 911 call, no further information.";
			case 1: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Report of person shot, caller heard multiple gunshots, victim down.";
			case 2: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- 911 open line, caller screaming for help, blood reported on scene.";
			case 3: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Person not breathing after violent assault, possible suspect fled.";
			case 4: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Multiple callers report fight with a knife, one person motionless.";
			case 5: return "Emergency Communications: Police / Fire / EMS -- Possible shooting, people running from area, victim down.";
			case 6: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Person down with heavy bleeding, suspect information unknown.";
			case 7: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Person found with trauma to head, caller refusing to approach.";
			case 8: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Disturbance upgraded, caller states one person stabbed and suspect left on foot.";
			case 9: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Gunshot victim reported, caller can hear someone crying nearby.";
			case 10: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Welfare check upgraded, caller found blood trail and person down.";
			case 11: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Person attacked with blunt object, victim unresponsive, scene not secure.";
			case 12: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Possible homicide, caller reports loud argument followed by silence.";
			case 13: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Person shot, caller reports vehicle fled at high speed.";
			case 14: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- 911 caller whispering, states someone is dead and suspect may be nearby.";
			case 15: return "Emergency Communications: Police / Fire / EMS -- Domestic violence call, one person down, weapon possibly still on scene.";
			case 16: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Person down with visible trauma, possible hit and run or assault.";
			case 17: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Report of stabbing after large gathering, victim not moving.";
			case 18: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Caller found victim down with signs of struggle, scene appears violent.";
			case 19: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Caller reports family member shot, suspect possibly still nearby.";
			case 20: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Unknown trouble, child caller states someone hurt a parent and left.";
			case 21: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Person found with multiple wounds, caller states it looks bad.";
			case 22: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Shots heard, now a person down, multiple calls coming in.";
			case 23: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Possible robbery gone wrong, victim down, suspect unknown.";
			case 24: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Caller found bloody clothing and a body nearby.";
			case 25: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Victim down after altercation, caller says suspect had a hammer.";
			case 26: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Report of person thrown from vehicle, not breathing, vehicle left area.";
			case 27: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Possible shooting, caller heard one shot then saw a person collapse.";
			case 28: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Person found with severe trauma, caller panicking.";
			case 29: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Stabbing victim reported, caller applying pressure, suspect gone.";
			case 30: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Argument with weapon, caller now reports one person dead.";
			case 31: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Person found with head injury, blood visible, caller says it looks intentional.";
			case 32: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Suspicious death, caller reports body with signs of a violent struggle.";
			case 33: return "Emergency Communications: Police / EMS -- Gunshot victim found, caller reports broken glass and multiple shots heard.";
			default: return "Emergency Communications: Police -- Possible homicide, victim down, suspect information unknown.";
		}
	}

	const char *GetInvestigationText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch(CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "Detective Update: Wounds consistent with stabbing. Defensive cuts visible. Evidence collection started.";
			case 1: return "Detective Update: Apparent gunshot trauma. Shell casing search requested. Evidence collection started.";
			case 2: return "Detective Update: Violent assault scene with blood trail. 911 audio suggests active struggle.";
			case 3: return "Detective Update: Blunt and sharp trauma noted. Suspect may have fled immediately after assault.";
			case 4: return "Detective Update: Knife assault indicated. Multiple wound patterns and signs of close contact.";
			case 5: return "Detective Update: Shooting indicators present. Entry points and witness statements require follow up.";
			case 6: return "Detective Update: Victim located with major blood loss. Possible ambush pattern noted.";
			case 7: return "Detective Update: Severe head trauma. Scene suggests victim was struck and left.";
			case 8: return "Detective Update: Stabbing after disturbance. Witness canvass requested.";
			case 9: return "Detective Update: Gunshot wounds observed. Trajectory and casing search requested.";
			case 10: return "Detective Update: Forced entry cannot be ruled out. Blood trail suggests movement after injury.";
			case 11: return "Detective Update: Blunt object trauma. Impact wounds consistent with repeated strikes.";
			case 12: return "Detective Update: Signs of domestic dispute. Fatal injuries documented.";
			case 13: return "Detective Update: Shooting evidence present. Vehicle description should be prioritized.";
			case 14: return "Detective Update: Caller statement indicates homicide. Scene secured for evidence.";
			case 15: return "Detective Update: Domestic violence homicide possible. Weapon may still be nearby.";
			case 16: return "Detective Update: Body shows trauma consistent with vehicle impact or assault.";
			case 17: return "Detective Update: Stabbing after large gathering. Witness identification may be difficult.";
			case 18: return "Detective Update: Signs of struggle and possible robbery motive.";
			case 19: return "Detective Update: Family member report suggests suspect may still be close.";
			case 20: return "Detective Update: Child caller information indicates violent assault.";
			case 21: return "Detective Update: Multiple wounds and heavy blood loss. Evidence collection started.";
			case 22: return "Detective Update: Shots-fired homicide. Area canvass for casings and witnesses.";
			case 23: return "Detective Update: Possible robbery homicide. Evidence and witness follow up needed.";
			case 24: return "Detective Update: Bloody clothing reported near victim. Possible movement after assault.";
			case 25: return "Detective Update: Blunt weapon assault. Pattern injuries match heavy handheld object.";
			case 26: return "Detective Update: Body may have been moved. Vehicle evidence and tire marks noted.";
			case 27: return "Detective Update: Single-shot homicide. Caller heard impact after shot.";
			case 28: return "Detective Update: Secluded scene indicators. Scene may be secondary.";
			case 29: return "Detective Update: Stabbing evidence present. Immediate witness canvass and weapon search needed.";
			case 30: return "Detective Update: Argument escalated to homicide. Suspect may be known to victim.";
			case 31: return "Detective Update: Severe head trauma. Blood pattern documented for evidence.";
			case 32: return "Detective Update: Suspicious death with forced-entry indicators. Treat as homicide pending evidence.";
			case 33: return "Detective Update: Vehicle-related shooting evidence. Ballistic evidence likely nearby.";
			default: return "Detective Update: Suspicious fatal injuries. Evidence collection started.";
		}
	}


	const char *GetLeadDispatchText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch(CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, notify next of kin and interview a relative. They may know who the victim was meeting.";
			case 1: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, phone records show a recent dispute. Respond to the marked follow-up point for interview.";
			case 2: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, a witness from the area is willing to talk. Marking their location now.";
			case 3: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, a vehicle lead was developed. Check with the witness at the marked follow-up point.";
			case 4: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, a witness reports hearing an argument before the assault. Contact them for a statement.";
			case 5: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, digital evidence may be available. Respond to the marked follow-up point and collect it.";
			case 6: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, property belonging to the victim was reported. Interview the reporting party.";
			case 7: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, a close contact is requesting to speak with investigators.";
			case 8: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, a witness called back with follow-up information. Locate and question them.";
			case 9: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, evidence search produced a lead. Meet the reporting officer at the marker.";
			case 10: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, blood trail points toward a secondary follow-up point. Check the marked area.";
			case 11: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, tool marks suggest a known associate. Notify and interview a family contact.";
			case 12: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, prior history located. Respond to the marked follow-up point.";
			case 13: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, a vehicle description was developed. Speak with the caller who saw it leave.";
			case 14: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, 911 caller is safe and available. Conduct follow-up interview at their location.";
			case 15: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, prior disturbance report found. Meet patrol at the associated follow-up point.";
			case 16: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, roadway evidence recovered. Interview the motorist who reported it.";
			case 17: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, a witness has additional information from the scene. Contact them for details.";
			case 18: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, schedule and conflict information developed. Respond to the marked follow-up point.";
			case 19: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, family member has important background information. Notify and interview.";
			case 20: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, child caller provided information to patrol. Interview the guardian at the marker.";
			case 21: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, evidence tech found a dropped item. Respond to examine and document it.";
			case 22: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, camera footage may show a subject leaving. Collect the video from the reporting party.";
			case 23: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, robbery motive possible. Speak with the reporting party about missing property.";
			case 24: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, bloody clothing was reported. Respond and process the marked location.";
			case 25: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, blunt object evidence may be tied to a follow-up contact. Check the lead location.";
			case 26: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, vehicle evidence developed from tire marks. Meet traffic unit at marker.";
			case 27: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, caller heard one shot and recognized a voice. Conduct follow-up interview.";
			case 28: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, secondary scene indicators found. Search the nearby lead point for evidence.";
			case 29: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, witness saw a person leaving the scene. Interview witness at marker.";
			case 30: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, recent argument information developed. Notify family and obtain details.";
			case 31: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, head injury evidence points to a recent confrontation. Interview listed contact.";
			case 32: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, forced-entry lead developed. Process the associated follow-up point.";
			case 33: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, glass and casing evidence found. Meet evidence unit for vehicle follow-up.";
			default: return "County Dispatch: Detectives, follow-up lead developed. Respond to marked location for interview.";
		}
	}


	const char *GetLeadResultText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch(CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "Lead Update: Relative reports the victim planned to meet an angry former partner. County Dispatch is developing a suspect location.";
			case 1: return "Lead Update: Phone contact confirms threats were made today. Suspect location is being marked for patrol and detectives.";
			case 2: return "Lead Update: Witness saw a subject discard clothing and leave quickly. County Dispatch has a possible suspect location.";
			case 3: return "Lead Update: Witness provides vehicle and driver description. Last known direction gives a suspect area.";
			case 4: return "Lead Update: Witness identifies the voice from the argument. Suspect location is being sent.";
			case 5: return "Lead Update: Digital evidence shows the victim followed by one subject. County Dispatch has a location from the evidence.";
			case 6: return "Lead Update: Reporting party identifies property tied to a known contact. Possible suspect location developed.";
			case 7: return "Lead Update: Close contact reports the victim feared one person specifically. County Dispatch marking possible address.";
			case 8: return "Lead Update: Witness provides nickname and direction of travel. Suspect area being marked.";
			case 9: return "Lead Update: Evidence unit links recovered evidence to a prior offender. County Dispatch sending last known location.";
			case 10: return "Lead Update: Secondary scene contains fresh blood and shoe prints. Suspect track leads to a location.";
			case 11: return "Lead Update: Family contact provides name of associate with matching tool access. Location being sent.";
			case 12: return "Lead Update: Follow-up point reveals signs of recent dispute and suspect property. Location developed.";
			case 13: return "Lead Update: Caller confirms fleeing vehicle tag fragment. County Dispatch has a likely suspect area.";
			case 14: return "Lead Update: 911 caller identifies the subject and says they may still be nearby. Marking location.";
			case 15: return "Lead Update: Prior disturbance report names a suspect with recent threats. Location being sent.";
			case 16: return "Lead Update: Motorist statement and debris point to a known vehicle. Suspect location developed.";
			case 17: return "Lead Update: Witness confirms nickname and clothing description. County Dispatch marking last known location.";
			case 18: return "Lead Update: Contact reports conflict and provides address. Possible suspect location marked.";
			case 19: return "Lead Update: Family member provides a place the suspect hides when police are called. Location being sent.";
			case 20: return "Lead Update: Guardian confirms name from child caller and gives last known address. Marking suspect location.";
			case 21: return "Lead Update: Dropped item has a name and phone number. County Dispatch has a possible suspect location.";
			case 22: return "Lead Update: Camera footage shows subject leaving toward a specific area. Suspect marker updated.";
			case 23: return "Lead Update: Reporting party confirms missing property and identifies a person of interest. Location sent.";
			case 24: return "Lead Update: Bloody clothing contains identification tied to a person of interest. Location developed.";
			case 25: return "Lead Update: Lead point reveals matching blunt object evidence. Suspect location now available.";
			case 26: return "Lead Update: Traffic unit matches tire marks to a reported vehicle. Possible suspect area marked.";
			case 27: return "Lead Update: Caller identifies the voice after the shot. County Dispatch is marking the likely address.";
			case 28: return "Lead Update: Secondary search finds discarded personal property. Suspect location developed.";
			case 29: return "Lead Update: Witness gives a clear description and direction. Suspect area being sent.";
			case 30: return "Lead Update: Family provides name from recent argument. County Dispatch marking the suspect location.";
			case 31: return "Lead Update: Contact describes a recent confrontation over money. Possible suspect location developed.";
			case 32: return "Lead Update: Follow-up processing finds forced-entry evidence and a known suspect name. Location marked.";
			case 33: return "Lead Update: Evidence unit connects glass and casings to suspect vehicle. Location being sent.";
			default: return "Lead Update: Follow-up lead produced a person of interest. County Dispatch is marking the possible suspect location.";
		}
	}
```
