```cpp
			case 28: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_28.wav";
			case 29: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_29.wav";
			case 30: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_30.wav";
			case 31: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_31.wav";
			case 32: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_32.wav";
			case 33: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_33.wav";
			default: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/Homicide_Lead_34.wav";
		}
	}
	bool HasCaseCommand(Person p, int CaseID)
	{
		char Cmd[64];
		snprintf(Cmd, 63, "DummyHomicideCase%02d", CaseID);
		return p.HasCommand(Cmd);
	}

	void AssignCaseCommand(Person p, int CaseID)
	{
		char Cmd[64];
		snprintf(Cmd, 63, "DummyHomicideCase%02d", CaseID);
		p.AssignCommand(Cmd);
	}

	int GetVictimCase(Person p)
	{
		for (int i = 0; i < HOMICIDE_MAX_CASES; i++)
		{
			if (HasCaseCommand(&p, i))
				return i;
		}

		return 34;
	}

	bool CanStartHomicideCall()
	{
		if (Mission::GetNumObjectivesNotAccomplished() > 0)
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE) || Mission::HasObjective(HOMICIDE_MISSING_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		GameObjectList missingVictims(HOMICIDE_MISSING_VICTIM);
		if (missingVictims.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList missingUpdaters(HOMICIDE_MISSING_UPDATER);
		if (missingUpdaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void StartHomicide(GameObject updater)
	{
		Vector scenePos;
		if (!GetSpawnPosition("homicide_spawn", scenePos))
		{
			System::Log("HOMICIDE: No homicide_spawn01 through homicide_spawn20 VO found.");
			return;
		}

		int CaseID = Math::rand() % HOMICIDE_MAX_CASES;
		Person victim = Game::CreatePerson(GetRandomCivilPrototype(), "EM4ResourceHomicideVictim");
		victim.SetPosition(scenePos);
		victim.SetPlayerMP(updater.GetPlayerMP());
		victim.SetBloodPuddle(true);
		victim.Kill(INJUREREASON_SHOT);
		victim.SetClassified(true);
		victim.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM);
		AssignCaseCommand(&victim, CaseID);

		updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ACTIVE);
		updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_COMPLETE);
		HomicideLeadEventID = -1;
		HomicideSuspectEventID = -1;

		const char *DispatchText = GetDispatchText(CaseID);
		Audio::PlaySample(GetDispatchSound(CaseID));
		Mission::PlayHint(DispatchText);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(DispatchText, 7.f);
		HomicideEventID = Game::ShowEvent(DispatchText, scenePos);

		if (!Mission::HasObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::AddObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE);
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE, false);
		}
	}

	void HandleInvestigation(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target)
	{
		Person detective(Caller);
		if (detective.IsValid())
			detective.SetCommandable(true);

		if (!Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return;

		Person victim(Target);
		if (!victim.IsValid() || (!victim.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM) && !victim.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideVictim")))
			return;

		if (!victim.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED))
			victim.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED);

		int CaseID = GetVictimCase(&victim);
		const char *Text = GetInvestigationText(CaseID);
		Audio::PlaySample3D(HOMICIDE_SOUND_EVIDENCE, victim.GetPosition());
		Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_EVIDENCE);
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("Detective Update: Evidence gathered at homicide scene. Dispatch advised.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);

		SpawnLead(Caller, Target);
		if (detective.IsValid())
		{
			detective.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 12.0f);
			detective.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, HOMICIDE_CMD_MONITOR, Target, 96, false);
		}
	}

	void SpawnLead(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target)
	{
		if (!Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return;

		Person victim(Target);
		if (!victim.IsValid() || (!victim.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM) && !victim.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideVictim")))
			return;

		Vector leadPos;
		if (!GetSpawnPosition("homicide_lead", leadPos))
		{
			System::Log("HOMICIDE: No homicide_lead01 through homicide_lead20 VO found. Sending suspect lead directly.");
			SpawnSuspect(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		GameObjectList existing("EM4ResourceHomicideLead");
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
		{
			Person existingLead(existing.GetObject(0));
			GameObjectList updaterListExisting("EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater");
			if (updaterListExisting.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				GameObject updaterExisting = updaterListExisting.GetObject(0);
				if (!updaterExisting.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING))
					updaterExisting.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING);
			}

			int ExistingCaseID = GetVictimCase(&victim);
			const char *ExistingText = GetLeadDispatchText(ExistingCaseID);
			HomicideLeadEventID = Game::ShowEvent(ExistingText, existingLead.GetPosition());
			return;
		}

		int CaseID = GetVictimCase(&victim);
		Person lead = Game::CreatePerson(GetRandomCivilPrototype(), "EM4ResourceHomicideLead");
		lead.SetPosition(leadPos);
		lead.SetPlayerMP(victim.GetPlayerMP());
		lead.SetRole(ROLE_CIVILIAN);
		lead.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_CIVILIAN_NORMAL);
		lead.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD);
		AssignCaseCommand(&lead, CaseID);

		GameObjectList updaterList("EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater");
		if (updaterList.GetNumObjects() > 0)
		{
			GameObject updater = updaterList.GetObject(0);
			if (!updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING))
				updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING);
		}

		const char *LeadText = GetLeadDispatchText(CaseID);
		HomicideLeadEventID = Game::ShowEvent(LeadText, leadPos);
	}

	void PlayLeadDispatch(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target)
	{
		if (!Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return;

		Person victim(Target);
		if (!victim.IsValid() || (!victim.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM) && !victim.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideVictim")))
			return;

		int CaseID = GetVictimCase(&victim);
		const char *Text = GetLeadDispatchText(CaseID);
		Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_LEAD_DISPATCH);
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}

	void HandleLeadInvestigation(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target)
	{
		if (!Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return;

		Person lead(Target);
		if (!lead.IsValid() || (!lead.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD) && !lead.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideLead")))
			return;

		if (!lead.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED))
			lead.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED);

		int CaseID = GetVictimCase(&lead);
		const char *Text = GetLeadResultText(CaseID);
		Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_LEAD_RESULT);
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 7.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);

		GameObjectList updaterList("EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater");
		if (updaterList.GetNumObjects() > 0)
		{
			GameObject updater = updaterList.GetObject(0);
			updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING);
			if (!updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_PENDING))
				updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_PENDING);
		}

		if (HomicideLeadEventID != -1)
			Game::SetEventFinished(HomicideLeadEventID, true, 30);
	}

	void SpawnSuspect(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target)
	{
		if (Caller->IsValid() && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
		{
			Person detective(Caller);
			if (detective.IsValid())
				detective.SetCommandable(true);
		}

		if (!Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return;

		Person source(Target);
		if (!source.IsValid())
			return;

		if (!source.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_VICTIM) && !source.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideVictim") && !source.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD) && !source.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideLead"))
			return;

		Vector suspectPos;
		if (!GetSpawnPosition("homicide_suspect", suspectPos))
		{
			System::Log("HOMICIDE: No homicide_suspect01 through homicide_suspect20 VO found. Using lead position fallback.");
			suspectPos = source.GetPosition();
			suspectPos.x += 300.f;
			suspectPos.y += 300.f;
		}

		GameObjectList existing("EM4ResourceHomicideSuspect");
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return;

		Person suspect = Game::CreatePerson(GetRandomCivilPrototype(), "EM4ResourceHomicideSuspect");
		suspect.SetPosition(suspectPos);
		suspect.SetPlayerMP(source.GetPlayerMP());
		suspect.SetRole(ROLE_CIVILIAN);
		suspect.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_CIVILIAN_NORMAL);
		suspect.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT);

		bool Armed = ((Math::rand() % 100) < HOMICIDE_ARMED_SUSPECT_CHANCE);
		if (Armed)
		{
			suspect.SetEquipment(EQUIP_PISTOL);
			suspect.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ARMED_SUSPECT);
		}

		GameObjectList updaterList("EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater");
		if (updaterList.GetNumObjects() > 0)
		{
			GameObject updater = updaterList.GetObject(0);
			if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_PENDING))
				updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_PENDING);
			if (!updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING))
				updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING);
		}

		const char *Text;
		if (Armed)
			Text = "County Dispatch: Possible homicide suspect located. Use caution. Suspect may be armed.";
		else
			Text = "County Dispatch: Possible homicide suspect located in the area. Marking last known position.";

		if (Armed)
			Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_ARMED);
		else
			Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_SUSPECT);

		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 6.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		HomicideSuspectEventID = Game::ShowEvent(Text, suspectPos);
	}

	void CheckArmedSuspectContact()
	{
		GameObjectList suspects("EM4ResourceHomicideSuspect");
		if (suspects.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		PersonList officers(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int i = 0; i < suspects.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			Person suspect(suspects.GetObject(i));
			if (!suspect.IsValid() || suspect.IsArrested() || !suspect.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ARMED_SUSPECT))
				continue;

			Vector sPos = suspect.GetPosition();
			for (int j = 0; j < officers.GetNumPersons(); j++)
			{
				Person officer = officers.GetPerson(j);
				if (!officer.IsValid() || officer.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
					continue;

				Vector oPos = officer.GetPosition();
				if (Math::dist(sPos.x, sPos.y, oPos.x, oPos.y) <= HOMICIDE_ARMED_CONTACT_DISTANCE)
				{
					suspect.SetRole(ROLE_GANGSTER);
					suspect.SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_GANGSTER_ATTACKSQUAD);
					suspect.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ARMED_SUSPECT);
					return;
				}
			}
		}
	}

	bool IsHomicideVictimStillOnMap()
	{
		GameObjectList victims("EM4ResourceHomicideVictim");
		if (victims.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool IsSuspectTransportedOrGone()
	{
		GameObjectList suspects("EM4ResourceHomicideSuspect");
		if (suspects.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	bool IsHomicideLead(Person p)
	{
		if (p.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD))
			return true;

		if (p.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideLead"))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void CheckSuspectCustody()
	{
		GameObjectList suspects("EM4ResourceHomicideSuspect");
		for (int i = 0; i < suspects.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			Person suspect(suspects.GetObject(i));
			if (suspect.IsValid() && suspect.IsArrested() && !suspect.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED))
			{
				suspect.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED);
				Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_CUSTODY);
				Mission::PlayHint(HOMICIDE_HINT_CUSTODY);
				Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HOMICIDE_HINT_CUSTODY, 6.f);
				Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HOMICIDE_HINT_CUSTODY, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			}
		}
	}

	void CheckCompletion(GameObject updater)
	{
		if (!updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ACTIVE) && !updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING) && !updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_PENDING) && !updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING))
			return;

		if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING))
		{
			CheckArmedSuspectContact();
			CheckSuspectCustody();
		}

		if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ACTIVE) && !IsHomicideVictimStillOnMap())
		{
			updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_ACTIVE);
			updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_COMPLETE);

			if (HomicideEventID != -1)
				Game::SetEventFinished(HomicideEventID, true, 30);

			if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_LEAD_OUTSTANDING))
			{
				Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_SCENE_CLEAR);
				Mission::PlayHint(HOMICIDE_HINT_LEAD_PENDING);
				Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HOMICIDE_HINT_LEAD_PENDING, 6.f);
				Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HOMICIDE_HINT_LEAD_PENDING, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			}
			else if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_PENDING) || updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING))
			{
				Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_SCENE_CLEAR);
				Mission::PlayHint(HOMICIDE_HINT_NEED_SUSPECT);
				Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HOMICIDE_HINT_NEED_SUSPECT, 6.f);
				Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HOMICIDE_HINT_NEED_SUSPECT, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			}
			else
			{
				if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED))
				{
					updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED);
					updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_COMPLETE);

					if (Mission::HasObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE))
					{
						Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE, true);
						Mission::RemoveObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE);
					}

					Mission::PlayHint(HOMICIDE_HINT_FULL_COMPLETE);
					Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_CASE_COMPLETE);
					Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HOMICIDE_HINT_FULL_COMPLETE, 6.f);
					Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HOMICIDE_HINT_FULL_COMPLETE, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
				}
				else
				{
					if (Mission::HasObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE))
					{
						Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE, true);
						Mission::RemoveObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE);
					}

					updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_COMPLETE);
					Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_SCENE_CLEAR);
					Mission::PlayHint(HOMICIDE_HINT_COMPLETE);
					Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HOMICIDE_HINT_COMPLETE, 6.f);
					Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HOMICIDE_HINT_COMPLETE, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
				}
			}
		}

		if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING) && IsSuspectTransportedOrGone())
		{
			updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_SUSPECT_OUTSTANDING);
			updater.AssignCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED);

			if (HomicideSuspectEventID != -1)
				Game::SetEventFinished(HomicideSuspectEventID, true, 30);

			Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_SUSPECT_SECURED);
			Mission::PlayHint(HOMICIDE_HINT_SUSPECT_SECURED);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HOMICIDE_HINT_SUSPECT_SECURED, 6.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HOMICIDE_HINT_SUSPECT_SECURED, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);

			if (updater.HasCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_COMPLETE))
			{
				updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_INVESTIGATED);
				updater.RemoveCommand(HOMICIDE_CMD_COMPLETE);
				if (Mission::HasObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE))
				{
					Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE, true);
					Mission::RemoveObjective(HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE);
				}

				Mission::PlayHint(HOMICIDE_HINT_FULL_COMPLETE);
				Audio::PlaySample(HOMICIDE_SOUND_CASE_COMPLETE);
				Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(HOMICIDE_HINT_FULL_COMPLETE, 6.f);
				Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(HOMICIDE_HINT_FULL_COMPLETE, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyHomicideCase14 : CommandScript
{
	DummyHomicideCase14()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
```

## SystemScript_MissingPersonCallout.script

```cpp
// SystemScript_MissingPersonCallout.script
// EM4Resource missing person callout system.
//
// Purpose:
// - Starts when selected by the custom call scheduler.
// - Creates one call-log/minimap entry for the broad search area.
//
// Optional map setup:
// - Best setup: add multiple virtual objects named missingperson_area01 through missingperson_area12.
// - Fallback setup: add at least one virtual object named missingperson_area01.
// - If those are missing, the script falls back to fire_station_controlpanel1,
//   then fire_station1, then map origin.

const char MP_CALLOUT_CMD[]					= "DummyMissingPersonCallout";
const char MP_SEARCH_CMD[]					= "PcmdSearchMissingPerson";
const char MP_VICTIM_CMD[]					= "DummyMissingPersonVictim";
const char MP_FOUND_CMD[]					= "DummyMissingPersonFound";
const char MP_CALLOUT_OBJECTIVE[]				= "POLICE -- Missing Person Search Area";
const char MP_AREA_FALLBACK[]						= "missingperson_area01";
const char MP_AREA_01[]				= "missingperson_area01";
const char MP_AREA_02[]				= "missingperson_area02";
const char MP_AREA_03[]				= "missingperson_area03";
const char MP_AREA_04[]				= "missingperson_area04";
const char MP_AREA_05[]				= "missingperson_area05";
const char MP_AREA_06[]				= "missingperson_area06";
const char MP_AREA_07[]				= "missingperson_area07";
const char MP_AREA_08[]				= "missingperson_area08";
const char MP_AREA_09[]				= "missingperson_area09";
const char MP_AREA_10[]				= "missingperson_area10";
const char MP_AREA_11[]				= "missingperson_area11";
const char MP_AREA_12[]				= "missingperson_area12";
const char MP_FALLBACK_PANEL[]			= "fire_station_controlpanel1";
const char MP_FALLBACK_STATION[]		= "fire_station1";
const char MP_FOUND_SOUND[]					= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Found_By_K9.wav";
const char MP_VICTIM_NAME[]					= "EM4ResourceMissingPersonVictim";
const char MP_UPDATER_NAME[]				= "EM4ResourceMissingPersonUpdater";
const char MP_HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE[]			= "POLICE -- Homicide investigation";
const char MP_HOMICIDE_UPDATER[]			= "EM4ResourceHomicideUpdater";
const char MP_DEBUG_SPAWN_TEXT[]				= "Hidden Missing Person Spawned Here";
const char MP_TEXT_FOUND[]					= "County Dispatch: Missing person located by search team. Subject is now injured and requires EMS evaluation. Establish patient care, confirm identity, and prepare transport to the nearest appropriate medical facility.";
const char MP_TEXT_NEGATIVE[]				= "Missing Person Search: K9 team searched this section. No strong scent located.";

int MPEventCenter						= -1;
int MPEventFound						= -1;
int MPEventDebugVictim					= -1;
int MPPingNorth							= -1;
int MPPingSouth							= -1;
int MPPingEast							= -1;
int MPPingWest							= -1;
int MPCurrentCase							= 0;
int MPDebugSpawnMarkerEnabled				= 0;
Vector MPCurrentSearchCenter;
Vector MPLastSearchPosition;

object DummyMissingPersonVictim : CommandScript
{
	DummyMissingPersonVictim()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
};

	DummyMissingPersonFound()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)

	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
};

object PcmdSearchMissingPerson : CommandScript
{
	PcmdSearchMissingPerson()
	{
		SetIcon("enterhouse");
		SetCursor("enterhouse");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_VIRTUAL);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(320);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		return Caller->HasCommand("SendDog") || Caller->HasCommand("CallDog");
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsEquipped())
			return false;

		GameObjectList victims(MP_VICTIM_NAME);
		if (victims.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return false;

		return !victims.GetObject(0)->HasCommand(MP_FOUND_CMD);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		return CheckPossible(Caller);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Person handler(Caller);
		Vector searchPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		MPLastSearchPosition = searchPos;

		if (!handler.HasCommand(MP_CALLOUT_CMD))
			handler.AssignCommand(MP_CALLOUT_CMD);

		handler.SetCommandable(false);
		handler.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, searchPos);
		handler.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "senddog");
		handler.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
		handler.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");

		Person dog;
		if (handler.GetArrestedID() != -1)
			dog = handler.GetArrested();

		if (dog.IsValid() && dog.HasAnimation("bark"))
		{
			handler.PushActionRelease(ACTION_APPEND);
			dog.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, searchPos, true);
			dog.PushActionDogSearch(ACTION_APPEND);
			handler.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.0f);
			handler.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, MP_CALLOUT_CMD, &dog, 2, false);
		}
		else
		{
			handler.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, searchPos, true);
			handler.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 6.0f);
			handler.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, MP_CALLOUT_CMD, Caller, 2, false);
		}

		handler.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 8.0f);
		handler.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, MP_CALLOUT_CMD, Caller, 5, false);
		handler.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
		handler.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, MP_CALLOUT_CMD, Caller, 3, false);
	}
};

object DummyMissingPersonCallout : CommandScript
{
	DummyMissingPersonCallout()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			ClearMissingPersonEvents();
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 2)
		{
			CheckSearchResult(Caller);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 3)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 4)
		{
			ClearPerimeterPings();
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 5)
		{
			CheckSearchPosition(MPLastSearchPosition);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 10)
		{
			CheckAutoUpdate(Caller);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 6)
		{
			ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", MPCurrentSearchCenter + Vector(0.f, 3600.f, 0.f), 0);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 7)
		{
			ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", MPCurrentSearchCenter + Vector(0.f, -3600.f, 0.f), 1);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 8)
		{
			ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", MPCurrentSearchCenter + Vector(3600.f, 0.f, 0.f), 2);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 9)
		{
			ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", MPCurrentSearchCenter + Vector(-3600.f, 0.f, 0.f), 3);
			return;
		}

		if (!CanStartMissingPersonCall())
			return;

		Vector center = GetSearchCenter();
		MPCurrentSearchCenter = center;
		MPCurrentCase = Math::rand() % 35;
		const char *Text = GetDispatchText(MPCurrentCase);

		Audio::PlaySample(GetDispatchSound(MPCurrentCase));
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.6f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 8.f);

		if (!Mission::HasObjective(MP_CALLOUT_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::AddObjective(MP_CALLOUT_OBJECTIVE);
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(MP_CALLOUT_OBJECTIVE, false);
		}

		SpawnMissingPerson(center, GetVictimPrototype(MPCurrentCase));

		MPEventCenter = Game::ShowEvent(Text, center);
		ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", center + Vector(0.f, 3600.f, 0.f), 0);
		ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", center + Vector(0.f, -3600.f, 0.f), 1);
		ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", center + Vector(3600.f, 0.f, 0.f), 2);
		ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing("Missing Person Search Boundary", center + Vector(-3600.f, 0.f, 0.f), 3);
		StartUpdater(center);
	}

	bool CanStartMissingPersonCall()
	{
		if (Mission::GetNumObjectivesNotAccomplished() > 0)
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(MP_CALLOUT_OBJECTIVE) || Mission::HasObjective(MP_HOMICIDE_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		GameObjectList victims(MP_VICTIM_NAME);
		if (victims.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList updaters(MP_UPDATER_NAME);
		if (updaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList homicideUpdaters(MP_HOMICIDE_UPDATER);
		if (homicideUpdaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void ShowTemporaryPerimeterPing(const char *Text, Vector Pos, int PingID)
	{
		int EventID = Game::ShowEvent(Text, Pos);

		if (PingID == 0)
			MPPingNorth = EventID;
		else if (PingID == 1)
			MPPingSouth = EventID;
		else if (PingID == 2)
			MPPingEast = EventID;
		else
			MPPingWest = EventID;
	}

	const char *GetVictimPrototype(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilboy01_blue.e4p";
			case 1: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilgirl02_red.e4p";
			case 2: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilboy03_yellow.e4p";
			case 3: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilgirl01_green.e4p";
			case 4: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/outdoorexplorer01.e4p";
			case 5: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/outdoorexplorer01_a.e4p";
			case 6: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/outdoorexplorer02.e4p";
			case 7: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold01.e4p";
			case 8: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwomanold02.e4p";
			case 9: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p";
			case 10: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman03_blue.e4p";
			case 11: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmother01_purple.e4p";
			case 12: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman03_green.e4p";
			case 13: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman02_beige.e4p";
			case 14: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman02_silver.e4p";
			case 15: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman01_yellow.e4p";
			case 16: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilboy02_green.e4p";
			case 17: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilgirl01_violet.e4p";
			case 18: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilworker01.e4p";
			case 19: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilski01.e4p";
			case 20: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilski02a.e4p";
			case 21: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civildeliveryman.e4p";
			case 22: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman06.e4p";
			case 23: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman05_black.e4p";
			case 24: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmother01_blue.e4p";
			case 25: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilboy02_white.e4p";
			case 26: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilgirl02_blue.e4p";
			case 27: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_red.e4p";
			case 28: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman03_grey.e4p";
			case 29: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilrocker01.e4p";
			case 30: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman06_red.e4p";
			case 31: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/fatman01.e4p";
			case 32: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold02.e4p";
			case 33: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilgirl01_blue.e4p";
		}

		return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwomanold01.e4p";
	}

	const char *GetDispatchSound(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_00.wav";
			case 1: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_01.wav";
			case 2: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_02.wav";
			case 3: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_03.wav";
			case 4: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_04.wav";
			case 5: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_05.wav";
			case 6: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_06.wav";
			case 7: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_07.wav";
			case 8: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_08.wav";
			case 9: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_09.wav";
			case 10: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_10.wav";
			case 11: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_11.wav";
			case 12: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_12.wav";
			case 13: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_13.wav";
			case 14: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_14.wav";
			case 15: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_15.wav";
			case 16: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_16.wav";
			case 17: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_17.wav";
			case 18: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_18.wav";
			case 19: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_19.wav";
			case 20: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_20.wav";
			case 21: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_21.wav";
			case 22: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_22.wav";
			case 23: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_23.wav";
			case 24: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_24.wav";
			case 25: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_25.wav";
			case 26: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_26.wav";
			case 27: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_27.wav";
			case 28: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_28.wav";
			case 29: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_29.wav";
			case 30: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_30.wav";
			case 31: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_31.wav";
			case 32: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_32.wav";
			case 33: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_33.wav";
		}

		return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MissingPerson_Dispatch_34.wav";
	}

	const char *GetDispatchText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "County Dispatch: Missing child report. Young boy wearing blue clothing, last seen walking away from family near the marked search area. Caller is frantic and reports the child has not answered voice calls. Start a coordinated ground search and request K9 if available.";
			case 1: return "County Dispatch: Possible Amber Alert standby. Young girl wearing red clothing, last seen only minutes ago near the marked perimeter. Family reports she disappeared from view suddenly. Units respond for immediate area search and witness canvass.";
			case 2: return "County Dispatch: Missing child. Young boy wearing yellow clothing walked away from supervision and has not returned. Caller is checking nearby roads now with negative results. Establish search teams and keep traffic units watching roadway edges.";
			case 3: return "County Dispatch: Missing juvenile female. Young girl wearing green clothing, last known inside the marked search area. Family reports she is scared of strangers and may hide if approached. Start quiet search, use K9 if available, and notify EMS to stage.";
			case 4: return "County Dispatch: Overdue hiker. Adult male in outdoor hiking clothing failed to return from a planned route. Reporting party states he may have limited water and no reliable phone service. Establish search grid from the marked area.";
			case 5: return "County Dispatch: Backcountry overdue subject. Adult hiker in outdoor gear separated from his party and missed the return time. Last contact was vague and conditions are unknown. Ground search and K9 requested for the marked area.";
			case 6: return "County Dispatch: Lost outdoorsman. Adult male in trail clothing separated from a group and has not been seen since. Search area is based on the last confirmed direction of travel. Use caution for terrain and possible exposure.";
			case 7: return "County Dispatch: Missing elderly male. Grandfather in civilian clothing, possible medical or memory issue, last seen near the marked area. Family reports this is unusual behavior. Start welfare search and have EMS ready for evaluation.";
			case 8: return "County Dispatch: Missing elderly female. Grandmother in civilian clothing, family unable to locate her after repeated checks. Unknown medical status. Units start a welfare search, check open areas first, and prepare for patient care if located.";
			case 9: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult male. Father wearing white clothing, vehicle or personal property located but subject is not with it. Family reports no phone contact. Start search from the marked area and treat as suspicious until proven otherwise.";
			case 10: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult female wearing blue clothing. Phone information places her last known area inside the marked search zone, but no voice contact has been made. Begin perimeter search and watch for signs of injury or exposure.";
			case 11: return "County Dispatch: Missing mother wearing purple clothing. Family reports she left on foot and failed to return, no recent contact. Search area marked from last known direction. Units begin ground search and attempt neighborhood canvass.";
			case 12: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult male wearing green clothing. Witness saw him walking alone, direction unknown after that point. Subject may be disoriented or intentionally avoiding contact. Search teams respond to the marked area.";
			case 13: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult female wearing beige clothing. Caller reports possible confusion and exposure risk. Subject may not recognize emergency personnel immediately. Start a careful welfare search and request EMS to stand by.";
			case 14: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult male wearing silver or light gray clothing. Subject is overdue and unreachable by phone. Last known position places him near the marked search area. Begin search pattern and check isolated spots.";
			case 15: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult female wearing yellow clothing. Witness statement places her near the marked perimeter before contact was lost. Unknown medical status. Units begin area search and notify command when a grid is established.";
			case 16: return "County Dispatch: Urgent missing child. Young boy wearing green clothing, last seen near the marked area. Family reports he may be tired and hiding. Start K9, ground search, and keep units alert for small footprints or clothing signs.";
			case 17: return "County Dispatch: Missing juvenile female. Young girl wearing violet clothing, last seen near the marked area with no confirmed direction of travel. Caller is searching nearby paths now. Units respond for rapid search and containment.";
			case 18: return "County Dispatch: Missing worker. Adult in work clothing left a work area and never returned. Coworkers report no contact by phone and are concerned due to possible injury. Start search from marked area and check behind structures or equipment.";
			case 19: return "County Dispatch: Missing skier. Subject wearing ski clothing separated from a group and has not reappeared. Possible cold exposure and injury risk. Search teams respond to marked area and prepare for medical treatment on contact.";
			case 20: return "County Dispatch: Missing skier report. Subject in ski clothing, tracks or last known movement lead toward the marked search area. Party reports worsening concern and no phone answer. Start rescue response and search grid.";
			case 21: return "County Dispatch: Missing delivery driver. Adult male in delivery work clothes, vehicle found unattended and driver not located. Unknown if medical, accident, or suspicious circumstance. Units search marked area and check for witnesses.";
			case 22: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult male in civilian clothing. Family reports a sudden disappearance and no phone contact, which is out of character. Last known area marked. Begin welfare search and update command with any evidence located.";
			case 23: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult female wearing black clothing. Last known position is inside the marked perimeter, no further details from caller. Search teams respond, check open ground and secluded areas, and request EMS if located.";
			case 24: return "County Dispatch: Missing mother wearing blue clothing. Children report she went for a walk and did not return on time. No phone answer. Units begin search in the marked area and keep family updated through command.";
			case 25: return "County Dispatch: High priority missing child. Young boy wearing white clothing, last seen near the marked search area. Caller reports increasing panic and no confirmed sighting. Start immediate search, K9 preferred, EMS to stage.";
			case 26: return "County Dispatch: Missing child. Young girl wearing blue clothing, possible runaway or lost child, exact circumstance unknown. Last seen in or near the marked area. Units start search and preserve any information from witnesses.";
			case 27: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult male wearing red clothing. Witness saw the subject enter the area alone and has not seen him return. Unknown medical status. Begin search grid and check low-visibility areas first.";
			case 28: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult female wearing gray clothing. Reporting party advises possible medical condition and concern for rapid decline. Last known area marked. Units search and prepare for immediate EMS assessment.";
			case 29: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult male in dark casual clothing. Friends report he was upset before walking away and has not answered calls. Treat as welfare concern. Search marked area and use caution on contact.";
			case 30: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult female wearing red clothing. Last seen on foot with no further contact. Caller reports this is unusual and requests urgent assistance. Units respond for area search and witness checks.";
			case 31: return "County Dispatch: Missing adult male in civilian clothing. Subject may be disoriented based on caller information. Last known area marked for search. Units begin welfare search and advise if medical aid is needed.";
			case 32: return "County Dispatch: Missing elderly male. Subject in civilian clothing, overdue and possibly in need of medical aid. Family reports limited mobility. Search teams respond to the marked area and check rest points or sheltered spots.";
			case 33: return "County Dispatch: Missing child. Young girl wearing blue clothing, Amber Alert criteria being reviewed while units search. Last known area is marked. Begin rapid search and report any witness information immediately.";
		}

		return "County Dispatch: Missing elderly female in civilian clothing. Last known area has been marked, family reports she may be confused and unable to ask for help. Start search and rescue response, K9 if available, EMS to prepare for evaluation.";
	}

	void SpawnMissingPerson(Vector center, const char *VictimPrototype)
	{
		GameObjectList oldVictims(MP_VICTIM_NAME);
		for (int i = 0; i < oldVictims.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *oldVictim = oldVictims.GetObject(i);
			Game::RemoveGameObject(oldVictim);
		}

		GameObjectList oldUpdaters(MP_UPDATER_NAME);
		for (int j = 0; j < oldUpdaters.GetNumObjects(); j++)
		{
			GameObject *oldUpdater = oldUpdaters.GetObject(j);
			oldUpdater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}

		Person victim = Game::CreatePerson(VictimPrototype, MP_VICTIM_NAME);
		Vector victimPos = center + Vector(600.f, 450.f, 0.f);
		bool placed = false;

		for (int attempt = 0; attempt < 16; attempt++)
		{
			Vector candidate = GetRandomSearchPosition(center, attempt);
			if (Game::FindFreePosition(&victim, candidate, 1200.f))
			{
				victim.SetPosition(candidate);
				victim.UpdatePlacement();
				if (victim.IsInsideMap() && Math::dist(center.x, center.y, candidate.x, candidate.y) < 3000.f)
				{
					victimPos = candidate;
					placed = true;
					break;
				}
			}
		}

		if (!placed)
		{
			Vector fallback = center + Vector(500.f, 500.f, 0.f);
			if (Game::FindFreePosition(&victim, fallback, 900.f))
			{
				victim.SetPosition(fallback);
				victim.UpdatePlacement();
				if (victim.IsInsideMap() && Math::dist(center.x, center.y, fallback.x, fallback.y) < 1800.f)
				{
					victimPos = fallback;
					placed = true;
				}
			}
		}

		if (!placed)
		{
			victim.SetPosition(center);
			victim.UpdatePlacement();
			if (victim.IsInsideMap())
				victimPos = center;
		}

		victim.SetPosition(victimPos);
		victim.SetRole(ROLE_CIVILIAN);
		victim.SetCommandable(false);
		victim.SetSelectable(true);
		victim.AssignCommand(MP_VICTIM_CMD);
		victim.SetIdleAnimation();
		victim.UpdatePlacement();

		if (MPDebugSpawnMarkerEnabled == 1)
		{
			if (MPEventDebugVictim != -1)
				Game::SetEventFinished(MPEventDebugVictim, true, 0);

			MPEventDebugVictim = Game::ShowEvent(MP_DEBUG_SPAWN_TEXT, victim.GetPosition());
			Game::SetEventFinished(MPEventDebugVictim, true, 45);
		}
	}

	void StartUpdater(Vector Pos)
	{
		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject("mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p", MP_UPDATER_NAME);
		updater.SetPosition(Pos);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(MP_CALLOUT_CMD);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, MP_CALLOUT_CMD, &updater, 10, false);
	}

	Vector GetRandomSearchPosition(Vector center, int attempt)
	{
		int distanceValue = 1400 + GetRandomNumber(1000);
		float d = distanceValue;
		float h = d * 0.5f;

		switch (attempt)
		{
			case 0: return center + Vector(d, h, 0.f);
			case 1: return center + Vector(-d, h, 0.f);
			case 2: return center + Vector(d, -h, 0.f);
			case 3: return center + Vector(-d, -h, 0.f);
			case 4: return center + Vector(h, d, 0.f);
			case 5: return center + Vector(-h, d, 0.f);
			case 6: return center + Vector(h, -d, 0.f);
			case 7: return center + Vector(-h, -d, 0.f);
			case 8: return center + Vector(d, 0.f, 0.f);
			case 9: return center + Vector(-d, 0.f, 0.f);
			case 10: return center + Vector(0.f, d, 0.f);
			case 11: return center + Vector(0.f, -d, 0.f);
			case 12: return center + Vector(h, h, 0.f);
			case 13: return center + Vector(-h, h, 0.f);
			case 14: return center + Vector(h, -h, 0.f);
		}

		return center + Vector(-h, -h, 0.f);
	}

	void CheckSearchResult(GameObject *Searcher)
	{
		GameObjectList victims(MP_VICTIM_NAME);
		if (victims.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject *victimObject = victims.GetObject(0);
		if (victimObject->HasCommand(MP_FOUND_CMD))
			return;

		float dist = Searcher->GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(victimObject);
		if (dist < 850.f)
		{
			RevealMissingPerson(victimObject);
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(MP_TEXT_NEGATIVE);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(MP_TEXT_NEGATIVE, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		}
	}

	void CheckSearchPosition(Vector SearchPos)
	{
		GameObjectList victims(MP_VICTIM_NAME);
		if (victims.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject *victimObject = victims.GetObject(0);
		if (victimObject->HasCommand(MP_FOUND_CMD))
			return;

		Vector victimPos = victimObject->GetPosition();
		if (Math::dist(SearchPos.x, SearchPos.y, victimPos.x, victimPos.y) < 850.f)
		{
			RevealMissingPerson(victimObject);
		}
		else
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(MP_TEXT_NEGATIVE);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(MP_TEXT_NEGATIVE, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		}
	}

	void CheckAutoUpdate(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		GameObjectList victims(MP_VICTIM_NAME);
		if (victims.GetNumObjects() == 0)
		{
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		GameObject *victimObject = victims.GetObject(0);
		if (victimObject->HasCommand(MP_FOUND_CMD))
		{
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		Person victim(victimObject);
		PersonList squads(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int i = 0; i < squads.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person *p = squads.GetPerson(i);
			if (!p->IsValid())
				continue;

			if (p->GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p->IsCarryingPerson())
				continue;

			if (p->GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(victimObject) < 850.f)
			{
				if (p->HasCommand("SendDog") || p->HasCommand("CallDog"))
				{
					RevealMissingPerson(victimObject);
					Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
					return;
				}
			}
		}

		PersonList animals(ROLE_ANIMAL);
		for (int j = 0; j < animals.GetNumPersons(); j++)
		{
			Person *animal = animals.GetPerson(j);
			if (!animal->IsValid())
				continue;

			if (animal->GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(victimObject) < 850.f)
			{
				if (animal->HasAnimation("bark"))
				{
					RevealMissingPerson(victimObject);
					Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
					return;
				}
			}
		}

		PersonList allPersons;
		for (int k = 0; k < allPersons.GetNumPersons(); k++)
		{
			Person *possibleDog = allPersons.GetPerson(k);
			if (!possibleDog->IsValid())
				continue;

			if (possibleDog->GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
				continue;

			if (possibleDog->IsRescueDog() && possibleDog->GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(victimObject) < 850.f)
			{
				RevealMissingPerson(victimObject);
				Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
				return;
			}
		}

		Updater->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.5f);
		Updater->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, MP_CALLOUT_CMD, Updater, 10, false);
	}

	void RevealMissingPerson(GameObject *victimObject)
	{
		if (victimObject->HasCommand(MP_FOUND_CMD))
			return;

		Person victim(victimObject);
		victim.AssignCommand(MP_FOUND_CMD);
		victim.Injure(INJUREREASON_UNKNOWN, true);
		victim.SetLife(victim.GetMaxLife() * 0.45f);
		victim.SetAnimation("injured");
		victim.SetSelectable(true);
		victim.SetCommandable(false);
		victim.SetFoundByDog(true);

		Audio::PlaySample(MP_FOUND_SOUND);
		Mission::PlayHint(MP_TEXT_FOUND);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(MP_TEXT_FOUND, 1.0f, 0.6f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(MP_TEXT_FOUND, 8.f);
		MPEventFound = Game::ShowEvent(MP_TEXT_FOUND, victim.GetPosition());
	}

	Vector GetSearchCenter()
	{
		Vector basePos = Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f);
		int AreaCount = GetSearchAreaCount();
		if (AreaCount > 0)
		{
			int Pick = GetRandomNumber(AreaCount);
			basePos = GetSearchAreaPositionByIndex(Pick);
			return basePos;
		}

		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(MP_AREA_FALLBACK);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			basePos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			return basePos;
		}

		GameObjectList l2(MP_FALLBACK_PANEL);
		if (l2.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			basePos = l2.GetObject(0)->GetPosition();
		else
		{
			GameObjectList l3(MP_FALLBACK_STATION);
			if (l3.GetNumObjects() > 0)
				basePos = l3.GetObject(0)->GetPosition();
		}

		return basePos;
	}

	int GetRandomNumber(int MaxValue)
	{
		if (MaxValue <= 0)
			return 0;

		int hour, minute, second;
		Game::GetTime(hour, minute, second);
		int seed = Math::rand() + Mission::GetMissionTime() + second + (minute * 7) + (hour * 13);
		if (seed < 0)
			seed *= -1;

		return seed % MaxValue;
	}

	int GetSearchAreaCount()
	{
		int Count = 0;
		for (int i = 1; i <= 12; i++)
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(GetSearchAreaName(i));
			if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Count++;
		}

		return Count;
	}

	Vector GetSearchAreaPositionByIndex(int Index)
	{
		int Count = 0;
		for (int i = 1; i <= 12; i++)
		{
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(GetSearchAreaName(i));
			if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				if (Count == Index)
					return l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

				Count++;
			}
		}

		return Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f);
	}

	const char *GetSearchAreaName(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return MP_AREA_01;
			case 2: return MP_AREA_02;
			case 3: return MP_AREA_03;
			case 4: return MP_AREA_04;
			case 5: return MP_AREA_05;
			case 6: return MP_AREA_06;
			case 7: return MP_AREA_07;
			case 8: return MP_AREA_08;
			case 9: return MP_AREA_09;
			case 10: return MP_AREA_10;
			case 11: return MP_AREA_11;
		}

		return MP_AREA_12;
	}

	Vector GetRandomSearchCenterNear(Vector basePos)
	{
		for (int attempt = 0; attempt < 12; attempt++)
		{
			int xValue = GetRandomNumber(12000) - 6000;
			int yValue = GetRandomNumber(12000) - 6000;
			Vector candidate = basePos + Vector(xValue, yValue, 0.f);

			GameObject temp = Game::CreateObject("mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p", "EM4ResourceMissingPersonCenterHelper");
			if (Game::FindFreePosition(&temp, candidate, 2500.f))
			{
				candidate = temp.GetPosition();
				if (temp.IsInsideMap())
				{
					Game::RemoveGameObject(&temp);
					return candidate;
				}
			}

			Game::RemoveGameObject(&temp);
		}

		return basePos;
	}

	void ClearOneEvent(int EventID)
	{
		if (EventID != -1)
			Game::SetEventFinished(EventID, true, 30);
	}

	void ClearMissingPersonEvents()
	{
		ClearMapEvents();

		GameObjectList updaters(MP_UPDATER_NAME);
		for (int i = 0; i < updaters.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *updater = updaters.GetObject(i);
			updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}

		if (Mission::HasObjective(MP_CALLOUT_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			GameObjectList victims(MP_VICTIM_NAME);
			if (victims.GetNumObjects() > 0 && victims.GetObject(0)->HasCommand(MP_FOUND_CMD))
				Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(MP_CALLOUT_OBJECTIVE, true);
		}

		MPEventCenter = -1;
		MPEventFound = -1;
		MPEventDebugVictim = -1;
		MPPingNorth = -1;
		MPPingSouth = -1;
		MPPingEast = -1;
		MPPingWest = -1;
	}

	void ClearMapEvents()
	{
		ClearOneEvent(MPEventCenter);
		ClearOneEvent(MPEventFound);
		ClearOneEvent(MPEventDebugVictim);

		MPEventCenter = -1;
		MPEventFound = -1;
		MPEventDebugVictim = -1;
	}

	void ClearPerimeterPings()
	{
		ClearOneEvent(MPPingNorth);
		ClearOneEvent(MPPingSouth);
		ClearOneEvent(MPPingEast);
		ClearOneEvent(MPPingWest);

		MPPingNorth = -1;
		MPPingSouth = -1;
		MPPingEast = -1;
		MPPingWest = -1;
	}
};

```

## SystemScript_NightPowerOutageCallout.script

```cpp
// SystemScript_NightPowerOutageCallout.script
// EM4Resource night power outage callout.
//
// Purpose:
// - Starts a power outage only during night hours, 22:00 through 05:00.
// - Turns off named map light objects in the affected area.
// - Allows an engineer to restore power at the matching panel.
// - Randomly escalates some outages into a fire condition.
//
// Map setup:
// - Add virtual objects named power_outage_area01 through power_outage_area12.
// - Add a selectable panel object/vehicle named power_panel01 through power_panel12.
// - Optional: name affected lights with prefixes power_light01, power_light02, etc.
// - Optional: name possible fire objects with prefixes power_fire01, power_fire02, etc.

const char POWER_EMPTY_OBJECT[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p";
const char POWER_UPDATER_NAME[]		= "EM4ResourcePowerOutageUpdater";
const char POWER_CALLOUT_CMD[]		= "DummyNightPowerOutageCallout";
const char POWER_ENGINEER_CMD[]		= "PcmdRestorePowerOutage";
const char POWER_PANEL_ACTIVE_CMD[]	= "DummyPowerOutagePanelActive";
const char POWER_PANEL_RESTORED_CMD[]	= "DummyPowerOutagePanelRestored";
const char POWER_OBJECTIVE[]			= "TECH -- Night Power Outage";
const char POWER_ENGINEER_PROTO[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/04 LA Tec/engineer.e4p";

const char POWER_SOUND_DISPATCH_0[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Dispatch_00.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_DISPATCH_1[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Dispatch_01.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_DISPATCH_2[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Dispatch_02.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_ENGINEER_0[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Engineer_00.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_ENGINEER_1[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Engineer_01.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_ENGINEER_2[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Engineer_02.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_FIRE[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Fire_Report.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_RESTORED[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Restored.wav";
const char POWER_SOUND_COMPLETE[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/PowerOutage_Complete.wav";

const float POWER_MONITOR_WAIT			= 6.f;
const int POWER_MAX_AREAS				= 12;
const int POWER_FIRE_CHANCE				= 35;
const int POWER_MIN_REPAIR_TIME			= 60;
const int POWER_EXTRA_REPAIR_TIME		= 61;

int PowerOutageAreaID					= 0;
int PowerOutageEventID					= -1;
int PowerOutageFireStarted				= 0;
int PowerOutageRestored					= 0;
int PowerOutageCauseID					= 0;

object DummyPowerOutagePanelActive : CommandScript
{
	DummyPowerOutagePanelActive()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
};

object DummyPowerOutagePanelRestored : CommandScript
{
	DummyPowerOutagePanelRestored()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
};

object PcmdRestorePowerOutage : CommandScript
{
	PcmdRestorePowerOutage()
	{
		SetIcon("powerrestore");
		SetCursor("powerrestore");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(240);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		GameObjectList updaters(POWER_UPDATER_NAME);
		if (updaters.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!IsEngineer(&p))
			return false;

		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsInjured() || p.IsDead())
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (!CheckPossible(Caller))
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() != ACTOR_OBJECT && Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		GameObject panel(Target);
		if (!panel.HasCommand(POWER_PANEL_ACTIVE_CMD) || panel.HasCommand(POWER_PANEL_RESTORED_CMD))
			return false;

		if (panel.HasName(GetPanelName(PowerOutageAreaID)))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			FinishRepair(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 2)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if (p.IsValid())
				p.SetCommandable(true);
			return;
		}

		Person p(Caller);
		GameObject panel(Target);
		if (!p.IsValid() || !panel.IsValid())
			return;

		int RepairTime = POWER_MIN_REPAIR_TIME + (Math::rand() % POWER_EXTRA_REPAIR_TIME);
		Notify(GetEngineerSound(PowerOutageCauseID), GetEngineerText(PowerOutageCauseID));

		p.SetCommandable(false);
		Vector targetPos = panel.GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, targetPos);
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &panel);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "useobjmid");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, RepairTime);
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, POWER_ENGINEER_CMD, &panel, 1, false);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.2f);
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, POWER_ENGINEER_CMD, Caller, 2, false);
	}

	bool IsEngineer(Person *p)
	{
		if (StrCompare(p->GetPrototypeFileName(), POWER_ENGINEER_PROTO) == 0)
			return true;

		if (p->HasCommand("PcmdRepair"))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void FinishRepair(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target)
	{
		GameObject panel(Target);
		if (!panel.IsValid() || panel.HasCommand(POWER_PANEL_RESTORED_CMD))
			return;

		panel.RemoveCommand(POWER_PANEL_ACTIVE_CMD);
		panel.AssignCommand(POWER_PANEL_RESTORED_CMD);
		PowerOutageRestored = 1;
		SetAreaLights(PowerOutageAreaID, true);

		const char *Text = "County Dispatch: Engineer reports power restored to the affected area. Continue checking for hazards and confirm no fire extension.";
		Notify(POWER_SOUND_RESTORED, Text);

		GameObjectList updaters(POWER_UPDATER_NAME);
		if (updaters.GetNumObjects() > 0)
		{
			GameObject *updater = updaters.GetObject(0);
			updater->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, POWER_CALLOUT_CMD, updater, 2, false);
		}
	}

	void SetAreaLights(int AreaID, bool Enabled)
	{
		GameObjectList lights = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix(GetLightPrefix(AreaID));
		for (int i = 0; i < lights.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *light = lights.GetObject(i);
			if (!light->IsValid())
				continue;

			light->EnableSpecialLights(Enabled);
			light->EnableHeadLights(Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(0, Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(1, Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(2, Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(3, Enabled);
		}
	}

	void Notify(const char *Sound, const char *Text)
	{
		Audio::PlaySample(Sound);
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.65f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 8.f);
	}

	const char *GetEngineerSound(int CaseID)
	{
		if (CaseID == 0)
			return POWER_SOUND_ENGINEER_0;
		if (CaseID == 1)
			return POWER_SOUND_ENGINEER_1;
		return POWER_SOUND_ENGINEER_2;
	}

	const char *GetEngineerText(int CaseID)
	{
		if (CaseID == 0)
			return "Engineer Update: Utility panel is open. Looks like a blown transformer fuse. I am isolating the circuit and restoring the feed now.";
		if (CaseID == 1)
			return "Engineer Update: Panel shows a tripped service breaker. I am checking for arcing and resetting the affected leg.";
		return "Engineer Update: Found a fault on the exterior service. I am bypassing the damaged section and bringing power back gradually.";
	}

	const char *GetPanelName(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return "power_panel01";
			case 2: return "power_panel02";
			case 3: return "power_panel03";
			case 4: return "power_panel04";
			case 5: return "power_panel05";
			case 6: return "power_panel06";
			case 7: return "power_panel07";
			case 8: return "power_panel08";
			case 9: return "power_panel09";
			case 10: return "power_panel10";
			case 11: return "power_panel11";
		}

		return "power_panel12";
	}

	const char *GetLightPrefix(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return "power_light01";
			case 2: return "power_light02";
			case 3: return "power_light03";
			case 4: return "power_light04";
			case 5: return "power_light05";
			case 6: return "power_light06";
			case 7: return "power_light07";
			case 8: return "power_light08";
			case 9: return "power_light09";
			case 10: return "power_light10";
			case 11: return "power_light11";
		}

		return "power_light12";
	}
};

object DummyNightPowerOutageCallout : CommandScript
{
	DummyNightPowerOutageCallout()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			StartTestScheduler();
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 1)
		{
			GameObject updater(Caller);
			StartPowerOutageCall(&updater);
			updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, POWER_MONITOR_WAIT);
			updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, POWER_CALLOUT_CMD, &updater, 2, false);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 2)
		{
			GameObject updater(Caller);
			MonitorPowerOutageCall(&updater);
			return;
		}
	}

	void StartTestScheduler()
	{
		GameObjectList existing(POWER_UPDATER_NAME);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return;

		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject(POWER_EMPTY_OBJECT, POWER_UPDATER_NAME);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(POWER_CALLOUT_CMD);
		updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 8.f);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, POWER_CALLOUT_CMD, &updater, 1, false);
	}

	void StartPowerOutageCall(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		if (!CanStartPowerOutageCall())
		{
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		PowerOutageAreaID = GetRandomAreaID();
		PowerOutageEventID = -1;
		PowerOutageFireStarted = 0;
		PowerOutageRestored = 0;
		PowerOutageCauseID = Math::rand() % 3;

		GameObjectList panels(GetPanelName(PowerOutageAreaID));
		if (panels.GetNumObjects() == 0)
		{
			System::Log("POWER OUTAGE: Matching power_panel object is missing.");
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		GameObject *panel = panels.GetObject(0);
		if (!panel->IsValid())
		{
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		panel->RemoveCommand(POWER_PANEL_RESTORED_CMD);
		panel->AssignCommand(POWER_PANEL_ACTIVE_CMD);
		panel->SetSelectable(true);
		SetAreaLights(PowerOutageAreaID, false);
		AssignEngineerCommands();

		if (!Mission::HasObjective(POWER_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::AddObjective(POWER_OBJECTIVE);
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(POWER_OBJECTIVE, false);
		}

		const char *Text = GetDispatchText(PowerOutageCauseID);
		Notify(GetDispatchSound(PowerOutageCauseID), Text);
		PowerOutageEventID = Game::ShowEvent(Text, panel->GetPosition());

		if ((Math::rand() % 100) < POWER_FIRE_CHANCE)
			StartOutageFire(PowerOutageAreaID);
	}

	bool CanStartPowerOutageCall()
	{
		if (!IsNightTime())
			return false;

		if (Mission::GetNumObjectivesNotAccomplished() > 0)
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(POWER_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		GameObjectList existing(POWER_UPDATER_NAME);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		if (GetAreaCount() == 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void MonitorPowerOutageCall(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		if (!Updater->IsValid())
			return;

		AssignEngineerCommands();

		if (PowerOutageRestored == 1 && (!PowerOutageHasActiveFire()))
		{
			CompletePowerOutageCall(Updater);
			return;
		}

		Updater->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, POWER_MONITOR_WAIT);
		Updater->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, POWER_CALLOUT_CMD, Updater, 2, false);
	}

	bool IsNightTime()
	{
		int hour;
		int minute;
		int second;
		Game::GetTime(hour, minute, second);

		if (hour >= 22 || hour < 5)
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	int GetAreaCount()
	{
		int count = 0;
		for (int i = 1; i <= POWER_MAX_AREAS; i++)
		{
			ActorList area = Game::GetActors(GetAreaName(i));
			GameObjectList panels(GetPanelName(i));
			if (area.GetNumActors() > 0 && panels.GetNumObjects() > 0)
				count++;
		}

		return count;
	}

	int GetRandomAreaID()
	{
		int validCount = GetAreaCount();
		int pick = Math::rand() % validCount;
		int count = 0;

		for (int i = 1; i <= POWER_MAX_AREAS; i++)
		{
			ActorList area = Game::GetActors(GetAreaName(i));
			GameObjectList panels(GetPanelName(i));
			if (area.GetNumActors() > 0 && panels.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			{
				if (count == pick)
					return i;

				count++;
			}
		}

		return 1;
	}

	void StartOutageFire(int AreaID)
	{
		GameObjectList targets = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix(GetFirePrefix(AreaID));
		if (targets.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject *target = targets.GetObject(Math::rand() % targets.GetNumObjects());
		if (!target->IsValid())
			return;

		target->Burn();
		PowerOutageFireStarted = 1;

		const char *Text = "County Dispatch: Power outage upgraded. Caller reports smoke or fire in the affected area. Fire department respond and stage with utility support.";
		Notify(POWER_SOUND_FIRE, Text);
		Game::ShowEvent(Text, target->GetPosition());
	}

	bool PowerOutageHasActiveFire()
	{
		if (PowerOutageFireStarted == 0)
			return false;

		if (Game::IsBurningObjectInVirtualObject(GetAreaName(PowerOutageAreaID)))
			return true;

		GameObjectList targets = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix(GetFirePrefix(PowerOutageAreaID));
		for (int i = 0; i < targets.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *target = targets.GetObject(i);
			if (target->IsValid() && target->IsBurning())
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void CompletePowerOutageCall(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		if (PowerOutageEventID != -1)
			Game::SetEventFinished(PowerOutageEventID, true, 20);

		if (Mission::HasObjective(POWER_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(POWER_OBJECTIVE, true);
			Mission::RemoveObjective(POWER_OBJECTIVE);
		}

		GameObjectList panels(GetPanelName(PowerOutageAreaID));
		for (int i = 0; i < panels.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *panel = panels.GetObject(i);
			if (!panel->IsValid())
				continue;

			panel->RemoveCommand(POWER_PANEL_ACTIVE_CMD);
			panel->AssignCommand(POWER_PANEL_RESTORED_CMD);
		}

		Notify(POWER_SOUND_COMPLETE, "County Dispatch: Power outage incident complete. Area power restored and no active fire hazards reported.");
		RemoveEngineerCommands();
		Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}

	void AssignEngineerCommands()
	{
		PersonList squads(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int i = 0; i < squads.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person *p = squads.GetPerson(i);
			if (!p->IsValid())
				continue;

			if (IsEngineer(p) && !p->HasCommand(POWER_ENGINEER_CMD))
				p->AssignCommand(POWER_ENGINEER_CMD);
		}
	}

	void RemoveEngineerCommands()
	{
		PersonList squads(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int i = 0; i < squads.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person *p = squads.GetPerson(i);
			if (!p->IsValid())
				continue;

			if (p->HasCommand(POWER_ENGINEER_CMD))
				p->RemoveCommand(POWER_ENGINEER_CMD);
		}
	}

	bool IsEngineer(Person *p)
	{
		if (StrCompare(p->GetPrototypeFileName(), POWER_ENGINEER_PROTO) == 0)
			return true;

		if (p->HasCommand("PcmdRepair"))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void SetAreaLights(int AreaID, bool Enabled)
	{
		GameObjectList lights = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix(GetLightPrefix(AreaID));
		for (int i = 0; i < lights.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *light = lights.GetObject(i);
			if (!light->IsValid())
				continue;

			light->EnableSpecialLights(Enabled);
			light->EnableHeadLights(Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(0, Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(1, Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(2, Enabled);
			light->SetLightEnabled(3, Enabled);
		}
	}

	void Notify(const char *Sound, const char *Text)
	{
		Audio::PlaySample(Sound);
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.65f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 8.f);
	}

	const char *GetDispatchSound(int CaseID)
	{
		if (CaseID == 0)
			return POWER_SOUND_DISPATCH_0;
		if (CaseID == 1)
			return POWER_SOUND_DISPATCH_1;
		return POWER_SOUND_DISPATCH_2;
	}

	const char *GetDispatchText(int CaseID)
	{
		if (CaseID == 0)
			return "County Dispatch: Night power outage reported. Multiple exterior lights are out and callers report a utility panel fault. Engineer requested to restore power.";
		if (CaseID == 1)
			return "County Dispatch: Area power failure. Caller reports a sudden blackout with possible electrical odor near the service panel. Engineer respond to investigate.";
		return "County Dispatch: Utility trouble call. Lights are out in the area and a panel alarm is active. Engineer requested for power restoration.";
	}

	const char *GetAreaName(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return "power_outage_area01";
			case 2: return "power_outage_area02";
			case 3: return "power_outage_area03";
			case 4: return "power_outage_area04";
			case 5: return "power_outage_area05";
			case 6: return "power_outage_area06";
			case 7: return "power_outage_area07";
			case 8: return "power_outage_area08";
			case 9: return "power_outage_area09";
			case 10: return "power_outage_area10";
			case 11: return "power_outage_area11";
		}

		return "power_outage_area12";
	}

	const char *GetPanelName(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return "power_panel01";
			case 2: return "power_panel02";
			case 3: return "power_panel03";
			case 4: return "power_panel04";
			case 5: return "power_panel05";
			case 6: return "power_panel06";
			case 7: return "power_panel07";
			case 8: return "power_panel08";
			case 9: return "power_panel09";
			case 10: return "power_panel10";
			case 11: return "power_panel11";
		}

		return "power_panel12";
	}

	const char *GetLightPrefix(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return "power_light01";
			case 2: return "power_light02";
			case 3: return "power_light03";
			case 4: return "power_light04";
			case 5: return "power_light05";
			case 6: return "power_light06";
			case 7: return "power_light07";
			case 8: return "power_light08";
			case 9: return "power_light09";
			case 10: return "power_light10";
			case 11: return "power_light11";
		}

		return "power_light12";
	}

	const char *GetFirePrefix(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return "power_fire01";
			case 2: return "power_fire02";
			case 3: return "power_fire03";
			case 4: return "power_fire04";
			case 5: return "power_fire05";
			case 6: return "power_fire06";
			case 7: return "power_fire07";
			case 8: return "power_fire08";
			case 9: return "power_fire09";
			case 10: return "power_fire10";
			case 11: return "power_fire11";
		}

		return "power_fire12";
	}
};

```

## SystemScript_UnknownChemicalOdorCallout.script

```cpp
// SystemScript_UnknownChemicalOdorCallout.script
// EM4Resource unknown chemical odor / hazmat exposure callout.
//
// Purpose:
// - Starts a hazmat callout when triggered by the custom call scheduler or manual test command.
// - Spawns a leaking chemical barrel/source and several contaminated civilians.
// - Gives hazmat firefighters a secure-source command when they are on map.
// - Keeps the objective active until the leak is secured and exposed victims are handled.
//
// Test map setup:
// - Preferred: add virtual objects named hazmat_odor01 through hazmat_odor12.
// - Fallback: if no hazmat odor VOs exist, the script uses fire_station1, then map origin.

const char CHEM_EMPTY_OBJECT[]				= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p";
const char CHEM_SOURCE_PROTO_A[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/EM4Resource/hazmatbar.e4p";
const char CHEM_SOURCE_PROTO_B[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Objects/EM4Resource/hazmatbar.e4p";
const char CHEM_HAZMAT_FF_PROTO[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/02 LA Fire Department/ff_hazmat.e4p";
const char CHEM_UPDATER_NAME[]				= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorUpdater";
const char CHEM_SOURCE_NAME[]				= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorSource";
const char CHEM_VICTIM_NAME[]				= "EM4ResourceChemicalOdorVictim";
const char CHEM_CALLOUT_CMD[]				= "DummyUnknownChemicalOdorCallout";
const char CHEM_SOURCE_ACTIVE_CMD[]			= "DummyChemicalOdorSourceActive";
const char CHEM_SOURCE_SECURED_CMD[]		= "DummyChemicalOdorSourceSecured";
const char CHEM_VICTIM_CMD[]				= "DummyChemicalOdorVictim";
const char CHEM_SECURE_CMD[]				= "PcmdSecureChemicalOdorSource";
const char CHEM_OBJECTIVE[]					= "FIRE -- Unknown Chemical Odor";
const char CHEM_UPDATE_SOUND[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Source_Secured.wav";
const char CHEM_COMPLETE_SOUND[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_All_Clear.wav";
const char CHEM_FALLBACK_STATION[]			= "fire_station1";

const float CHEM_INITIAL_WAIT				= 8.f;
const float CHEM_MONITOR_WAIT				= 4.f;
const float CHEM_CONTAM_RADIUS				= 1150.f;
const int CHEM_MAX_AREAS					= 12;
const int CHEM_MAX_CASES					= 10;

int ChemicalOdorEventID						= -1;
int ChemicalOdorCurrentCase					= 0;

object DummyChemicalOdorSourceActive : CommandScript
{
	DummyChemicalOdorSourceActive()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
};

object DummyChemicalOdorSourceSecured : CommandScript
{
	DummyChemicalOdorSourceSecured()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
};

object DummyChemicalOdorVictim : CommandScript
{
	DummyChemicalOdorVictim()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
};

object PcmdSecureChemicalOdorSource : CommandScript
{
	PcmdSecureChemicalOdorSource()
	{
		SetIcon("hazmatchemical");
		SetCursor("hazmatchemical");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE | ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPriority(250);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		GameObjectList sources(CHEM_SOURCE_NAME);
		if (sources.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p.IsCarryingPerson() || p.IsLinkedWithPerson() || p.IsInjured() || p.IsDead())
			return false;

		return IsHazmatFirefighter(&p);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (!CheckPossible(Caller))
			return false;

		if (Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE || Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT)
		{
			GameObject obj(Target);
			if (obj.HasName(CHEM_SOURCE_NAME) && obj.HasCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_ACTIVE_CMD) && !obj.HasCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_SECURED_CMD))
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			SecureSource(Caller, Target);
			return;
		}

		Person p(Caller);
		Vector targetPos = Target->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_EQUIPMENTDOOR);
		p.SetCommandable(false);
		p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, targetPos);
		p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "usescissors");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 8.0f);
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CHEM_SECURE_CMD, Target, 1, false);
		p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.2f);
		p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CHEM_CALLOUT_CMD, Caller, 4, false);
	}

	bool IsHazmatFirefighter(Person *p)
	{
		if (StrCompare(p->GetPrototypeFileName(), CHEM_HAZMAT_FF_PROTO) == 0)
			return true;

		if (p->HasCommand("PcmdChangeToHazmat"))
			return true;

		return false;
	}

	void SecureSource(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target)
	{
		GameObject source(Target);
		if (!source.IsValid())
			return;

		source.RemoveContaminationArea();
		source.RemoveCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_ACTIVE_CMD);
		source.AssignCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_SECURED_CMD);
		source.EnableSpecialLights(false);
		source.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);

		Audio::PlaySample(CHEM_UPDATE_SOUND);
		const char *Text = "County Dispatch: Hazmat reports the chemical source is secured. Continue decon operations and remove exposed patients from the scene.";
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.65f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 8.f);
	}
};

object DummyUnknownChemicalOdorCallout : CommandScript
{
	DummyUnknownChemicalOdorCallout()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			StartTestScheduler();
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 1)
		{
			GameObject updater(Caller);
			StartChemicalOdorCall(&updater);
			updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, CHEM_MONITOR_WAIT);
			updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CHEM_CALLOUT_CMD, &updater, 2, false);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 2)
		{
			GameObject updater(Caller);
			MonitorChemicalOdorCall(&updater);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 4)
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			if (p.IsValid())
				p.SetCommandable(true);
			return;
		}
	}

	void StartTestScheduler()
	{
		GameObjectList existing(CHEM_UPDATER_NAME);
		if (existing.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return;

		GameObject updater = Game::CreateObject(CHEM_EMPTY_OBJECT, CHEM_UPDATER_NAME);
		updater.Hide();
		updater.AssignCommand(CHEM_CALLOUT_CMD);
		updater.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, CHEM_INITIAL_WAIT);
		updater.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CHEM_CALLOUT_CMD, &updater, 1, false);
	}

	void StartChemicalOdorCall(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		if (!CanStartChemicalOdorCall())
		{
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		Vector scenePos = GetScenePosition();
		ChemicalOdorCurrentCase = Math::rand() % CHEM_MAX_CASES;

		GameObject source = Game::CreateObject(GetSourcePrototype(ChemicalOdorCurrentCase), CHEM_SOURCE_NAME);
		if (!source.IsValid())
		{
			source = Game::CreateObject(CHEM_SOURCE_PROTO_A, CHEM_SOURCE_NAME);
		}

		if (!source.IsValid())
		{
			System::Log("CHEMICAL ODOR: Could not create mod EM4Resource hazmatbar source.");
			Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}

		source.SetPosition(scenePos);
		source.UpdatePlacement();
		source.Show();
		source.AssignCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_ACTIVE_CMD);
		source.SetUserData(ChemicalOdorCurrentCase);
		source.SetContaminationArea(CONTAMINATION_CHEMICAL, CHEM_CONTAM_RADIUS);
		source.EnableSpecialLights(true);
		source.SetCommandable(false);
		source.SetSelectable(true);

		SpawnVictims(source.GetPosition(), ChemicalOdorCurrentCase);
		AssignHazmatCommands();

		const char *Text = GetDispatchText(ChemicalOdorCurrentCase);
		Audio::PlaySample(GetDispatchSound(ChemicalOdorCurrentCase));
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.65f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 10.f);

		if (!Mission::HasObjective(CHEM_OBJECTIVE))
		{
			Mission::AddObjective(CHEM_OBJECTIVE);
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(CHEM_OBJECTIVE, false);
		}

		ChemicalOdorEventID = Game::ShowEvent(Text, source.GetPosition());
	}

	bool CanStartChemicalOdorCall()
	{
		if (Mission::GetNumObjectivesNotAccomplished() > 0)
			return false;

		if (Mission::HasObjective(CHEM_OBJECTIVE))
			return false;

		GameObjectList sources(CHEM_SOURCE_NAME);
		if (sources.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		GameObjectList victims(CHEM_VICTIM_NAME);
		if (victims.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void MonitorChemicalOdorCall(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		AssignHazmatCommands();
		ExposeNearbyResponders();

		if (IsChemicalOdorComplete())
		{
			CompleteChemicalOdorCall(Updater);
			return;
		}

		Updater->PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, CHEM_MONITOR_WAIT);
		Updater->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CHEM_CALLOUT_CMD, Updater, 2, false);
	}

	void SpawnVictims(Vector scenePos, int CaseID)
	{
		int victimCount = 1 + GetRandomNumber(4);
		for (int i = 0; i < victimCount; i++)
		{
			Person victim = Game::CreatePerson(GetVictimPrototype(i + CaseID), CHEM_VICTIM_NAME);
			Vector pos = scenePos + GetVictimOffset(i);
			victim.SetPosition(pos);
			victim.SetRole(ROLE_CIVILIAN);
			victim.SetCommandable(false);
			victim.SetSelectable(true);
			victim.AssignCommand(CHEM_VICTIM_CMD);
			victim.Contaminate(CONTAMINATION_CHEMICAL);
			victim.Injure(INJUREREASON_CONTAM_CHEM, true);
			victim.SetLife(victim.GetMaxLife() * GetVictimLifeFactor(i));
			victim.UpdatePlacement();
		}
	}

	Vector GetVictimOffset(int Index)
	{
		switch (Index % 12)
		{
			case 0: return Vector(160.f, 80.f, 0.f);
			case 1: return Vector(-180.f, 90.f, 0.f);
			case 2: return Vector(185.f, -95.f, 0.f);
			case 3: return Vector(-205.f, -105.f, 0.f);
			case 4: return Vector(80.f, 210.f, 0.f);
			case 5: return Vector(-90.f, 220.f, 0.f);
			case 6: return Vector(95.f, -225.f, 0.f);
			case 7: return Vector(-110.f, -230.f, 0.f);
			case 8: return Vector(260.f, 0.f, 0.f);
			case 9: return Vector(-270.f, 0.f, 0.f);
			case 10: return Vector(0.f, 270.f, 0.f);
		}

		return Vector(0.f, -280.f, 0.f);
	}

	float GetVictimLifeFactor(int Index)
	{
		if (Index == 0)
			return 0.35f;
		if (Index == 1)
			return 0.48f;
		if (Index == 2)
			return 0.62f;
```
