```cpp
		return 0.55f;
	}

	const char *GetVictimPrototype(int Index)
	{
		switch (Index % 10)
		{
			case 0: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p";
			case 1: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman03_blue.e4p";
			case 2: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civildeliveryman.e4p";
			case 3: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilworker01.e4p";
			case 4: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman02_beige.e4p";
			case 5: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman03_green.e4p";
			case 6: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman05_black.e4p";
			case 7: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman02_silver.e4p";
			case 8: return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/Civilworker02.e4p";
		}

		return "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman01_yellow.e4p";
	}

	void AssignHazmatCommands()
	{
		PersonList squads(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int i = 0; i < squads.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person *p = squads.GetPerson(i);
			if (!p->IsValid())
				continue;

			if (StrCompare(p->GetPrototypeFileName(), CHEM_HAZMAT_FF_PROTO) == 0 && !p->HasCommand(CHEM_SECURE_CMD))
				p->AssignCommand(CHEM_SECURE_CMD);
		}
	}

	void ExposeNearbyResponders()
	{
		GameObjectList sources(CHEM_SOURCE_NAME);
		if (sources.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return;

		GameObject *source = sources.GetObject(0);
		if (!source->HasCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_ACTIVE_CMD) || source->HasCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_SECURED_CMD))
			return;

		PersonList squads(ROLE_SQUAD);
		for (int i = 0; i < squads.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person *p = squads.GetPerson(i);
			if (!p->IsValid() || p->GetEnteredCarID() != -1 || p->IsDead())
				continue;

			if (StrCompare(p->GetPrototypeFileName(), CHEM_HAZMAT_FF_PROTO) == 0)
				continue;

			if (p->GetBoundingRadiusDistXYToObject(source) < CHEM_CONTAM_RADIUS)
			{
				if (!p->IsContaminated())
				{
					p->Contaminate(CONTAMINATION_CHEMICAL);
					Mission::PlayHint("Hazmat Warning: A responder has been exposed inside the hot zone. Remove and decontaminate immediately.");
				}
			}
		}
	}

	bool IsChemicalOdorComplete()
	{
		GameObjectList sources(CHEM_SOURCE_NAME);
		if (sources.GetNumObjects() == 0)
			return false;

		GameObject *source = sources.GetObject(0);
		if (!source->HasCommand(CHEM_SOURCE_SECURED_CMD))
			return false;

		GameObjectList victims(CHEM_VICTIM_NAME);
		for (int i = 0; i < victims.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = victims.GetObject(i);
			if (!obj->IsValid())
				continue;

			Person p(obj);
			if (p.IsContaminated() || p.GetEnteredCarID() == -1)
				return false;
		}

		return true;
	}

	void CompleteChemicalOdorCall(GameObject *Updater)
	{
		GameObjectList sources(CHEM_SOURCE_NAME);
		for (int i = 0; i < sources.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *source = sources.GetObject(i);
			source->RemoveContaminationArea();
			source->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		}

		if (ChemicalOdorEventID != -1)
			Game::SetEventFinished(ChemicalOdorEventID, true, 20);

		if (Mission::HasObjective(CHEM_OBJECTIVE))
			Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(CHEM_OBJECTIVE, true);

		Audio::PlaySample(CHEM_COMPLETE_SOUND);
		const char *Text = "County Dispatch: Chemical odor incident is under control. Source secured, exposed patients removed, and the hot zone is clear.";
		Mission::PlayHint(Text);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 0.65f, 0.1f);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 8.f);

		Updater->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}

	Vector GetScenePosition()
	{
		int count = GetAreaCount();
		if (count > 0)
		{
			int pick = GetRandomNumber(count);
			return GetAreaPositionByIndex(pick);
		}

		GameObjectList station(CHEM_FALLBACK_STATION);
		if (station.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return station.GetObject(0)->GetPosition();

		return Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f);
	}

	int GetAreaCount()
	{
		int count = 0;
		for (int i = 1; i <= CHEM_MAX_AREAS; i++)
		{
			ActorList list = Game::GetActors(GetAreaName(i));
			if (list.GetNumActors() > 0)
				count++;
		}

		return count;
	}

	Vector GetAreaPositionByIndex(int Index)
	{
		int count = 0;
		for (int i = 1; i <= CHEM_MAX_AREAS; i++)
		{
			ActorList list = Game::GetActors(GetAreaName(i));
			if (list.GetNumActors() > 0)
			{
				if (count == Index)
					return list.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

				count++;
			}
		}

		return Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f);
	}

	const char *GetAreaName(int AreaID)
	{
		switch (AreaID)
		{
			case 1: return "hazmat_odor01";
			case 2: return "hazmat_odor02";
			case 3: return "hazmat_odor03";
			case 4: return "hazmat_odor04";
			case 5: return "hazmat_odor05";
			case 6: return "hazmat_odor06";
			case 7: return "hazmat_odor07";
			case 8: return "hazmat_odor08";
			case 9: return "hazmat_odor09";
			case 10: return "hazmat_odor10";
			case 11: return "hazmat_odor11";
		}

		return "hazmat_odor12";
	}

	const char *GetDispatchText(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "County Dispatch: Fire and EMS respond for an unknown chemical odor with multiple people coughing and becoming dizzy. Possible leaking container in the area. Establish hot zone and start hazmat response.";
			case 1: return "County Dispatch: Report of a strong chlorine-type smell outside with several civilians down or vomiting. Caller states the odor is getting stronger. Fire, EMS, and hazmat respond.";
			case 2: return "County Dispatch: Multiple sick persons near a chemical container. Caller reports burning eyes, trouble breathing, and a visible vapor near the source. Hazmat requested to identify and control the source.";
			case 3: return "County Dispatch: Unknown hazardous materials exposure. Several workers are symptomatic outside and one subject is unconscious. Units stage uphill and upwind until hazmat identifies the product.";
			case 4: return "County Dispatch: Chemical odor investigation upgraded. Caller reports a leaking container and people collapsing nearby. Fire department respond with hazmat and EMS for patient triage.";
			case 5: return "County Dispatch: Possible industrial chemical release. Civilians reporting chest tightness, coughing, and eye irritation. Establish exclusion zone and send hazmat to secure the leak.";
			case 6: return "County Dispatch: Unknown white vapor reported around a waste container with multiple exposed civilians. Fire and hazmat respond, EMS stage outside the hot zone until decon is established.";
			case 7: return "County Dispatch: Strong ammonia-like odor reported outdoors. Several people are sick and moving away from the area. Hazmat response requested for source control and atmospheric hazard.";
			case 8: return "County Dispatch: Chemical spill with exposure. Caller reports an industrial container may be leaking and bystanders are becoming ill. Fire command requested for hazmat operations.";
		}

		return "County Dispatch: Unknown chemical odor with multiple exposure patients. Fire, EMS, and hazmat respond. Approach with caution and keep non-hazmat personnel out of the hot zone.";
	}

	const char *GetDispatchSound(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_00.wav";
			case 1: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_01.wav";
			case 2: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_02.wav";
			case 3: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_03.wav";
			case 4: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_04.wav";
			case 5: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_05.wav";
			case 6: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_06.wav";
			case 7: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_07.wav";
			case 8: return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_08.wav";
		}

		return "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/ChemicalOdor_Dispatch_09.wav";
	}

	const char *GetSourcePrototype(int CaseID)
	{
		return CHEM_SOURCE_PROTO_A;
	}

	int GetRandomNumber(int MaxValue)
	{
		if (MaxValue <= 0)
			return 0;

		int hour, minute, second;
		Game::GetTime(hour, minute, second);
		int seed = Math::rand() + Mission::GetMissionTime() + second + (minute * 7) + (hour * 13);
		if (seed < 0)
			seed *= -1;

		return seed % MaxValue;
	}
};

```

## SystemScript_WaterSupplyFreeplay.script

```cpp
/********************************************************************************************
	    Limited Water Supply script by Hoppah
		Version: 1.1

		Quint script by itchyboy for West Falls mod - USE IN OTHER MODS IS NOT ALLOWED!
******************************************************************************************/

int MAX_WATER_TANKER 		= 3000;
int MAX_WATER_TLF	 		= 2000;
int MAX_WATER_LPF	 		= 3000;
int MAX_WATER_GTF	 		= 1000;
int MAX_WATER_DLK	 		= 1000;
int MAX_WATER_BRUSH	 		= 500;

int OUTTAKE_HOSE 			= 6;	//outtake per tank update
int OUTTAKE_TLF_CANNON 		= 42;
int OUTTAKE_LPF_CANNON 		= 42;
int OUTTAKE_DLK_CANNON 		= 34;

int INTAKE_SUPPLYLINE 		= 66;
int OUTTAKE_WATERCANNON		= 66;
float WATER_UPDATE_INTERVAL	= 2.0f;
float WATER_CHECK_INTERVAL	= 30.0f;

const char PROTO_WATER_TANKER5[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/water_tender.e4p";
const char PROTO_WATER_TANKER51[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/water_tender2.e4p";
const char PROTO_WATER_TANKER6[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 USFS/usfs_cnf_wt3.e4p";
const char PROTO_WATER_TANKER7[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 USFS/usfs_cnf_wt31.e4p";
const char PROTO_WATER_TANKER8[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 8.e4p";
const char PROTO_WATER_TANKER9[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 9.e4p";
const char PROTO_WATER_TANKER4[]		= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Tanker 4.e4p";

object DummyUpdateWaterLevel : CommandScript
{
	int WaterLevel;
	bool TankEmpty = false;
 	DummyUpdateWaterLevel()
 	{
 		SetGroupID(20);
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
		GameObject obj(Caller);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (!v.IsValid() || v.IsSmoking() || v.IsDestroyed())
		{
			System::Log("WATER, Removed Water Supply Tank of: %s",v.GetPrototypeFileName());
			obj.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
			return;
		}
		if (v.HasCommand("DummyUpdateWaterLevel"))
		{
			if (checkTanker(&v))	
				WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_TANKER;
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF)
			{
				if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Utility5_1.e4p") == 0)
					WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_BRUSH;
				else
					WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_GTF;
			}
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF)						WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_TLF;
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF)						WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_LPF;
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK)						WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_DLK;
			else
				System::Error("WATER, Unknown vehicletype!");				
			v.RemoveCommand("DummyUpdateWaterLevel");
			System::Log("WATER, Assigned water tank level of %d to %s",WaterLevel,v.GetPrototypeFileName());
		} else
			WaterLevel = childID;

		int RelativeWaterLevel = 0;
		if (checkTanker(&v))
			RelativeWaterLevel = (WaterLevel*100)/MAX_WATER_TANKER;
		else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF)
			RelativeWaterLevel = (WaterLevel*100)/MAX_WATER_TLF;
		else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF)
			RelativeWaterLevel = (WaterLevel*100)/MAX_WATER_LPF;
		else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF)
		{
			if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Utility5_1.e4p") == 0)
				RelativeWaterLevel = (WaterLevel*100)/MAX_WATER_BRUSH;
			else
				RelativeWaterLevel = (WaterLevel*100)/MAX_WATER_GTF;
		}
		else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK)
			RelativeWaterLevel = (WaterLevel*100)/MAX_WATER_DLK;
		else
			System::Error("WATER, Unknown vehicletype!");

		if (((!checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel < 20) || (checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel < 101)) && !v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))
			v.AssignCommand("DummyEmptyTank");
		else if (v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && ((!checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel > 20) || (checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel > 101)))
			v.RemoveCommand("DummyEmptyTank");

		bool PumpControllerPresent = false;	
		int numActiveHoses = 0;
		int numActiveTLFCannons = 0;
		int numActiveLPFCannons = 0;
		int numActiveDLKCannons = 0;
		int numSupplyLines = 0;
		int numWaterTankerLines = 0;
		int Outtake = 0;
		int Intake = 0;							
		
		//	CHECK IF PUMP CONTROLLER IS PRESET
		if (v.HasCommand("VcmdPumpSwitch") && v.HasCommand("DummyPumpEnabled"))
		{
			GameObjectList l1 = v.GetObjectsInRange(500.0f, ACTOR_PERSON);
			for(int j = 0; j < l1.GetNumObjects(); j++)
			{
				if (l1.GetObject(j)->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON)
				{
					Person p = (Person*)l1.GetObject(j);
					if (p.GetUserData() == v.GetID() && p.HasCommand("DummyPumpEnabled") && !p.IsCurrentAnimation("useextinguis") && !p.IsFlagSet(OF_HIDDEN))
					{
						p.SetUserData(0);
						p.RemoveCommand("DummyPumpEnabled");
					}
					if (!PumpControllerPresent && p.GetUserData() == v.GetID() && p.HasCommand("DummyPumpEnabled") && p.IsCurrentAnimation("useextinguis") && !p.IsFlagSet(OF_HIDDEN))
						PumpControllerPresent = true;
				}
			}
		}
		if (!PumpControllerPresent && v.HasCommand("DummyPumpEnabled"))
		{
			v.RemoveCommand("DummyPumpEnabled");
			if (!v.IsCommandEnabled("MoveTo"))
				v.EnableCommand("MoveTo", true);
			if (!v.IsCommandEnabled("GoHome"))	
				v.EnableCommand("GoHome", true);
		}

		//	CHECK IF VEHICLE HAS SUPPLY LINE CONNECTED	
		if (v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyOn"))
			numSupplyLines++;
		//	CHECK IF FIRE VEHICLE HAS A SUPPLY LINE CONNECTED TO ANOTHER FIRE VEHICLE
		if (v.IsInstalled() && v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle"))
		{
			PersonList l4(ROLE_SQUAD);
			for(int y = 0; y < l4.GetNumPersons(); y++)
			{
				if (l4.GetPerson(y)->GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && l4.GetPerson(y)->GetFirehoseID() != 0 && l4.GetPerson(y)->IsFlagSet(OF_HIDDEN) && l4.GetPerson(y)->HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle"))
				{
					GameObject Phydrant = l4.GetPerson(y)->GetHydrant();
					if (Phydrant.GetID() == v.GetID())
					{
						Person p(l4.GetPerson(y));
						GameObjectList l5 = p.GetObjectsInRange(100.0f, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
						for(int z = 0; z < l5.GetNumObjects(); z++)
						{
							if (l5.GetObject(z)->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
							{
								Vehicle m = (Vehicle*)l5.GetObject(z);
								if (p.GetUserData() == m.GetID())
								{
									if (!v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && !m.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))
										numWaterTankerLines++;
								}
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}

		//	CHECK FIRE VEHICLES RECEIVING A SUPPLY LINE FROM ANOTHER VEHICLE
		if (v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyFromVehicle"))
		{
			GameObjectList l6 = v.GetObjectsInRange(100.0f, ACTOR_PERSON);		
			for(int d = 0; d < l6.GetNumObjects(); d++)
			{
				Person n = (Person*)l6.GetObject(d);
				if (n.GetUserData() == v.GetID() && n.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle"))
				{
					GameObject Phydrant = n.GetHydrant();
					Vehicle hy(&Phydrant);
					if (hy.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle") && !hy.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && !v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))
						numSupplyLines++;
				}
			}
		}

		if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF)
		{
			//	CHECK FIRE ENGINES
			if (!checkTanker(&v))
			{
				if (v.IsInstalled())
				{
					PersonList l2(ROLE_SQUAD);
					for(int k = 0; k < l2.GetNumPersons(); k++)
					{
						if (l2.GetPerson(k)->GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && l2.GetPerson(k)->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON && l2.GetPerson(k)->GetFirehoseID() != 0 && !l2.GetPerson(k)->IsFlagSet(OF_HIDDEN))
						{
							GameObject Phydrant = l2.GetPerson(k)->GetHydrant();
							if (Phydrant.GetID() == v.GetID() || ((Phydrant.HasName("extend_wye") || Phydrant.HasName("extend_hose")) && Phydrant.GetUserData() == v.GetID()))
							{
								Person p(l2.GetPerson(k));
								if ((!PumpControllerPresent || v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank")) && (p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool")))
								{
									p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", false);
									p.EnableCommand("Cool", false);
									p.EnableAutoTarget(false);
									if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool"))
									{
										p.ClearActions();
										p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idleequipped");
										p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.f);
									}
								}
								else if (PumpControllerPresent && !v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && !p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
								{
									p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", true);
									p.EnableCommand("Cool", true);
									p.EnableAutoTarget(true);
								}
								if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool"))
									numActiveHoses++;
							}
						}
					}
				}
				//	CHECK FIRE ENGINES WITH DECK GUN
				if (v.HasCommand("VcmdCannonSwitch") && v.IsCurrentAnimation("activate"))
				{
					GameObjectList l3 = Game::GetGameObjectsWithPrefix("engine_water_cannon");
					for(int h = 0; h < l3.GetNumObjects(); h++)
					{
						Vehicle cannon = (Vehicle*)l3.GetObject(h);
						if (cannon.GetUserData() == v.GetID())
						{
							if (v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))
							{
								cannon.EnableAutoTarget(false);
								cannon.ClearActions();
								cannon.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 4.f);
							}
							else if (!v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))
								cannon.EnableAutoTarget(true);
							if (cannon.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish") || cannon.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool"))
								numActiveTLFCannons++;
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		//	CHECK LADDER VEHICLES
		else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK)
		{
			if (v.IsInstalled() && v.IsUplifted() && !v.IsBasketEmpty())
			{
				PersonList l7(ROLE_SQUAD);
				for(int b = 0; b < l7.GetNumPersons(); b++)
				{
					if (l7.GetPerson(b)->CanUseDLKCannon() && l7.GetPerson(b)->GetEnteredCarID() == v.GetID())		
					{
						Person p(l7.GetPerson(b));
						if (v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
						{
							if (p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
							{
								p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", false);
								p.EnableCommand("Cool", false);
								p.EnableAutoTarget(false);
								p.ClearActions();
								p.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 4.f);
							} 
						}
						else if (!v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && !p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
						{
							p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", true);
							p.EnableCommand("Cool", true);
							p.EnableAutoTarget(true);
						}
					}
				}
				if (v.IsCannonInUse())
					numActiveDLKCannons++;
			}
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyIsQuint") && v.HasCommand("DummyQuintPumpOn"))	//for quint invisible dummy
			{
				char pumpName[22];		snprintf(pumpName, 22, "%d_quintPump", v.GetID());
				VehicleList list(pumpName);
				if (list.GetNumVehicles() > 0)
				{
					Vehicle *pump;
					for (int i=0; i<list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
					{		pump = list.GetVehicle(i);		}
					
					if (pump->HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle"))
						v.AssignCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");
					else if (!pump->HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle") && v.HasCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle"))
						v.RemoveCommand("DummyWaterSupplyToVehicle");

					if (v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))
						pump->AssignCommand("DummyEmptyTank");
					else if (!v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && pump->HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))
						pump->RemoveCommand("DummyEmptyTank");

					if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))
						pump->AssignCommand("DummyWater100Perc");
					else if (!v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc") && pump->HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))
						pump->RemoveCommand("DummyWater100Perc");

					PersonList l8(ROLE_SQUAD);
					for(int k = 0; k < l8.GetNumPersons(); k++)
					{
						if (l8.GetPerson(k)->GetEquipment() == EQUIP_FIREHOSE && l8.GetPerson(k)->GetType() == ACTOR_PERSON && l8.GetPerson(k)->GetFirehoseID() != 0 && !l8.GetPerson(k)->IsFlagSet(OF_HIDDEN))
						{
							GameObject Phydrant = l8.GetPerson(k)->GetHydrant();
							if (Phydrant.GetID() == pump->GetID() || ((Phydrant.HasName("extend_wye") || Phydrant.HasName("extend_hose")) && Phydrant.GetUserData() == pump->GetID()))
							{
								Person p(l8.GetPerson(k));
								if ((!PumpControllerPresent || v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank")) && (p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool")))
								{
									p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", false);
									p.EnableCommand("Cool", false);
									p.EnableAutoTarget(false);
									if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool"))
									{
										p.ClearActions();
										p.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_NEWLIST, "idleequipped");
										p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 5.f);
									}
								}
								else if (PumpControllerPresent && !v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank") && !p.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
								{
									p.EnableCommand("Extinguish", true);
									p.EnableCommand("Cool", true);
									p.EnableAutoTarget(true);
								}
								if (p.IsCurrentAction("EActionExtinguish") || p.IsCurrentAction("EActionCool"))
									numActiveHoses++;
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}

		//	RECALCULATE IN- AND OUTTAKES
		Intake = numSupplyLines*INTAKE_SUPPLYLINE;
		Outtake = numActiveHoses*OUTTAKE_HOSE+numActiveTLFCannons*OUTTAKE_TLF_CANNON+numActiveLPFCannons*OUTTAKE_LPF_CANNON+numActiveDLKCannons*OUTTAKE_DLK_CANNON+numWaterTankerLines*OUTTAKE_WATERCANNON;
		
		//	CHANGE WATER LEVEL
		if (obj.GetUserData() == v.GetID())
		{
			WaterLevel = WaterLevel+Intake-Outtake;
			if ((!checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel < 20) || (checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel < 101))
				v.AssignCommand("DummyEmptyTank");
			else if (checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel > MAX_WATER_TANKER)
				WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_TANKER;
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF && WaterLevel > MAX_WATER_TLF)
				WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_TLF;
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF && WaterLevel > MAX_WATER_LPF)
				WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_LPF;
			else if (!checkTanker(&v) && v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF)
			{
				if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Utility5_1.e4p") == 0)
				{	if (WaterLevel > MAX_WATER_BRUSH)	WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_BRUSH;	}
				else
				{	if (WaterLevel > MAX_WATER_GTF)		WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_GTF;		}
			}
			else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK && WaterLevel > MAX_WATER_DLK)
				WaterLevel = MAX_WATER_DLK;
			if (WaterLevel < 0)
				WaterLevel = 0;
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))
			{
				if (!TankEmpty)
				{
					TankEmpty = true;
					if (checkTanker(&v))
						Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water tanker is empty!", 2.f);					
					else
						Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water tank empty!", 2.f);
					System::Log("WATER, Tank of %s empty!", v.GetPrototypeFileName());
				}
				if ((!checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel > 20) || (checkTanker(&v) && WaterLevel > 101))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand("DummyEmptyTank");
					if (v.HasCommand("Extinguish") && !v.IsCommandEnabled("Extinguish"))
						v.EnableCommand("Extinguish", true);
					if (v.HasCommand("Cool") && !v.IsCommandEnabled("Cool"))
						v.EnableCommand("Cool", true);
					if (TankEmpty)
						TankEmpty = false;
				}
			}
		} else
			System::Error("WATER, Unknown water tank Dummyobject!");

		//	CHANGE ICONS	
		if (RelativeWaterLevel >= 100)		
		{
			if (!v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))		v.AssignCommand("DummyWater100Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater80Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater60Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater40Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater20Perc");			
		}			
		else if (WaterLevel <= 0 || (WaterLevel > 0 && WaterLevel < 20) || RelativeWaterLevel >= 80)		
		{	
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater100Perc");		
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater80Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater60Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater40Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater20Perc");
		}
		else if (RelativeWaterLevel >= 60)
		{
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater100Perc");
			if (!v.HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))		v.AssignCommand("DummyWater80Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater60Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater40Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater20Perc");
		}
		else if (RelativeWaterLevel >= 40)
		{			
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater100Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater80Perc");
			if (!v.HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))		v.AssignCommand("DummyWater60Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater40Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater20Perc");
		}
		else if (RelativeWaterLevel >= 20)
		{
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater100Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater80Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater60Perc");
			if (!v.HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))		v.AssignCommand("DummyWater40Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater20Perc");
		}
		else if (WaterLevel > 0)
		{
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater100Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater100Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater80Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater60Perc");
			if (v.HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))		v.RemoveCommand("DummyWater40Perc");
			if (!v.HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))		v.AssignCommand("DummyWater20Perc");
		}

		if (v.HasCommand("DummyCheckWaterSupply"))		//display water level
		{
			v.RemoveCommand("DummyCheckWaterSupply");
			char Text[255];
			snprintf(Text, 255, "Water level: %d gal. (%d%%)", WaterLevel, RelativeWaterLevel);	
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 2.f);
		}

		// REPEAT COMMAND
		childID = WaterLevel;
		obj.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, WATER_UPDATE_INTERVAL);
		obj.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyUpdateWaterLevel", &v, childID, false);
 	}

	bool checkTanker(Vehicle pV)
	{
		return (StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_WATER_TANKER4) == 0 ||
		StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_WATER_TANKER5) == 0 || 
		StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_WATER_TANKER51) == 0 || 
		StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_WATER_TANKER6) == 0 ||
		StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_WATER_TANKER7) == 0 ||
		StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_WATER_TANKER8) == 0 ||
		StrCompare(pV.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_WATER_TANKER9) == 0);
	}
};

object DummyCheckWaterSupply : CommandScript
{
 	DummyCheckWaterSupply()
 	{
 		SetGroupID(20);
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
		VehicleList fflist(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_ASF, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF);
		for(int i = 0; i < fflist.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{	
			if (!fflist.GetVehicle(i)->HasCommand("VcmdWaterSupply") && fflist.GetVehicle(i)->IsValid() && !fflist.GetVehicle(i)->IsSmoking() && !fflist.GetVehicle(i)->IsDestroyed() && fflist.GetVehicle(i)->HasCommand("MoveTo") && (fflist.GetVehicle(i)->GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_GTF || fflist.GetVehicle(i)->GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_TLF || fflist.GetVehicle(i)->GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_LPF || fflist.GetVehicle(i)->GetVehicleType() == VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK))
			{
				Vehicle v(fflist.GetVehicle(i));
				v.AssignCommand("VcmdWaterSupply");
				v.AssignCommand("DummyUpdateWaterLevel");
				GameObject mDummy = Game::CreateObject("mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p", "WaterTankDummy");
				mDummy.Hide();
				mDummy.SetUserData(v.GetID());
				float StartDelay = 0.35f * i;
				mDummy.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, StartDelay);
				mDummy.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyUpdateWaterLevel", &v, 0, false);
			}
		}
		GameObject obj(Caller);
		obj.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, WATER_CHECK_INTERVAL);
		obj.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyCheckWaterSupply", Caller, childID, false);
 	}	
};

object VcmdWaterSupply : CommandScript
{
 	VcmdWaterSupply()
 	{
		SetIcon("water100");
		SetCursor("cool");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
 	}
  
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
		if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))	
			SetIcon("water0");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))
			SetIcon("water20");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))
			SetIcon("water40");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))
			SetIcon("water60");
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))
			SetIcon("water80");
		else
			SetIcon("water100");
 		return true;
 	}
 
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
		if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyEmptyTank"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water level: empty.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater20Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water level: low.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater40Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water level: around 40%.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater60Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water level: around 60%.", 2.f);
		else if (Caller->HasCommand("DummyWater80Perc"))
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water level: around 80%.", 2.f);
		else
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("Water level: full.", 2.f);

		Caller->AssignCommand("DummyCheckWaterSupply");
	}
};

object DummyWater100Perc: CommandScript
{
 	DummyWater100Perc()
 	{
		SetGroupID(20);
 	}
};

object DummyWater80Perc: CommandScript

 	DummyWater80Perc()
 	{
		SetGroupID(20);

 	{

 	}
};

object DummyWater40Perc: CommandScript
```

## Throw.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.2#
//
// 		Changes: - Throw command will be removed.
//			   - Priority removed.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_THROW[] 		= "Throw";

object Throw : CommandScript
{
	Throw()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR | ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_VIRTUAL | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
		SetHighlightingEnabled(false);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON || Caller->GetEquipment()!=EQUIP_FLASHGRENADE)
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetEquipment()!=EQUIP_FLASHGRENADE || Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vector CmdPos, TargetPos;
		CmdPos = Game::GetCommandPos();
		TargetPos = CmdPos;

		Person p(Caller);
		if (!p.IsValid())
			return;
		if (p.GetThrowPosition(TargetPos))
		{
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TargetPos);
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
		}
		else
			Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, CmdPos);

		Caller->PushActionThrow(ACTION_APPEND, CmdPos);
		Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_THROW);
	}
};
```

## Use.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.2#
//
// 		Changes: - Only bomb squad can defuse bombs.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char PROTO_EOD[] 				= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/03 LA Police/lapd_bomb_squad.e4p";
const char PROTO_TECH[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Persons/04 LA Tec/engineer.e4p";
const char NAME_BOMB01[]			= "bomb";
const char NAME_BOMB02[]			= "m03_bomb";

object Use : CommandScript
{
	Use()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OBJECT | ACTOR_HOUSE | ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE | ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_USABLE);
		SetPriority(700);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		return Game::ExistsObjectWithFlagSet(OF_USABLE);
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID())
			return false;
		
		GameObject obj(Target);
		Person p(Caller);
		if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EOD) == 0)
		{
			if (!obj.HasName(NAME_BOMB01) && !obj.HasName(NAME_BOMB02))
				return false;
		}
		else if (StrCompare(p.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_TECH) == 0)
		{
			if (obj.HasName(NAME_BOMB01) || obj.HasName(NAME_BOMB02))
				return false;
		}

		if (!obj.IsValid()) 
			return false;
		
		return true;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, TARGET_USE);
		Caller->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		Caller->PushActionUse(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
	}
};

```

## UseJumppad.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - UseJumppad and RemoveEquipment command will be removed.
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char DUMMY_EQUIPMENT[] 		= "DummyEquipmentCommands";

object UseJumppad : CommandScript
{
	UseJumppad()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_JUMPPAD);
		SetPossibleExists(CPE_HOUSE_FOR_JUMPPAD);
	}

	/*bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON || Caller->GetEquipment()!=EQUIP_JUMPPAD)
			return false;
		return Game::ExistsHouseForJumpad();
	}*/
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetEquipment()!= EQUIP_JUMPPAD )
			return false;

		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;

		if ( Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OPEN_HOUSE )
		{
			OpenHouse house(Target);
			if ( house.HasJumppadTarget() )
				return true;
		}

		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		OpenHouse house(Target);
		Vector TargetPos = house.GetJumppadTarget();

		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
		Caller->PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_APPEND, Target, ChildID, 3.f);
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_EQUIPMENT, Target, 10, false); 

		// go back 300 units
		Vector BackPos = Caller->GetPosition();
		BackPos.x -= TargetPos.x;
		BackPos.y -= TargetPos.y;
		BackPos.z -= TargetPos.z;
		float len = Math::dist(BackPos.x, BackPos.y, BackPos.z, 0, 0, 0);
		if ( len )
		{
			BackPos.x *= 300/len;
			BackPos.y *= 300/len;
			BackPos.z *= 300/len;
		}
		BackPos.x += TargetPos.x;
		BackPos.y += TargetPos.y;
		BackPos.z += TargetPos.z;
		Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, BackPos);
	}
};

```

## UseRoadBlock.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
 #Version 1.3#
 	Changes: - UseRoadBlock and RemoveEquipment command will be removed.
			 - Priority removed.
******************************************************************************************/

object UseRoadBlock : CommandScript
{
	UseRoadBlock()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_FLOOR|ACTOR_OBJECT);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_PERSON);
		SetPossibleEquipment(EQUIP_ROADBLOCK);
		SetSelfClickActivation(true);
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetEquipment()!=EQUIP_ROADBLOCK || Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID())
			return false;
		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON)
			return false;
		if (Target->IsValid() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_OBJECT)
		{
			GameObject target(Target);
			if(!target.IsBridge())
				return false;
		}
		Person p(Caller);
		if(p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
		   	Caller->PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_NEWLIST, Target, ChildID, 3.f); // Target, Child and Time does not matter
		else
			Caller->PushActionUseEquipment(ACTION_NEWLIST, Game::GetCommandPos(), 3.f);	
		Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyEquipmentCommands", Caller, 10, false);
	}
};
```

## VcmdOpenMDT.script

```cpp
// EM4Resource native MDT and traffic stop command system.
//
// Assign these two commands to police vehicles:
// - VcmdOpenMDT
// - VcmdMDTInitiateTrafficStop
//
// Traffic stop is intentionally outside MDT mode. MDT mode temporarily hides
// common non-light vehicle commands and restores them when closed.

const char CMD_MDT_OPEN[]			= "VcmdOpenMDT";
const char CMD_MDT_STOP[]			= "VcmdMDTInitiateTrafficStop";
const char CMD_MDT_PLATE[]			= "VcmdMDTRunPlate";
const char CMD_MDT_DRIVER[]			= "VcmdMDTRunDriver";
const char CMD_MDT_WARRANTS[]		= "VcmdMDTCheckWarrants";
const char CMD_MDT_CITATION[]		= "VcmdMDTIssueCitation";
const char CMD_MDT_TOW[]			= "VcmdMDTRequestTow";
const char CMD_MDT_RELEASE[]		= "VcmdMDTReleaseVehicle";
const char CMD_MDT_PULL_DRIVER[]	= "VcmdMDTPullDriverOut";
const char CMD_MDT_CLEAR[]			= "VcmdMDTClearStop";
const char DUMMY_MDT_APPROACH[]		= "DummyMDTOfficerApproach";
const char DUMMY_MDT_STEPOUT[]		= "DummyMDTStepOutAfterContact";
const char CMD_SIREN[]				= "VcmdSiren";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[]			= "DummyHasSiren";

const char DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE[]		= "DummyMDTActive";
const char DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED[]		= "DummyMDTStoppedVehicle";
const char DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_RAN[]	= "DummyMDTPlateRan";
const char DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_RAN[]	= "DummyMDTDriverRan";
const char DUMMY_MDT_WARRANT_RAN[]	= "DummyMDTWarrantRan";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CITATION[]		= "DummyMDTCitationIssued";
const char DUMMY_MDT_TOW[]			= "DummyMDTTowRequested";
const char DUMMY_MDT_OCCUPANT_OUT[]	= "DummyMDTOccupantOut";
const char DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT[]	= "DummyMDTDriverOut";
const char DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT[]	= "DummyMDTPassengerOut";
const char DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE[]	= "DummyMDTPassengerPossible";

const char DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_CLEAR[]	= "DummyMDTPlateClear";
const char DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_EXPIRED[]= "DummyMDTPlateExpired";
const char DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN[]	= "DummyMDTPlateStolen";
const char DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO[]	= "DummyMDTPlateBOLO";

const char DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CLEAR[]	= "DummyMDTDriverClear";
const char DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP[]	= "DummyMDTDriverSuspended";
const char DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CAUTION[]= "DummyMDTDriverCaution";
const char DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT[]= "DummyMDTDriverWarrant";
const char DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY[]	= "DummyMDTDriverFelonyWarrant";

const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_TRAFFIC[]	= "DummyMDTChargeTrafficCitation";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_SUSPENDED[]	= "DummyMDTChargeSuspendedDriver";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT[]	= "DummyMDTChargeWarrant";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY[]	= "DummyMDTChargeFelonyWarrant";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH[]	= "DummyMDTChargeStolenVehicle";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS[]	= "DummyMDTChargeNarcotics";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON[]	= "DummyMDTChargeWeapon";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENPROP[]	= "DummyMDTChargeStolenProperty";
const char DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FALSEID[]	= "DummyMDTChargeFalseID";

const char DUMMY_HAD_MOVETO[]		= "DummyMDTHadMoveTo";
const char DUMMY_HAD_PATROL[]		= "DummyMDTHadPatrol";
const char DUMMY_HAD_FOLLOW[]		= "DummyMDTHadFollow";
const char DUMMY_HAD_EMPTYCAR[]		= "DummyMDTHadEmptyCar";
const char DUMMY_HAD_GOHOME[]		= "DummyMDTHadGoHome";
const char DUMMY_HAD_TOPD[]			= "DummyMDTHadToPoliceStation";
const char DUMMY_HAD_ADV_CUSTODY[]	= "DummyMDTHadAdvancedCustody";
const char DUMMY_HAD_M4[]			= "DummyMDTHadDeployM4";

const char SND_MDT_TOGGLE[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_ToggleShort.wav";
const char SND_MDT_CLOSE[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_CloseShort.wav";
const char SND_MDT_STOP[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Traffic_Stop.wav";
const char SND_MDT_STOP_PLATE[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Traffic_Stop_Plate_Standby.wav";
const char SND_MDT_PLATE[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Plate_Return.wav";
const char SND_MDT_DRIVER[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Driver_Return.wav";
const char SND_MDT_WARRANT[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Warrant_Check.wav";
const char SND_MDT_PULL[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Occupant_Out.wav";
const char SND_MDT_CITATION[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Citation.wav";
const char SND_MDT_TOW[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Tow.wav";
const char SND_MDT_RELEASE[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Release.wav";
const char SND_MDT_OCC_RETURN[]		= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Occupant_Return.wav";
const char SND_MDT_CLEAR_NOACTION[]	= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Stop_Clear_NoAction.wav";
const char SND_MDT_CLEAR_CITATION[]	= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Stop_Clear_Citation.wav";
const char SND_MDT_BACKUP[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/EM4Resource/MDT_Backup_Advised.wav";
const char PROTO_MDT_TOW[]			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/04 LA Tec/Tow 1.e4p";
const char VO_TOW_SPAWN02[]			= "spawn02";
const char VO_TOW_SPAWN05[]			= "spawn05";
const char VO_TOW_SPAWN06[]			= "spawn06";
const char VO_TOW_SPAWN09[]			= "spawn09";
const char VO_TOW_ROTATE02[]		= "rotate02";
const char VO_TOW_ROTATE05[]		= "rotate05";
const char VO_TOW_ROTATE06[]		= "rotate06";
const char VO_TOW_ROTATE09[]		= "rotate09";

object VcmdMDTInitiateTrafficStop : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTInitiateTrafficStop()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtstop");
		SetCursor("mdtstop");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-980);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && !Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && !Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE || Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE))
			return false;
		if (!Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;

		Vehicle t(Target);
		return t.IsValid() && !t.IsDestroyed() && !t.IsParking();
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject targetObj(Target);
		Vehicle targetVehicle(Target);
		Vehicle police(Caller);

		if (!targetObj.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED))
			targetObj.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED);
		if ((Target->GetID() % 4) == 0 && !targetObj.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE))
			targetObj.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE);
		if (targetVehicle.GetNumPassengers() > 1 && !targetObj.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE))
			targetObj.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE);

		targetVehicle.ClearActions();
		targetVehicle.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 3600.f);

		Vector move = targetObj.GetPosition();
		float r[9];
		targetObj.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
		float dx = -360.f, dy = 0.f, dz = 0.f;
		Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
		move = move + Vector(dx, dy, 0.f);
		Game::FindFreePosition(&police, move, 250.f);
		police.EnableBlueLights(true);
		if (!police.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &police, &police);
		police.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, move, true);
		police.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		police.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_MDT_APPROACH, Target, 0, false);
	}
};

object VcmdOpenMDT : CommandScript
{
	VcmdOpenMDT()
	{
		SetIcon("mdt");
		SetCursor("mdt");
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(-920);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && !Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE && !Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE);
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Target->IsValid() && Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID() && Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE))
		{
			Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_PLATE)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_PLATE);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_DRIVER)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_DRIVER);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_WARRANTS)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_WARRANTS);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CITATION)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_CITATION);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_TOW)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_TOW);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_RELEASE)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_RELEASE);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_PULL_DRIVER)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_PULL_DRIVER);
			if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CLEAR)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_CLEAR);

			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_MOVETO)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_MOVETO); Caller->AssignCommand("MoveTo"); }
			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_PATROL)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_PATROL); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdPatrol"); }
			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_FOLLOW)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_FOLLOW); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdFollow"); }
			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_EMPTYCAR)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_EMPTYCAR); Caller->AssignCommand("EmptyCar"); }
			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_GOHOME)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_GOHOME); Caller->AssignCommand("GoHome"); }
			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_TOPD)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_TOPD); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"); }
			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_ADV_CUSTODY)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_ADV_CUSTODY); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess"); }
			if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_M4)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_M4); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdDeployM4Officer"); }

			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_CLOSE);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT: Closed. Standard vehicle commands restored.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT: Closed. Standard vehicle commands restored.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}

		Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE);

		if (Caller->HasCommand("MoveTo")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("MoveTo"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_MOVETO); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand("VcmdPatrol")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("VcmdPatrol"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_PATROL); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand("VcmdFollow")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("VcmdFollow"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_FOLLOW); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand("EmptyCar")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("EmptyCar"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_EMPTYCAR); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand("GoHome")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("GoHome"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_GOHOME); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_TOPD); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand("VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_ADV_CUSTODY); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand("VcmdDeployM4Officer")) { Caller->RemoveCommand("VcmdDeployM4Officer"); Caller->AssignCommand(DUMMY_HAD_M4); }

		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_PLATE)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_PLATE);
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_DRIVER)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_DRIVER);
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_WARRANTS)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_WARRANTS);
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CITATION)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_CITATION);
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_TOW)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_TOW);
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_RELEASE)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_RELEASE);
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_PULL_DRIVER)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_PULL_DRIVER);
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CLEAR)) Caller->AssignCommand(CMD_MDT_CLEAR);

		Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_TOGGLE);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT: Open. Query mode active; light and siren controls remain available.", 5.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT: Open. Query mode active; light and siren controls remain available.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

object DummyMDTOfficerApproach : CommandScript
{
	DummyMDTOfficerApproach()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) { return true; }

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE || !Target->IsValid())
			return;

		Vehicle police(Caller);
		police.EnableBlueLights(true);
		if (police.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &police, &police);

		int ID = Target->GetID();
		int Num = 1000 + ((ID * 37) % 9000);
		char Plate[32];
		if ((ID % 10) < 8)
			snprintf(Plate, 31, "MT %d-EMR", Num);
		else if ((ID % 10) == 8)
			snprintf(Plate, 31, "ID %d-LAW", Num);
		else
			snprintf(Plate, 31, "WY %d-RMT", Num);

		char StopText[255];
		snprintf(StopText, 254, "County: Final stop. Plate %s received. Occupants unknown. Stand by.", Plate);
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_STOP_PLATE);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(StopText, 5.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(StopText, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);

		PersonList officers = police.GetPassengers();
		if (officers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
			return;

		Person officer = officers.GetPerson(0);
		officer.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 3.0f);
		officer.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_APPEND, &police);
		officer.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
		officer.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		officer.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkto");
		officer.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.0f);
		officer.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		officer.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &police, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
		officer.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, &police);
	}
};

object VcmdMDTRunPlate : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTRunPlate()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtplate");
		SetCursor("mdtplate");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-930);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE) && Target->IsValid() && Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject t(Target);
		int ID = Target->GetID();
		int Result = (ID + 3) % 10;
		int Num = 1000 + ((ID * 37) % 9000);

		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_RAN))
		{
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_RAN);
			if (Result <= 4) t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_CLEAR);
			else if (Result == 5 || Result == 6) t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_EXPIRED);
			else if (Result == 7) t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN);
			else t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO);
		}

		char Plate[32];
		if ((ID % 10) < 8)
			snprintf(Plate, 31, "MT %d-EMR", Num);
		else if ((ID % 10) == 8)
			snprintf(Plate, 31, "ID %d-LAW", Num);
		else
			snprintf(Plate, 31, "WY %d-RMT", Num);

		char Text[255];
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN))
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Plate Return: %s. Possible stolen vehicle. Hold target, request backup, confirm occupants.", Plate);
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO))
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Plate Return: %s. County BOLO hit. Confirm driver and use caution.", Plate);
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_EXPIRED))
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Plate Return: %s. Registration or insurance flag. Citation eligible.", Plate);
		else
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Plate Return: %s. Montana registration valid, no wants on vehicle.", Plate);

		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO))
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_BACKUP);
		else
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_PLATE);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 6.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

object VcmdMDTRunDriver : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTRunDriver()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtdriver");
		SetCursor("mdtdriver");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-931);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE) && Target->IsValid() && Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject t(Target);
		int ID = Target->GetID();
		int Result = (ID + 7) % 10;

		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_RAN))
		{
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_RAN);
			if (Result <= 4) t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CLEAR);
			else if (Result == 5) t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP);
			else if (Result == 6) t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CAUTION);
			else if (Result == 7 || Result == 8) t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT);
			else t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY);
		}

		char Text[255];
		const char *Name = "Daniel Mercer";
		switch (ID % 12)
		{
			case 0: Name = "Daniel Mercer"; break;
			case 1: Name = "Travis Cole"; break;
			case 2: Name = "Mason Keller"; break;
			case 3: Name = "Avery Hughes"; break;
			case 4: Name = "Jordan Price"; break;
			case 5: Name = "Casey Miller"; break;
			case 6: Name = "Shawn Brooks"; break;
			case 7: Name = "Morgan Reeves"; break;
			case 8: Name = "Taylor Bennett"; break;
			case 9: Name = "Parker Collins"; break;
			case 10: Name = "Riley Dawson"; break;
			default: Name = "Cameron Walsh"; break;
		}
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY))
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Driver Return: %s, Montana OLN %d. Felony warrant possible. Request cover before contact.", Name, 550000 + (ID % 90000));
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT))
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Driver Return: %s, Montana OLN %d. Local warrant flag. Confirm identity before arrest.", Name, 550000 + (ID % 90000));
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CAUTION))
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Driver Return: %s, Montana OLN %d. Prior weapons caution. Approach with cover.", Name, 550000 + (ID % 90000));
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP))
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Driver Return: %s, Montana OLN %d. Suspended driver. Citation or custodial arrest at discretion.", Name, 550000 + (ID % 90000));
		else
			snprintf(Text, 254, "MDT Driver Return: %s, Montana OLN %d. Valid driver, no active wants.", Name, 550000 + (ID % 90000));

		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CAUTION))
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_BACKUP);
		else
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_DRIVER);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 6.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

object VcmdMDTCheckWarrants : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTCheckWarrants()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtwarrant");
		SetCursor("mdtwarrant");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-932);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE) && Target->IsValid() && Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject t(Target);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED) && !v.IsParking())
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Warrant Check: Vehicle must be stopped or parked first.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Warrant Check: Vehicle must be stopped or parked first.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}

		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_WARRANT_RAN))
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_WARRANT_RAN);

		const char *Text = "MDT Warrant Check: No active warrants confirmed from current returns.";
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY)) Text = "MDT Warrant Check: Felony warrant confirmed. High-risk contact recommended.";
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT)) Text = "MDT Warrant Check: Local warrant confirmed. Arrest and transport authorized.";
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN)) Text = "MDT Warrant Check: Vehicle confirmed possible stolen. Felony stop recommended.";
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO)) Text = "MDT Warrant Check: BOLO remains active. Detain occupants until confirmed.";

		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO))
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_BACKUP);
		else
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_WARRANT);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 6.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

object VcmdMDTPullDriverOut : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTPullDriverOut()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtpullout");
		SetCursor("mdtpullout");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-933);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE) || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() == Caller->GetID() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		GameObject t(Target);
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED))
			return false;
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT))
			return true;
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE) && !t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT))
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject t(Target);
		Vehicle police(Caller);
		PersonList officers = police.GetPassengers();
		if (officers.GetNumPersons() == 0)
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Stop: Officer must be inside the police vehicle to order an occupant out.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Stop: Officer must be inside the police vehicle to order an occupant out.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}
		Person officer = officers.GetPerson(0);
		bool PullPassenger = false;
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT) && t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE) && !t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT))
			PullPassenger = true;

		officer.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &police);
		officer.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, Target, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
		officer.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Target);
		officer.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "talkto");
		officer.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
		officer.PushActionSwitchAnim(ACTION_APPEND, "idle");
		if (PullPassenger)
			officer.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_MDT_STEPOUT, Target, 1, false);
		else
			officer.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_MDT_STEPOUT, Target, 0, false);
	}
};

object DummyMDTStepOutAfterContact : CommandScript
{
	DummyMDTStepOutAfterContact()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID) { return true; }

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_PERSON || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return;

		GameObject t(Target);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		Person officer(Caller);
		bool PullPassenger = false;
		if (childID == 1)
			PullPassenger = true;

		Vector StandPos = officer.GetPosition();
		float pr[9];
		officer.GetRotation(pr[0], pr[1], pr[2], pr[3], pr[4], pr[5], pr[6], pr[7], pr[8]);
		float sx = 0.f, sy = 140.f, sz = 0.f;
		if (PullPassenger)
			sx = 120.f;
		Math::RotateVector(sx, sy, sz, pr);
		StandPos = StandPos + Vector(sx, sy, 0.f);
		Game::FindFreePosition(&officer, StandPos, 180.f);

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		if (passengers.GetNumPersons() > 0 && !PullPassenger)
		{
			Person *p = passengers.GetPerson(0);
			p->SetUserData(Target->GetID());
			p->PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			p->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, StandPos, true);
			if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY) && !p->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY)) p->AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY);
			else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT) && !p->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT)) p->AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT);
			else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN) && !p->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH)) p->AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH);
			else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP) && !p->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_SUSPENDED)) p->AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_SUSPENDED);
		}
		else
		{
			const char *CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01.e4p";
			int Choice = Target->GetID() % 12;
			if (PullPassenger)
				Choice = (Target->GetID() + 5) % 12;
			switch (Choice)
			{
				case 0: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01.e4p"; break;
				case 1: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman02_blue.e4p"; break;
				case 2: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman03_green.e4p"; break;
				case 3: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman01_red.e4p"; break;
				case 4: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman02_beige.e4p"; break;
				case 5: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwoman03_blue.e4p"; break;
				case 6: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilmanold01.e4p"; break;
				case 7: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilwomanold02.e4p"; break;
				case 8: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civildeliveryman.e4p"; break;
				case 9: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilrocker01.e4p"; break;
				case 10: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/fatman01.e4p"; break;
				default: CivilProto = "mod:Prototypes/Persons/Civil/civilman01_white.e4p"; break;
			}

			GameObject targetObj(Target);
			Vector pos = targetObj.GetPosition();
			float r[9];
			targetObj.GetRotation(r[0], r[1], r[2], r[3], r[4], r[5], r[6], r[7], r[8]);
			float dx = 0.f, dy = 125.f, dz = 0.f;
			if (PullPassenger)
				dy = -125.f;
			Math::RotateVector(dx, dy, dz, r);
			pos = pos + Vector(dx, dy, 0.f);

			const char *SpawnName = "EM4ResourceMDTDriver";
			if (PullPassenger)
				SpawnName = "EM4ResourceMDTPassenger";
			Person driver = Game::CreatePerson(CivilProto, SpawnName);
			driver.SetUserData(Target->GetID());
			driver.SetPosition(pos);
			driver.UpdatePlacement();
			driver.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, StandPos, true);
			if (!PullPassenger)
			{
				if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY) && !driver.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY)) driver.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY);
				else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT) && !driver.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT)) driver.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT);
				else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN) && !driver.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH)) driver.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH);
				else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP) && !driver.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_SUSPENDED)) driver.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_SUSPENDED);
			}
		}

		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT) && !PullPassenger)
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT);
		else if (PullPassenger && !t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT))
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT);
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_OCCUPANT_OUT))
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_OCCUPANT_OUT);

		Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_PULL);
		if (PullPassenger)
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Stop: Passenger ordered out. Await officer decision to frisk, cite, release, or arrest.", 6.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Stop: Passenger ordered out. Await officer decision to frisk, cite, release, or arrest.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		}
		else
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Stop: Driver ordered out. Await officer decision to frisk, cite, release, or arrest.", 6.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Stop: Driver ordered out. Await officer decision to frisk, cite, release, or arrest.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		}
	}
};

object VcmdMDTIssueCitation : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTIssueCitation()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtcitation");
		SetCursor("mdtcitation");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-934);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE) && Target->IsValid() && Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject t(Target);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED) && !v.IsParking())
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Citation: Vehicle must be stopped or parked first.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Citation: Vehicle must be stopped or parked first.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_RAN) && !t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_RAN))
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Citation: Run plate or driver first.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Citation: Run plate or driver first.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY))
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Citation: Citation not appropriate due to serious active flag.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Citation: Citation not appropriate due to serious active flag.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}

		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CITATION))
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CITATION);
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_TRAFFIC))
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CHARGE_TRAFFIC);

		int Fine = 100;
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_EXPIRED)) Fine = 200;
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP)) Fine = 300;
		else if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CAUTION)) Fine = 150;
		Mission::SetMoney(Mission::GetMoneyLeft() + Fine);

		char Text[180];
		snprintf(Text, 179, "MDT Citation: Citation documented. Fine processed: %d credits. Release when ready.", Fine);
		Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_CITATION);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(Text, 6.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(Text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

object VcmdMDTRequestTow : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTRequestTow()
	{
		SetIcon("mdttow");
		SetCursor("mdttow");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-935);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE) && Target->IsValid() && Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject t(Target);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED) && !v.IsParking())
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Tow: Vehicle must be stopped or parked first.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Tow: Vehicle must be stopped or parked first.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED))
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED);
		if (!t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_TOW))
			t.AssignCommand(DUMMY_MDT_TOW);
		v.ClearActions();
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 3600.f);

		Vector Spawn;
		Vector Rotate;
		ActorList l1;
		ActorList l2;
		int randomLocation = Math::rand()%4;
		switch(randomLocation)
		{
			case 0:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_SPAWN02);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_ROTATE02);
			}
			break;

			case 1:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_SPAWN06);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_ROTATE06);
			}
			break;

			case 2:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_SPAWN05);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_ROTATE05);
			}
			break;

			case 3:
			{
				l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_SPAWN09);
				l2 = Game::GetActors(VO_TOW_ROTATE09);
			}
			break;
		}

		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Spawn = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			if (l2.GetNumActors() > 0)
				Rotate = l2.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			else
				Rotate = v.GetPosition();
			Vehicle tow = Game::CreateVehicle(PROTO_MDT_TOW, "Unnamed");
			tow.SetSpeed(9.0f);
			tow.SetPlayerMP(Caller->GetPlayerMP());
			tow.SetPosition(Spawn);
			tow.UpdatePlacement();
			tow.Hide();
			tow.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Rotate);
			tow.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.0f);
			tow.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			tow.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, v.GetPosition());
		}
		else
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Tow: Tow spawn point missing. Check spawn02, spawn05, spawn06, or spawn09.", 6.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Tow: Tow spawn point missing. Check map tow spawn VO.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}

		Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_TOW);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Tow: Vehicle held. Rotation tow requested through dispatch.", 6.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Tow: Vehicle held. Rotation tow requested through dispatch.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

object VcmdMDTReleaseVehicle : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTReleaseVehicle()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtrelease");
		SetCursor("mdtrelease");
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetPriority(-936);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE) && Target->IsValid() && Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID() && Target->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		GameObject t(Target);
		Vehicle v(Target);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_TOW))
		{
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Release: Tow requested. Vehicle remains held.", 5.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Release: Tow requested. Vehicle remains held.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
			return;
		}

		bool HadOccupantOut = t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_OCCUPANT_OUT) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT) || t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT);
		bool HadCitation = t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CITATION);
		GameObjectList people = v.GetObjectsInRange(1400.f, ACTOR_PERSON);
		for (int i = 0; i < people.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = people.GetObject(i);
			Person p(obj);
			if (!p.IsValid() || p.IsArrested() || p.GetUserData() != v.GetID())
				continue;
			if (p.GetEnteredCarID() != -1)
				continue;

			p.ClearActions();
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
			if (p.HasName("EM4ResourceMDTDriver") || p.HasName("EM4ResourceMDTPassenger"))
			{
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.5f);
				p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
			}
			else
			{
				p.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
			}
		}

		v.ClearActions();
		if (HadOccupantOut)
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 10.0f);
		v.SetCommandable(false);
		v.SetSelectable(false);
		v.SetVehicleRole(VT_POLICE_GETAWAY);
		v.EnableBlueLights(false);
		v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
		if (HadOccupantOut)
			v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_APPEND);
		else
			v.PushActionReturnToBase(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_STOPPED);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_RAN)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_RAN);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_RAN)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_RAN);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_WARRANT_RAN)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_WARRANT_RAN);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CITATION)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_CITATION);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_OCCUPANT_OUT)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_OCCUPANT_OUT);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_OUT);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_OUT);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PASSENGER_POSSIBLE);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_CLEAR)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_CLEAR);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_EXPIRED)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_EXPIRED);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_STOLEN);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_PLATE_BOLO);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CLEAR)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CLEAR);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_SUSP);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CAUTION)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_CAUTION);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_WARRANT);
		if (t.HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY)) t.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_DRIVER_FELONY);

		if (HadOccupantOut)
		{
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_OCC_RETURN);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Release: Occupant released back to vehicle. Stop cleared.", 6.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Release: Occupant released back to vehicle. Stop cleared.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		}
		else if (HadCitation)
		{
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_CLEAR_CITATION);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Release: Citation issued. Vehicle released from traffic stop.", 6.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Release: Citation issued. Vehicle released from traffic stop.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		}
		else
		{
			Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_CLEAR_NOACTION);
			Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT Release: Traffic stop clear. No further action.", 6.f);
			Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT Release: Traffic stop clear. No further action.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
		}
	}
};

object VcmdMDTClearStop : CommandScript
{
	VcmdMDTClearStop()
	{
		SetIcon("mdtclear");
		SetCursor("mdtclear");
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(-937);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return Caller->IsValid() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE); }
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return Caller->IsValid() && Target->IsValid() && Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID();
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE))
			return;

		Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_MDT_ACTIVE);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_PLATE)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_PLATE);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_DRIVER)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_DRIVER);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_WARRANTS)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_WARRANTS);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CITATION)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_CITATION);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_TOW)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_TOW);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_RELEASE)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_RELEASE);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_PULL_DRIVER)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_PULL_DRIVER);
		if (Caller->HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CLEAR)) Caller->RemoveCommand(CMD_MDT_CLEAR);

		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_MOVETO)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_MOVETO); Caller->AssignCommand("MoveTo"); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_PATROL)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_PATROL); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdPatrol"); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_FOLLOW)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_FOLLOW); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdFollow"); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_EMPTYCAR)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_EMPTYCAR); Caller->AssignCommand("EmptyCar"); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_GOHOME)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_GOHOME); Caller->AssignCommand("GoHome"); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_TOPD)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_TOPD); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdToPoliceStation"); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_ADV_CUSTODY)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_ADV_CUSTODY); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess"); }
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HAD_M4)) { Caller->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HAD_M4); Caller->AssignCommand("VcmdDeployM4Officer"); }

		Audio::PlaySample(SND_MDT_CLOSE);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow("MDT: Closed. Standard vehicle commands restored.", 5.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText("MDT: Closed. Standard vehicle commands restored.", 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

object DummyMDTActive : CommandScript { DummyMDTActive() { SetGroupID(20); } bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; } bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return false; } };
```

## VehicleCommand_AdvancedCustodyProcess.script
