```cpp
const char HINT_BOOKING_TRANSPORT[]			= "Custody Process: Transport unit en route to police station for booking and processing.";
const char HINT_BOOKING[]					= "Custody Process: Subject booked. Officer requested immediate arraignment; courthouse accepted.";
const char HINT_COURT_ARRIVAL[]				= "Custody Process: Officer arrived at county courthouse with suspect. Standing by for arraignment.";
const char HINT_GENERAL_RELEASE[]			= "Court Update: Judge reviewed the booking packet. Subject released on recognizance with court date issued.";
const char HINT_GENERAL_JAIL[]				= "Court Update: Judge reviewed the booking packet. Bond set by the court. Transport to county jail pending bond.";
const char HINT_GENERAL_HOLD[]				= "Court Update: Judge ordered a temporary hold pending further review. Transport to county jail.";
const char HINT_MDT_TRAFFIC_RELEASE[]		= "Court Update: Traffic stop case reviewed. Citation and appearance date accepted; subject released on recognizance.";
const char HINT_MDT_WARRANT_JAIL[]			= "Court Update: MDT warrant case reviewed. Identity confirmed, bond set by the court, transport to county jail pending bond.";
const char HINT_MDT_NARCOTICS_JAIL[]		= "Court Update: Frisk evidence logged for narcotics offense. Bond set by the court, transport to county jail pending bond.";
const char HINT_MDT_FELONY_HOLD[]			= "Court Update: Felony traffic stop case reviewed. Judge ordered subject held pending further review. Transport to county jail.";
const char HINT_MDT_WEAPON_HOLD[]			= "Court Update: Weapon recovered during stop. Judge ordered subject held pending further review. Transport to county jail.";
const char HINT_MDT_STOLENVEH_HOLD[]		= "Court Update: Stolen vehicle case reviewed. Judge ordered subject held pending further review. Transport to county jail.";
const char HINT_MULTI_RELEASE[]				= "Court Update: Judge reviewed both booking packets. Both subjects released on recognizance with court dates issued.";
const char HINT_MULTI_JAIL[]				= "Court Update: Judge reviewed both booking packets. Bond set by the court. Transport both subjects to county jail pending bond.";
const char HINT_MULTI_HOLD[]				= "Court Update: Judge ordered both subjects temporarily held pending further review. Transport to county jail.";
const char HINT_HOMICIDE[]					= "Court Update: Probable cause found for homicide charge. Suspect remanded to county jail without release.";
const char HINT_HOMICIDE_ARMED[]			= "Court Update: Probable cause found for armed homicide charge. Suspect remanded to county jail without release.";
const char HINT_JAIL_ESCAPE_CUSTODY[]		= "County Dispatch: Jail escapee is in custody. Confirm identity, notify jail command, and transport under guard.";
const char HINT_JAIL[]						= "Custody Process: Subject received at county jail. Custody process complete.";
const char HINT_NO_VO[]						= "Custody Process: Required court or jail virtual object is missing.";

const int CUSTODY_STATE_BOOKED				= 1;
const int CUSTODY_STATE_COURT				= 2;
const int CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL				= 3;
const int CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI			= 4;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE			= 10;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL				= 11;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD				= 12;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE			= 13;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED	= 14;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE_MULTI		= 15;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_MULTI		= 16;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD_MULTI		= 17;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_MULTI	= 18;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED_MULTI	= 19;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE		= 20;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_MULTI	= 25;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE	= 26;
const int CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE_MULTI	= 27;
const int CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT01				= 21;
const int CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT02				= 22;
const int CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT03				= 23;
const int CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT_FALLBACK		= 24;
const int CUSTODY_PD_SLOT01					= 31;
const int CUSTODY_PD_SLOT02					= 32;
const int CUSTODY_PD_SLOT03					= 33;

object DummyAdvancedCustodyCourtActor : CommandScript
{
	DummyAdvancedCustodyCourtActor()
	{
		SetGroupID(32);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return;

		Person p(Caller);
		Vehicle v(Target);

		if (childID == 1)
		{
			if (v.GetUserData() == 0)
			{
				Vector pos = p.GetPosition();
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_COURT_ENTRY);
				if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
					pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

				Game::FindFreePosition(&p, pos, 80.f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, pos);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 8.0f);
				p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
			}
			else
			{
				p.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
				Vector walkinPos = p.GetPosition();
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_COURT_WALKIN);
				if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
					walkinPos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

				Vector targetPos = v.GetTargetPoint(&p, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, walkinPos, true);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, targetPos);
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_COURT_ACTOR, &v, 3, false);
			}
		}
		else if (childID == 2)
		{
			Vector walkinPos = p.GetPosition();
			ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_COURT_WALKIN);
			if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				walkinPos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

			Vector targetPos = v.GetTargetPoint(&p, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, walkinPos, true);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, targetPos);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
			p.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
		}
		else if (childID == 3)
		{
			p.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
			v.AddTransport(&p);

			if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI)
			{
				PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
				if (transports.GetNumPersons() < 2)
					return;
			}

			v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 8.0f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ADV_CUSTODY, &v, 0, false);
		}
		else if (childID == 4)
		{
			p.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_COURT);
			Vector targetPos = v.GetTargetPoint(&p, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, targetPos);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_COURT_ACTOR, &v, 6, false);
		}
		else if (childID == 5)
		{
			Vector targetPos = v.GetTargetPoint(&p, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, targetPos);
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
			p.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
		}
		else if (childID == 6)
		{
			p.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_COURT);
			v.AddTransport(&p);
		}
		else if (childID == 7)
		{
			if (Mission::HasObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE))
			{
				Mission::SetObjectiveAccomplished(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE, true);
				Mission::RemoveObjective(JAIL_ESCAPE_OBJECTIVE);
			}
		}
	}
};

object VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess : CommandScript
{
	VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess()
	{
		SetIcon("VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess");
		SetCursor("VcmdAdvancedCustodyProcess");
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(-900);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		return Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		return Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID())
			return false;

		return Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);

		if (childID == 1)
		{
			MarkBooked(v);
			v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_COURT);
			Notify(SND_BOOKING, HINT_BOOKING);
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 18.0f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ADV_CUSTODY, &v, 0, false);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 2)
		{
			ProcessCourtDecision(v);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 3)
		{
			CompleteJailIntake(v);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 4)
		{
			StartCourtAppearance(v);
			return;
		}

		if (childID == 5)
		{
			StartBookingAppearance(v);
			return;
		}

		if (NeedsJail(v))
			SendToJail(v);
		else if (NeedsCourt(v))
			SendToCourt(v);
		else if (v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
		{
			DisableEmergencySignals(v);
			SendToBooking(v);
		}
		else
			Mission::PlayHint("Custody Process: No transported suspect in this vehicle.");
	}

	void SendToBooking(Vehicle v)
	{
		const char *ParkVO = GetPoliceStationVO();
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, "") == 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_VO);
			return;
		}

		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(ParkVO);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() == 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_VO);
			return;
		}

		Vector pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		Notify(SND_BOOKING_TRANSPORT, HINT_BOOKING_TRANSPORT);
		v.SetUserData(GetPoliceStationSlot(ParkVO));
		Game::FindFreePosition(&v, pos);
		v.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, pos);
		PushTurnToVO(v, VO_PD_TURNTO);
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ADV_CUSTODY, &v, 5, false);
	}

	void SendToCourt(Vehicle v)
	{
		const char *ParkVO = GetCourtVO();
		const char *TurnVO = GetCourtTurnToVO(ParkVO);
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, "") == 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_VO);
			return;
		}

		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(ParkVO);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() == 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_VO);
			return;
		}

		Vector pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		v.SetUserData(GetCourtSlot(ParkVO));
		Game::FindFreePosition(&v, pos);
		v.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, pos);
		PushTurnToVO(v, TurnVO);
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ADV_CUSTODY, &v, 4, false);
	}

	void SendToJail(Vehicle v)
	{
		const char *ParkVO = GetJailVO();
		const char *TurnVO = GetJailTurnToVO(ParkVO);
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, "") == 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_VO);
			return;
		}

		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(ParkVO);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() == 0)
		{
			Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NO_VO);
			return;
		}

		Vector pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		Game::FindFreePosition(&v, pos);
		v.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, pos);
		PushTurnToVO(v, TurnVO);
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.0f);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ADV_CUSTODY, &v, 3, false);
	}

	void MarkBooked(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (IsJailEscapeSuspect(p) && !p.HasCommand(CMD_JAIL_ESCAPE_CUSTODY))
			{
				p.AssignCommand(CMD_JAIL_ESCAPE_CUSTODY);
				Notify(SND_JAIL_ESCAPE_CUSTODY, HINT_JAIL_ESCAPE_CUSTODY);
			}
			p.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_COURT);
		}
	}

	void StartBookingAppearance(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		if (transports.GetNumPersons() == 0)
			return;

		int suspectCount = transports.GetNumPersons();
		if (suspectCount > 2)
			suspectCount = 2;

		Vector baseSuspectEntryPos = GetPoliceStationBookingEntryPosition(v);
		Vector officerEntryPos = GetPoliceStationBookingEntryPosition(v) + Vector(45.f, 45.f, 0.f);

		for (int i = 0; i < suspectCount; i++)
		{
			Person suspect = transports.GetPerson(i);
			Vector suspectEntryPos = baseSuspectEntryPos + Vector(35.f * i, -35.f * i, 0.f);

			suspect.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_COURT);
			suspect.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			suspect.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f + (1.0f * i));
			Game::FindFreePosition(&suspect, suspectEntryPos, 80.f);
			suspect.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, suspectEntryPos, true);
			suspect.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, true);
			suspect.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 14.0f);
			suspect.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			suspect.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_COURT_ACTOR, &v, 4, false);
		}

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		if (passengers.GetNumPersons() > 0)
		{
			Person officer = passengers.GetPerson(0);
			officer.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			officer.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			Game::FindFreePosition(&officer, officerEntryPos, 80.f);
			officer.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, officerEntryPos, true);
			officer.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, true);
			officer.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 14.0f);
			officer.PushActionShowHide(ACTION_APPEND, false);
			officer.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_COURT_ACTOR, &v, 5, false);
		}

		if (suspectCount > 1)
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 26.0f);
		else
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 12.0f);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ADV_CUSTODY, &v, 1, false);
	}

	void StartCourtAppearance(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		if (transports.GetNumPersons() == 0)
			return;

		int suspectCount = transports.GetNumPersons();
		if (suspectCount > 2)
			suspectCount = 2;

		bool hasHomicide = false;
		bool hasArmedHomicide = false;
		bool hasJailEscape = false;
		bool hasJailEscapeHomicide = false;
		for (int h = 0; h < suspectCount; h++)
		{
			Person checkSuspect = transports.GetPerson(h);
			if (IsJailEscapeHomicideConfession(checkSuspect))
				hasJailEscapeHomicide = true;
			if (IsJailEscapeSuspect(checkSuspect))
				hasJailEscape = true;
			if (IsKnownHomicide(checkSuspect))
			{
				hasHomicide = true;
				if (checkSuspect.HasCommand(CMD_HOMICIDE_ARMED))
					hasArmedHomicide = true;
			}
		}

		int outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE;
		if (hasJailEscapeHomicide)
			outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE;
		else if (hasJailEscape)
			outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE;
		else if (hasArmedHomicide)
			outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED;
		else if (hasHomicide)
			outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE;
		else if (HasAnyMDTCharge(v))
			outcome = GetMDTOutcome(v);
		else
		{
			Person firstSuspect = transports.GetPerson(0);
			outcome = GetCourtOutcome(firstSuspect);
		}
		if (suspectCount > 1)
		{
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE)
				outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE_MULTI;
			else if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL)
				outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_MULTI;
			else if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD)
				outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD_MULTI;
			else if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE)
				outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_MULTI;
			else if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED)
				outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED_MULTI;
			else if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE)
				outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_MULTI;
			else if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE)
				outcome = CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE_MULTI;
		}
		v.SetUserData(outcome);

		Notify(SND_COURT_ARRIVAL, HINT_COURT_ARRIVAL);

		Vector suspectPos = GetCourtSuspectPosition(v);
		Vector officerPos = GetCourtOfficerPosition(v);
		Vector walkinPos = GetCourtWalkInPosition(v);

		for (int i = 0; i < suspectCount; i++)
		{
			Person suspect = transports.GetPerson(i);
			Vector thisSuspectPos = suspectPos + Vector(35.f * i, -35.f * i, 0.f);

			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE_MULTI)
				suspect.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_BOOKED);
			else
				suspect.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);

			suspect.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			suspect.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f + (1.0f * i));
			suspect.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, walkinPos, true);
			suspect.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, thisSuspectPos, true);
			PushPersonTurnToVO(suspect, VO_COURT_JUDGE);
			suspect.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 32.0f);
			suspect.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_COURT_ACTOR, &v, 1, false);
		}

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		if (passengers.GetNumPersons() > 0)
		{
			Person officer = passengers.GetPerson(0);
			officer.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			officer.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			officer.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, walkinPos, true);
			officer.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, officerPos, true);
			PushPersonTurnToVO(officer, VO_COURT_JUDGE);
			officer.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 39.0f);
			officer.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_COURT_ACTOR, &v, 2, false);
		}

		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 30.0f);
		v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_ADV_CUSTODY, &v, 2, false);
	}

	void ProcessCourtDecision(Vehicle v)
	{
		int outcome = v.GetUserData();

		if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_MULTI || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED_MULTI)
		{
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED_MULTI)
				Notify(SND_COURT_HOMICIDE, HINT_HOMICIDE_ARMED);
			else
				Notify(SND_COURT_HOMICIDE, HINT_HOMICIDE);

			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_MULTI || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED_MULTI)
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI);
			else
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
			return;
		}

		if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE_MULTI)
		{
			Notify(SND_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE_COURT, GetJailEscapeHomicideCourtHint(v));
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_HOMICIDE_MULTI)
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI);
			else
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
			return;
		}

		if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_MULTI)
		{
			Notify(SND_JAIL_ESCAPE_COURT, GetJailEscapeCourtHint(v));
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_ESCAPE_MULTI)
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI);
			else
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
			return;
		}

		if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE_MULTI)
		{
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE_MULTI)
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_RELEASE, HINT_MULTI_RELEASE);
			else if (HasAnyMDTCharge(v))
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_RELEASE, GetMDTCourtHint(v));
			else
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_RELEASE, HINT_GENERAL_RELEASE);
			v.SetUserData(0);
		}
		else if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL || outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_MULTI)
		{
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_MULTI)
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_JAIL, HINT_MULTI_JAIL);
			else if (HasAnyMDTCharge(v))
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_JAIL, GetMDTCourtHint(v));
			else
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_JAIL, HINT_GENERAL_JAIL);
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL_MULTI)
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI);
			else
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
		}
		else
		{
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD_MULTI)
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_HOLD, HINT_MULTI_HOLD);
			else if (HasAnyMDTCharge(v))
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_HOLD, GetMDTCourtHint(v));
			else
				Notify(SND_COURT_GENERAL_HOLD, HINT_GENERAL_HOLD);
			if (outcome == CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD_MULTI)
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI);
			else
				v.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
		}
	}

	int GetCourtOutcome(Person suspect)
	{
		if (IsKnownHomicide(suspect))
		{
			if (suspect.HasCommand(CMD_HOMICIDE_ARMED))
				return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE_ARMED;
			return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOMICIDE;
		}

		if (suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY) || suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH) || suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON))
			return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD;
		if (suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT) || suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS) || suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENPROP) || suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_FALSEID))
			return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL;
		if (suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_SUSPENDED) || suspect.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_TRAFFIC))
			return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE;

		int result = Math::rand() % 5;
		if (result == 0)
			return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE;
		if (result <= 2)
			return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL;
		return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD;
	}

	void RequireJail(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			p.SetUserData(CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL);
		}
	}

	void ReleaseAtCourt(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_COURT_ENTRY);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		Game::FindFreePosition(&v, pos, 80.f);

		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			p.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, pos);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 8.0f);
			p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
		}

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		for (int j = 0; j < passengers.GetNumPersons(); j++)
		{
			Person officer = passengers.GetPerson(j);
			if (officer.GetEnteredCarID() == -1)
				officer.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
		}
	}

	void CompleteJailIntake(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_JAIL_ENTRY);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			bool jailEscapee = IsJailEscapeSuspect(p);
			p.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, pos, true);
			if (jailEscapee)
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_COURT_ACTOR, &v, 7, false);
			p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
		}

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		for (int j = 0; j < passengers.GetNumPersons(); j++)
		{
			Person p = passengers.GetPerson(j);
			if (p.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL)
			{
				p.PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, &v);
				p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, pos, true);
				p.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
			}
		}

		Notify(SND_JAIL, HINT_JAIL);
		v.SetUserData(0);
	}

	bool NeedsCourt(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_STATE_COURT)
			return true;

		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (p.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_STATE_COURT)
				return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	bool NeedsJail(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL || v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL_MULTI)
			return true;

		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (p.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_STATE_JAIL)
				return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	bool HasAnyMDTCharge(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_TRAFFIC) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_SUSPENDED) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT))
				return true;
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS))
				return true;
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENPROP) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_FALSEID))
				return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	const char *GetMDTCourtHint(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH))
				return HINT_MDT_STOLENVEH_HOLD;
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY))
				return HINT_MDT_FELONY_HOLD;
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON))
				return HINT_MDT_WEAPON_HOLD;
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT))
				return HINT_MDT_WARRANT_JAIL;
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS))
				return HINT_MDT_NARCOTICS_JAIL;
		}

		return HINT_MDT_TRAFFIC_RELEASE;
	}

	int GetMDTOutcome(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_FELONY) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENVEH) || p.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WEAPON))
				return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_HOLD;
		}

		for (int j = 0; j < transports.GetNumPersons(); j++)
		{
			Person q = transports.GetPerson(j);
			if (q.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_WARRANT) || q.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_NARCOTICS) || q.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_STOLENPROP) || q.HasCommand(CMD_MDT_CHARGE_FALSEID))
				return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_JAIL;
		}

		return CUSTODY_OUTCOME_RELEASE;
	}

	bool IsKnownHomicide(Person p)
	{
		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_HOMICIDE_SUSPECT))
			return true;
		if (p.HasName("EM4ResourceHomicideSuspect"))
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	bool IsJailEscapeSuspect(Person p)
	{
		if (p.HasCommand(CMD_JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT))
			return true;
		if (p.HasName(JAIL_ESCAPE_SUSPECT_NAME))
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	bool IsJailEscapeHomicideConfession(Person p)
	{
		if (IsJailEscapeSuspect(p) && p.HasCommand(CMD_JAIL_ESCAPE_CONFESSION))
			return true;
		return false;
	}

	int GetJailEscapeCase(Person p)
	{
		for (int i = 0; i < 20; i++)
		{
			char Cmd[64];
			snprintf(Cmd, 63, "DummyJailEscapeCase%.2d", i);
			if (p.HasCommand(Cmd))
				return i;
		}

		return 19;
	}

	const char *GetJailEscapeCourtHint(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (IsJailEscapeSuspect(p))
				return GetJailEscapeCourtHintByCase(GetJailEscapeCase(p));
		}

		return "Court Update: County jail escapee identified. Prior sentence and escape charge confirmed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
	}

	const char *GetJailEscapeHomicideCourtHint(Vehicle v)
	{
		PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p = transports.GetPerson(i);
			if (IsJailEscapeHomicideConfession(p))
				return GetJailEscapeHomicideCourtHintByCase(GetJailEscapeCase(p));
		}

		return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior sentence, new escape charge, and homicide confession documented. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
	}

	const char *GetJailEscapeHomicideCourtHintByCase(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior aggravated assault and escape history confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 1: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior burglary and criminal endangerment confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 2: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior felony theft and probation violation confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 3: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior drug distribution and resisting arrest confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 4: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior armed robbery confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 5: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior vehicle theft and failure to appear confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 6: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior fraud, felony theft, and eluding confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 7: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior domestic assault and protection order violation confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 8: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior aggravated burglary and assault with bodily injury confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 9: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior felony DUI and vehicular assault confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 10: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior arson and felony criminal mischief confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 11: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior embezzlement and custodial interference confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 12: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior assault with a weapon and witness intimidation confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 13: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior possession with intent and resisting arrest confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 14: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior burglary and criminal trespass confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 15: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior attempted kidnapping and obstruction confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 16: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior homicide-related offense and staff assault confirmed. New escape charge and additional homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 17: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior forgery, theft, and bail jumping confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 18: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior felony eluding and reckless endangerment confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
		}

		return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior parole violation and felony theft confirmed. New escape charge and homicide confession added to court packet. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
	}

	const char *GetJailEscapeCourtHintByCase(int CaseID)
	{
		switch (CaseID)
		{
			case 0: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include aggravated assault on a peace officer and felony escape attempt. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 1: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include burglary and criminal endangerment. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 2: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include felony theft and probation violation. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 3: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include drug distribution and resisting arrest. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 4: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior conviction for armed robbery confirmed. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 5: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include vehicle theft and failure to appear. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 6: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include fraud, felony theft, and eluding. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 7: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include domestic assault and violation of protection order. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 8: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include aggravated burglary and assault with bodily injury. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 9: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include felony DUI and vehicular assault. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 10: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include arson and felony criminal mischief. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 11: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include embezzlement and custodial interference. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 12: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include assault with a weapon and witness intimidation. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 13: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include possession with intent and resisting arrest. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 14: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include burglary and criminal trespass. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 15: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include attempted kidnapping and obstruction. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 16: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior homicide-related conviction and assault on staff confirmed. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 17: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include forgery, theft, and bail jumping. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
			case 18: return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include felony eluding and reckless endangerment. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
		}

		return "Court Update: Jail escapee identified. Prior convictions include parole violation and felony theft. New escape charge filed. Subject remanded to county jail without release.";
	}

	const char *GetPoliceStationVO()
	{
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_PD_PARK01))
			return VO_PD_PARK01;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_PD_PARK02))
			return VO_PD_PARK02;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_PD_PARK03))
			return VO_PD_PARK03;
		return "";
	}

	int GetPoliceStationSlot(const char *ParkVO)
	{
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_PD_PARK01) == 0)
			return CUSTODY_PD_SLOT01;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_PD_PARK02) == 0)
			return CUSTODY_PD_SLOT02;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_PD_PARK03) == 0)
			return CUSTODY_PD_SLOT03;
		return CUSTODY_PD_SLOT01;
	}

	const char *GetPoliceStationOfficerVO(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_PD_SLOT01)
			return VO_PD_OFFICER01;
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_PD_SLOT02)
			return VO_PD_OFFICER02;
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_PD_SLOT03)
			return VO_PD_OFFICER03;
		return VO_PD_OFFICER;
	}

	const char *GetPoliceStationSuspectVO(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_PD_SLOT01)
			return VO_PD_SUSPECT01;
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_PD_SLOT02)
			return VO_PD_SUSPECT02;
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_PD_SLOT03)
			return VO_PD_SUSPECT03;
		return VO_PD_SUSPECT;
	}

	Vector GetPoliceStationOfficerPosition(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(GetPoliceStationOfficerVO(v));
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		return pos;
	}

	Vector GetPoliceStationSuspectPosition(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(GetPoliceStationSuspectVO(v));
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		return pos;
	}

	Vector GetPoliceStationBookingEntryPosition(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		ActorList entry = Game::GetActors(VO_PD_BOOKING_ENTRY);
		if (entry.GetNumActors() > 0)
			return entry.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

		ActorList suspect = Game::GetActors(GetPoliceStationSuspectVO(v));
		if (suspect.GetNumActors() > 0)
			return suspect.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

		ActorList officer = Game::GetActors(GetPoliceStationOfficerVO(v));
		if (officer.GetNumActors() > 0)
			return officer.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

		return pos;
	}

	const char *GetCourtVO()
	{
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_COURT_PARK01))
			return VO_COURT_PARK01;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_COURT_PARK02))
			return VO_COURT_PARK02;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_COURT_PARK03))
			return VO_COURT_PARK03;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_COURT_PARK))
			return VO_COURT_PARK;
		return "";
	}

	const char *GetCourtTurnToVO(const char *ParkVO)
	{
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK01) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_TURNTO01;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK02) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_TURNTO02;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK03) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_TURNTO03;
		return VO_COURT_TURNTO;
	}

	const char *GetCourtWalkInVO(const char *ParkVO)
	{
		return VO_COURT_WALKIN;
	}

	int GetCourtSlot(const char *ParkVO)
	{
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK01) == 0)
			return CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT01;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK02) == 0)
			return CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT02;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK03) == 0)
			return CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT03;
		return CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT_FALLBACK;
	}

	const char *GetCourtOfficerVO(const char *ParkVO)
	{
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK01) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_OFFICER01;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK02) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_OFFICER02;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK03) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_OFFICER03;
		return VO_COURT_OFFICER;
	}

	const char *GetCourtSuspectVO(const char *ParkVO)
	{
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK01) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_SUSPECT01;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK02) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_SUSPECT02;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_COURT_PARK03) == 0)
			return VO_COURT_SUSPECT03;
		return VO_COURT_SUSPECT;
	}

	Vector GetCourtOfficerPosition(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		const char *ParkVO = GetStoredCourtParkVO(v);
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(GetCourtOfficerVO(ParkVO));
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		return pos;
	}

	Vector GetCourtSuspectPosition(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		const char *ParkVO = GetStoredCourtParkVO(v);
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(GetCourtSuspectVO(ParkVO));
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		return pos;
	}

	Vector GetCourtWalkInPosition(Vehicle v)
	{
		Vector pos = v.GetPosition();
		const char *ParkVO = GetStoredCourtParkVO(v);
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(GetCourtWalkInVO(ParkVO));
		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		return pos;
	}

	const char *GetStoredCourtParkVO(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT01)
			return VO_COURT_PARK01;
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT02)
			return VO_COURT_PARK02;
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT03)
			return VO_COURT_PARK03;
		if (v.GetUserData() == CUSTODY_COURT_SLOT_FALLBACK)
			return VO_COURT_PARK;
		return GetCurrentCourtParkVO(v);
	}

	const char *GetCurrentCourtParkVO(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_COURT_PARK01))
			return VO_COURT_PARK01;
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_COURT_PARK02))
			return VO_COURT_PARK02;
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_COURT_PARK03))
			return VO_COURT_PARK03;
		return VO_COURT_PARK;
	}

	const char *GetJailVO()
	{
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_JAIL_PARK01))
			return VO_JAIL_PARK01;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_JAIL_PARK02))
			return VO_JAIL_PARK02;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_JAIL_PARK03))
			return VO_JAIL_PARK03;
		if (IsFreeVO(VO_JAIL_PARK))
			return VO_JAIL_PARK;
		return "";
	}

	const char *GetJailTurnToVO(const char *ParkVO)
	{
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_JAIL_PARK01) == 0)
			return VO_JAIL_TURNTO01;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_JAIL_PARK02) == 0)
			return VO_JAIL_TURNTO02;
		if (StrCompare(ParkVO, VO_JAIL_PARK03) == 0)
			return VO_JAIL_TURNTO03;
		return VO_JAIL_TURNTO;
	}

	bool IsFreeVO(const char *vo)
	{
		GameObjectList blockers;
		Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(vo, blockers, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		if (blockers.GetNumObjects() > 0)
			return false;

		ActorList actors = Game::GetActors(vo);
		if (actors.GetNumActors() == 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	void PushTurnToVO(Vehicle v, const char *vo)
	{
		ActorList turnList = Game::GetActors(vo);
		if (turnList.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Vector turnPos = turnList.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, turnPos);
		}
	}

	void PushPersonTurnToVO(Person p, const char *vo)
	{
		ActorList turnList = Game::GetActors(vo);
		if (turnList.GetNumActors() > 0)
		{
			Vector turnPos = turnList.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
			p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, turnPos);
		}
	}

	void DisableEmergencySignals(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled())
			v.EnableBlueLights(false);

		v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
		v.EnableSpecialLights(false);

		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &v, &v);
	}

	void Notify(const char *sound, const char *text)
	{
		Audio::PlaySample(sound);
		Mission::PlayHint(text);
		Game::ShowHelpTextWindow(text, 6.f);
		Mission::ShowMessageTickerText(text, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f);
	}
};

```

## VehicleCommand_ATFUnit.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.0#
//
// 		Includes: FBI Command Vehicle commands
//
//	- VcmdATFDeploy
//	- VcmdATFUnDeploy
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

int DummyGroup = 28;

object VcmdATFDeploy : CommandScript
{
 	VcmdATFDeploy()
 	{
 		SetIcon("install");
 		SetCursor("install");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
 		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(100);
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 		{
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 		{
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return true;
 	}
 
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 4.0f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdATFDeploy", Caller, 1, false);
			v.SetCommandable(false);
			v.SetAnimation("Install");
			v.RemoveCommand("VcmdATFDeploy");
			v.AssignCommand("VcmdATFUnDeploy");
			v.RemoveCommand("MoveTo");
			v.RemoveCommand("GoHome");
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			v.SetCommandable(true);
			v.EnableSpecialLights(true);
		}
	}
};

object VcmdATFUndeploy : CommandScript
{
 	VcmdATFUndeploy()
 	{
 		SetIcon("deinstall");
		SetCursor("deinstall");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
 		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(100);
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 		{
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 		{
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return true;
 	}
 
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (childID == 0)
		{
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 4.0f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "VcmdATFUndeploy", Caller, 1, false);
			v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
			v.SetCommandable(false);
			v.SetAnimation("Deinstall");
		}
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			v.AssignCommand("VcmdATFDeploy");
			v.RemoveCommand("VcmdATFUnDeploy");
			v.AssignCommand("MoveTo");
			v.AssignCommand("GoHome");
			v.SetCommandable(true);
		}
 	}	
};
```

```cpp
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";

	}
```
