```cpp
const char PROTO_CV_UMPC[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_impala_unit20.e4p";
const char PROTO_CV_LAAP[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mppd_unmarked_cvpi.e4p";
const char PROTO_CV_LAPP[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_tahoe.e4p";
const char PROTO_LAPP_CAPRICE[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_caprice.e4p";
const char PROTO_CV_CHP[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/mhp_taurus.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHP_CAPRICE[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_umpc.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHP_CAPRICE89[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_cvpi.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHP_CHARGER15_SLICK[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_traffic_cvpi.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHP_LTD91[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_explorer.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHP_MUSTANG[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/bcso_traffic_tahoe.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHP_COMMAND[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/atf_mcp.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHP_DIPLOMAT[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/usparkranger_f150.e4p";
const char PROTO_CV_LASD[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/montana_wildlife_f150.e4p";
const char PROTO_LASD_CAPRICE[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/lasd_caprice.e4p";
const char PROTO_LASD_VAN[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/lasd_van.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHARGER_CHP[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/dodge_charger_chp.e4p";
const char PROTO_CHARGER_LAPD[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/dodge_charger_lapd.e4p";
const char PROTO_SUV_LAPD[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/suv_lapd.e4p";
const char PROTO_RESCUE01[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/rescue_truck01_lapd.e4p";
const char PROTO_SWAT_TRUCK[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_truck.e4p";
const char PROTO_WATERCANNON[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/swat_armoured_vehicle.e4p";
const char PROTO_BOMB_SQUAD[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/suv_bomb_squad.e4p";
const char PROTO_HEAVY_RESCUE[] = "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/mpfd_expedition_s1.e4p";

int DummyGroup = 23;

object VcmdSiren : CommandScript
{
	VcmdSiren()
	{
		SetIcon("sirenson");
		SetCursor("sirens");
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPossibleCallers(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;
		SetIcon("sirenson");
		if (Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))		SetIcon("sirensoff");
		if (!Caller->IsBlueLightEnabled() && Caller->HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
			Game::ExecuteCommand("DummyDisableSiren", Caller, Caller);
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
		{
			if (!v.IsBlueLightEnabled())
				v.EnableBlueLights(true);

			int soundID;
			Vector CarPos = v.GetPosition();
			if (v.HasCommand("DummySiren480K"))
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/480K/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/480K/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
			else if (v.HasCommand("DummySiren80K"))
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/80K/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/80K/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
			else if (v.HasCommand("DummySirenMotorola"))
			{
				switch(rand()%4)
				{
					case 0 :	soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);	break;
					case 1 : 	soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Siren03.wav", CarPos, true);	break;
					case 2 :
					{
						if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Wail with mechanical hilo.wav", CarPos, true);
						else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Wail.wav", CarPos, true);
					}
					break;
					case 3 : 	soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Yelp.wav", CarPos, true);		break;
				}
			}
			else if (v.HasCommand("DummySirenMotorolaAirhorn"))
			{
				switch(rand()%3)
				{
					case 0 :	soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Siren01 airhorn.wav", CarPos, true);	break;
					case 1 : 	soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);			break;
					case 2 : 	soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Motorola/Wail airhorn.wav", CarPos, true);		break;
				}
			}
			else if (v.HasCommand("DummySirenOmega"))
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Omega/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Omega/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
			else if (v.HasCommand("DummySirenTouchmaster"))
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Touchmaster/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Touchmaster/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
			else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_AMBULANCE06) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_BCV3) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CRASHTENDER) == 0)
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA20/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA20/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
			else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_USAR) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_FOAMCARRIER) == 0)
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA20/Siren01 airhorn.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA20/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
			else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CV_LASD) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_LASD_CAPRICE) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA2) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_MCU01) == 0)
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA4000/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA4000/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
			else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_LASD_VAN) == 0)
			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Vcon/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else 					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Vcon/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
			}
 			else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_USFS01) == 0 || 
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_USFS02) == 0)
 			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA300/Siren01 alternate.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA300/Siren02 alternate.wav", CarPos, true);
 			}
			else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_HES) == 0)
				soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/Touchmaster/Siren02 lacofd.wav", CarPos, true);
 			else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CV_CHP) == 0 ||
 			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CHP_CAPRICE) == 0 ||
 			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CHP_MUSTANG) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CHP_CAPRICE89) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CHP_CHARGER15_SLICK) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CHP_DIPLOMAT) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CHP_COMMAND) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CHP_LTD91) == 0)
 			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA500/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA500/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
 			}
 			else if(StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA1) == 0 ||
 			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA7) == 0 ||
 			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA3) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA4) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA8) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA5) == 0 ||
			StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_EXTRA6) == 0)
 			{
				if (rand()%2 == 0)		soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA500/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
				else					soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA500/Siren02.wav", CarPos, true);
 			}
			else if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_SWR) == 0)
				soundID = Audio::PlaySample3D("mod:Audio/FX/Sirens/PA1000/Siren01.wav", CarPos, true);
			int CarID = v.GetID();
			GameObject mDummy =  Game::CreateObject("mod:Prototypes/Objects/Misc/empty.e4p", NAME_DUMMYOBJECT);
			v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN);
			v.SetUserData(soundID);
			mDummy.Hide();
			//mDummy.SetUserData(v.GetID());
			mDummy.SetUserData(soundID);
			mDummy.AttachSound(soundID);
			mDummy.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_UPDATEPOS, &v, 0, false);
			return;
		}

		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
		{
			System::Log("Stop sample via VcmdSiren");
			if (childID == 1)
				v.EnableBlueLights(false);
			int CarID = v.GetUserData();
			int ref = v.GetUserData();
			v.UnattachSound(ref);
			Audio::StopSample(ref);
			int mSirTest;
			GameObjectList list = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_DUMMYOBJECT);
			for(int i=0; i<list.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject *obj = list.GetObject(i);
				if (obj->GetUserData() == CarID)
					mSirTest = i;
			}
			GameObject *obj = list.GetObject(mSirTest);
			obj->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);

			if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
				v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN);

			return;
		}
	}
};

object DummySiren480K : CommandScript
{
	DummySiren480K()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

object DummySiren80K : CommandScript
{
	DummySiren80K()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

object DummySirenMotorola : CommandScript
{
	DummySirenMotorola()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

object DummySirenMotorolaAirhorn : CommandScript
{
	DummySirenMotorolaAirhorn()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

object DummySirenOmega : CommandScript
{
	DummySirenOmega()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

object DummySirenTouchmaster : CommandScript
{
	DummySirenTouchmaster()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

object DummyUpdatePos : CommandScript
{
	DummyUpdatePos()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

  	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target);
		GameObject mDummy(Caller);

		if (v.IsDestroyed() || !v.IsValid())
		{
			int ref = mDummy.GetUserData();
			mDummy.UnattachSound(ref);
			Audio::StopSample(ref);

			if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
				v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN);

			mDummy.PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
		} else
		  {
			if (v.IsCurrentAction(EACTION_FINDPATH))
			{
				if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH))
				{
					v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH);
				}
			}
			Vector vPos = v.GetPosition();
			mDummy.SetPosition(vPos);
			mDummy.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_UPDATEPOS, Target, childID, false);
		  }

		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH))
		{
			if (!v.IsCurrentAction(EACTION_FINDPATH) && (v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF) || v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF_OLD)) && (v.GetNumActions() == 0 || v.IsCurrentAction(EACTION_EXTINGUISH)))
			{
				if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
					v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN);

				if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH))
					v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH);

				int CarID = v.GetUserData();
				int ref = v.GetUserData();
				v.UnattachSound(ref);
				Audio::StopSample(ref);

				GameObjectList list = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_DUMMYOBJECT);
				for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumObjects(); i++)
				{
					int mSirTest;
					GameObject *obj = list.GetObject(i);
					if (obj->GetUserData() == CarID)
					{
						mSirTest = i;
						GameObject *obj = list.GetObject(mSirTest);
						obj->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);
						if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
							v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN);
						if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH))
							v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH);
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyDisableSiren : CommandScript
{
	DummyDisableSiren()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

  	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			v.EnableBlueLights(false);
		}

		//int CarID = v.GetID();
		int CarID = v.GetUserData();
		int ref = v.GetUserData();
		v.UnattachSound(ref);
		Audio::StopSample(ref);

		GameObjectList list = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_DUMMYOBJECT);
		for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumObjects(); i++)
		{
			GameObject *obj = list.GetObject(i);
			if (obj->GetUserData() == CarID)
			{
				int mSirTest = i;

				GameObject *obj = list.GetObject(mSirTest);
				obj->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_NEWLIST);

				if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
					v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN);
				if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH))
					v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_FINDPATH);
				if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_GETTIL))
					v.SetUserData(v.GetID());
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyFindPath : CommandScript
{
	DummyFindPath()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

object DummyHasSiren : CommandScript
{
	DummyHasSiren()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}
};

```

## VehicleCommand_StandbyVehicle.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.0#
//
// 		Includes: All Automatic Sirens commands
//
//	- VcmdStandbyOn
//	- VcmdStandbyOff
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//    Mofied by Xplorer4x4
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_STANDBY_ON[]			= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char SND_STANDBY[] 			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/1023.wav";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[] 			= "DummyPatrol";
const char DUMMY_DISABLE[] 			= "DummyDisableSiren";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[] 			= "DummyHasSiren";
const char DUMMY_HOSESON[] 			= "DummyHosesAreOn";
const char DUMMY_TILLERGOHOME[]		= "DummyTillerGoHome";
const char VO_SQUAD01[]				= "fs_squad01";
const char VO_SQUAD02[]				= "policestation_mppd";
const char VO_SQUAD03[]				= "policestation_mhp";
const char VO_SQUAD04[]				= "policestation_bcso";
const char VO_SQUAD05[]				= "hospital_squad01";
const char VO_SQUAD06[]				= "policestation_uspr";
const char VO_BATTALION[]			= "fs_battalion";

int DummyGroup = 28;

object VcmdStandbyOn : CommandScript
{
	VcmdStandbyOn()
	{
		SetIcon("standbyon");
		SetCursor("standbyon");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;

 		if (Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return false;

 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD04) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD05) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD06) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_BATTALION) || v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSESON) || v.IsInstalled())
			return false;
		if (v.IsCurrentAction("EActionCrossBridge") || v.IsCurrentAction("EActioninstall") || v.IsCurrentAction("EActionloadup") || v.IsCurrentAction("EActionUnload") || v.IsCurrentAction("EActionDropWithCrane") || !v.HasCommand("MoveTo"))
			return false;
 
 		return true;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true;

 		return true;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 0.1f);
		v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
		v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
		if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_TILLERGOHOME))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_TILLERGOHOME);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF))
			Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_DISABLE, &v, &v);
		if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled())
			v.EnableBlueLights(false);

			v.EnableHeadLights(false);
		Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_STANDBY, v.GetPosition(), false); 
	}
};

object VcmdStandbyOff : CommandScript
{
	VcmdStandbyOff()
	{
		SetIcon("standbyoff");
		SetCursor("standbyoff");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true;
 
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true;
 
 		return true;
 	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		v.EnableHeadLights(true);
		v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
		v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
	}
};


```

## VehicleCommand_TrailerAttachDetach.script

```cpp
//**************************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Includes: Trailer commands
//
//	- VcmdGetTrailer
//	- DummyGetTrailer
//	- DummyIsTrailed
//
// Thanks to Nico Bohnsack for his help.
//**************************************************************************************************
// Sponsored by: DDR-MODIFIKATION     | www.ddr-mod.de |    Errors? Contact: Bass-ti@ddr-mod.de ****
//**************************************************************************************************

const char DUMMY_GETTRAIL[] 			= "DummyGetTrailer";
const char DUMMY_ISTRAILED[] 			= "DummyIsTrailed";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[] 			= "DummyPatrol";
const char NAME_TRAILER[] 			= "equipment_trailer";
const char CHILD_TRAILERHOOK[] 		= "trailer_coupling";
const char PATH_PATROL01[] 			= "patrolpath01";
const char PATH_PATROL02[] 			= "patrolpath02";
const char PATH_PATROL03[] 			= "patrolpath03";
const char VO_SQUAD01[]				= "fs_squad01";
const char VO_SQUAD02[]				= "fs_squad02";

int DummyGroup = 30;

object VcmdTrailer : CommandScript
{
	VcmdTrailer()
	{
		SetIcon("trailer");
		SetCursor("trailer");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02))
			return false;

		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid())
			return false;

		Vehicle vCal(Caller);
		if (Caller->GetID() == Target->GetID())
		{
			if (vCal.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
				return true;

			return false;
		}

		if (Target->HasName(NAME_TRAILER))
		{
			GameObject vTar(Target);
			if (!vTar.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED) && !vCal.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
				return true;

			return false;
		}
		
		return false;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.HasObjectPath(PATH_PATROL01) || v.HasObjectPath(PATH_PATROL02) || v.HasObjectPath(PATH_PATROL03))
		{
			Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
		}
		if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
		{
			if (!v.IsChildEnabled(CHILD_TRAILERHOOK))
				v.SetChildEnabled(CHILD_TRAILERHOOK, true);

			Vector TarPos = Target->GetPosition();
			Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, TarPos, true);
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GETTRAIL, Target, 1, false);
		} else
		  {
			Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GETTRAIL, Caller, 2, false);
		  }
	}
};

object DummyGetTrailer : CommandScript
{
	DummyGetTrailer()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			Vehicle vCal(Caller);
			GameObject vTar(Target);
			Vector HookPos = vCal.GetChildPosition(CHILD_TRAILERHOOK);

			float rot[9];
			vCal.GetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);

			vTar.SetPosition(HookPos);
			vTar.SetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);

			int VecID = vCal.GetID();
			vTar.SetUserData(VecID);

			if (!vTar.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
				vTar.AssignCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED);

			if (!vCal.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
				vCal.AssignCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED);


			vCal.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_GETTRAIL, Target, 3, false);
			vCal.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 2.f);
			vCal.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GETTRAIL, Target, 4, false);
			vCal.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GETTRAIL, Target, 5, false);
		}

		if (childID == 2)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			int VecID = v.GetID();
			GameObjectList list = Game::GetGameObjects(NAME_TRAILER);
			for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumObjects(); i++)
			{
				GameObject Trailer = list.GetObject(i);
				if (Trailer.GetUserData() == VecID)
				{
					v.RemoveTrainWaggon(&Trailer);

					int TrailerID = Trailer.GetID();
					Trailer.SetUserData(TrailerID);

					if (Trailer.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
						Trailer.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED);

					if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
						v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED);
				}
			}
		}

		if (childID == 3)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			v.SetCommandable(false);
		}

		if (childID == 4)
		{
			float rot[9];
			Vehicle v(Caller);GameObject obj(Target);
			v.GetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);

			float ident[9];
			Math::EulerToMatrix(0.f, 0.f, 0.f, ident);
			v.SetRotation(ident[0], ident[1], ident[2], ident[3], ident[4], ident[5], ident[6], ident[7], ident[8]);
			obj.SetRotation(ident[0], ident[1], ident[2], ident[3], ident[4], ident[5], ident[6], ident[7], ident[8]);

			Vector HookPos1 = v.GetChildPosition(CHILD_TRAILERHOOK);
			obj.SetPosition(HookPos1);

			v.AddTrainWaggon(&obj);

			v.SetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);
			obj.SetRotation(rot[0], rot[1], rot[2], rot[3], rot[4], rot[5], rot[6], rot[7], rot[8]);

			Vector HookPos2 = v.GetChildPosition(CHILD_TRAILERHOOK);
			obj.SetPosition(HookPos2);
		}

		if (childID == 5)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			v.SetCommandable(true);
		}
	}
};

object DummyIsTrailed : CommandScript
{
	DummyIsTrailed()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return true;
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return true;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}
};
```

## VehicleCommand_TransportToHospital.script

```cpp
/******************************************************************************************
	#Version 1.4#
 	Includes: Hospital command for ambulances.
	- VcmdToHospital
	- DummyAtHospital
	- DummyGoHome

	Script by Hoppah
	Edited by itchyboy for single stretcher script
	Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
/******************************************************************************************/

const char CMD_TOHOSPITAL[]				= "VcmdToHospital";
const char CMD_SIREN[]					= "VcmdSiren";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOn";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF[] 		= "VcmdFloodLightsOff";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON[] 		= "VcmdFloodLightsOn";
const char CMD_TOFIRESTATION[] 			= "VcmdToFireStation";
const char CMD_GOHOME[] 				= "GoHome";
const char CMD_STANDBY_ON[]				= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char DUMMY_DISABLE[] 				= "DummyDisableSiren";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[] 			= "DummyHasSiren";
const char DUMMY_HOSPITAL[] 			= "DummyAtHospital";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[] 				= "DummyPatrol";
const char DUMMY_GOHOME[] 				= "DummyGoHome";
const char DUMMY_VCALLED[]				= "DummyVehicleCalled";
const char DUMMY_GETPAT[] 				= "DummyGetPatientInCar";
const char DUMMY_EQUIPMENT[] 			= "DummyEquipmentCommands";
const char DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK01[]		= "DummyHospitalPark01";
const char DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK02[]		= "DummyHospitalPark02";
const char DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK03[]		= "DummyHospitalPark03";
const char DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK04[]		= "DummyHospitalPark04";
const char DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK05[]		= "DummyHospitalPark05";
const char VO_ENTRANCE[] 				= "hospital_entrance";
const char VO_ENTRY[] 					= "hospital_entry";
const char VO_SQUAD03[]					= "fs_squad03";

const char VO_PARK01[] 				= "hospital_park01";
const char VO_PARK02[] 				= "hospital_park02";
const char VO_PARK03[] 				= "hospital_park03";
const char VO_PARK04[] 				= "hospital_park04";
const char VO_PARK05[] 				= "hospital_park05";

const char HINT_NOTRANSPORTS[] 			= "No transports!";
const char SND_TOSTATION[]				= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/1019.wav";
const char HINT_HELICOPTER[] 			= "Transporting patient to hospital!";
const char HINT_NOTVALID[] 				= "This vehicle doesn't belong in the hospital!";
const char HINT_NOSPACE[] 				= "No space at the hospital ambulance bay, vehicle returns to base!";

const float HOSPITAL_LIGHTS_SIREN_LIFE_LIMIT = 0.50f;

int DummyGroup = 33;

object VcmdToHospital : CommandScript
{
	VcmdToHospital()
	{
		SetCursor("tohospital");
		SetIcon("tohospital");
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;
		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENTRANCE);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() == 0)
			return false;

 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if(v.GetNumPassengers() == 0)
			return false;
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD03))
			return false;
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_ENTRANCE))
			return false;
		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()))
			return false;

 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		SetPriority(0);
		if (v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
			SetPriority(115);

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if (ChildID == 0)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
			PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
			if(v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
			{
				int numMedics = 0;
				for(int i=0; i< passengers.GetNumPersons(); i++)
				{
					Person *p = passengers.GetPerson(i);
					if(p->HasCommand("GetStretcher") && p->HasCommand("lift"))
						numMedics++;
				}
				if(transports.GetNumPersons() > numMedics)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint("Not enough medics on board to unload patients!");
					return;
				}
			}
			if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW) 
			{
				if (transports.GetNumPersons() == 0) 
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTRANSPORTS);
					return;
				}

				int ParkingSlot = getFreeHospitalParking();
				if (ParkingSlot == 0)
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOSPACE);
					return;
				}
				assignHospitalParking(v, ParkingSlot);
				Vector Hospital = getHospitalParkingPosition(ParkingSlot);
				Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, Hospital);

				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				} 
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL))
					Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
				bool CriticalTransport = needsHospitalLightsAndSirens(transports);
				if (CriticalTransport) 
				{
					if (!v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF))
						Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_SIREN, &v, &v);
				}
				else
				{
					if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN))
						Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_DISABLE, &v, &v);
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				}
				if (transports.GetNumPersons() > 0)
				{
					Caller->PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, Hospital);
					if (CriticalTransport && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF))
						Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_DISABLE, Caller, 2, false);
					Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
					Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_HOSPITAL, Caller, 0, false);
				} else
				{
					Mission::PlayHint(HINT_NOTRANSPORTS);
					return;
				}
			} else
			{
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_TOSTATION, Caller->GetPosition());
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors("hospital_helipad");
				if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				{
					Actor hospital = *l1.GetActor(0);
					Vector Hospital = hospital.GetPosition();
				}
				if (Game::IsSquadInVirtualObject("hospital_heli"))
				{
					GameObjectList l2;
					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject("hospital_heli", l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					for (int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
					{
						Vehicle m = l2.GetObject(i);
						m.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_GOHOME, &m, 2, false);
						Mission::PlayHint(HINT_HELICOPTER);					
					}
				}
				Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, Hospital);
				GameObject obj(&hospital);
				float landingDirection = v.GetValidLandingAngle(&obj, Hospital);
				Caller->PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Hospital, true, landingDirection);
				Caller->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.0f);
				PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
				if (transports.GetNumPersons() > 0)
					Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_HOSPITAL, Caller, 0, false);
			}
		}
		if (ChildID == 1)
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			bool ParkinglotFound = false;
			ActorList l1;
			if (!ParkinglotFound)
			{
				GameObjectList l2;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK01, l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if(l2.GetNumObjects() == 0)
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK01);
					ParkinglotFound = true;
				}
			}
			if (!ParkinglotFound)
			{
				GameObjectList l3;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK02, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if(l3.GetNumObjects() == 0)
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK02);
					ParkinglotFound = true;
				}
			}
			if (!ParkinglotFound)
			{
				GameObjectList l4;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK03, l4, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if(l4.GetNumObjects() == 0)
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK03);
					ParkinglotFound = true;
				}
			}
			if (!ParkinglotFound)
			{
				GameObjectList l5;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK04, l5, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if (!l5.ContainsSquad())
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK04);
					ParkinglotFound = true;
				}
			}
			if (!ParkinglotFound)
			{
				GameObjectList l6;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK05, l6, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if (!l6.ContainsSquad())
				{
					l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK05);
					ParkinglotFound = true;
				}
			}
			if (!ParkinglotFound)
			{
				if (v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
					Caller->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_HOSPITAL, Caller, 0, false);		//if no space at the 5 bays, just unload directly
			}
			else
			{
				Vector Pos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition() + Vector(0,30,0);
				v.SetPosition(Pos);
				v.SetLookatDir(0,1,0);
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_HOSPITAL, &v, 0, false);		//unload patient
			}
		}
		if (ChildID == 2)		//optional
		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
			v.EnableHeadLights(false);
			bool repeatCommand = false;
			if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK01))
			{
				GameObjectList l1;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK01, l1, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if (l1.GetNumObjects() == 1)
					return;
				else
					repeatCommand = true;
			}
			else if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK02))
			{
				GameObjectList l2;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK02, l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if (l2.GetNumObjects() == 1)
					return;
				else
					repeatCommand = true;
			}
			else if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK03))
			{
				GameObjectList l3;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK03, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if (l3.GetNumObjects() == 1)
					return;
				else
					repeatCommand = true;
			}
			else if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK04))
			{
				GameObjectList l4;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK04, l4, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if (l4.GetNumObjects() == 1)
					return;
				else
					repeatCommand = true;
			}
			else if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK05))
			{
				GameObjectList l5;
				Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK05, l5, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
				if (l5.GetNumObjects() == 1)
					return;
				else
					repeatCommand = true;
			}
			if(repeatCommand)
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CMD_TOHOSPITAL, &v, 1, false);
		}
	}

	int getFreeHospitalParking()
	{
		if (isHospitalParkingFree(VO_PARK01, DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK01))
			return 1;
		if (isHospitalParkingFree(VO_PARK02, DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK02))
			return 2;
		if (isHospitalParkingFree(VO_PARK03, DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK03))
			return 3;
		if (isHospitalParkingFree(VO_PARK04, DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK04))
			return 4;
		if (isHospitalParkingFree(VO_PARK05, DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK05))
			return 5;
		return 0;
	}

	bool isHospitalParkingFree(const char *ParkingVO, const char *ParkingCommand)
	{
		GameObjectList obstacles;
		Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(ParkingVO, obstacles, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		if (obstacles.ContainsSquad())
			return false;

		VehicleList vehicles(VT_NOSQUAD, VT_ALL_SQUAD_VEHICLES);
		for (int i = 0; i < vehicles.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
		{
			Vehicle v(vehicles.GetVehicle(i));
			if (v.IsValid() && v.HasCommand(ParkingCommand))
				return false;
		}
		return true;
	}

	bool needsHospitalLightsAndSirens(PersonList transports)
	{
		for (int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person p(transports.GetPerson(i));
			if (p.IsValid() && p.GetLife() < HOSPITAL_LIGHTS_SIREN_LIFE_LIMIT * p.GetMaxLife())
				return true;
		}
		return false;
	}

	Vector getHospitalParkingPosition(int ParkingSlot)
	{
		ActorList l1;
		if (ParkingSlot == 1)
			l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK01);
		else if (ParkingSlot == 2)
			l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK02);
		else if (ParkingSlot == 3)
			l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK03);
		else if (ParkingSlot == 4)
			l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK04);
		else
			l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK05);

		if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
			return l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition() + Vector(0.f, 30.f, 0.f);

		ActorList entrance = Game::GetActors(VO_ENTRANCE);
		if (entrance.GetNumActors() > 0)
			return entrance.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
		return Vector(0.f, 0.f, 0.f);
	}

	void assignHospitalParking(Vehicle v, int ParkingSlot)
	{
		clearHospitalParking(v);
		if (ParkingSlot == 1)
			v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK01);
		else if (ParkingSlot == 2)
			v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK02);
		else if (ParkingSlot == 3)
			v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK03);
		else if (ParkingSlot == 4)
			v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK04);
		else if (ParkingSlot == 5)
			v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK05);
	}

	void clearHospitalParking(Vehicle v)
	{
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK01))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK01);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK02))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK02);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK03))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK03);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK04))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK04);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK05))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK05);
	}
};

object DummyAtHospital : CommandScript
{
	DummyAtHospital()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if(ChildID == 0) //General for all ambulances with patients
		{
			if(v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
			{
				bool medicFound = false;
				PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
				for(int i=0; i < passengers.GetNumPersons() && !medicFound; i++)
				{
					Person *p = passengers.GetPerson(i);
					if(p->HasCommand("GetStretcher") && p->HasCommand("lift"))
					{
						Vector pos = Caller->GetTargetPoint(Caller, TARGET_REARDOOR);
						p->SetCommandable(false);
						p->PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, Caller);
						if(p->IsEquipped())
						{
							p->RemoveEquipment();
							p->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyEquipmentCommands", p, 10, false);
						}
						p->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, pos);
						p->PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, Caller);
						p->PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyAtHospital", Caller, 1, false); //function call for get patient from ambulance
						medicFound = true;
					}
				}
			}
		}
		if(ChildID == 1) //get patient from ambulance
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			if(v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
			{
				bool transportFound = false;
				PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
				for(int i=0; i < transports.GetNumPersons() && !transportFound; i++)
				{
					if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RTW || v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_ITW)
					{
						ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENTRY);
						if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
						Vector TargetPos  = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
					}
					else if (v.GetVehicleType() == VT_AMBULANCE_RHC)
					{
						ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors("hospital_heli_entry");
						if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
						Vector TargetPos  = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
					}

					Person pat = transports.GetPerson(i);
					v.RemoveTransport(&pat);
					pat.SetFlag(OF_HIDDEN);
					p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher_patient", true);
					p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos);
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyAtHospital", &pat, 2, false);
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyAtHospital", &v, 3, false);
					transportFound = true;
				}
			} else
				p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyAtHospital", &v, 4, false);
		}
		if(ChildID == 2) //revive patient and put in base
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Person pat(Target);
			Vector newPos = p.GetPosition();
			pat.SetPosition(newPos);
			pat.Revive();
			p.PushActionLinkPerson(ACTION_APPEND, &pat);
		}
		if(ChildID == 3) //set paramedic to have stretcher with patient
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			p.SetUserData(0);
			p.PushActionPutInBase(ACTION_APPEND);
			p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher", true);
			p.SetChildEnabled("stretcher_patient", false);
			p.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 3.0f);
			p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, &v, TARGET_REARDOOR);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "DummyAtHospital", &v, 1, false);
		}
		if(ChildID == 4)	//return stretcher to vehicle, vehicle returns to base
		{
			Person p(Caller);
			Vehicle v(Target);
			p.SetCommandable(true);
			p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "ReturnStretcher", &v, 1, false);
			if (v.GetFreePassengers() > 0)
			{
				p.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, v.GetTargetPoint(&p, TARGET_PASSENGERDOOR));
				p.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
				p.PushActionEnterCar(ACTION_APPEND, &v);
				if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/bcfd_ambulance01.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/topkick_ambulance.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/ambulance03.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/Medic 4.e4p") == 0 ||
				StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/Medic 5.e4p") == 0)
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_GOHOME, &v, 2, false);
				else
					p.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, "GoHome", &v, 0, false);
			}
		}
	}
};

object DummyGoHome : CommandScript
{
	DummyGoHome()
	{
		SetGroupID(20);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Target); //Go home off map
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK01))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK01);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK02))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK02);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK03))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK03);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK04))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK04);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK05))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_HOSPITAL_PARK05);

		if(ChildID == 1)
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_GOHOME, &v, &v);
		else if(ChildID == 2)
			Game::ExecuteCommand(CMD_TOFIRESTATION, &v, &v);

		PersonList passengers = v.GetPassengers();
		for(int i=0; i < passengers.GetNumPersons(); i++)
		{
			Person *p = passengers.GetPerson(i);
			p->SetUserData(0);
		}
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED))
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_VCALLED);
	}
};

object DummyHospitalPark01 : CommandScript
{
	DummyHospitalPark01() { SetGroupID(DummyGroup); }
	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller) { return false; }
};

```

## VehicleCommand_TransportToPoliceStation.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.5#
//
// 		Includes: To police station command.
//
//	- VcmdToPoliceStation
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_SIREN[]				= "VcmdSiren";
const char CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF[]			= "VcmdAutoSirenOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOff";
const char CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON[] 		= "VcmdWarningLightsOn";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF[] 		= "VcmdFloodLightsOff";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON[] 		= "VcmdFloodLightsOn";
const char CMD_GOHOME[] 			= "GoHome";
const char CMD_TOPOLICESTATION[] 		= "VcmdToPoliceStation";
const char CMD_PATROL[] 			= "VcmdPatrol";
const char CMD_STANDBY_ON[]			= "VcmdStandbyOn";
const char CMD_STANDBY_OFF[]			= "VcmdStandbyOff";
const char DUMMY_DISABLE[] 			= "DummyDisableSiren";
const char DUMMY_HASSIREN[] 			= "DummyHasSiren";
const char DUMMY_GOHOME[] 			= "DummyGoHome";
const char DUMMY_PATROL[] 			= "DummyPatrol";
const char OBJ_HELIPAD[] 			= "policestation_helipad";
const char VO_ENTRY[] 				= "policestation_entry";
const char VO_ENTRY_HELIPAD[] 			= "policestation_entry2";
const char VO_TURNTO[] 				= "policestation_turnto";
const char VO_PARK01[] 				= "policestation_park01";
const char VO_PARK02[] 				= "policestation_park02";
const char VO_PARK03[] 				= "policestation_park03";
const char VO_PARK04[] 				= "policestation_park97";
const char VO_PARK05[] 				= "policestation_park98";
const char VO_PARK06[] 				= "policestation_park99";
const char VO_HELI[] 				= "policestation_heli";
const char VO_SPAWN[] 				= "policestation_spawn";
const char SND_TOSTATION[]			= "mod:Audio/FX/radio/1019.wav";
const char HINT_HELICOPTER[] 			= "Another helicopter is blocking the helipad! The helicopter will return to base!";
const char PROTO_CV_LAPD[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/03 LA Police/cv_lapd.e4p";

int DummyGroup = 32;

object VcmdToPoliceStation : CommandScript
{
	VcmdToPoliceStation()
	{
		SetCursor("topolicestation");
		SetIcon("topolicestation");
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid())
			return false;

		if (!Game::IsFreeplay() && !Game::IsMultiplayer())
			return false;

 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_HELI))
			return false;

		ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK01);
		if (l1.GetNumActors() == 0)
			return false;

		return true;
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || (Caller->GetID() != Target->GetID()))
			return false;

 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		SetPriority(0);
		if (v.GetNumTransported() > 0)
			SetPriority(110);

		return true;
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		bool Donut = false;
		ActorList d = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK04);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_CV_LAPD) == 0 && d.GetNumActors() > 0)
			Donut = true;

		if(ChildID == 0)
		{
			if (v.GetVehicleType() != VT_POLICE_PHC) 
			{
				if (v.IsBlueLightEnabled())
					v.EnableBlueLights(false);
				if (v.HasCommand("DummyFollow"))
					v.RemoveCommand("DummyFollow");
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF))
				{
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_STANDBY_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_STANDBY_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_WARNINGLIGHTS_ON);
				} 
				if (v.HasCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF))
				{
					v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
					v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
					v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
				}
				if (v.HasObjectPath(NULL))
					Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_PATROL, &v, &v);
				if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_HASSIREN) && v.HasCommand(CMD_AUTOSIREN_OFF))
					Game::ExecuteCommand(DUMMY_DISABLE, &v, &v);

				bool ParkinglotFound = false;
				bool ToDonut = false;
				ActorList l1;
				if (!ParkinglotFound)
				{
					GameObjectList l2;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK01, l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l2.GetNumObjects() == 0)
					{
						l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK01);
						ParkinglotFound = true;
					}
				}
				if (!ParkinglotFound)
				{
					GameObjectList l3;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK02, l3, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l3.GetNumObjects() == 0)
					{
						l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK02);
						ParkinglotFound = true;
					}
				}
				if (!ParkinglotFound)
				{
					GameObjectList l4;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK03, l4, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if(l4.GetNumObjects() == 0)
					{
						l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK03);
						ParkinglotFound = true;
					}
				}
				if (Donut && !ParkinglotFound)
				{
					GameObjectList l5;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK04, l5, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if (!l5.ContainsSquad())
					{
						l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK04);
						ParkinglotFound = true;
						ToDonut = true;
					}
				}
				if (Donut && !ParkinglotFound)
				{
					GameObjectList l6;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_PARK05, l6, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					if (!l6.ContainsSquad())
					{
						l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_PARK05);
						ParkinglotFound = true;
						ToDonut = true;
					}
				}

				if (!ParkinglotFound)
				{
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CMD_PATROL, Caller, 0, false);
					return;
				}				
				else
				{
					Vector PD = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
					Vector PD2 = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition() + Vector(280,-280,0);

					ActorList l8 = Game::GetActors(VO_TURNTO);
					Vector TurnTo = l8.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();

					Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, PD);
					Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_TOSTATION, v.GetPosition());

					if (!ToDonut)
					{
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, PD);
						v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, TurnTo);
					} else
					{
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_NEWLIST, PD2);
						v.PushActionTurnTo(ACTION_APPEND, PD + Vector(320,-320,0));
						v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
						v.PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, PD);
					}
					v.PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 1.5f);
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_TOPOLICESTATION, Caller, 2, false);
					PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
					if (!ToDonut && transports.GetNumPersons() > 0)
						v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_TOPOLICESTATION, Caller, 1, false);
				}
			} else
			{
				Audio::PlaySample3D(SND_TOSTATION, v.GetPosition());
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(OBJ_HELIPAD);
				if(l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
				{
					Actor policestation = *l1.GetActor(0);
					Vector Policestation = policestation.GetPosition();
				}
				if (Game::IsSquadInVirtualObject(VO_HELI))
				{
					GameObjectList l2;
 					Game::CollectObstaclesOnVirtualObject(VO_HELI, l2, ACTOR_VEHICLE);
					for (int i = 0; i < l2.GetNumObjects(); i++)
					{
						Vehicle m = l2.GetObject(i);
						m.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, DUMMY_GOHOME, &m, 1, false);
						Mission::PlayHint(HINT_HELICOPTER);					
					}
				}
				Game::FindFreePosition(Caller, Policestation);
				GameObject obj(&policestation);
				float landingDirection = v.GetValidLandingAngle(&obj, Policestation);
				v.PushActionFlyTo(ACTION_NEWLIST, Policestation, true, landingDirection);
				PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
				if (transports.GetNumPersons() > 0)
					v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, CMD_TOPOLICESTATION, Caller, 1, false);
			}
		}
		if(ChildID == 1)
		{
			if (v.GetVehicleType() != VT_POLICE_PHC)
			{
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_SPAWN);
        			if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
					Vector TargetPos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
				for(int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
				{
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, Caller);
					if(transports.GetPerson(i)->GetRole() == ROLE_GANGSTER)
					{
						transports.GetPerson(i)->SetRole(ROLE_CIVILIAN);
						transports.GetPerson(i)->SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_CIVILIAN_NORMAL);
					}
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos, true);
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			} else
			{
				ActorList l1 = Game::GetActors(VO_ENTRY_HELIPAD);
        			if (l1.GetNumActors() > 0)
					Vector TargetPos = l1.GetActor(0)->GetPosition();
				PersonList transports = v.GetTransports();
				for(int i = 0; i < transports.GetNumPersons(); i++)
				{
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionLeaveCar(ACTION_NEWLIST, Caller);
					if(transports.GetPerson(i)->GetRole() == ROLE_GANGSTER)
					{
						transports.GetPerson(i)->SetRole(ROLE_CIVILIAN);
						transports.GetPerson(i)->SetBehaviour(BEHAVIOUR_CIVILIAN_NORMAL);
					}
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionWait(ACTION_APPEND, 0.5f);
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionMove(ACTION_APPEND, TargetPos, true);
					transports.GetPerson(i)->PushActionDeleteOwner(ACTION_APPEND);
				}
			}
		}
		if(ChildID == 2)
		{
 			Vehicle v(Caller);
 			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
			bool ToPoliceStation = false;
			if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK01))
				return;
			else
				ToPoliceStation = true;
			if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK02))
				return;
			else
				ToPoliceStation = true;
			if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK03))
				return;
			else
				ToPoliceStation = true;
			if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK04))
				return;
			else
				ToPoliceStation = true;
			if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_PARK05))
				return;
			else
				ToPoliceStation = true;

			if(ToPoliceStation)
				v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_NEWLIST, CMD_TOPOLICESTATION, Caller, 0, false);
		}
	}
};

```

## VehicleCommand_VehicleFloodLights.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.5#
//
// 		Includes: All Flood Lights commands
//
//	- VcmdFloodLightsOn
//	- VcmdFloodLightsOff
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON[]			= "VcmdFloodLightsOn";
const char CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF[]		= "VcmdFloodLightsOff";
const char CMD_MCU_DEINSTALL[]			= "VcmdMCUDeinstall";
const char PROTO_HAZMAT[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/hazmat_squad.e4p";
const char PROTO_USAR[] 			= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/Special 1157.e4p";
const char PROTO_MCU[] 				= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/01 LA Ambulance/mass_casualty_unit.e4p";
const char DUMMY_LIGHTS[] 			= "DummyLights";
const char VO_SQUAD01[]				= "Unnamed";
const char VO_SQUAD02[]				= "Unnamed";

int DummyGroup = 27;

object VcmdFloodLightsOn : CommandScript
{
 	VcmdFloodLightsOn()
 	{
 		SetIcon("floodlightson");
 		SetCursor("lighton");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
 		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(-10);
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 		{
			Vehicle v(Caller);
			if (v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD01) || v.IsCollidingWithVirtualObject(VO_SQUAD02))
				return false;
 			return true;
 		}
 
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true; 
 		return true;
 	}
 
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		Vehicle v(Caller);
  		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_HAZMAT) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_USAR) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_MCU) == 0)
		{
			v.SetCommandable(false);
			if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_MCU) == 0 && v.HasCommand(CMD_MCU_DEINSTALL))
				v.SetAnimation("Light_onI");
			else
				v.SetAnimation("Light_on");
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 2.5f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_LIGHTS, Caller, 1, false);
		} else
		{
			v.EnableSpecialLights(true);
		}
		v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF); 
		v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON);
 	}	
};

object VcmdFloodLightsOff : CommandScript
{
 	VcmdFloodLightsOff()
 	{
 		SetIcon("floodlightsoff");
 		SetCursor("lightoff");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
 		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetPriority(-10);
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true;
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true;
 		return true;
 	}
 
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		Vehicle v(Caller);
  		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_HAZMAT) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_USAR) == 0 || StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_MCU) == 0)
		{
			v.PushActionWait(ACTION_NEWLIST, 1.0f);
			v.PushActionExecuteCommand(ACTION_APPEND, DUMMY_LIGHTS, Caller, 2, false);
		}
		v.EnableSpecialLights(false);
		v.AssignCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_ON); 
		v.RemoveCommand(CMD_FLOODLIGHTS_OFF);
 	}	
};

object DummyLights : CommandScript
{
	DummyLights()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (childID == 1)
		{
			v.SetCommandable(true);
			v.EnableSpecialLights(true);
		}
		if (childID == 2)
		{
			if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), PROTO_MCU) == 0 && v.HasCommand(CMD_MCU_DEINSTALL))
				v.SetAnimation("Light_offI");
			else
				v.SetAnimation("Light_off");
		}
	}
};
```

## VehicleCommand_WarningLights.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Includes: All Warninglights commands
//
//	- VcmdWarningLightsOn
//	- DummyHasWarningLights
//
//		Script by Hoppah
//		
//		Usage of this script in other mods is NOT allowed without permission of Hoppah
//
//******************************************************************************************

const char DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS[]		= "DummyHasWarningLights";
const char OBJ_TILLER[]					= "mod:Prototypes/Vehicles/02 LA Fire Department/tiller_cabin.e4p";
const char DUMMY_ISTRAILED[] 			= "DummyIsTrailed";

int DummyGroup = 25;
 
object VcmdWarningLightsOn : CommandScript
{
	VcmdWarningLightsOn()
 	{
 		SetIcon("warningon");
 		SetCursor("warningon");
 		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
 		SetGroupLeader(true);
 		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
 	}
 
 	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid())
 			return false;

		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
			SetIcon("warningoff");
		else
			SetIcon("warningon");
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true;
 
 		return false;
 	}
 
 	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		if (!Caller->IsValid() || !Target->IsValid() || Target->GetID() != Caller->GetID())
 			return false;
 
 		if (Caller->GetType() == ACTOR_VEHICLE)
 			return true;
 
 		return true;
 	}
 
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
 	{
 		Vehicle v(Caller);
		if (StrCompare(v.GetPrototypeFileName(), OBJ_TILLER) == 0 && v.HasCommand(DUMMY_ISTRAILED))
		{
			int VecID = v.GetID();
			if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
			{
				v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
				v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS); 
				VehicleList list(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW);
				for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
				{
					Vehicle *c = list.GetVehicle(i);
					if(c->GetUserData() == VecID)
					{
						System::Log("Vehicle flashinglights found");
						if (c->HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
						{
							c->EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
							c->RemoveCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS); 
						}
					}
				}
			} else
			{
				v.EnableBlinker(BLT_BOTH);
				v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS);
				VehicleList list(VT_FIREFIGHTERS_DLK, VT_FIREFIGHTERS_RW);
				for(int i = 0; i < list.GetNumVehicles(); i++)
				{
					Vehicle *c = list.GetVehicle(i);
					if(c->GetUserData() == VecID)
					{
						System::Log("Vehicle flashinglights found");
						if (!c->HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
						{
							c->EnableBlinker(BLT_BOTH);
							c->AssignCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS); 
						}
					}
				}			
			}
		} 
		else if (v.HasCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS))
		{
			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_NONE);
			v.RemoveCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS); 
		} else
		{
			v.EnableBlinker(BLT_BOTH);
			v.AssignCommand(DUMMY_WARNINGLIGHTS);
		}
	}	
};

object DummyHasWarningLights : CommandScript
{
	DummyHasWarningLights()
	{
		SetGroupID(DummyGroup);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}

	bool CheckPossible(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		return false;
	}
 
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
		return false;
	}
 
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int childID)
	{
	}
};
```

## WaterOff.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - Priority lowered.
//
//******************************************************************************************

object WaterOff : CommandScript
{
	WaterOff()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_CANNON_WAW);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(90);
	}
	
	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		return Caller->IsWaterCannonActive();
	}

	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if(Caller && Target && Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID())
			return Caller->IsWaterCannonActive();
		
		return false;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Caller->PushActionWaterOff(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}
};

```

## WaterOn.script

```cpp
//******************************************************************************************
// #Version 1.1#
//
// 		Changes: - Priority lowered.
//
//******************************************************************************************

object WaterOn : CommandScript
{
	WaterOn()
	{
		SetValidTargets(ACTOR_VEHICLE);
		SetDoubleClickable(true);
		SetGroupID(CGROUP_CANNON_WAW);
		SetGroupLeader(true);
		SetRestrictions(RESTRICT_SELFEXECUTE);
		SetDeselectCaller(false);
		SetPriority(90);
	}

	bool CheckGroupVisibility(GameObject *Caller)
	{
		if(!Caller->IsValid() || Caller->GetType() != ACTOR_VEHICLE)
			return false;
		return !Caller->IsWaterCannonActive();
	}
	
	bool CheckTarget(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		if(Caller && Target && Caller->GetID()==Target->GetID())
			return !Caller->IsWaterCannonActive();
		
		return false;
	}
	
	void PushActions(GameObject *Caller, Actor *Target, int ChildID)
	{
		Caller->PushActionWaterOn(ACTION_NEWLIST);
	}
};

```
